[ 2 ] The rank of a marine officer who commands a ship would not necessarily be "Captain". It may be higher (up to Fleet Admiral ), or lower on small ships. By naval custom, any officer who is below the rank of Captain and commands a ship is addressed as "captain" while aboard that ship. The ship's captain also may be referred to as the Skipper.

name: Caribou Pirates
intro_text: Caribou Pirates Statistics Japanese Name: カリブー海賊団 Romanized Name: Karibū Kaizokudan Official English Name: Caribou Pirates First Appearance: Chapter 600 ; Episode 519 [ 1 ] Captain: Caribou and Coribou Main Ship: Small rowboat; Newly built unnamed ship (destroyed); Numabou (destroyed) Total Bounty: At least 400,000,000 [ bounty 1 ] The Caribou Pirates are a crew who arrived at Sabaody Archipelago around the same time as the Straw Hats were reuniting. Their captains are the brothers Caribou and Coribou , which temporarily changed to Demalo Black when they joined the Fake Straw Hat Crew , under the belief they were real until the truth was disclosed. [ 1 ]

name: Carmel
occupation: Child Trafficker; Caretaker of Sheep's House
alias: Mother Carmel ( マザー・カルメル , Mazā Karumeru ? ) ; "Sister Carmel" ( シスター・カルメル , Shisutā Karumeru ? ) ; "Mountain Witch" ( 山姥 , Yamanba ? , Viz: "Mountain Hag")
epithet: "Holy Mother" ( 聖母 , Seibo ? )
intro_text: Mother Carmel was a child trafficker dealing in orphans, that operated in the Underworld several decades ago, under the code name of "Mountain Witch" . Running an orphanage known as the " Sheep's House ", her seemingly benevolent nature caused her to be known as the "Holy Mother" . [ 3 ] In reality, she sold her orphan wards to the World Government every two years to be trained as Marines or Cipher Pol agents, [ 2 ] until she met her end 62 years ago. [ 7 ] Notably, she took care of a young Charlotte Linlin , who would later go on to become the Emperor Big Mom. [ 8 ]

name: Carina
first_appearance: Chapter 829 cover; Heart of Gold ; Movie 13
epithet: "Phantom Thief" ( 怪盗 , Kaitō ? ) "Vixen" ( 女狐 , Megitsune ? , Funimation: "Hellcat")
intro_text: "Phantom Thief" Carina is a character who appears in Heart of Gold and One Piece Film: Gold . [ 5 ] She is a thief who formerly worked as a songstress in Gran Tesoro , plotting to steal its riches. After helping the Straw Hat Pirates overthrow Gild Tesoro , Carina took command of Gran Tesoro. [ 3 ]

name: Carne
intro_text: Carne is one of the main cooks at the Baratie , currently serving as the restaurant's head charcutier .

name: Catacombo
intro_text: Rear Admiral Catacombo [ 4 ] is a Marine officer who led a team to capture the Straw Hat Pirates . [ 1 ] Non-canonically , he is the Base Commander of the GR 66 Marine Base on the Sabaody Archipelago . [ 2 ]

name: Carrot
affiliation: Mokomo Dukedom , Inuarashi Musketeer Squad ; Ninja-Pirate-Mink-Samurai Alliance (disbanded)
occupation: Ruler of Mokomo Dukedom; Musketeer (former); Kingsbird (former)
intro_text: Carrot is a rabbit mink , the current ruler of the Mokomo Dukedom , [ 7 ] [ 3 ] and a former member of the Kingsbirds [ 4 ] and Inuarashi Musketeer Squad . [ 2 ] She was trained by Pedro , whose will she carries on. She is an ally of the Straw Hat Pirates during the Whole Cake Island Saga and Wano Country Arc , where she joined the Sanji Retrieval Team to rescue Sanji on Whole Cake Island [ 8 ] and participated in the Raid on Onigashima .

name: Caribou
affiliation: Caribou Pirates ; Fake Straw Hat Crew (former, temporary); Ninja-Pirate-Mink-Samurai Alliance (disbanded)
epithet: "Wet-Haired Caribou" ( 濡れ髪のカリブー , Nuregami no Karibū ? )
intro_text: "Wet-Haired Caribou" [ 1 ] [ 7 ] is an infamous rookie pirate who was at the Sabaody Archipelago around the time of the Straw Hat Pirates ' reunion. He has earned a bounty of 210,000,000, making him part of the new generation of rookie pirates with bounties over 100,000,000. [ 2 ] A fierce admirer of the Emperor Marshall D. Teach , Caribou dreams of becoming part of the Blackbeard Pirates . [ 8 ] He is the big brother of "Blood Splatterer" Coribou , another infamous rookie, and the two of them are co-captains of the Caribou Pirates . Both brothers gained their reputations for killing Marines . As both of them have bounties over 70,000,000, they both fulfilled the requirement of the Fake Straw Hat Crew , [ 3 ] but they left upon discovering the crew's fraudulence. He is a minor antagonist during the Fish-Man Island Saga , and the central character of the Caribou's Kehihihihi in the New World cover story. Later, he became an ally of the Ninja-Pirate-Mink-Samurai Alliance during the Wano Country Arc . After the successful raid on Onigashima , Luffy let Caribou hitch a ride on the Thousand Sunny with the Straw Hats to Egghead , where Caribou was taken in by the Blackbeard Pirates for information on the whereabouts of the Ancient Weapons .

name: Catarina Devon
occupation: Titanic Captain (Captain of the Sixth Ship); Prisoner of the Great Prison (former)
epithet: "Crescent Moon Hunter" ( 若月狩り , Mikazuki-gari ? )
devil_fruit_name: Inu Inu no Mi, Model: Kyubi no Kitsune
devil_fruit_english_name: Dog-Dog Fruit, Model: Nine Tailed Fox
intro_text: Catarina Devon , [ 7 ] known as the "Crescent Moon Hunter" , is one of Ten Titanic Captains of the Blackbeard Pirates , serving as captain of the sixth ship of the fleet . [ 3 ] She is regarded as the worst female pirate in history and was one of the most dangerous criminals ever to be imprisoned within Impel Down until she was freed and recruited by Marshall D. Teach . [ 2 ] Due to her actions and role, she is a supporting antagonist in the Marineford Arc , a minor antagonist in the Egghead Arc and a major antagonist in the Final Saga .

name: Caesar Clown
affiliation: NEO MADS ; Donquixote Pirates (former); Marines (former); MADS (former)
alias: "Cedar" ( シーダー , Shīdā ? ) "'Gangster' Gastino" ( “ギャングスター”ガスティーノ , Gyangusutā Gasutīno ? )
epithet: "Master" ( M , Masutā ? )
intro_text: Caesar Clown , [ 5 ] who was referred to as " Master " by his subordinates, [ 1 ] is a scientist , the leading expert on chemical weapons of mass destruction, [ 5 ] and one of the co-founders of NEO MADS . [ 2 ] Caesar is a former colleague of Vegapunk , having worked with him both in MADS [ 5 ] [ 13 ] and later the World Government research facility on Punk Hazard , [ 5 ] [ 6 ] an island that Caesar went on to devastate with a toxic gas explosion , [ 14 ] earning him a bounty of 300,000,000. [ 11 ] Years later, Caesar returned to the island in secret to continue his illegal experiments [ 5 ] until his defeat at the hands of the Straw Hat Pirates and Trafalgar Law . [ 15 ] One of his projects was the production of SAD , a chemical that he supplied to the Warlord Donquixote Doflamingo to be used in the manufacturing of SMILEs , artificial Devil Fruits which were sold to the Emperor Kaidou to help create an army of Zoans . [ 16 ] After a period as a hostage of the Straw Hat- Heart Pirate Alliance , he fell into the custody of Big Mom on Whole Cake Island . [ 17 ] There, Caesar was liberated by the Fire Tank Pirates and forced to take part in an assassination attempt against Big Mom. [ 18 ] Following the plan's failure, Caesar finally parted ways with his former captors [ 19 ] and escaped with the Vinsmoke Family to the Germa Kingdom , [ 20 ] where he would establish NEO MADS with fellow ex-MADS member Vinsmoke Judge . [ 2 ] Caesar is the main antagonist of the Punk Hazard Arc and a reluctant ally of the Straw Hat Pirates during the Dressrosa Arc , Zou Arc , and Whole Cake Island Arc . He is also a major character in Germa 66's Ahh... An Emotionless Excursion Cover Page Serial.

name: Caucasusman
intro_text: Caucasusman [ 3 ] is a Gifter in the Beasts Pirates ' Armored Division. During the Raid on Onigashima , he was tamed by the power of the Kibi Kibi no Mi and joined the side of the Ninja-Pirate-Mink-Samurai Alliance . [ 2 ]

name: Cavendish
affiliation: Beautiful Pirates ; Straw Hat Grand Fleet ; Bourgeois Kingdom
occupation: Captain of the First Ship of the Straw Hat Grand Fleet ; Pirate Captain ; Prince of the Bourgeois Kingdom (former)
alias: Hakuba ( ハクバ , Hakuba ? )
epithet: "Cavendish of the White Horse" ( 白馬のキャベンディッシュ , Hakuba no Kyabendisshu ? , VIZ: "White Knight Cavendish") ; "Pirate Prince" ( 海賊貴公子 , Kaizoku Kikōshi ? , VIZ: "Pirate Noble"; Funimation: "Pirate Nobleman")
intro_text: Cavendish of the White Horse , also known as the " Pirate Prince ", is a famous Super Rookie and the captain of the Beautiful Pirates . He joined as a gladiator at the Corrida Colosseum to compete for the Mera Mera no Mi . [ 1 ] After the final battle against Donquixote Doflamingo , Cavendish decided to pledge his loyalty to Monkey D. Luffy and became the captain of the first ship of the Straw Hat Grand Fleet . [ 4 ] He was formerly the prince of the Bourgeois Kingdom before he was exiled. [ 5 ] He also suffers from a split personality, changing into a bloodthirsty lunatic known as Hakuba when his dominant personality sleeps. [ 7 ] While initially antagonistic, he later becomes an ally of Luffy during the Dressrosa Arc , and one of the central characters from The Stories of the Self-Proclaimed Straw Hat Grand Fleet Cover Page Serial.

name: Cezar
intro_text: Cezar [ 3 ] is the recently-crowned king of the Ilisia Kingdom and one of fifty monarchs who took part in the Levely . [ 2 ]

name: Cerberus
intro_text: Cerberus is Figarland Shamrock 's sword , which has been animated by a Mythical Zoan -type Devil Fruit , allowing it to take the form of a monstrous, three-headed dog. [ 2 ]

name: Chap
intro_text: Chap [ 3 ] is the king of the Deul Kingdom ( ドイル王国 , Doiru Ōkoku ? ) in the North Blue and one of fifty monarchs who took part in the Levely . [ 2 ] [ 3 ]

name: Chao
affiliation: Tontatta Kingdom ; SMILE Factory (former); Tontatta Pirates
intro_text: Chao is a dwarf from the Tontatta Kingdom who was enslaved in the SMILE Factory . [ 1 ]

name: Chaka
epithet: "Chaka the Jackal" ( ジャッカルのチャカ , Jakkaru no Chaka ? )
devil_fruit_name: Inu Inu no Mi, Model: Jackal
devil_fruit_english_name: Dog-Dog Fruit, Model: Jackal (Funimation); Mutt Mutt Fruit: Jackal Mode (Viz); Mutt-Mutt Fruit: Jackal Strike (4Kids)
intro_text: Chaka the Jackal [ 3 ] is one of two head guards in the Arabasta kingdom who serves under Igaram , alongside Pell . [ 2 ] Chaka was the acting captain of the royal guard in Igaram's absence.

name: Chappe
epithet: "Rope-Tugging" Chappe ( 縄引きのチャッペ , Nawahiki no Chappe ? )
intro_text: "Rope-Tugging" Chappe is an ex-prisoner and former member of the Centaur Patrol Unit under Brownbeard , having served as one of Caesar Clown ’s henchmen. He was first seen fighting against the Marines of G-5 on Punk Hazard . [ 1 ]

name: Chabo
intro_text: Chabo is a young boy from Gosa Village . [ 1 ] He works for Nojiko on her mikan farm. [ 2 ]

name: Charlotte Anana
japanese_name: シャーロット・アナナ
intro_text: Charlotte Anana is the 39th daughter of the Charlotte Family , as well as the 85th and youngest overall child, and is a member of the Big Mom Pirates . [ 2 ]

name: Charlotte Anglais
japanese_name: シャーロット・アングレ
intro_text: Charlotte Anglais [ 4 ] is the 42nd son and 78th child of the Charlotte Family and a member of the Big Mom Pirates . [ 1 ] [ 2 ]

name: Charlotte Basans
japanese_name: シャーロット・バサンズ
intro_text: Charlotte Basans is the 23rd son and 39th child of the Charlotte Family and the younger twin brother of Saint-Marc . [ 3 ] He also is an officer of the Big Mom Pirates . [ 4 ]

name: Celestial Dragons
intro_text: World Noble Statistics Japanese Name: 世界貴族 Romanized Name: Sekai Kizoku Official English Name: World Noble First Appearance: Chapter 233 ; Episode 151 [ 1 ] Affiliation: World Government Occupation: Global -class Nobles Leader(s): Five Elders [ 1 ] The World Nobles , also known as the Celestial Dragons ( 天竜人 , Tenryūbito ? , literally meaning "Heavenly Dragon Folk") , are the aristocratic descendants of nineteen of the First Twenty who established what is now known as the World Government . Due to their actions and role, they are among the major overarching antagonists of the series. Many of the series' antagonists, including the Five Elders , Knights of God , Doflamingo , and Charlos , are all members of the World Nobles (or were, in the case of Doflamingo).

name: Charlotte Basskarte
japanese_name: シャーロット・バスカルテ
intro_text: Charlotte Basskarte [ 5 ] is the 13th son [ 5 ] and 22nd child of the Charlotte Family and the middle triplet brother of Nusstorte and Dosmarche . [ 6 ] He is also an officer of the Big Mom Pirates . [ 4 ]

name: Charlotte Angel
japanese_name: シャーロット・エンゼル
intro_text: Charlotte Angel is the seventh daughter and 17th child of the Charlotte Family [ 5 ] and the younger triplet sister of Cracker and Custard . [ 4 ] She is also an officer of the Big Mom Pirates . [ 3 ]

name: Charlotte Amande
japanese_name: シャーロット・アマンド
epithet: "Demon Lady" ( 鬼夫人 , Kifujin ? , Viz: "Mad Moiselle")
intro_text: "Demon Lady" Charlotte Amande is the third daughter and seventh child of the Charlotte Family , the second quadruplet sister to Mondée , Hachée , and Effilée , [ 6 ] and a snakeneck - human hybrid . [ 8 ] She also is an officer of the Big Mom Pirates [ 3 ] and serves as Totto Land 's Minister of Nuts ( ナッツ大臣 , Nattsu Daijin ? ) , governing over Nuts Island . [ 4 ] Due to her actions and role, she is a supporting antagonist in the Whole Cake Island Arc .

name: Charlotte Brownie
japanese_name: シャーロット・ブラウニー
intro_text: Charlotte Brownie is the 32nd son and 58th child of the Charlotte Family [ 2 ] and an officer of the Big Mom Pirates . [ 3 ] He joined Charlotte Oven 's army to intercept the Straw Hat Pirates on Cacao Island . [ 2 ]

name: Charlotte Bavarois
japanese_name: シャーロット・ババロア
intro_text: Charlotte Bavarois is the 26th son and 45th child of the Charlotte Family , [ 2 ] as well as an officer of the Big Mom Pirates . [ 3 ] He is the younger twin brother of Snack . [ 4 ]

name: Charlotte Cadenza
japanese_name: シャーロット・カデンツァ
intro_text: Charlotte Cadenza is the seventh son and the twelfth child of the Charlotte Family and the third quintuplet brother of Opera , Counter , Cabaletta , and Gala . [ 2 ] He is also an officer of the Big Mom Pirates . [ 3 ]

name: Charlotte Broyé
japanese_name: シャーロット・ブロワイエ
intro_text: Charlotte Broyé is the ninth daughter and 20th child of the Charlotte Family [ 3 ] and the younger twin sister of Brûlée . [ 5 ] She is also an officer of the Big Mom Pirates [ 2 ] and serves as Totto Land 's Minister of Meringue ( メレンゲ大臣 , Merenge Daijin ? ) , governing over Milenge Island . [ 3 ]

name: Charlotte Cabaletta
japanese_name: シャーロット・カバレッタ
intro_text: Charlotte Cabaletta is the eighth son and the 13th child of the Charlotte Family and the fourth quintuplet brother of Opera , Counter , Cadenza , and Gala . [ 2 ] He is also an officer of the Big Mom Pirates . [ 3 ]

name: Charlotte Chiffon
japanese_name: シャーロット・シフォン
intro_text: Charlotte Chiffon is the 22nd daughter and the 52nd child of the Charlotte Family and Totto Land 's former Minister of Puff ( ふんわり大臣 , Funwari Daijin ? , Viz: "Minister of Fluff") [ 3 ] having governed over Funwari Island until her defection. She is Capone Bege 's wife and the mother of Capone Pez , as well as a member of Bege's Fire Tank Pirates . [ 8 ] Her father is Big Mom 's 25th ex-husband, Pound , [ 9 ] and her younger twin sister is Lola . Due to her resemblance to Lola, Chiffon was abused by Big Mom in her rage for Lola abandoning an arranged marriage. This led to Chiffon cutting ties to her blood family and helping Bege in his attempt to assassinate her own mother, which caused Big Mom herself and most of Chiffon's siblings to identify her as an enemy. [ 5 ] She is an ally of the Straw Hat Pirates during the Whole Cake Island Arc . She is also one of the central characters in "Gang" Bege's Oh My Family Cover Page Serial.

name: Charlotte Chiboust
japanese_name: シャーロット・シブースト

[ 2 ] He also serves as Totto Land 's Minister of Mix ( ミックス大臣 , Mikkusu Daijin ? ) , governing over Sanshoku Island . [ 3 ] He was a member of Charlotte Oven 's army to ambush Luffy on Cacao Island . [ 1 ]

name: Charlotte Compote
japanese_name: シャーロット・コンポート

intro_text: Charlotte Cinnamon is the 16th daughter and 37th child of the Charlotte Family , [ 5 ] the younger triplet sister of Smoothie and Citron , [ 3 ] and a longleg - human hybrid . [ 6 ] She also is an officer of the Big Mom Pirates . [ 2 ]

name: Charlotte Citron
japanese_name: シャーロット・シトロン
intro_text: Charlotte Citron [ 6 ] is the 15th daughter and 36th child of the Charlotte Family , the middle triplet sister of Smoothie and Cinnamon , [ 4 ] and a longleg - human hybrid . [ 7 ] She also is an officer of the Big Mom Pirates [ 2 ] and serves as Totto Land 's Minister of Eggs ( エッグ大臣 , Eggu Daijin ? ) , governing over Kimi Island . [ 3 ]

intro_text: Charlotte Dacquoise [ 5 ] is the 24th son and 41st child of the Charlotte Family [ 2 ] and an officer of the Big Mom Pirates . [ 3 ] He also serves as Totto Land 's Minister of Jam ( ジャム大臣 , Jamu Daijin ? ) , governing over Jam Island . [ 4 ]

name: Charlotte Cornstarch
japanese_name: シャーロット・コンスターチ
intro_text: Charlotte Cornstarch is the 11th daughter and 27th child of the Charlotte Family and the younger triplet sister of Moscato and Mash . [ 5 ] She also is an officer of the Big Mom Pirates [ 3 ] and serves as Totto Land 's Minister of Love ( 愛情大臣 , Aijō Daijin ? ) , governing over Loving Island . [ 4 ]

name: Charlotte Brûlée
japanese_name: シャーロット・ブリュレ
intro_text: Charlotte Brûlée is the eighth daughter and 19th child of the Charlotte Family and the older twin sister of Broyé . [ 2 ] [ 6 ] She is also an officer of the Big Mom Pirates . [ 3 ] She was stationed in the Seducing Woods to ambush the Sanji Retrieval Team, [ 2 ] but after being defeated, the team used her Devil Fruit ability to enter an alternate dimension known as Mirro-World to move around Totto Land . [ 8 ] Due to her actions and role, she is a major antagonist in the Whole Cake Island Arc . She, alongside her siblings Charlotte Katakuri and Charlotte Oven , become temporary and reluctant allies of the Straw Hat Pirates during One Piece Film: Red .

name: Charlotte Decuplets
intro_text: The Charlotte Decuplets are the 36-40th sons and 30-34th daughters of the Charlotte Family , making up the 65-74th children in the family, and are all officers of the Big Mom Pirates . [ 2 ] [ 3 ] They are the largest group of Big Mom 's children born in a single birth. [ 4 ] They were first mentioned in SBS Volume 85 , [ 4 ] but were not identified until they gathered on Cacao Island . [ 2 ]

name: Charlotte Dolce
japanese_name: シャーロット・ドルチェ シャーロット・ドラジェ
english_name: Charlotte Dolce and Dragée (Viz); Charlotte Dolce and Dragee ( WT100 )
intro_text: Charlotte Dolce and Charlotte Dragée are the 45th and 46th sons and the 83rd and 84th children of the Charlotte Family , being the two youngest sons of Charlotte Linlin , and are members of the Big Mom Pirates . [ 3 ]

name: Charlotte De-Chat
japanese_name: シャーロット・ドシャ
intro_text: Charlotte De-Chat is the 44th son and the 81st child of the Charlotte Family . [ 3 ] He is a hybrid between a human and a fish-man . [ 2 ]

[ 4 ] He also is an officer of the Big Mom Pirates [ 3 ] and serves as Totto Land 's Minister of Tea ( お茶大臣 , Ocha Daijin ? ) , governing over Black Island . [ 4 ]

name: Charlotte Cracker
japanese_name: シャーロット・クラッカー
epithet: "Thousand Arms Cracker" ( 千手のクラッカー , Senju no Kurakkā ? ) "Biscuit Knight" ( ビスケットの騎士 , Bisuketto no Kishi ? )
intro_text: "Thousand Arms" Charlotte Cracker [ 4 ] [ 9 ] is the tenth son and 15th child of the Charlotte Family and the oldest triplet brother of Custard and Angel . [ 10 ] He is also one of the Three Sweet Commanders of the Big Mom Pirates and serves as Totto Land 's Minister of Biscuits ( ビスケット大臣 , Bisuketto Daijin ? ) , governing Biscuits Island . Due to his actions and role, he is a major antagonist in the first half of the Whole Cake Island Arc . [ 3 ]

name: Charlotte Dragée

intro_text: Charlotte Dolce and Charlotte Dragée are the 45th and 46th sons and the 83rd and 84th children of the Charlotte Family , being the two youngest sons of Charlotte Linlin , and are members of the Big Mom Pirates . [ 3 ]

name: Charlotte Effilée
japanese_name: シャーロット・エフィレ
intro_text: Charlotte Effilée is the fifth daughter and ninth child of the Charlotte Family , the youngest quadruplet sister of Mondée , Amande , and Hachée , and a snakeneck - human hybrid . [ 5 ] She is also an officer of the Big Mom Pirates . [ 3 ]

name: Charlotte Flampe
japanese_name: シャーロット・フランペ
occupation: Pirate Officer ; Minister of Honey; Special Attack Unit Captain; Katakuri Fan Club President
intro_text: Charlotte Flampe is the 36th daughter [ 6 ] and 77th child of the Charlotte Family and an officer of the Big Mom Pirates , [ 2 ] serving as the Captain of the Special Attack Unit ( 特攻隊長 , Tokkō-taichō ? , Viz: "Kamikaze Captain") . She is also Totto Land 's Minister of Honey ( はちみつ大臣 , Hachimitsu Daijin ? ) , governing over Rokumitsu Island , [ 3 ] and the President of the Katakuri Fan Club ( カタクリファンクラブ会長 , Katakuri Fan Kurabu Kaichō ? ) . [ 1 ] Due to her actions and role, she is a minor antagonist during the Whole Cake Island Arc .

name: Charlotte Galette
japanese_name: シャーロット・ガレット
intro_text: Charlotte Galette is the 18th daughter and the 42nd child of the Charlotte Family and the older twin sister of Poire . [ 8 ] She is also an officer of the Big Mom Pirates [ 4 ] and serves as Totto Land 's Minister of Butter ( バター大臣 , Batā Daijin ? ) , [ 2 ] governing over Margarine Island . [ 5 ] Due to her actions and role, she is a supporting antagonist in the Whole Cake Island Arc .

name: Charlotte High-Fat
japanese_name: シャーロット・ハイファット
intro_text: Charlotte High-Fat [ 5 ] is the 20th son and 33rd child of the Charlotte Family [ 2 ] and the older twin brother of Tablet . [ 4 ] He is also an officer of the Big Mom Pirates . [ 3 ]

name: Charlotte Joconde
japanese_name: シャーロット・ジョコンド
intro_text: Charlotte Joconde is the 27th daughter and 59th child of the Charlotte Family [ 1 ] and an officer of the Big Mom Pirates . [ 2 ] She was also a member of Charlotte Oven 's army to intercept the Straw Hat Pirates on Cacao Island . [ 1 ]

name: Charlotte Joscarpone
japanese_name: シャーロット・ジョスカルポーネ
intro_text: Charlotte Joscarpone is the 29th daughter [ 6 ] and 63rd child of the Charlotte Family , the younger twin sister of Charlotte Mascarpone , and a Snakeneck - human hybrid . [ 2 ] She is also an officer of the Big Mom Pirates . [ 3 ]

[ 4 ] He is also an officer of the Big Mom Pirates [ 2 ] and serves as Totto Land 's Minister of Beans ( 豆大臣 , Mame Daijin ? ) , governing over Poripori Island . [ 3 ] Due to his actions and role, he is a major antagonist in the Whole Cake Island Arc .

name: Charlotte Kanten
japanese_name: シャーロット・カンテン
intro_text: Charlotte Kanten [ 7 ] is the 27th son and 48th child of the Charlotte Family [ 4 ] and the eldest triplet brother of Kato and Montb . [ 6 ] He is also an officer of the Big Mom Pirates [ 5 ] and serves as Totto Land 's Minister of Agar ( 寒天大臣 , Kanten Daijin ? ) , governing over Jelly Island . [ 6 ]

name: Charlotte Linlin
japanese_name: シャーロット・リンリン
affiliation: Big Mom Pirates ; Rocks Pirates (former); Four Emperors (former); Charlotte Family
occupation: Pirate Captain ; Emperor (former); Queen of Totto Land
alias: "O-Lin" ( おリン , Orin ? , English versions: "Olin")
epithet: "Big Mom" ( ビッグ・マム , Biggu Mamu ? ) (Funimation subs (formerly): Big Mam) "Evil Spirit" ( 悪神 , Akujin ? )
intro_text: Charlotte Linlin , [ 18 ] better known as "Big Mom" , [ 19 ] is the captain of the Big Mom Pirates [ 6 ] and was formerly one of the Four Emperors ruling over the New World , as the only female member of the group. [ 3 ] [ 1 ] She is the queen of the archipelago nation Totto Land , [ 6 ] a place she seeks to form into a utopia where all the world 's races can live together in peace without discrimination or segregation. [ 20 ] She is also the matriarch of the Charlotte Family , [ 5 ] whose children make up the ministers of her nation and the core infrastructure of her crew. [ 21 ] Big Mom wields the Soru Soru no Mi , which allows her to steal the souls of others and implant them in inanimate objects, resulting in the unique race of creatures known as homies , who happily serve her. Big Mom possesses three special homies: the bicorne Napoleon , the sun Prometheus , and the thunder cloud Hera . Hera's position was formerly owned by another thunder cloud, Zeus , but Big Mom grew tired of Zeus' continued failures and created Hera to replace him. [ 22 ] In her childhood, Linlin was raised on Elbaph in the Sheep's House under Carmel after being abandoned by her family. [ 23 ] After accidentally slaying Jorul , a hero of Elbaph, during one of her hunger pangs, Linlin was relocated to another island . During Linlin's birthday party, as she gorged on sweets, Carmel and her fellow orphans mysteriously disappeared and Linlin inherited Carmel's Devil Fruit. [ 24 ] Now alone, she was discovered by Streusen , and the pair co-founded a pirate crew. [ 25 ] As a young adult, Big Mom joined the legendary Rocks Pirates , where she formed a bond with apprentice Kaidou . [ 2 ] Some time after the God Valley Incident where the Rocks Pirates fell, she formed her own crew once again, the Big Mom Pirates. Big Mom developed an enmity with Monkey D. Luffy and the Straw Hat Pirates , who challenged her ownership of Fish-Man Island and then invaded Whole Cake Island, thwarting her plans to steal technology from the advanced Germa Kingdom during an arranged wedding between Sanji and her daughter, Charlotte Pudding . [ 26 ] This grudge brought her to Wano Country in pursuit of Luffy, where she formed an alliance with Kaidou and the Beasts Pirates with the intention of conquering the world and claiming the One Piece . [ 27 ] However, this never came to fruition as their alliance would go on to be defeated by the Ninja-Pirate-Mink-Samurai Alliance that same night. [ 28 ] Following her defeat to Eustass Kid and Trafalgar Law , the World Economy News Paper released a new listing of the Four Emperors, with Big Mom no longer being included among them anymore. [ 29 ] As a young child at the beginning of her piracy career, Big Mom was assigned a 50,000,000 bounty which was quickly escalated to 500,000,000. [ 12 ] By the time of the Raid on Onigashima , at the peak of her piracy career, she held a bounty of 4,388,000,000 which was the second-highest bounty of any living pirate . [ 11 ] Big Mom was the last of the Four Emperors to be named; her epithet was first revealed after the Summit War of Marineford by Eustass Kid [ 4 ] and her real name was revealed by Pappag on Fish-Man Island. [ 19 ] Since the timeskip , she is a minor antagonist during the Fish-Man Island Arc , the main antagonist of the Whole Cake Island Arc and the Whole Cake Island Saga as a whole, the secondary antagonist of the second half of the Wano Country Arc and one of the two secondary antagonists of Wano Country Saga as a whole.

name: Charlotte Marnier

name: Charlotte Moscato
japanese_name: シャーロット・モスカート

japanese_name: シャーロット・カタクリ

[ 5 ] He is also one of the Three Sweet Commanders of the Big Mom Pirates [ 4 ] and serves as Totto Land 's Minister of Flour ( 粉大臣 , Kona Daijin ? ) , governing over Komugi Island . [ 5 ] Due to his actions and role, Katakuri is the secondary antagonist in the second half of the Whole Cake Island Arc . He, alongside his younger siblings Charlotte Brûlée and Oven, become temporary and reluctant allies of the Red Hair Pirates and the Straw Hat Pirates during One Piece Film: Red .

[ 5 ] He also serves as Totto Land 's Minister of Cheese ( チーズ大臣 , Chīzu Daijin ? ) , governing over Cheese Island . [ 3 ] Due to his actions and role, he is a supporting antagonist during the Whole Cake Island Arc .

name: Charlotte Myukuru
japanese_name: シャーロット・ミュークル

name: Charlotte Newichi
intro_text: The Charlotte Decuplets are the 36-40th sons and 30-34th daughters of the Charlotte Family , making up the 65-74th children in the family, and are all officers of the Big Mom Pirates . [ 2 ] [ 3 ] They are the largest group of Big Mom 's children born in a single birth. [ 4 ] They were first mentioned in SBS Volume 85 , [ 4 ] but were not identified until they gathered on Cacao Island . [ 2 ]

name: Charlotte Normande
japanese_name: シャーロット・ノルマンド
intro_text: Charlotte Normande is the 38th daughter and the 82nd child of the Charlotte Family . She is a dosundada , a hybrid between a human and a dwarf . [ 2 ] [ 4 ]

name: Charlotte Lola
japanese_name: シャーロット・ローラ
affiliation: Rolling Pirates ; Charlotte Family ; Thriller Bark Victim's Association (former)
epithet: "Marriage Proposal Lola" ( 求婚のローラ , Kyūkon no Rōra ? , English versions: "Lola the Proposer")
intro_text: Charlotte Lola [ 5 ] is the captain of the Rolling Pirates and the 23rd daughter and 53rd child of the Charlotte Family . Her mother is the former Emperor Charlotte Linlin [ 2 ] and her father is Linlin's 25th husband, Pound . She is the younger twin sister of Chiffon [ 7 ] [ 8 ] and Gotti 's wife. She was Totto Land 's Minister of Chocolate ( チョコレート大臣 , Chokorēto Daijin ? ) before she ran away after being arranged to marry Prince Loki of Elbaph . [ 3 ] Wanting to marry for love, she proposed so many times to the point of being called " Marriage Proposal Lola " until she finally married Gotti. She was a member of the Thriller Bark Victim's Association after her shadow was stolen by Gecko Moria and placed into a warthog zombie also named Lola . She is an ally of the Straw Hat Pirates during the Thriller Bark Arc . She is also one of the central characters in "Gang" Bege's Oh My Family Cover Page Serial.

name: Charlotte Newsan
intro_text: The Charlotte Decuplets are the 36-40th sons and 30-34th daughters of the Charlotte Family , making up the 65-74th children in the family, and are all officers of the Big Mom Pirates . [ 2 ] [ 3 ] They are the largest group of Big Mom 's children born in a single birth. name: Charlotte Noisette
japanese_name: シャーロット・ノアゼット

name: Charlotte Opera

[ 7 ] He also is an officer of the Big Mom Pirates [ 4 ] and served as Totto Land 's Minister of Whipped Cream ( 生クリーム大臣 , Nama Kurīmu Daijin ? , Viz: "Minister of Cream") , governing over Noko Island . [ 2 ] [ 5 ] His current status is unknown after having his lifespan removed by a rampaging Big Mom. [ 8 ] Due to his actions and role, he is a supporting antagonist during the Whole Cake Island Arc .

name: Charlotte Nougat
japanese_name: シャーロット・ヌガー

affiliation: Sun Pirates ; Charlotte Family ; Big Mom Pirates (defected)
intro_text: Charlotte Praline is a half - human and half- hammerhead shark mermaid , the 21st daughter and 47th child of the Charlotte Family , [ 1 ] and the younger twin sister of Prim . [ 5 ] She was also Totto Land 's former Minister of Design ( デザイン大臣 , Dezain Daijin ? ) , having governed over Unique Island until her defection. [ 2 ] She married Aladine sometime in the past two years, and became a member of his crew, the Sun Pirates , cutting off ties with her family and working against them in the process. [ 1 ] [ 6 ]

japanese_name: シャーロット・パンナ

name: Charlotte Tablet

[ 6 ] He is also an officer of the Big Mom Pirates [ 3 ] and serves as Totto Land 's Minister of Browned Food ( こんがり大臣 , Kongari Daijin ? , Viz: "Minister of Baking") , governing over Yakigashi Island . [ 4 ] Due to his actions and role, he is a major antagonist in the Whole Cake Island Arc . He, alongside his siblings Charlotte Brûlée and Charlotte Katakuri , become temporary and reluctant allies of the Red Hair Pirates and the Straw Hat Pirates during One Piece Film: Red .

name: Charlotte Perospero
japanese_name: シャーロット・ペロスペロー

name: Charlotte Yuen

name: Charlotte Zuccotto

name: Charlotte Pudding
japanese_name: シャーロット・プリン
intro_text: Charlotte Pudding is the 35th daughter and the 76th child of the Charlotte Family , [ 2 ] an officer of the Big Mom Pirates , [ 3 ] and a hybrid between a human and a member of the Three-Eye Tribe . [ 8 ] She also works as a chocolatier and the owner of cafe "Caramel" on Cacao Island , [ 4 ] as the candidate for the vacant position of Minister of Chocolate ( チョコレート大臣 , Chokorēto Daijin ? ) . [ 9 ] She was once Sanji 's arranged fiancée, per the political agreement between their families. [ 2 ] She is currently held captive by the Blackbeard Pirates . [ 10 ] Due to her actions and role, she was initially a major antagonist in the Whole Cake Island Arc , but after genuinely falling in love with Sanji, she became an ally of the Straw Hat Pirates to help them escape from her mother, Charlotte Linlin . [ 11 ] She is also a supporting character in the Germa 66's Ahh... An Emotionless Excursion cover page serial. [ 12 ]

intro_text: Chesskippa the Hanger-on [ 2 ] is a pirate captain from Robin 's past. [ 3 ]

name: Chessmarimo
intro_text: Chessmarimo is a fusion of Chess and Kuromarimo , created by Wapol 's Baku Baku Factory .

name: Chess

[ 2 ] [ 3 ] After the attack of Blackbeard , he became a pirate alongside his king, until their subsequent return to Drum Island . Due to his actions and role, he is a major antagonist in the Drum Island Arc .

intro_text: Chimney is the granddaughter of Sea Train conductor Kokoro , her only mermaid grandparent, making Chimney 1/4 mermaid. [ 5 ] She is the owner of a rabbit named Gonbe (whom Chimney thinks is a cat). [ 1 ] She is an ally of the Straw Hat Pirates during the Water 7 and Enies Lobby Arcs.

intro_text: "Moonflower" O-Cho is a yakuza boss who was in charge of the Ringo region in Wano Country . She was imprisoned in Udon by the Beasts Pirates , but was freed when Luffy took over the prison. [ 1 ] [ 2 ]

name: Chiya
intro_text: Chiya [ 2 ] was the Shandia Pantri that lived over 400 years ago, who died of Tree Fever . [ 1 ]

name: Chocho
residence: Wano Country (Okobore Town; formerly Bakura Town )

affiliation: Chinjao Family ; Happo Navy (retired); Straw Hat Grand Fleet
occupation: 12th Leader of the Happo Navy (retired); Pirate (former)

intro_text: Chinjao , [ 7 ] formerly known as "Don Chinjao" and "Chinjao the Drill" , is a former pirate , the leader of the Chinjao Family , and the retired 12th leader of the Happo Navy . He also joined as a gladiator at the Corrida Colosseum to compete for the Mera Mera no Mi . [ 1 ] He is the grandfather of Sai and Boo . He has a bounty of 542,000,000. Although at first he confronted Luffy for his hatred against Garp , he became his ally during the Dressrosa Arc .

name: Choco Police
residence: Chocolat Town, Cacao Island , Totto Land

name: Choi
intro_text: Choi [ 2 ] is an infamous New World pirate captain who allied with Whitebeard . [ 1 ]

name: Chokyumei-no Chosuke
intro_text: Chokyumei-no Chosuke [ 2 ] is a young boy from the Hakumai region of the Wano Country . [ 1 ] He is the brother of Jugemu Jugemuko .

name: Chome
affiliation: Beasts Pirates ; Orochi Oniwabanshu (former); Kurozumi Family (former)
intro_text: Chome [ 4 ] is a kunoichi and a member of the Beasts Pirates . [ 2 ] She previously was a member of the Orochi Oniwabanshu which served the shogun of Wano Country , Kurozumi Orochi . [ 1 ] Due to her actions and role, she is a minor antagonist in the Wano Country Arc .

name: Chore Boy
intro_text: Marine Ranks Statistics Explained in: SBS Volume 8 [ 1 ] SBS Volume 24 [ 2 ] SBS Volume 29 [ 3 ] SBS Volume 98 [ 4 ] The ranks within the Marine System are fairly straightforward, where each rank is clearly delineated. [ 1 ] Officers present at Marine Headquarters are considered the elite forces of the Marines, about three ranks higher in terms of power from those of the same rank at other bases. All ranks present from "Lieutenant" above are usually trained here, exceptions being those in command of other Marine bases which includes Axe-Hand Morgan and Nezumi . [ 3 ] This page will list the Marine ranks and the soldiers who hold the titles.

name: Chochinman
intro_text: Chochinman [ 2 ] is a Gifter of the Beasts Pirates and a member of the Marys , the crew's surveillance division. [ 1 ]

intro_text: Chuchun is a Super Sparrow ridden by Itomimizu . He and Itomimizu witnessed all the Davy Back Fight games between the Foxy Pirates and the Straw Hat Pirates .

name: Clione
intro_text: Clione [ 2 ] is a member of the Heart Pirates . [ 1 ]

name: Chouchou
intro_text: Chouchou [ 5 ] is a dog from Orange Town , famed for his unceasing vigil over the pet-food shop founded by his deceased owner . He is classified as a Type B creature, "Small Friendly". [ 6 ] He is an ally of the Straw Hat Pirates during the Orange Town Arc .

name: Clou D. Clover
japanese_name: クラウ・ D ・クローバー
occupation: Professor and archaeologist of the Tree of Knowledge ; Explorer (former)
intro_text: Clou D. Clover , [ 5 ] commonly known as Professor Clover ( クローバー博士 , Kurōbā-hakase ? ) , was the director of the Ohara Library, and a leading authority on archaeology. He was a professor and archaeologist who studied Poneglyphs with his fellow colleagues in the Tree of Knowledge . [ 1 ] During his younger years, he was also an infamous explorer known for getting repeatedly caught by the Marines . [ 2 ] Clover and his fellow archaeologists died 22 years ago for conducting forbidden research on the Void Century , which led the World Government to decimate the island of Ohara through a Buster Call . [ 6 ]

name: Clapp
intro_text: Clapp was the father of Bartholomew Kuma and a member of the Buccaneers race . [ 1 ] His family lived in the Sorbet Kingdom until they were all captured and made slaves in Mary Geoise . Clapp was later shot and killed by a World Noble . [ 3 ]

name: Cipher Pol
intro_text: Cipher Pol Statistics Japanese Name: サイファーポール Romanized Name: Saifā Pōru Official English Name: Cipher Pol First Appearance: Chapter 323 ; Episode 230 [ 1 ] Affiliation: World Government Occupation: Worldwide Investigation Services Cipher Pol is a series of secret agencies who do investigations, espionage, and assassinations for the World Government .

name: Coburn

name: Colon
intro_text: Colon is a resident of Elbaph and the half- human , half- giant son of Scopper Gaban and Ripley . [ 3 ] [ 2 ] He is the self-proclaimed captain of the "Colon Pirates". [ 4 ]

name: Cocoyasi Village
english_name: Coco Village (VIZ manga, 4Kids dub, Funimation dub (Episode of East Blue), Live Action); Cocoyashi Village (Funimation); Coconut Village (Odex)
intro_text: Cocoyasi Village Statistics Japanese Name: ココヤシ村 Romanized Name: Kokoyashi-mura English Name: Coco Village (VIZ manga, 4Kids dub, Funimation dub (Episode of East Blue), Live Action); Cocoyashi Village (Funimation); Coconut Village (Odex) First appearance: Chapter 70 ; Episode 32 Region: Conomi Islands Cocoyasi Village [ 1 ] is the village on Conomi Islands where Nami , as well as her sister, Nojiko , grew up with Bell-mère . Situated in close proximity to Arlong Park , the village is home to the majority of key characters featured in the Arlong Park Arc . When the Straw Hat Pirates arrived, it was dangerously close to being destroyed like Gosa Village . When Arlong was defeated, this village was the location of the ensuing celebration.

name: Commander
intro_text: Marine Ranks Statistics Explained in: SBS Volume 8 [ 1 ] SBS Volume 24 [ 2 ] SBS Volume 29 [ 3 ] SBS Volume 98 [ 4 ] The ranks within the Marine System are fairly straightforward, where each rank is clearly delineated. [ 1 ] Officers present at Marine Headquarters are considered the elite forces of the Marines, about three ranks higher in terms of power from those of the same rank at other bases. All ranks present from "Lieutenant" above are usually trained here, exceptions being those in command of other Marine bases which includes Axe-Hand Morgan and Nezumi . name: Corazon
japanese_name: ドンキホーテ・ロシナンテ
english_name: Don Quixote Rocinante (Viz); Donquixote Rosinante (Funimation subs); Don Quixote Rosinante (Funimation dub)
occupation: Marine Commander ; Pirate Elite Officer (undercover); World Noble (former)
alias: Corazon ( コラソン , Korason ? )
intro_text: Donquixote Rosinante [ 8 ] [ 1 ] was a former World Noble of the Donquixote Family descent, [ 4 ] being the second son of Donquixote Homing and the younger brother of Donquixote Doflamingo . [ 9 ] [ 8 ] After his family lost their status as Celestial Dragons and became pariahs, Rosinante was discovered by Sengoku and enlisted into the Marines , eventually reaching the rank of Commander . [ 1 ] Upon reuniting with Doflamingo, he feigned muteness and operated as an Elite Officer of the Donquixote Pirates , serving Doflamingo under the codename Corazon [ 10 ] [ 11 ] [ 3 ] while remaining an undercover Marine. Rosinante abandoned his post in an attempt to cure Trafalgar D. Water Law of his Amber Lead Syndrome. He eventually obtained the Ope Ope no Mi , forcing Law to eat it and thus giving him the means to save himself from the disease. However, his cover was blown by the former Corazon, Vergo , [ 12 ] and he was subsequently executed by Doflamingo. [ 13 ] Rosinante's kindness and sacrifice would serve as driving motivators for Law to one day avenge him by defeating Doflamingo.

name: Cosmo
intro_text: Sergeant Cosmo [ 2 ] is one of the automata created on Karakuri Island by Dr. Tsukimi . Sergeant Cosmo was first introduced in cover story of Enel's Great Space Operations .

name: Cosmos
intro_text: Cosmos [ 3 ] is a member of the Kuja Pirates . [ 1 ]

name: Cowboy
english_name: Supersonic Duck Squadron Super Spot-Billed Duck Troops ( OPCG )
intro_text: Super Spot-Billed Duck Troops Statistics Japanese Name: 超カルガモ部隊 Romanized Name: Chō Karugamo Butai Official English Name: Supersonic Duck Squadron Super Spot-Billed Duck Troops ( OPCG ) First Appearance: Chapter 180 ; Episode 111 [ 1 ] Affiliation: Arabasta Kingdom Leader(s): Karoo The Super Spot-Billed Duck Troops [ 2 ] are a family of seven Super Spot-Billed Ducks (and later one camel) who serve the kingdom of Arabasta . They are led by their captain Karoo , and are reputed to be the fastest troop in the kingdom of Arabasta . [ 1 ] All of the ducks have the strange theme of wearing different types of hats and various other jewelry and clothing. Also strange was that the last member to join the squad, Matsuge , is a camel who helped the Straw Hats confront Baroque Works .

name: Cross Guild
intro_text: Cross Guild Statistics Japanese Name: クロス・ギルド Romanized Name: Kurosu Girudo Official English Name: Cross Guild First Appearance: Chapter 1056 ; Episode 1083 [ 1 ] Leader(s): Buggy (Figurehead, de jure) Crocodile & Dracule Mihawk (Founders, de facto) Main Ship: Big Top Blaster Total Bounty: At least 8,848,000,000 [ Bounty 1 ] The Cross Guild is a New World crime syndicate headlined by three former Warlords of the Sea : Buggy , Crocodile , and Dracule Mihawk . [ 1 ] It was founded by Crocodile and Mihawk and absorbed Buggy's Delivery as collateral for past debts. Buggy himself, unwittingly publicized as its leader by overeager crewmen, now serves as the figurehead "president," [ 2 ] for which the World Government recognizes him as one of the current Four Emperors . [ 1 ] Crocodile intended for the organization to recreate his previously failed " Operation Utopia " campaign, but following Buggy's declaration to surpass his fellow Emperors and become Pirate King, the Cross Guild has joined the race for the One Piece . [ 3 ]

affiliation: Tontatta Kingdom Scouting Unit ; Tontatta Pirates ; Straw Hat Grand Fleet

name: Couran
intro_text: Couran [ 3 ] is the king of the Cameron Kingdom ( キャメロン王国 , Kyameron Ōkoku ? ) and one of fifty monarchs who took part in the Levely . [ 2 ] [ 3 ]

name: Coribou
affiliation: Caribou Pirates ; Fake Straw Hat Crew (former, temporary)
epithet: "Blood-Splatterer" Coribou ( 返り血のコリブー , Kaerichi no Koribū ? )
intro_text: "Blood-Splatterer" Coribou is a captain of the Caribou Pirates , along with his big brother Caribou . [ 2 ] He is famous for killing Marines and was at the Sabaody Archipelago around the time of the Straw Hat Pirates ' reunion. He, along with Caribou, another infamous rookie, joined the Fake Straw Hat Crew temporarily. He has a bounty of 190,000,000, making him part of the new generation of rookies, following the path of Luffy and the other Super Rookies with bounties over 100,000,000. [ 3 ] He is a minor antagonist of the Fish-Man Island Arc and a supporting character in the Caribou's Kehihihihi in the New World Cover Page Serial.

name: Crocodile
affiliation: Cross Guild ; Seven Warlords of the Sea (former); Baroque Works (former); Impel Down (former)
occupation: Pirate ; Cross Guild Officer ; Baroque Works President (former); Proprietor of Rain Dinners (former); Prisoner of the Great Prison (former)
alias: "Mr. 0" ( ミスター・ゼロ , Misutā Zero ? )
epithet: "Sir Crocodile" ( サー・クロコダイル , Sā Kurokodairu ? ) "Desert King" ( 砂漠の王 , Sabaku no Ō ? )
intro_text: "Desert King" Sir Crocodile [ 3 ] [ 13 ] is a former Warlord of the Sea [ 7 ] and former president—under the codename "Mr. 0" —of the mysterious crime syndicate Baroque Works . [ 14 ] During his time as Warlord, Crocodile maintained a public facade of helping both the people of Arabasta Kingdom and the Marines , all while secretly using Baroque Works to weaken Arabasta for conquest . After his plot was exposed by Princess Nefertari Vivi and the Straw Hat Pirates , whose captain Monkey D. Luffy defeated him in battle, he was stripped of his title and arrested [ 4 ] alongside most of his top subordinates (save his former Vice-President Nico Robin , who went on to join the Straw Hats). Sent to the legendary prison Impel Down [ 15 ] for execution, Crocodile was later freed by Luffy in exchange for aiding the rescue of Portgas D. Ace , [ 16 ] and so entered the Summit War of Marineford . [ 17 ] While initially aiming to kill Whitebeard , his contempt for the Marines led him to ally with Luffy and the Whitebeard Pirates . After the war, he and his subordinate Daz Bonez escaped from Marineford and decided to head out to the New World . [ 18 ] After the disbandment of the Seven Warlords, Crocodile now works as a co-leader of the Cross Guild alongside Dracule Mihawk and under the figurehead leadership of Buggy , who was mistakenly made one of the Four Emperors . [ 19 ] Sometime prior to the disbanding of the Warlords, Vegapunk cloned Crocodile as one of the Seraphim to replace the Warlords. [ 20 ] Overall, he is one of the most enduring and noteworthy adversaries of the series, being the first enemy to completely defeat Luffy in battle. He is the main antagonist of the Arabasta Arc and the Arabasta Saga overall, a tentative ally in both the Impel Down and Marineford Arcs , and a supporting antagonist in the Final Saga .

name: Crocus
intro_text: Crocus [ 2 ] is a doctor and the caretaker of the whale Laboon as well as the overseer of the Twin Cape Lighthouse , which guides all ships using Reverse Mountain to enter the Grand Line . Though a lighthouse keeper for most of his life, Crocus spent three years serving as a doctor on Gol D. Roger 's crew . According to Silvers Rayleigh , he was the best doctor in the world at the time he joined the Roger Pirates, and the only one able to relieve Roger's disease. [ 4 ] He is an ally of the Straw Hat Pirates during the Reverse Mountain Arc , supplying the Log Pose they use in the first half of the Grand Line .

name: Curiel
intro_text: Curiel is the former 10th division commander of the Whitebeard Pirates . [ 1 ] [ 4 ]

name: Curly Dadan
occupation: Mountain Bandit Boss ; Caretaker of Monkey D. Luffy , Portgas D. Ace , and Sabo (former)
intro_text: Curly Dadan [ 4 ] is a mountain bandit and the boss of the Dadan Family who lives on Mt. Colubo near Foosha Village . She served as the foster mother of Portgas D. Ace and Monkey D. Luffy , who were entrusted to her by Monkey D. Garp , [ 6 ] [ 7 ] and also took care of Sabo too when he moved in. Dadan was first mentioned in the Post-Enies Lobby Arc , when Woop Slap read about Luffy and the Straw Hat Pirates waging war on the World Government .

name: D. D. Tee
english_name: Giant Pirates; Giant Pirate Warrior Band / Pirate Giants; Giant Pirate Crew (VIZ, current); Giant Warrior Pirates (Funimation, former)
intro_text: Giant Warrior Pirates Statistics Japanese Name: 巨兵海賊団 Romanized Name: Kyo Hei Kaizoku-dan Official English Name: Giant Pirates; Giant Pirate Warrior Band / Pirate Giants; Giant Pirate Crew (VIZ, current); Giant Warrior Pirates (Funimation, former) First Appearance: Chapter 129 ; Episode 78 [ 1 ] Captain: Jarul and Jorul (original crew, former); Dorry and Brogy Main Ship: Great Magni (original crew, former); Great Eirik (Destroyed) † Total Bounty: At least 3,600,000,000 [ bounty 1 ] At least 200,000,000 [ bounty 2 ] The Giant Warrior Pirates is a pirate crew made up of giants from Elbaph lead by Dorry and Brogy . Before them, the crew's captains were Jarul and Jorul . They disbanded 102 years ago when Dorry and Brogy began their duel, but reunited once they returned to Elbaph. [ 2 ] [ 3 ] They are major allies of the Straw Hat Pirates during the Egghead Arc . During Dorry and Brogy's absence, Hajrudin formed a spiritual revival crew, the New Giant Warrior Pirates , who are a part of the Straw Hat Grand Fleet .

name: Dadan Family

name: Cutty Flam
affiliation: Straw Hat Pirates ; Straw Hat Grand Fleet ; Franky Family (former); Tom's Workers (former); Ninja-Pirate-Mink-Samurai Alliance (disbanded)
occupation: Shipwright ; Senior Officer ; Dismantler; Underworld boss (former); Bounty Hunter (former)
alias: "Fra-nosuke" ( フラの介 , Furanosuke ? , English versions: Franosuke)
epithet: "Iron Man" Franky ( "鉄人"フランキー , Tetsujin Furankī ? ) "Cyborg" Franky ( " 鉄人 "フランキー , Saibōgu Furankī ? ) (former)
intro_text: "Iron Man" Franky [ 7 ] is the shipwright of the Straw Hat Pirates and one of the Senior Officers of the Straw Hat Grand Fleet . [ 2 ] He is the crew's eighth member and the seventh to join, doing so at the end of the Post-Enies Lobby Arc . [ 17 ] Franky was born in the South Blue [ 18 ] to Scien, an infamous scientist and pirate who would later be known as Queen of the Beasts Pirates . [ 19 ] After his parents abandoned him as a 10-year-old [ 20 ] , he eventually made his way to Water 7 . Born " Cutty Flam ", [ 21 ] he chose to go by his nickname of "Franky" until he eventually permanently discarded his true name per the request of Iceburg to hide his identity. [ 22 ] He worked as a shipwright of Tom's Workers until, during a failed attempt to save his mentor Tom from the World Government , his body was heavily damaged, requiring him to augment himself into a cyborg . Upon returning to Water 7, he became the leader of the Franky Family , a group of ship dismantlers and bounty hunters . [ 3 ] Franky and his followers were introduced as the secondary antagonists of the Water 7 Arc , until circumstances forced them to become allies at the end of the same arc and the Enies Lobby Arc . Franky's dream is to create a ship and circumnavigate the world with it, and he built the Thousand Sunny and joined the Straw Hat Pirates to fulfill his dream. He gained a bounty of 44,000,000 for his involvement at the Enies Lobby Incident. It later increased to 94,000,000 after the Dressrosa Arc . Following the Raid on Onigashima , his bounty was increased to 394,000,000. [ 2 ]

name: Dawn Island
intro_text: Dawn Island Statistics Japanese Name: ドーン島 Romanized Name: Dōn-tō English Name: Dawn Island (FUNimation); Doan Island (Viz) First appearance: Chapter 1 ; Episode 4 [ 1 ] Region: East Blue [ 1 ] Affiliates: Goa Kingdom [ 2 ] Dawn Island [ 3 ] is an island located in the East Blue and where the Goa Kingdom is situated. It is the home island of Monkey D. Luffy and the starting point of his journey into piracy, as well as the home island of his father, Monkey D. Dragon and grandfather, Monkey D. Garp . This is also the adopted home of Portgas D. Ace after the death of his mother and the home of Sabo and his family.

intro_text: "The Killer" Daz Bonez , [ 4 ] alias Mr. 1 , is a former bounty hunter [ 3 ] and the former highest-ranked male Officer Agent of Baroque Works . His partner was Miss Doublefinger . [ 1 ] After escaping Impel Down , he traveled with Crocodile in the New World [ 7 ] and later joined Crocodile's new organization, Cross Guild . [ 2 ] He was a major antagonist during the Arabasta Arc and a tentative ally in the Impel Down and Marineford Arcs .

name: Demalo Black

intro_text: "Three-Tongued" Demalo Black [ 5 ] is the former captain of the Fake Straw Hat Crew . He impersonated Monkey D. Luffy to benefit from his reputation, [ 1 ] but was later arrested by Sentomaru . [ 6 ] Afterwards, he began impersonating Eustass Kid , before being arrested again. [ 5 ] Due to his actions, he can be considered the main antagonist of the Return to Sabaody Arc .

name: Den

name: Devil Dias

name: Dalton
occupation: King of the Sakura Kingdom ; Captain of the Civilian Guard (former); Captain of Security of the Drum Kingdom (former);
devil_fruit_name: Ushi Ushi no Mi, Model: Bison
devil_fruit_english_name: Ox-Ox Fruit, Bison Model (VIZ); Ox-Ox Fruit (4Kids); Ox-Ox Fruit, Bison Form (Funimation)
intro_text: Dalton [ 3 ] [ 7 ] is the elected king of the Sakura Kingdom (successor to the Drum Kingdom). [ 2 ] He was formerly the captain of security ( 守備隊隊長 , shubi-tai taichō ? ) of the Drum Kingdom under King Wapol . [ 4 ] He also temporarily served as the captain of the civilian guard after the fall of Drum Kingdom. [ 3 ] He is an ally to the Straw Hat Pirates during the Drum Island Arc .

name: Denjiro
affiliation: Kouzuki Family ; Nine Red Scabbards ; Kyoshiro Family ; Kurozumi Family (undercover); Ninja-Pirate-Mink-Samurai Alliance (disbanded)
occupation: Daimyo ; Samurai ; Retainer of the Kouzuki Family (former); Yakuza Boss (former); Money Changer (former); Thief (former)
residence: Wano Country ( Flower Capital ) Wano Country ( Kibi )
alias: "Kyoshiro" ( 狂死郎 , Kyōshirō ? ) "Ushimitsu Kozo" ( 丑三つ小僧 , Ushimitsu Kozō ? , Meaning "Witching Hour Boy")
epithet: "Dozing Kyoshiro" ( 居眠り狂死郎 , Inemuri Kyōshirō ? , VIZ: "Napping Kyoshiro")
intro_text: Denjiro is a samurai from Wano Country and one of the Nine Red Scabbards who served as Kouzuki Oden 's retainers. [ 7 ] He currently serves as the daimyo of Kibi . [ 4 ] After becoming grief-stricken over Oden's execution 20 years ago, Denjiro's facial structure changed, and he started going under the name Kyoshiro . With this new identity, he became a yakuza boss and recruited followers to form the Kyoshiro Family . Eventually, he started working for Oden's usurper, shogun Kurozumi Orochi , as his money changer and bodyguard; he would successfully keep his true allegiance to the Kouzuki Family a secret and bide his time until the Scabbards finally reunited to take down Orochi and Kaidou . [ 2 ] [ 1 ] [ 8 ] Apart from his Kyoshiro identity, Denjiro would disguise himself at night to rob the wealthy Flower Capital citizens and give to the poor residents of Ebisu Town , earning him the moniker "Ushimitsu Kozo" . He also took care of Oden's daughter Kouzuki Hiyori for the past 13 years, raising her to become the oiran Komurasaki. [ 2 ]

name: Dice
intro_text: Dice is an underground champion in death matches who is an executive member of Gild Tesoro 's crew and works on Gran Tesoro as the dealer. He appears in One Piece Film: Gold . [ 3 ]

name: Didit
intro_text: Didit [ 2 ] is a noble living in the Goa Kingdom on Dawn Island . She is the wife of Outlook III , the biological mother of Sabo , and the adoptive mother of Sterry . [ 1 ]

name: Diamante
occupation: Pirate Executive Officer; Colosseum Proprietor (former); Swordsman
intro_text: Diamante is one of the top three officers of the Donquixote Pirates . [ 5 ] He occupies the Diamond seat of the Donquixote Family and is the leader of the crew's Diamante Army subdivision. [ 6 ] He was the proprietor of the Corrida Colosseum of Dressrosa , where he earned his title as the " Hero of the Colosseum " ( コロシアムの英雄 , Koroshiamu no Eiyū ? ) . [ 7 ] Due to his actions and role, he is one of the major antagonists in the Dressrosa Arc .

name: Diesel

name: Disc J

name: Diez Barrels
english_name: Diez Barrels X. Barrels ( WT100 , OPCG )
intro_text: Diez Barrels was a Marine officer who defected to become a pirate . Thirteen years ago, he was the captain of the Barrels Pirates while operating in the North Blue until he was killed by Donquixote Doflamingo during an attempt to sell the Ope Ope no Mi to the Marines. [ 1 ] He was also the father of X Drake . [ 3 ]

name: Dirt Boss
intro_text: The Dirt Boss is a giant mole awoken by Gedatsu during his work for Goro in his cover story . [ 1 ]

name: Dive
intro_text: Dive [ 3 ] is a member of the Kid Pirates . [ 1 ]

name: Dobby Ibadonbo
intro_text: Dobby Ibadonbo [ 3 ] is a man imprisoned in Level 6 of Impel Down . [ 2 ]

name: Doberman
intro_text: Vice Admiral Doberman [ 4 ] is a veteran Marine officer. He was one of the five Vice Admirals who led the Buster Call against Enies Lobby , [ 1 ] and also took part in the Summit War of Marineford . [ 5 ] Two years later, he is one of the nine Vice Admirals that took part in the Egghead Incident . [ 6 ] Due to his actions and role, he is a minor antagonist in the Enies Lobby and Marineford Arcs , and a supporting antagonist in the Egghead Arc .

name: Disco
epithet: "Walking Super Bazaar" ( 歩くスーパーバザール , Aruku Sūpābazāru ? )
intro_text: Disco is the owner of the now-bankrupt Human Auctioning House at Grove 1 in Sabaody Archipelago . [ 5 ]

name: Dobon
occupation: Shinuchi ; Vice Warden of the Prisoner Mine
intro_text: Dobon is a Shinuchi of the Beasts Pirates who served as a vice warden of the Prisoner Mine in the Udon region of Wano Country . [ 1 ]

name: Doctor
intro_text: Doctor Statistics Japanese Name: 医者 Romanized Name: Isha Official English Name: Doctor First Appearance: Chapter 77 ; Episode 32 [ 1 ] A doctor is a person who works to keep others healthy and well by treating their illnesses and injuries.

name: Dogra
intro_text: Dogra is a member of Dadan 's bandits that are active on Mt. Colubo on Dawn Island . He helped take care of Ace and Luffy for Garp .

name: Domo-kun
japanese_name: どーも君, ンーケ君
intro_text: Domo-kun and Nnke-kun are aliens planning to conquer the Earth. [ 2 ] They are the first joke characters created by Oda . They first appeared in Oda's short story Future Present from God . Later Domo-kun makes an appearance among the Buggy Pirates . [ 3 ] Oda answered a question in an SBS and drew both of them. [ 4 ] Nnke-kun appeared again alongside Pandaman on the cover of Volume 52 .

name: Doc Q
occupation: Titanic Captain (Captain of the Ninth Ship); Doctor
epithet: "Death God" ( 死神 , Shinigami ? , "Grim Reaper" in English versions)
intro_text: Doc Q , [ 6 ] known as "Death God" , is the doctor , [ 1 ] and one of the Ten Titanic Captains of the Blackbeard Pirates , serving as the captain of the ninth ship of the fleet . [ 3 ] Because of his chronically sick body, he is almost always seen riding his horse, Stronger (who is just as sick as he is), to get around. [ 1 ] Due to his actions and role, he is a minor antagonist in the Jaya Arc , a supporting antagonist in the Impel Down and Marineford Arcs , a minor antagonist in the Egghead Arc , and a major antagonist in the Final Saga .

name: Dogya
intro_text: Dogya [ 2 ] is a member of the Spade Pirates . [ 1 ]

name: Domino
intro_text: Domino is the Head Jailer of Impel Down serving under Warden Hannyabal . [ 2 ]

name: Doma
epithet: "Bohemian Knight" ( 遊騎士 , Yū Kishi ? )
intro_text: "Bohemian Knight" Doma is an infamous New World pirate captain who allied with Whitebeard . [ 1 ]

name: Donannoyo
intro_text: Donannoyo [ 2 ] is a Waiter of the Beasts Pirates who serves as a guard in the Prisoner Mine of the Udon region of Wano Country . [ 1 ]

name: Doll
intro_text: Doll is a Marine Vice Admiral and Commander of the G-14 Marine Base . [ 1 ] She is one of the nine Vice Admirals that took part in the Egghead Incident . [ 4 ] She serves as a minor antagonist in the Egghead Arc .

name: Donquino
intro_text: Donquino [ 4 ] was the helmsman [ 3 ] of the Roger Pirates . [ 1 ]

name: Donovan
intro_text: Donovan was one of the fifty mechanics of the Foxy Pirates . He left the crew sometime during the Timeskip . Luffy chose their flag instead of one of their shipwrights . [ 1 ]

name: Donquixote Family
english_name: Don Quixote Family (Viz) Donquixote Family (FUNimation subs)
intro_text: Donquixote Family Statistics Japanese Name: ドンキホーテ一族 Romanized Name: Donkihōte Ichizoku Official English Name: Don Quixote Family (Viz) Donquixote Family (FUNimation subs) [ 1 ] First Appearance: Chapter 233 ; Episode 151 [ 2 ] Kingdom: Dressrosa (Former) Status: Extant The Donquixote Family is one of the 20 royal families that founded the World Government 800 years ago, and one of the 19 that relocated to Mary Geoise to become the World Nobles . Before the World Government was founded, the family ruled over the kingdom of Dressrosa . [ 3 ] Donquixote Homing decided to forsake the World Noble statuses of himself and his wife and two sons, [ 4 ] and his eldest son Doflamingo retook the throne of Dressrosa 23 years later. [ 5 ] However, after ruling for ten years, he was removed from power by Monkey D. Luffy and Trafalgar Law . [ 6 ]

name: Donquixote Mjosgard
japanese_name: ドンキホーテ・ミョスガルド聖
english_name: Don Quixote Myosgard (VIZ, Funimation dub (Ep 545), Funimation) Don Quixote Mjosgard (Funimation, former) Donquixote Myosgard (Crunchyroll)
intro_text: Saint Donquixote Mjosgard was a World Noble and member of the Donquixote Family , one of the 20 royal families that founded the World Government . [ 4 ] After an attempt to recapture his freed fish-man slaves went awry, Mjosgard met Queen Otohime of Fish-Man Island 's Ryugu Kingdom [ 1 ] and became their ally and a supporter of their efforts to integrate with humans, opposing the extreme racism typically associated with the World Nobles' normal ideology. During the most recent Levely , he would directly oppose other World Nobles from threatening Otohime's family, [ 4 ] which resulted in his execution. [ 5 ] [ 2 ]

name: Donquixote Homing
japanese_name: ドンキホーテ・ホーミング
intro_text: Saint Donquixote Homing was a former World Noble of the Donquixote Family , one of the 20 royal families that founded the World Government . Homing withdrew from his position and left Mary Geoise in order to live a normal life with his wife and two sons, Doflamingo and Rosinante . After suffering two years of abuse from prejudiced civilians, Homing was killed by his then 10-year-old son, Doflamingo. [ 1 ]

english_name: Don Quixote Pirates; Donquixote Pirates ( OPCG )
