intro_text: Donquixote Pirates Statistics Japanese Name: ドンキホーテ海賊団 Romanized Name: Donkihōte Kaizoku-dan Official English Name: Don Quixote Pirates; Donquixote Pirates ( OPCG ) First Appearance: Chapter 233 ; Episode 151 [ 1 ] Captain: Donquixote Doflamingo Main Ship: Numancia Flamingo Total Bounty: Main Crew: At least 813,000,000 [ bounty 1 ] Organization: At least 1,308,000,000 [ bounty 2 ] At least 906,000,000 [ bounty 3 ] The Donquixote Pirates , also known as the Donquixote Family ( ドンキホーテファミリー , Donkihōte Famirī ? ) , was a powerful pirate crew led by the former Warlord , Donquixote Doflamingo . [ 2 ] They used to rule the kingdom of Dressrosa as the governing body, with their captain as the king. Due to their actions and role, they are the main antagonists of the Dressrosa Arc and the Dressrosa Saga as a whole. The crew is now disbanded after Doflamingo and the other higher-ups' defeat at the hands of the Straw Hat Pirates - Heart Pirates alliance , resulting in Doflamingo being dethroned as king and his title of a Warlord of the Sea being stripped from him. Most of the high-ranking members were arrested by Admiral Fujitora and locked up at Impel Down . [ 3 ]

name: Doringo
intro_text: Doringo [ 2 ] was a member of the Roger Pirates until the crew's dissolution. [ 1 ] His current whereabouts and status are unknown.

name: Donquixote Shivercalero
japanese_name: ドンキホーテ・シヴァーカレロ聖
intro_text: Saint Donquixote Shivercalero [ 2 ] is a World Noble from the Donquixote Family and the father of the late Donquixote Mjosgard . [ 1 ]

name: Doran
intro_text: Doran is a child who was captured and kept in the Biscuits Room on Punk Hazard . [ 1 ] He was freed with the rest of the children by the Straw Hat Pirates .

name: Donquixote Rosinante
japanese_name: ドンキホーテ・ロシナンテ
english_name: Don Quixote Rocinante (Viz); Donquixote Rosinante (Funimation subs); Don Quixote Rosinante (Funimation dub)
occupation: Marine Commander ; Pirate Elite Officer (undercover); World Noble (former)
alias: Corazon ( コラソン , Korason ? )
intro_text: Donquixote Rosinante [ 8 ] [ 1 ] was a former World Noble of the Donquixote Family descent, [ 4 ] being the second son of Donquixote Homing and the younger brother of Donquixote Doflamingo . [ 9 ] [ 8 ] After his family lost their status as Celestial Dragons and became pariahs, Rosinante was discovered by Sengoku and enlisted into the Marines , eventually reaching the rank of Commander . [ 1 ] Upon reuniting with Doflamingo, he feigned muteness and operated as an Elite Officer of the Donquixote Pirates , serving Doflamingo under the codename Corazon [ 10 ] [ 11 ] [ 3 ] while remaining an undercover Marine. Rosinante abandoned his post in an attempt to cure Trafalgar D. Water Law of his Amber Lead Syndrome. He eventually obtained the Ope Ope no Mi , forcing Law to eat it and thus giving him the means to save himself from the disease. However, his cover was blown by the former Corazon, Vergo , [ 12 ] and he was subsequently executed by Doflamingo. [ 13 ] Rosinante's kindness and sacrifice would serve as driving motivators for Law to one day avenge him by defeating Doflamingo.

name: Dosun
intro_text: Dosun [ 5 ] is a hammerhead shark fish-man and was one of the officers of the New Fish-Man Pirates . [ 2 ] Due to his actions and role, he is considered to be a major antagonist in the Fish-Man Island Arc .

name: Dorry
epithet: Dorry the Blue Ogre ( 青鬼のドリー , Ao-Oni no Dorī ? )
intro_text: Dorry the Blue Ogre is a giant from Elbaph and one of the two captains of the Giant Warrior Pirates alongside Brogy . Once an active and infamous threat in the seas long ago, Dorry became embroiled in a personal duel over a trivial dispute with his best friend and co-captain Brogy. This duel on Little Garden lasted for a century before being interrupted by the arrival of the Straw Hat Pirates and the machinations of Baroque Works . After finally settling their duel the two giant captains returned to Elbaph and their crew, and later became involved in the Egghead Incident to rescue the Straw Hat Pirates and bring them to safety to Elbaph. A century ago his bounty was 100,000,000, but due to years of inflation and a return to active piracy his bounty was updated to 1,800,000,000. He is a major ally of the Straw Hat Pirates during the Little Garden , Egghead , and Elbaph Arcs. After being transformed into a demon by Imu , he temporarily served as a minor antagonist during the Elbaph Arc.

name: Doubt Brothers
intro_text: The Doubt Brothers are Shinuchi [ 2 ] of the Beasts Pirates . [ 1 ]

name: Dotaku
intro_text: Dotaku [ 2 ] is a samurai who resides in Wano Country . [ 1 ]

name: Douglas Bullet
first_appearance: One Piece: Stampede ; My Plans Never Fail!! (cover)
epithet: "Demon Heir" ( “鬼”の跡目 , “Oni” no Atome ? )
intro_text: Douglas Bullet , known as the Demon Heir , is the main antagonist of One Piece: Stampede . After serving as a child soldier in his homeland of Galzburg , he joined the Roger Pirates and was later imprisoned in Impel Down for over 20 years. He escaped during the mass breakout caused by Monkey D. Luffy and Marshall D. Teach , and plotted to become Pirate King by luring the world's most powerful people to the Pirates Festival and attempting to kill them. [ 1 ]

name: Dr. Fishbonen
japanese_name: Dr. フィッシュボーネン
intro_text: Dr. Fishbonen [ 2 ] is a Marine naval surgeon (軍医 Gun'i ) [ 3 ] stationed at Marineford .

name: Dory
affiliation: Marines ( SWORD ); Drake Pirates ; Beasts Pirates ( Tobiroppo , former); Barrels Pirates (defected); Ninja-Pirate-Mink-Samurai Alliance (disbanded)
occupation: Captain of SWORD ; Pirate (undercover); Captain (undercover); Shinuchi (undercover, former); Marine Rear Admiral (former)
alias: Dory ( ドリィ , Dorii ? , English version: Drie)
epithet: "Red Flag" ( 赤旗 , Akahata ? )
devil_fruit_name: Ryu Ryu no Mi, Model: Allosaurus
intro_text: "Red Flag" X Drake (pronounced as "Diez Drake") is the captain of the Marine Secret Special Unit SWORD . In order to go undercover as a pirate , he publicly defected from his position as rear admiral [ 8 ] and founded the Drake Pirates . [ 2 ] [ 1 ] He is one of twelve pirates referred to as the " Worst Generation ", [ 13 ] and before the two-year timeskip had a bounty of 222,000,000. [ 1 ] Drake is the son of the Marine-turned-pirate Diez Barrels , and was affiliated with the Barrels Pirates until he defected to the Marines. As a young adult, he was called Dory . [ 6 ] [ 14 ] In Drake's endeavor as an undercover spy, [ 2 ] he and his crew became subordinate to the Beasts Pirates , led by Kaidou of the Four Emperors , over the two-year timeskip. [ 3 ] Drake served as one of the crew's Shinuchi , specifically one of strongest six called Tobiroppo . [ 4 ] His treachery was eventually uncovered, however, leading him to ally himself with the Ninja-Pirate-Mink-Samurai Alliance . [ 5 ]

name: Dragon Number Twenty-One
intro_text: Dragon Number Twenty-One [ 2 ] is a dragon created by Vegapunk which resides on Punk Hazard . It was designed to be smaller than Vegapunk's first successful dragon, Dragon Number Thirteen , giving it more quickness. It is a minor antagonist in the Punk Hazard Arc .

name: Dragon Number Thirteen
intro_text: Dragon Number Thirteen [ 2 ] was a dragon created by Vegapunk to guard Punk Hazard . He carried out this duty even after Vegapunk and the World Government 's departure until he was killed by Roronoa Zoro four years later. [ 3 ] He was named by one of the World Nobles . [ 4 ]

name: Dracule Mihawk
japanese_name: ジュラキュール・ミホーク
affiliation: Cross Guild ; Seven Warlords of the Sea (former)
occupation: Pirate ; Cross Guild Officer ; Warlord of the Sea (former)
epithet: "Hawk Eyes Mihawk" ( 鷹の目のミホーク , Taka no Me no Mihōku ? , "Hawk-Eye" in the English versions) "Strongest Swordsman in the World" ( 世界最強の剣士 , Sekai Saikyō no Kenshi ? ) "Marine Hunter" ( 海兵狩り , Kaihei-gari ? , VIZ: "Naval Hunter")
intro_text: Dracule "Hawk Eyes" Mihawk [ 15 ] is a world-famous pirate currently recognized as the strongest swordsman in the world. [ 8 ] Known as the "Marine Hunter" in his early career, [ 9 ] Mihawk stood as one of the Seven Warlords of the Sea (the first to be revealed and formally introduced) [ 3 ] until the group's dissolution, [ 4 ] and was for a time the sole human resident of Kuraigana Island . [ 5 ] Since then, he has become a founding executive of the Cross Guild , alongside fellow ex-Warlord Crocodile . [ 2 ] [ 16 ] Mihawk once led a renowned rivalry with Shanks , currently one of the Four Emperors . In turn, he is viewed as the ultimate opponent by Roronoa Zoro , who pursues his own dream of becoming the world's strongest swordsman. Though Mihawk easily won their first encounter, he grew to respect Zoro, and agreed to mentor him in further swordsmanship during the timeskip . [ 17 ] [ 18 ] Like the other ex-Warlords, Mihawk has been cloned by Dr. Vegapunk to create one of the Seraphim , S-Hawk , as part of a project to replace the Warlord system. [ 19 ] Due to his actions and role, Mihawk can be considered a supporting antagonist in the Baratie Arc and one of the major antagonists in the Marineford Arc , where he took part in the Summit War of Marineford on the side of the Marines , along with most of the other Warlords of the Sea. [ 20 ]

name: Dragon
japanese_name: モンキー・ D ・ドラゴン
affiliation: Revolutionary Army ; Clan of D. ; Freedom Fighters (former); Marines (defected)
occupation: Supreme Commander of the Revolutionary Army; Captain of the Freedom Fighters (former)
epithet: "Rebellious Dragon" ( 反逆竜 , Hangyaku Ryū ? , Funimation: "The Insurgent Serpent") "World's Worst Criminal" ( 世界最悪の犯罪者 , Sekai Saiaku no Hanzaisha ? , Funimation: "World's Most Heinous Criminal")
intro_text: Monkey D. Dragon , [ 10 ] also known as the "Rebellious Dragon" , [ 7 ] is the supreme commander [ 6 ] and founder of the Revolutionary Army (originally the Freedom Fighters ). [ 3 ] A former Marine , his disgust with the organization's actions in the God Valley Incident , and its brutality in the Ohara Incident led to him forming the Revolutionary Army to oppose the World Government in its entirety. [ 4 ] Having campaigned toward its downfall for over thirty years, he is labeled the " World's Worst Criminal ". [ 5 ] Dragon is the father of Monkey D. Luffy and the son of Monkey D. Garp , and likewise was born and raised in the Goa Kingdom . [ 2 ] He was also responsible for saving Sabo 's life after a World Noble attack, eventually raising the boy into his second-in-command. Dragon was first introduced in the Loguetown Arc , where he helped Luffy escape from Marine captain Smoker 's clutches. Since then, he has periodically appeared as a key background character.

name: Drake Pirates
intro_text: Drake Pirates Statistics Japanese Name: ドレーク海賊団 Romanized Name: Dorēku Kaizokudan Official English Name: Drake Pirates First Appearance: Chapter 498 ; Episode 392 [ 1 ] Captain: X Drake Main Ship: Liberal Hind Total Bounty: At least 222,000,000 [ bounty 1 ] The Drake Pirates are an infamous and notable pirate crew originating from the North Blue , and are led by X Drake , who is later revealed to still be part of the Marines as a member of SWORD . They were introduced on Sabaody Archipelago around the time the Straw Hat Pirates arrived there two years ago and are part of the Worst Generation . [ 1 ]

name: Donquixote Doflamingo
japanese_name: ドンキホーテ・ドフラミンゴ
english_name: Don Quixote Doflamingo (VIZ); Donquixote Doflamingo (Funimation subs)
affiliation: Donquixote Pirates ; Impel Down ; Underworld ; World Government (secret); Seven Warlords of the Sea (former); Dressrosa (former)
occupation: Pirate Captain ; Prisoner of the Great Prison; Underworld Broker ; King of Dressrosa (former); World Noble (former)
residence: Mary Geoise (former); Downs (former); Spider Miles (former); Dressrosa (former); Impel Down
alias: "Joker" ( ジョーカー , Jōkā ? )
epithet: "Heavenly Yaksha" ( 天夜叉 , Ten Yasha ? , English versions: "Heavenly Demon")
intro_text: Donquixote Doflamingo , [ 4 ] nicknamed "Heavenly Yaksha" , [ 9 ] is the captain of the Donquixote Pirates . [ 14 ] Before his imprisonment, [ 15 ] he was a member of the Seven Warlords of the Sea with a frozen bounty of 340,000,000, [ 16 ] as well as the most influential underworld broker under the codename "Joker" . [ 8 ] [ 2 ] He is also a former World Noble , descended from the Donquixote Family . [ 6 ] He is the first son of the late Donquixote Homing [ 17 ] and the older brother of the late Rosinante , [ 18 ] both of whom he killed out of feeling betrayed by them. [ 19 ] [ 18 ] Doflamingo became the King of Dressrosa after taking the throne from Riku Doldo III eight years before the start of the series. [ 20 ] He ruled the country tyrannically until he was stripped of his positions as a Warlord of the Sea and king after he was defeated by Monkey D. Luffy near the end of the Dressrosa Arc . After Doflamingo was arrested by Admiral Fujitora along with most of his crew, [ 21 ] he was locked up at Impel Down and placed in Level 6. [ 22 ] Vegapunk later cloned Doflamingo as one of the Seraphim to replace the Warlords. [ 23 ] Doflamingo is first introduced during the Skypiea Saga , having a minor role during its epilogue as Bellamy 's superior. He is also a major antagonist in the Marineford Arc where he took part in the Summit War of Marineford and sided with the Marines , along with most of the other Warlords of the Sea, and the main antagonist of the Dressrosa Arc and the Dressrosa Saga as a whole, being the impetus for the entirety of the saga's events. [ 2 ]

name: Drip
intro_text: Drip was a member of the Fake Straw Hat Crew who was posing as the real Sanji . [ 1 ] When the crew switched to posing as the Kid Pirates , Drip impersonated Killer . [ 3 ]

name: Drophy
alias: "Miss Merry Christmas" ( ミス・メリークリスマス , Misu Merī Kurisumasu ? , 4Kids: "Ms. Groundhog's Day"; WT100 : "Miss Merrychristmas")
epithet: "Town-Collapser" Drophy ( 町落としのドロフィー , Machi Otoshi no Dorofī ? )
intro_text: "Town-Collapser" Drophy , [ 2 ] better known by her alias Miss Merry Christmas , is a former officer agent partnered with Mr. 4 . [ 1 ] She was a major antagonist during the Arabasta Arc . After the downfall of Baroque Works, she works as a "princess" at the new Spiders Cafe alongside most of her former colleagues.

name: Drug Peclo
epithet: "Major Undertaker" ( 大手葬儀屋 , Ōte Sōgi-ya ? )
intro_text: Drug Peclo , also known as the Major Undertaker , is an emperor of the Underworld . [ 1 ]

name: Dwarves
intro_text: Dwarves Statistics Japanese Name: 小人族 Romanized Name: Kobito-zoku Official English Name: Little People First Appearance: Chapter 711 ; Episode 640 [ 1 ] Features: Tiny Species Thick tails Homeland: Green Bit Slave Price: 700,000 [ 2 ] Dwarves are a race in the One Piece world . They were first mentioned on a list of slave prices that Duval gave to Sanji . They sell for 700,000 as slaves. [ 2 ] They were first seen in Green Bit when Robin and Usopp were exploring the forest at the northern part of the island off the coast of Dressrosa , they discovered a tribe of dwarves living on the island. [ 3 ] [ 4 ]

name: Duval
occupation: Leader of the Rosy Life Riders (formerly the Flying Fish Riders); Slave trader (former); Mafia
epithet: "Iron Mask Duval" ( 鉄仮面のデュバル , Tetsu Kamen no Dyubaru ? ) ;
intro_text: Duval [ 3 ] is the leader of the Rosy Life Riders (originally the Flying Fish Riders), active around the Sabaody Archipelago and Fish-Man Island . Initially an enemy of the Straw Hat Pirates [ 1 ] due to a personal grudge against Sanji , he has since become their ally.

name: Ducky Bree
intro_text: Ducky Bree [ 2 ] is a member of the Spade Pirates . [ 1 ]

name: Drum Island
intro_text: Drum Island Statistics Japanese Name: ドラム島 Romanized Name: Doramu-tō English Name: Drum Island First appearance: Chapter 132 ; Episode 79 [ 1 ] Region: Paradise Type: Winter Island Drum Island [ 2 ] is a Winter Island in Paradise . [ 1 ] It is the location of the Sakura Kingdom , formerly known as the Drum Kingdom; the birthplace of Tony Tony Chopper , the doctor of the Straw Hat Pirates ; and the setting of the Drum Island Arc . It was the third island on the Grand Line visited by the Straw Hats.

name: Eddy
intro_text: Eddy was the navigator of the Bellamy Pirates . [ 2 ]

name: Edison
intro_text: Edison , also designated as Punk-03 ( PUNK-03 , Panku-Surī ? ) , is one of the six satellites of Dr. Vegapunk , embodying his aspect of "thinking". [ 3 ] He is a major companion and ally to the Straw Hat Pirates during the Egghead Arc .

name: Egana
intro_text: Egana [ 3 ] is Margarita 's employer. [ 2 ]

name: Edward Weevil
japanese_name: エドワード・ウィーブル
alias: "Whitebeard Jr." ( 白ひげJr. , Shirohige Junia ? ) (self-proclaimed)
intro_text: Edward Weevil , [ 6 ] or " Whitebeard Jr. ", is a pirate and self-proclaimed son of the late Edward "Whitebeard" Newgate . He is the son of Buckingham Stussy , the self-proclaimed lover of Newgate. [ 1 ] He was initiated into the Seven Warlords of the Sea sometime during the two-year timeskip, [ 2 ] and served in their ranks until the Warlords' dissolution. [ 3 ] Weevil was first mentioned by Marine commodore Brannew in a discussion of the, at-time, current Warlord ranks to several high-ranking Marine officers, but was not explicitly named until after Donquixote Doflamingo 's defeat. [ 7 ]

name: Egghead
intro_text: Egghead Current 3 years ago Original Statistics Japanese Name: エッグヘッド Romanized Name: Egguheddo English Name: Egghead; Egg Head (formerly) First appearance: Chapter 1061 ; Episode 1090 [ 1 ] Region: New World [ 1 ] Type: Winter Island [ 2 ] Affiliates: Vegapunk ; World Government ( SSG ) [ 1 ] Egghead , formerly known as Marines Science Division: Lab 8 ( 海軍科学班第8研究所 , Kaigun Kagaku-han Daihachi Kenkyūjo ? ) , [ 3 ] is a winter island in the New World belonging to the World Government that houses the laboratory of Dr. Vegapunk who renamed the island. [ 4 ] Designed to be "500 years in the future", [ 1 ] [ 4 ] it became labelled as a Future Island ( 未来島 , Mirai-jima ? ) . It is the primary setting of the Egghead Arc .

name: Dressrosa
affiliation: World Government ( Riku Family ) Donquixote Pirates ( Donquixote Family )
intro_text: Dressrosa Statistics Japanese Name: ドレスローザ Romanized Name: Doresurōza English Name: Dressrosa First appearance: Chapter 682 ; Episode 608 [ 1 ] Region: New World Affiliates: World Government ( Riku Family ) Donquixote Pirates ( Donquixote Family ) Dressrosa is an island and kingdom in the New World , [ 2 ] and one of the twenty kingdoms that founded the World Government . [ 3 ] It was first mentioned by Vergo . [ 4 ] Dressrosa is the second island visited by the Straw Hat Pirates in the New World and the primary setting of the Dressrosa Arc . Dressrosa is also known as the "Land of Love and Passion" ( 愛と情熱の国 , Ai to Jōnetsu no Kuni ? ) . [ 5 ]

name: Eikon
affiliation: Tontatta Kingdom ; Tonta Corps ; Straw Hat Grand Fleet
intro_text: Eikon [ 2 ] is a dwarf from the Tontatta Kingdom and a member of the Tontatta Pirates . [ 1 ] [ 3 ]

name: Eggplant Soldier
intro_text: Eggplant Soldier is a soldier of the Big Mom Pirates , serving as a guard at the Whole Cake Chateau . He was Sanji 's helper during his stay at the castle before his planned wedding to Charlotte Pudding . [ 1 ]

name: East Blue
intro_text: East Blue Statistics Japanese Name: 東の海 Romanized Name: Īsuto Burū Official English Name: East Blue First Appearance: Chapter 1 ; Episode 1 Compass: Ordinary compass Literal Meaning: Ocean of the East The East Blue is the ocean which makes up the east part of the Blue Sea split by the Red Line and the Grand Line . It is separated from the North Blue by the Red Line and the South Blue by the Paradise half of the Grand Line. [ 1 ] The East Blue is commonly known as the weakest of all the seas. [ 1 ] Pirates who are considered powerful and threatening in this sea are regarded as low rate compared to pirates from the other seas and especially in the Grand Line. Because of this, it is also seen as a symbol of peace by those on the side of justice . [ 2 ] Ironically, despite its poor fame, the East Blue was the birthplace of the most famous pirate of all time, the late Pirate King Gol D. Roger . In the anime, it is also referred to as the Sea of Schemes ( 計略の海 , Keiryaku no Umi ? ) . [ 3 ] Many other powerful and world-renowned characters also hail from the East Blue: Marine hero and Vice Admiral , Monkey D. Garp ; the emperor Monkey D. Luffy , the pirate of the Worst Generation , Roronoa Zoro , as well as their crewmates Nami , a navigator , and Usopp , a sniper ; and the Revolutionary Army leader, Monkey D. Dragon , and his right-hand man, Sabo . Other notable pirate crews from this sea include the Spade Pirates and the Barto Club . It was the setting of the first six arcs of the manga and anime and the anime-only Warship Island Arc .

name: Edward Newgate
japanese_name: エドワード・二ューゲート
affiliation: Whitebeard Pirates ; Rocks Pirates (former); Four Emperors
epithet: "Whitebeard" ( 白ひげ , Shirohige ? , "White Beard" in the edited dub) ; "The Strongest Man in the World" ( 世界最強の男 , Sekai Saikyō no Otoko ? ) "The Man Closest to One Piece" ( ひとつなぎの大秘宝 に最も近い男 , Wan Pīsu ni Mottomo Chikai Otoko ? )
intro_text: Edward Newgate , [ 12 ] more commonly known as "Whitebeard" , was a legendary pirate and the captain of the Whitebeard Pirates . Widely known as the "Strongest Man in the World" , he was considered the "Man Closest to One Piece " after Gol D. Roger 's death. [ 7 ] Growing up as an orphan on the island of Sphinx , Newgate went on to become a pirate, eventually joining the legendary Rocks Pirates . Sometime after the Rocks Pirates' disbanding, he went on to form his own crew, taking on the nickname "Whitebeard" and eventually becoming one of the Four Emperors that rule over the New World . [ 4 ] [ 5 ] He shared a friendly rivalry with Roger, to whom he lent one of his crewmates, Kouzuki Oden , so that Oden could help Roger discover the final island of the Grand Line , a goal that Whitebeard had no interest in. Following Roger's death, Whitebeard became recognized as the strongest man in the world, a fact complimented by having the highest active bounty whilst alive, and the second highest bounty of any pirate in history. Later in life, Whitebeard unknowingly took Roger's son, Portgas D. Ace , under his wing. After Ace was arrested by the Marines during a doomed attempt to hunt down the traitorous crew member Marshall D. Teach , Ace was to be executed by the Marines as a display to end the Great Pirate Era . Whitebeard, his crew and his allies all laid siege to Marineford to rescue Ace, resulting in the Summit War of Marineford which concluded with the deaths of both Ace and Whitebeard at the hands of Akainu and Teach, respectively. In his final moments, Whitebeard announced to the world that the One Piece did in fact exist, inspiring a new wave of pirates and effectively beginning the New Age . [ 13 ] Whitebeard was an ally of Monkey D. Luffy and a central figure overall during the Marineford Arc .

name: Eigis Kingdom
intro_text: Eigis Kingdom Statistics Japanese Name: エイギス王国 Romanized Name: Eigisu Ōkoku English Name: Eigis Kingdom First appearance: Chapter 1086 ; Episode 1120 (mentioned) [ 1 ] Region: Grand Line The Eigis Kingdom is a nation somewhere on the Grand Line that is ruled by King Tea IV . [ 2 ] The citizens of the kingdom participated in the Eight-Nation Revolution , rebelling against their monarchs. [ 1 ]

name: Elbaph
intro_text: Elbaph Statistics Japanese Name: エルバフ Romanized Name: Erubafu English Name: Elbaph (VIZ, 4Kids, Crunchyroll subs); Elbaf (Funimation); Erhab (Odex) First appearance: Chapter 865 ; Episode 836 [ 1 ] Region: New World [ 2 ] Elbaph [ 3 ] is a nation in the New World that is inhabited by giants , and is unaffiliated with the World Government . [ 4 ] Officially, Elbaph Island ( エルバフ島 , Erubafu-tō ? ) contains the Warland Kingdom ( ウォーランド王国 , Wōrando Ōkoku ? ) , but the nation is commonly referred to by the general term "Elbaph". [ 5 ] Elbaph has always been a fiercely independent nation renowned for its warmongering culture; it is considered to be the strongest country in the world due to its mighty warriors. [ 6 ] [ 7 ] During the past century, King Harald sought to shift Elbaph's culture to prioritize scholarship and diplomacy, and pursued affiliation with the World Government . However, the government solely valued Elbaph for its fighting power, creating conflicts that resulted in Harald's death. In the present day, the World Government is actively attempting to annex Elbaph by force. Imu has equated Elbaph's defiance with the Will of D. [ 8 ] It was first mentioned during the Little Garden Arc and was a desired destination of both Luffy and Usopp . [ 9 ] [ 10 ] It was shown for the first time in a flashback during the Whole Cake Island Arc . [ 1 ] It is the primary setting of the Elbaph Arc .

name: Elmy
intro_text: Elmy [ 3 ] is an infamous New World pirate captain who allied with Whitebeard . [ 1 ]

name: Elizabello II
epithet: "The Fighting King" ( 戦う王 , Tatakau Ō ? )
intro_text: "The Fighting King" Elizabello II [ 5 ] is the king of the Prodence Kingdom . He is also a fighter who joined as a gladiator at the Corrida Colosseum to compete for the Mera Mera no Mi . [ 1 ] He is an ally of Luffy during the Dressrosa Arc .

name: Emma
intro_text: Emma is a member of the Kid Pirates . [ 2 ]

name: Emperors
english_name: Four Emperors; Yonko ( Grand Pirate Show )
intro_text: Four Emperors Statistics Japanese Name: 四皇 Romanized Name: Yonkō Official English Name: Four Emperors; Yonko ( Grand Pirate Show ) First Appearance: Chapter 96 ; Episode 45 [ 1 ] [ 2 ] Affiliation: Three Great Powers Occupation: Pirate Captains Total Bounty: 14,233,900,000 [ bounty 1 ] [ 3 ] [ 4 ] [ 5 ] [ 6 ] 15,295,600,000 [ bounty 2 ] [ 7 ] 18,094,000,000 [ bounty 3 ] [ 7 ] The Four Emperors are four pirates considered to be the most notorious and powerful captains in the world . Currently, these four are recognized as Shanks , Marshall D. Teach , Monkey D. Luffy , and Buggy , with known predecessors being Edward Newgate , Charlotte Linlin , and Kaidou . Historically, the Emperors have dominated the second half of the Grand Line (the " New World "), captaining powerful subordinates and massive fleets while exerting influence and control over dozens of separate pirate crews and even full-fledged nations. As such, the World Government views them collectively as one of the Three Great Powers underpinning world stability. However, no formal system supports them; each Emperor works as an independent force, and may oppose or align with whomever they see fit. With the rise of the Worst Generation , the Emperors underwent much upheaval, beginning with Teach's murder of Newgate during Summit War of Marineford [ 8 ] and usurpation of his position. [ 9 ] [ 10 ] Two years after the war, Kaidou and Linlin formed an unprecedented two-Emperor alliance , only to be toppled by the Ninja-Pirate-Mink-Samurai Alliance in the Raid on Onigashima . Subsequently, Luffy and Buggy were declared new Emperors, the former for defeating Kaidou in combat and the latter for his unwitting "leadership" of the infamous Cross Guild . [ 3 ] The concept of the Four Emperors was first revealed by Garp in the Post-Enies Lobby Arc , and this group has had an especially large role in the second half of the series. Luffy has had varying relationships with each Emperor, but intends to defeat all of them in his quest to become the Pirate King. [ 11 ] Big Mom and Kaidou respectively served as the main antagonists of the Whole Cake Island and Wano Country Sagas .

name: Emet
epithet: "Iron Giant" ( 鉄の巨人 , Tetsu no Kyojin ? )
intro_text: Emet , [ 3 ] also known as the Iron Giant , is a robot created around the time of the Void Century who was a friend of Joy Boy . Since that time it has been mostly de-powered, only reactivating in two known instances. The first instance occurred 200 years ago when it nearly attacked Mary Geoise . Afterwards, it was smuggled away and kept on Egghead , [ 1 ] [ 4 ] where in the present day it was used to guard Vegapunk 's prerecorded video being broadcasted from within itself. [ 5 ] After hearing the Drums of Liberation from Monkey D. Luffy , Emet powered back up and aided the Straw Hat Pirates in battling the Five Elders . [ 6 ] Emet is an ally during the Egghead Arc .

name: Endurance Curry Pirates
japanese_name: ふんばりカレー海賊団
intro_text: Endurance Curry Pirates Statistics Japanese Name: ふんばりカレー海賊団 Romanized Name: Funbari Karē Kaizoku-dan Official English Name: Funbari Curry Pirates ( WT100 2nd ) First Appearance: WSJ 2000 Issue 8 ; [ 1 ] Chapter 1122 ; Episode 1153 [ 2 ] Captain: Hippie The Endurance Curry Pirates are a crew of pirates originally created as a response to a reader contest featured in Weekly Shonen Jump in the year 2000. Designed by Eiichiro Oda together with Nobuhiro Watsuki , the author of Rurouni Kenshin , and Hiroyuki Takei , the author of Shaman King , the crew would eventually be canonized into One Piece 24 years later in Chapter 1122 .

name: Enies Lobby
intro_text: Enies Lobby Statistics Japanese Name: エニエスロビー Romanized Name: Eniesu Robī English Name: Enies Lobby First appearance: Chapter 358 ; Episode 263 [ 1 ] Region: Paradise [ 1 ] Type: Afternoon/Never-night Island [ 1 ] Affiliates: World Government [ 2 ] ; Marines Enies Lobby was a World Government establishment located on a Paradise island where night never fell. [ 1 ] It, along with Impel Down and Marineford , comprised the three major Government strongholds triangulating the Tarai Current via the Gates of Justice . Reputed worldwide as the Judicial Island ( 司法の島 , Shihō no Shima ? ) , Enies Lobby hosted both CP9 headquarters and the (mostly ceremonial) courthouse for processing Impel Down sentences. These were attended by a mixed garrison of Cipher Pol agents, Marines , and special personnel, totaling some 10,000 troops in all. After a combined attack from Straw Hat Pirates , the Galley-La Company and the Franky Family —which inadvertently triggered a full-scale Buster Call —the island was completely annihilated, and left in ruins. [ 3 ] It is unknown if anything has been rebuilt since. It was the main setting of the Enies Lobby Arc .

name: Enel
epithet: "God Enel" ( 神 ・エネル , Goddo Eneru ? )
intro_text: Enel is the former tyrannical " God " of Skypiea . [ 1 ] Once an inhabitant of Birka , Enel destroyed his homeland through the powers of the Goro Goro no Mi and led a small army of loyalists to take over Skypiea. As the nation's new "God," he ruthlessly exploited its populace and resources to build a massive airship aimed toward "Fairy Vearth" —the moon . [ 5 ] Though defeated by Monkey D. Luffy some six years into his reign, Enel nevertheless completed the ship, and successfully left the planet to become the moon's new ruler. [ 6 ] Enel is the main antagonist of the Skypiea Arc and thus the main antagonist of the Sky Island Saga as a whole. Subsequently, he became the central character of the Enel's Great Space Operations cover arc .

name: Enishida
intro_text: Enishida is a member of the Kuja and one of Boa Hancock 's attendants in her castle. She is a lady's maid . [ 2 ]

name: Epoida
intro_text: Epoida [ 3 ] is an infamous New World pirate captain who was once a member of the Whitebeard Pirates , [ 4 ] before forming his own crew subordinate to Whitebeard . [ 1 ]

name: Ensign
intro_text: Marine Ranks Statistics Explained in: SBS Volume 8 [ 1 ] SBS Volume 24 [ 2 ] SBS Volume 29 [ 3 ] SBS Volume 98 [ 4 ] The ranks within the Marine System are fairly straightforward, where each rank is clearly delineated. [ 1 ] Officers present at Marine Headquarters are considered the elite forces of the Marines, about three ranks higher in terms of power from those of the same rank at other bases. All ranks present from "Lieutenant" above are usually trained here, exceptions being those in command of other Marine bases which includes Axe-Hand Morgan and Nezumi . [ 3 ] This page will list the Marine ranks and the soldiers who hold the titles.

name: Erio
intro_text: Erio [ 4 ] was a member of the Roger Pirates who acted as their information broker ( 情報屋 , jōhō-ya ? ) [ 3 ] until the crew's dissolution. His current whereabouts and status are unknown.

name: Eris
intro_text: Eris [ 4 ] was the mother of Marshall D. Teach and the wife of Rocks D. Xebec , a member of the Davy Family . [ 5 ]

name: Esta
intro_text: Esta is a citizen of Dressrosa . [ 1 ]

name: Estrid
intro_text: Estrid was the mother of Loki , as well as the former arranged wife to king Harald , making her Elbaph 's latest queen . She was also the daughter of a pureblooded and ancient influential lineage, akin to nobility . [ 1 ] She passed away 62 years ago of an unknown illness . [ 2 ]

name: Ettara Chaunkai
japanese_name: エッタラ・チャウンカイ
intro_text: Ettara Chaunkai [ 2 ] is a citizen of Dressrosa . [ 1 ]

name: Erik
intro_text: Erik is an Arabasta Kingdom citizen and a former member of the Rebel Army led by Koza . He is from Suiren , a town that had been completely dried out. [ 3 ]

name: Evil Black Drum Kingdom
japanese_name: 悪 ブラックドラム王国
intro_text: Evil Black Drum Kingdom Statistics Japanese Name: 悪 ブラックドラム王国 Romanized Name: Waru Burakku Doramu Ōkoku English Name: Evil Black Drum Kingdom First appearance: Chapter 635 ( cover ); [ 1 ] Episode 778 [ 2 ] Region: South Blue [ 2 ] Affiliates: World Government The Evil Black Drum Kingdom is the kingdom Wapol currently rules with his wife Kinderella and his dog Hakowan by his side. [ 1 ]

name: Fake Chopper
intro_text: Nora Gitsune [ 4 ] is a fox who filled the role of the " pet " for the Fake Straw Hat Crew , who did not know that the real Chopper is the crew 's doctor and is given human -traits by the Hito Hito no Mi . [ 2 ]

name: Ethanbaron V. Nusjuro
japanese_name: イーザンバロン・ V ・ナス寿郎聖
occupation: Co-Head of the World Government (Public) ; Warrior God of Finance ( 財務武神 , Zaimu Bushin ? , English versions: "Godhead of Finance")
intro_text: Saint Ethanbaron V. Nusjuro [ 3 ] [ 4 ] is a World Noble and one of the Five Elders who publicly head the World Government , [ 1 ] holding the title of Warrior God of Finance . [ 3 ] Due to his actions and role, he is one of the secondary antagonists of the Egghead Arc . Along with the other Elders, he is one of the main antagonists of the Final Saga and one of the overarching antagonists of the One Piece series.

name: Fake Franky
intro_text: Turco [ 4 ] is a member of the Fake Straw Hat Crew and masqueraded as Franky . [ 2 ] When the crew switched to posing as the Kid Pirates , Turco impersonated Wire . [ 5 ]

name: Fake Luffy
epithet: "Three-Tongued" Demalo Black ( 三枚舌のデマロ・ブラック , Sanmai-jita no Demaro Burakku ? ) (Viz, Funimation: "Triple-Tongued")
intro_text: "Three-Tongued" Demalo Black [ 5 ] is the former captain of the Fake Straw Hat Crew . He impersonated Monkey D. Luffy to benefit from his reputation, [ 1 ] but was later arrested by Sentomaru . [ 6 ] Afterwards, he began impersonating Eustass Kid , before being arrested again. [ 5 ] Due to his actions, he can be considered the main antagonist of the Return to Sabaody Arc .

name: Eustass Kid
epithet: "Captain" ( キャプテン , Kyaputen ? )
intro_text: Eustass "Captain" Kid [ 7 ] is a notorious pirate from the South Blue and the captain of the Kid Pirates . [ 1 ] He is one of twelve pirates who are referred to as the " Worst Generation ". [ 8 ] Kid first appeared at the Sabaody Archipelago at the same time Monkey D. Luffy and his crew arrived. Both were described as members of the "Eleven Supernovas", pirates who had congregated on the island who all had a bounty of more than 100,000,000. After briefly fighting alongside Luffy while escaping an attack by the Marines , he fled the archipelago and would later spectate the Summit War of Marineford alongside the other Supernovas. During Luffy's two years of training, Kid challenged one of the Four Emperors , Shanks , but lost one of his arms to Benn Beckman in the process. [ 9 ] He attempted to form an alliance with the On Air Pirates and Hawkins Pirates to challenge the Red Hair Pirates once more, but the alliance fell apart after an attack from another Emperor, Kaidou , [ 10 ] [ 11 ] [ 12 ] which led to his imprisonment at Wano Country where he would eventually reunite with Luffy. Though nominally acting in self-interest towards vengeance and glory, Kid's assistance towards the Ninja-Pirate-Mink-Samurai Alliance was instrumental in defeating Kaidou, Big Mom and the Beasts Pirates . After leaving Wano, Kid and his crew arrived at Elbaph and decided to challenge Shanks once more. However, the entire crew and their ship were decimated by Shanks and his allies, Dorry and Brogy . [ 13 ] Kid was originally introduced with a bounty of 315,000,000, largely due to a high number of civilian casualties caused by him and his crew, thus exceeding Luffy 's when they first arrived at the Sabaody Archipelago. [ 14 ] Sometime during the timeskip, his bounty was raised from 315,000,000 to 470,000,000. [ 6 ] Kid's bounty was eventually raised to 3,000,000,000 for his role in defeating Big Mom of the Four Emperors alongside Trafalgar Law during the Raid on Onigashima . Due to his actions, Kid can be considered a minor ally during the Sabaody Archipelago Arc as well as a major ally during the Wano Country Arc .

name: Emporio Ivankov
japanese_name: エンポリオ・イワンコフ
affiliation: Revolutionary Army ; Freedom Fighters (former); Kamabakka Kingdom ; Newkama Land (former)
occupation: G Army Commander of the Revolutionary Army; Queen of the Kamabakka Kingdom; Queen of Newkama Land (former); Slave (former)
epithet: "Okama King" ( オカマ王 , Okama Ō ? ) ; "Miracle Person" ( 奇跡の人 , Kiseki no Hito ? )
devil_fruit_english_name: Horm-Horm Fruit (VIZ and Funimation); Hor-Hor Fruit (One Piece Official YouTube Channel)
intro_text: Emporio Ivankov , [ 7 ] or Iva for short, is the queen of the Kamabakka Kingdom , known as "Okama King" and a "Miracle Person" . [ 8 ] He is one of the Revolutionary Army 's founding members, [ 2 ] as well as the commander of the G Army, which covers the Grand Line . [ 9 ] A former slave of the World Nobles , [ 10 ] he escaped during the Native Hunting Competition on God Valley and was responsible for the God Valley Incident along with Ginny . [ 11 ] He was formerly a prisoner of Impel Down , where he was kept in Level 5, but lived in the secret "Okama Paradise" in Level 5.5. [ 1 ] After escaping Impel Down and participating in the Summit War of Marineford , he returned to his post as queen of Kamabakka Kingdom . [ 12 ] He acts as an ally of Luffy during the Impel Down and Marineford Arcs.

name: Fake Robin
intro_text: Cocoa was a member of the Fake Straw Hat Crew who impersonated Nico Robin . [ 1 ]

name: Fake Sanji
intro_text: Drip was a member of the Fake Straw Hat Crew who was posing as the real Sanji . [ 1 ] When the crew switched to posing as the Kid Pirates , Drip impersonated Killer . [ 3 ]

name: Fake Nami
intro_text: Chocolat [ 4 ] is a member of the Fake Straw Hat Crew who masqueraded as Nami . [ 2 ]

name: Fake Sogeking
intro_text: Mounblutain [ 4 ] was a member of the Fake Straw Hat Crew who masqueraded as Sogeking . [ 2 ]

name: Fake Straw Hat Crew
intro_text: Fake Straw Hat Crew Statistics Japanese Name: ニセ麦わらの一味 Romanized Name: Nise Mugiwara no Ichimi Official English Name: Fake Straw Hats First Appearance: Chapter 598 ; Episode 517 [ 1 ] Captain: Demalo Black Total Bounty: Main Crew: 26,000,000 [ bounty 1 ] Organization: At least 606,000,000 [ bounty 2 ] The Fake Straw Hat Crew [ 2 ] were a group of pirates assembled by Demalo Black to impersonate the Straw Hat Pirates and exploit their notoriety. Launched near the end of the timeskip , [ 1 ] the crew managed a briefly successful recruitment drive on the Sabaody Archipelago , but were exposed when the real Straw Hats—with the Marines in pursuit—reunited there. In wake of the exposure, the crew rapidly collapsed, with most of them either arrested by the Marines or buried alive by the Caribou Pirates (one of the few recruits to successfully escape). Nevertheless, Black and several other members eventually resurfaced as impersonators of the Kid Pirates . [ 3 ] They are the main antagonists of the Return to Sabaody Arc .

name: Fallen Monk Pirates
intro_text: Fallen Monk Pirates Statistics Japanese Name: 破戒僧海賊団 Romanized Name: Hakaisō Kaizokudan Official English Name: Fallen Monk Pirates First Appearance: Chapter 498 ; Episode 392 [ 1 ] Captain: Urouge Main Ship: Hanjomaru Total Bounty: At least 108,000,000 [ bounty 1 ] The Fallen Monk Pirates are an infamous and notable rookie pirate crew who were first seen on Sabaody Archipelago around the time the Straw Hat Pirates arrived there two years ago. [ 1 ] As such, they are part of the Worst Generation , with their captain being Urouge .

name: Farul
affiliation: Beautiful Pirates ; Straw Hat Grand Fleet
intro_text: Farul is Cavendish 's pet horse and a member of the Beautiful Pirates . [ 1 ]

name: Faust
intro_text: Faust is a cat mink from North Blue [ 3 ] and a member of the Hawkins Pirates , serving as the crew's magician. [ 1 ] [ 4 ]

name: Fen Bock
epithet: Fen Bock of the Gourd ( 瓢箪フェン・ボック , Hyōtan Fen Bokku ? )
intro_text: Fen Bock of the Gourd is an ex-prisoner and former member of the Centaur Patrol Unit under Brownbeard , having served as one of Caesar Clown ’s henchmen. [ 1 ] He is a satyr .

name: Fake Zoro
intro_text: Manjaro [ 4 ] is a member of the Fake Straw Hat Crew and masqueraded as Zoro . [ 2 ] When the crew switched to posing as the Kid Pirates , Manjaro impersonated Heat . [ 5 ]

name: Farafra
intro_text: Farafra was a member of the Rebel Army led by Koza . He lost his right arm and right shoulder while protecting Koza during an enemy attack. [ 1 ]

name: Figarland Shamrock
japanese_name: フィガーランド・シャムロック聖
affiliation: Knights of God ; World Nobles ( Figarland Family )
intro_text: Saint Figarland Shamrock [ 6 ] is a World Noble and the commander of the Knights of God . Born in God Valley , he is the son of Saint Figarland Garling , one of the Five Elders of the World Government , [ 2 ] as well as the older twin brother of Shanks , one of the Four Emperors . [ 7 ] He acts as a minor antagonist in the Elbaph Arc , spearheading the Knights' mission to annex Elbaph and leading the initial invasion.

name: Figarland Garling
japanese_name: フィガーランド・ガーリング聖
affiliation: Five Elders ; Knights of God ; World Nobles ( Figarland Family )
occupation: Co-Head of the World Government (Public) ; Warrior God of Science and Defense ( 科学防衛武神 , Kagaku Bōei Bushin ? , VIZ: "Godhead of Science & Defense") ; Supreme Commander of Knights of God; Commander of Knights of God (former), World Noble
intro_text: Saint Figarland Garling [ 4 ] is one of the Five Elders who publicly head the World Government , holding the title Warrior God of Science and Defense ; [ 2 ] prior to this, he held the position of Supreme Commander of the Knights of God . [ 1 ] A World Noble who hails from the Figarland Family , Garling is the biological father of Knights commander Shamrock , [ 5 ] as well as the pirate Shanks of the Four Emperors . [ 6 ] Garling became the "champion" of God Valley during the battle that took place there 38 years ago. After the Egghead Incident , Garling was named an Elder to succeed Jaygarcia Saturn . [ 2 ] Due to his role, Garling serves as one of the main antagonists of the Final Saga along with the other Elders.

name: Finamore
intro_text: Finamore [ 2 ] is a member of the Spade Pirates . [ 1 ]

name: Fillonce
intro_text: Fillonce [ 3 ] is an amethyst anthias mermaid [ 4 ] and one of the Mermaid Cafe Dancers . [ 2 ]

name: Fishbonen
japanese_name: Dr. フィッシュボーネン
intro_text: Dr. Fishbonen [ 2 ] is a Marine naval surgeon (軍医 Gun'i ) [ 3 ] stationed at Marineford .

name: First Twenty
intro_text: First Twenty Statistics Japanese Name: 最初の20人 Romanized Name: Saisho no Nijū-nin Official English Name: First 20 First Appearance: Chapter 497 ; Episode 391 (mentioned) [ 1 ] Affiliation: World Government Occupation: Royals The First Twenty , also known as the Creators ( 創造主 , Sōzō-shu ? ) , were the twenty monarchs who banded together in a united army called the Alliance ( 連合軍 , Rengō-gun ? ) in a great war against a common enemy. After defeating the Great Kingdom at the end of the Void Century they founded the World Government . Their descendants, sans the Nefertari Family , became the World Nobles or "Celestial Dragons". [ 1 ] [ 2 ] [ 3 ] [ 4 ] After eight centuries of time, the only survivor amongst the twenty rulers is Nerona Imu , who has been ruling the World Government in secret ever since its founding, as the King of the World. [ 5 ] [ 6 ]

name: Fish-Man District
intro_text: Fish-Man District Present Past Statistics Japanese Name: 魚人街 Romanized Name: Gyojin-gai English Name: Fish-Man District First appearance: Chapter 608 ; Episode 527 [ 1 ] Affiliates: Ryugu Kingdom New Fish-Man Pirates (formerly) The Fish-Man District was part of the Ryugu Kingdom that was notorious for being one of the tougher parts of Fish-Man Island . It was previously the main base of operations of the New Fish-Man Pirates until their imprisonment and was subsequently closed off by the kingdom. [ 2 ]

name: Fire Tank Pirates
japanese_name: ファイアタンク海賊団
intro_text: Fire Tank Pirates Statistics Japanese Name: ファイアタンク海賊団 Romanized Name: Faia Tanku Kaizokudan Official English Name: Firetank Pirates First Appearance: Chapter 498 ; Episode 392 [ 1 ] Captain: Capone Bege Main Ship: Nostra Castello (Destroyed) † Tarte 25 (Former) ‡ Unnamed Ship Total Bounty: At least 535,000,000 [ bounty 1 ] [ 2 ] [ 3 ] [ 4 ] The Fire Tank Pirates [ 5 ] are an infamous and notable rookie pirate crew who are led by Capone Bege , originated in the West Blue, and arrived on the Sabaody Archipelago around the time the Straw Hat Pirates arrived there two years ago, along with other rookie crews. [ 1 ] As such, they are part of the Worst Generation . Following the two-year timeskip, they briefly became subordinate to Big Mom , one of the Four Emperors , and her crew on Whole Cake Island . [ 6 ] They formed a temporary alliance with the Sanji Retrieval Team to assassinate Big Mom, which ended in failure, and they ended their alliance after escaping the Whole Cake Chateau . They are the central characters of the cover story called "Gang" Bege's Oh My Family .

name: Fish-Man Island
affiliation: Ryugu Kingdom ; Straw Hat Pirates ; Big Mom Pirates (former); Whitebeard Pirates (former)
intro_text: Fish-Man Island Statistics Japanese Name: 魚人島 Romanized Name: Gyojin-tō English Name: Fish-Man Island First appearance: Chapter 68 ; Episode 30 (mentioned) [ 1 ] Chapter 607 ; Episode 526 (seen) [ 2 ] Region: Grand Line (under the Red Line ) Log: Half a day [ 4 ] Affiliates: Ryugu Kingdom ; Straw Hat Pirates ; Big Mom Pirates (former); Whitebeard Pirates (former) Population: 5,000,000 (10 years ago) [ 3 ] Fish-Man Island [ 5 ] is the home of the fish-men and merfolk . [ 6 ] It contains the Ryugu Kingdom , and serves as an underwater gateway to the New World for those who do not wish (or are not legally permitted) to cross over the Red Line above . This was the last island the Straw Hats visited before arriving at the New World and the main setting of the Fish-Man Island Arc . It has also been prophesied by Madam Shyarly that someone bearing a straw hat will destroy the island.

name: Fisher Tiger
japanese_name: フィッシャー・タイガー
occupation: Adventurer ; Pirate ; Captain ; De-facto Leader of Fish-Man District (former); Slave (former)
epithet: "The Adventurer" ( 冒険家 , Bōkenka ? ) "Hero of Slaves" ( 奴隷解放の英雄 , Dorei Kaihō no Eiyū ? )
intro_text: Fisher Tiger , known as the Adventurer , [ 1 ] was a sea bream fish-man and the founder and original captain of the Sun Pirates . [ 9 ] A well-known explorer , Tiger became a slave for the World Nobles at some point in his adventures. [ 10 ] After managing to escape his captors and return to Fish-Man Island , Tiger assaulted Mary Geoise in order to free his fellow slaves. [ 11 ] This act granted Tiger infamy among humans and admiration from his fellow Fish-Men, particularly his long-time friends Jinbe and Arlong . Tiger died from blood loss after being ambushed and shot by a squad of Marines at Foolshout Island , following his delivery of a young former slave back to her home town. [ 12 ] He is one of the two posthumous overarching protagonists of the Fish-Man Island Arc (alongside Otohime ).

name: Flevance
intro_text: Flevance Statistics Japanese Name: フレバンス Romanized Name: Furebansu English Name: Flevance First appearance: Chapter 762 ; Episode 701 [ 1 ] Region: North Blue Flevance , also known as the "White City" ( 白い町 , Shiroi Machi ? ) , was a country located in the North Blue , best known as the birthplace of Trafalgar Law . It was also notable for its abundant deposits of Amber Lead . It remains unclear whether Flevance was officially affiliated with the World Government ; during the catastrophic outbreak linked to Amber Lead exposure, the royal family fled the country, abandoning their people with its aid. [ 1 ]

name: Florian Triangle
intro_text: Florian Triangle Statistics Japanese Name: 魔の三角地帯 Romanized Name: Furorian Toraianguru English Name: Florian Triangle Literal Meaning: Devil's Triangle Zone First appearance: Chapter 442 ; Episode 337 [ 1 ] Region: Paradise Type: Sea The Florian Triangle is a stretch of sea that must be sailed through to travel from Water 7 to Fish-Man Island . It is notorious for the many ships that mysteriously go missing within it. [ 2 ] The former Warlord Gecko Moria and his crew previously resided in the Florian Triangle on their ship, Thriller Bark . Because of this, the Florian Triangle serves as the overarching setting of the Thriller Bark Saga .

name: Flying Pirates
intro_text: Flying Pirates Statistics Japanese Name: フライング海賊団 Romanized Name: Furaingu Kaizokudan Official English Name: Flying Pirates First Appearance: Chapter 606 ; Episode 525 [ 1 ] Captain: Vander Decken IX Main Ship: Flying Dutchman The Flying Pirates were a pirate crew led by Vander Decken IX , floating over the ocean floor and endangering the citizens of Fish-Man Island . The crew is possibly named after the flagship used by Vander Deckens for nine generations, the Flying Dutchman . The captains of the Flying Pirates and the New Fish-Man Pirates had sworn an alliance with each other before the captains betrayed one another. [ 2 ] Upon Decken's arrest and imprisonment, the crew's status is currently unknown. They are the secondary antagonist group in the Fish-Man Island Arc .

name: Foosha Village
intro_text: Foosha Village Statistics Japanese Name: フーシャ村 Romanized Name: Fūsha-mura English Name: Windmill Village, Fusha Village (Funimation subs) First appearance: Chapter 1 ; Episode 4 [ 1 ] Affiliates: Goa Kingdom Foosha Village [ 2 ] (literally meaning "Windmill Village") is a little port village that is located on Dawn Island and is part of Goa Kingdom . It is the first setting of the Romance Dawn Arc , and is where the story of One Piece starts from. [ 1 ]

name: Flapper
affiliation: Tontatta Kingdom ; Tonta Corps ; Straw Hat Grand Fleet
intro_text: Flapper is a dwarf from Tontatta Kingdom who first appeared on Green Bit , when he stopped Leo from taking Robin 's clothes and belongings. [ 1 ] He participated in Operation SOP and became a temporary victim of Sugar 's Hobi Hobi no Mi .

name: Flying Dutchman
japanese_name: フライング・ダッチマン号
affiliation: Vander Decken and descendants; Flying Pirates (current)
intro_text: Flying Dutchman Statistics Japanese Name: フライング・ダッチマン号 Romanized Name: Furaingu Datchiman-gō Official English Name: Flying Dutchman Debut: Chapter 606 ; Episode 525 Affiliation: Vander Decken and descendants; Flying Pirates (current) Status: Active The Flying Dutchman is a legendary ship from maritime folklore, and is largely infamous as a ghost ship. It is the main vessel of the Flying Pirates and was once captained by the original Vander Decken and his descendants, up until Vander Decken IX . [ 1 ]

name: Foolshout Island
intro_text: Foolshout Island Statistics Japanese Name: フールシャウト島 Romanized Name: Fūrushauto-tō English Name: Foolshout Island First appearance: Chapter 623 ; Episode 543 Region: Paradise Foolshout Island is an island in Paradise where Koala 's hometown is located.

name: Five Elders
english_name: Five Elders (VIZ, Funimation); Five Elder Stars (formerly Funimation)
occupation: Highest Authorities of the World Government (Publicly) ; World Nobles
intro_text: Five Elders Current Previous Statistics Japanese Name: 五老星 Romanized Name: Gorōsei Official English Name: Five Elders (VIZ, Funimation); Five Elder Stars (formerly Funimation) First Appearance: Chapter 233 ; Episode 151 [ 1 ] Affiliation: World Government ( World Nobles ) Occupation: Highest Authorities of the World Government (Publicly) ; World Nobles [ 2 ] Residency: Mary Geoise ( Pangaea Castle ) The Five Elders [ 3 ] are a council of the five highest-ranking Celestial Dragons [ 2 ] [ 4 ] collectively titled the " Highest Authorities of the World Government " ( 世界政府最高権力 , Sekai Seifu Saikō Kenryoku ? ) . Publicly claimed to oversee and wield the greatest authority over the entire world at large, they are secretly subordinate to the government's shadow ruler Nerona Imu , the true King of the World and occupant of the Empty Throne . [ 5 ] [ 6 ] [ 7 ] They are almost always found residing in the Room of Authority in Pangaea Castle . The Five Elders (in particular Jaygarcia Saturn ) are the main antagonists of the Egghead Arc . Due to their status, longstanding actions both indirect and direct, and their profound plot involvement, they can be considered among the main antagonists of the Final Saga as well as the One Piece series as a whole.

name: Flying Fish Riders
japanese_name: 人生バラ色ライダーズ
intro_text: Rosy Life Riders Statistics Japanese Name: 人生バラ色ライダーズ Romanized Name: Jinsei Bara-iro Raidāzu Official English Name: Rosy Life Riders First Appearance: Chapter 491 ; Episode 386 [ 1 ] Affiliation: Straw Hat Pirates Occupation: Slave Trader (Former) Leader(s): Duval The Rosy Life Riders [ 2 ] are an outlaw gang led by Duval , active around the Sabaody Archipelago . [ 1 ] Their members famously ride on giant flying fish, maneuverable both midair and underwater. Originally a kidnapping gang known as the Flying Fish Riders ( トビウオライダーズ , Tobiuo Raidāzu ? ) , they were briefly enemies of the Straw Hat Pirates , per Duval's personal vendetta. However, after Duval was "reformed" by Sanji and made peace with them, the gang followed suit, becoming staunch allies of the Straw Hats. [ 2 ]

name: Forest Boss

intro_text: Footbianco [ 2 ] is one of the Franky Family 's Kairiki Destroyers . [ 3 ]

name: Fossa

name: Fourtricks

name: Four Emperors
english_name: Four Emperors; Yonko ( Grand Pirate Show )
intro_text: Four Emperors Statistics Japanese Name: 四皇 Romanized Name: Yonkō Official English Name: Four Emperors; Yonko ( Grand Pirate Show ) First Appearance: Chapter 96 ; Episode 45 [ 1 ] [ 2 ] Affiliation: Three Great Powers Occupation: Pirate Captains Total Bounty: 14,233,900,000 [ bounty 1 ] [ 3 ] [ 4 ] [ 5 ] [ 6 ] 15,295,600,000 [ bounty 2 ] [ 7 ] 18,094,000,000 [ bounty 3 ] [ 7 ] The Four Emperors are four pirates considered to be the most notorious and powerful captains in the world . Currently, these four are recognized as Shanks , Marshall D. Teach , Monkey D. Luffy , and Buggy , with known predecessors being Edward Newgate , Charlotte Linlin , and Kaidou . Historically, the Emperors have dominated the second half of the Grand Line (the " New World "), captaining powerful subordinates and massive fleets while exerting influence and control over dozens of separate pirate crews and even full-fledged nations. As such, the World Government views them collectively as one of the Three Great Powers underpinning world stability. However, no formal system supports them; each Emperor works as an independent force, and may oppose or align with whomever they see fit. With the rise of the Worst Generation , the Emperors underwent much upheaval, beginning with Teach's murder of Newgate during Summit War of Marineford [ 8 ] and usurpation of his position. [ 9 ] [ 10 ] Two years after the war, Kaidou and Linlin formed an unprecedented two-Emperor alliance , only to be toppled by the Ninja-Pirate-Mink-Samurai Alliance in the Raid on Onigashima . Subsequently, Luffy and Buggy were declared new Emperors, the former for defeating Kaidou in combat and the latter for his unwitting "leadership" of the infamous Cross Guild . [ 3 ] The concept of the Four Emperors was first revealed by Garp in the Post-Enies Lobby Arc , and this group has had an especially large role in the second half of the series. Luffy has had varying relationships with each Emperor, but intends to defeat all of them in his quest to become the Pirate King. [ 11 ] Big Mom and Kaidou respectively served as the main antagonists of the Whole Cake Island and Wano Country Sagas .

name: Foxy
epithet: "Silver Fox" ( 銀ギツネ , Gin-gitsune ? )
intro_text: Foxy the Silver Fox is the captain of the Foxy Pirates , and the main antagonist of the Long Ring Long Land Arc . [ 1 ] In the anime , he is a recurring enemy—and occasional ally—of the Straw Hat Pirates , with major roles in the anime-original Foxy's Return Arc , Spa Island Arc , one installment of the Boss Luffy Historical Special , and the Adventure of Nebulandia special.

name: Foxy Pirates
intro_text: Foxy Pirates Current Jolly Roger Former Jolly Roger Statistics Japanese Name: フォクシー海賊団 Romanized Name: Fokushī Kaizokudan Official English Name: Foxy Pirates First Appearance: Chapter 304 ; Episode 207 [ 1 ] Captain: Foxy Main Ship: Sexy Foxy (formerly) Total Bounty: At least 24,000,000 [ bounty 1 ] The Foxy Pirates are a group of pirates led by Foxy the Silver Fox . A majority of the crew was composed mostly of crewmen won through the Davy Back Fight . [ 1 ] Before meeting the Straw Hat Pirates , the crew was composed of nearly 500 members, according to the anime . However, sometime after the Straw Hats defeated them, the crew fell on hard times and was apparently reduced to just 3 members. They are the main antagonist group in the Long Ring Long Land Arc . They also act as an antagonist group in the Foxy's Return and Spa Island filler Arcs.

name: Francois
intro_text: Francois [ 2 ] is a former prisoner of Impel Down and resident of Newkama Land in Level 5.5. [ 1 ]

name: Franky
affiliation: Straw Hat Pirates ; Straw Hat Grand Fleet ; Franky Family (former); Tom's Workers (former); Ninja-Pirate-Mink-Samurai Alliance (disbanded)
occupation: Shipwright ; Senior Officer ; Dismantler; Underworld boss (former); Bounty Hunter (former)
alias: "Fra-nosuke" ( フラの介 , Furanosuke ? , English versions: Franosuke)
epithet: "Iron Man" Franky ( "鉄人"フランキー , Tetsujin Furankī ? ) "Cyborg" Franky ( " 鉄人 "フランキー , Saibōgu Furankī ? ) (former)
intro_text: "Iron Man" Franky [ 7 ] is the shipwright of the Straw Hat Pirates and one of the Senior Officers of the Straw Hat Grand Fleet . [ 2 ] He is the crew's eighth member and the seventh to join, doing so at the end of the Post-Enies Lobby Arc . [ 17 ] Franky was born in the South Blue [ 18 ] to Scien, an infamous scientist and pirate who would later be known as Queen of the Beasts Pirates . [ 19 ] After his parents abandoned him as a 10-year-old [ 20 ] , he eventually made his way to Water 7 . Born " Cutty Flam ", [ 21 ] he chose to go by his nickname of "Franky" until he eventually permanently discarded his true name per the request of Iceburg to hide his identity. [ 22 ] He worked as a shipwright of Tom's Workers until, during a failed attempt to save his mentor Tom from the World Government , his body was heavily damaged, requiring him to augment himself into a cyborg . Upon returning to Water 7, he became the leader of the Franky Family , a group of ship dismantlers and bounty hunters . [ 3 ] Franky and his followers were introduced as the secondary antagonists of the Water 7 Arc , until circumstances forced them to become allies at the end of the same arc and the Enies Lobby Arc . Franky's dream is to create a ship and circumnavigate the world with it, and he built the Thousand Sunny and joined the Straw Hat Pirates to fulfill his dream. He gained a bounty of 44,000,000 for his involvement at the Enies Lobby Incident. It later increased to 94,000,000 after the Dressrosa Arc . Following the Raid on Onigashima , his bounty was increased to 394,000,000. [ 2 ]

intro_text: "Memorial Blade" Fugar is the bandmaster ( 船長 , banmasu ? ) of the Social Club , a subordinate pirate crew of the Red Hair Pirates . [ 1 ]

name: Fuga
intro_text: Fuga is a member of the Numbers in the Beasts Pirates , representing the number "two". [ 2 ]

name: Frontier Agents
intro_text: Baroque Works Statistics Japanese Name: バロックワークス Romanized Name: Barokku Wākusu Official English Name: Baroque Works First Appearance: Chapter 103 ; Episode 62 [ 1 ] Occupation: Underworld bounty hunters [ 2 ] President: Mr. 0 [ 3 ] Transport: Baroque Works Ships ; Banchi Coach Total Bounty: At least 389,700,000 [ bounty 1 ] Baroque Works [ 2 ] was a criminal syndicate created by the Warlord Crocodile to destabilize and conquer the Arabasta Kingdom (and, by extension, acquire the ancient superweapon Pluton ). For this sole purpose, it conducted countless acts of espionage, sabotage, and murder over a span of years, ultimately manipulating Arabasta into civil war. [ 4 ] [ 5 ] While the syndicate mostly employed common bounty hunters and mercenaries (motivated [ 3 ] by the half-truth that they were building a new, "ideal" nation), its elite members contained highly formidable warriors and spies. Despite multiple setbacks, its endgame Operation Utopia [ 6 ] nearly succeeded in every objective, and was only narrowly stopped by the combined efforts of Princess Nefertari Vivi , the Straw Hat Pirates , and a unit of Marines led by then- Captain Smoker . After Operation Utopia's failure, the syndicate was exposed and dismantled, with Crocodile and most of his subordinates—many personally defeated by the Straw Hats—arrested by the Marines. In time, however, many of them would escape and continue to impact world events . Due to their actions and role, they are collectively the main antagonists of the Arabasta Saga , with varying members being the focus of each individual arc (excluding the Drum Island Arc ). Several ex-members also serve as the protagonists of the Miss Goldenweek's "Operation: Meet Baroque Works" cover arc , and supporting characters in the Impel Down Arc and Marineford Arc .

name: Fugetsu Omusubi
intro_text: Fugetsu Omusubi was a samurai who, as a member of the Fugetsu Family , served as the daimyo of the Kibi region [ 2 ] until he was imprisoned and killed by Kaidou 20 years ago. [ 1 ]

name: Fujin
affiliation: Beasts Pirates ; Orochi Oniwabanshu (former); Kurozumi Family (former)
intro_text: Fujin [ 5 ] is a ninja and a member of the Beasts Pirates . [ 2 ] He previously was a member of the Orochi Oniwabanshu which served the shogun of Wano Country , Kurozumi Orochi . [ 1 ] Due to his actions and role, he is a minor antagonist in the Wano Country Arc .

name: Fukaboshi
intro_text: Fukaboshi is a shark merman and the eldest son of the royal Neptune Family on Fish-Man Island . After he, his father and his brothers were liberated by the Straw Hat Pirates , he allied himself with them against Hody Jones and his crew. [ 1 ]

name: Fukurou
epithet: "Fukurou the Silent" ( 音無しのフクロウ , Otonashi no Fukurō ? )
intro_text: Fukurou the Silent [ 4 ] is an agent of CP0 [ 2 ] and was previously an agent of CP9 . [ 3 ] He was one of the major antagonists during the Enies Lobby Arc .

name: Fukurokuju
affiliation: Kurozumi Family ; Beasts Pirates (former); Orochi Oniwabanshu (former); Kouzuki Family (former)
occupation: Ninja ; Captain of the Orochi Oniwabanshu (former)
intro_text: Fukurokuju is a ninja and the previous captain of the Orochi Oniwabanshu [ 1 ] before they joined the Beasts Pirates following Orochi's deposition. [ 2 ] Though he pledged his team's support to Kaidou, Fukurokuju remained loyal to the surviving Orochi and helped him attempt to get revenge. [ 6 ] However, Fukurokuju was ultimately bested in combat by his rival Raizo as his and Orochi's plot failed. [ 7 ] Due to his actions and role, he is a supporting antagonist during the Wano Country Arc .

name: Fullbody
occupation: Marine Lieutenant Commander ; Marine Seaman Recruit (promoted) , Marine Lieutenant (demoted)
epithet: "Double Ironfist Fullbody" ( 両鉄拳のフルボディ , Ryōtekken no Furubodi ? ) "Ironfist Fullbody" ( 鉄拳のフルボディ , Tekken no Furubodi ? ) (former)
intro_text: "Double Ironfist" Fullbody is a Marine lieutenant commander [ 2 ] serving under Rear Admiral Hina . [ 3 ] He was a Marine Headquarters lieutenant at the start of the series, [ 1 ] but was demoted to seaman recruit as a condition when he helped the former Black Cat pirate , Jango , get acquitted for his past crimes [ 4 ] (in the anime, it was after getting into a fight with Sanji on the Baratie [ 8 ] ). During the timeskip, however, he rose back through the ranks to become a commissioned officer once again, being one rank higher than he was to begin with in the series. [ 2 ] Due to his actions, he is a minor antagonist during the Baratie and Arabasta Arcs . He also is a supporting character during Jango's Dance Paradise Cover Page Serial.

name: Former Warlords
english_name: Seven Warlords of the Sea (VIZ, Funimation, 4Kids); Seven Sea Warriors (Odex); Seven Royal Seas (Manga Entertainment)
intro_text: Seven Warlords of the Sea Statistics Japanese Name: 王下七武海 Romanized Name: Ōka Shichibukai Official English Name: Seven Warlords of the Sea (VIZ, Funimation, 4Kids); Seven Sea Warriors (Odex); Seven Royal Seas (Manga Entertainment) First Appearance: Chapter 49 ; Episode 23 (seen); [ 1 ] Chapter 69 ; Episode 31 (named) [ 2 ] Literal Meaning: (Royal) Seven Martial-Seas Total Former Bounty: At least 871,000,000 [ Bounty 1 ] [ 3 ] [ 4 ] At least 1,651,000,000 [ Bounty 2 ] [ 6 ] At least 716,000,000 [ Bounty 3 ] [ 7 ] [ 8 ] At least 1,286,000,000 [ Bounty 4 ] [ 10 ] At least 1,367,000,000 [ Bounty 5 ] Affiliation: World Government (former) Occupation: Sanctioned Privateers The Seven Warlords of the Sea , or simply the Seven Warlords , were a selection of seven incredibly powerful and notorious pirates authorized by the World Government . [ 2 ] Collectively, they comprised one of the Three Great Powers keeping the world in balance. [ 15 ] After two members ( Crocodile and Donquixote Doflamingo ) were exposed and arrested for undermining important kingdoms, Marine Admiral Fujitora led a campaign against the Warlords system, and during the next Levely a majority of kings voted to abolish it entirely. As a result, all of the remaining Warlords were reverted to wanted criminals. [ 16 ] Currently, the World Government is advancing the SSG 's Seraphim as a replacement. [ 17 ] The Seven Warlords of the Sea are a major group in the overall storyline, with most of its individual members encountering the Straw Hat Pirates at many different junctures, serving as both enemies and allies.

name: Furika
intro_text: Furika [ 2 ] is a citizen of Dressrosa . [ 1 ]

name: Fuza
intro_text: Fuza is the giant Three-length Bird of the Skypiean Priest Shura , who rode on it to get around to the different places throughout Skypiea . [ 2 ]

name: Funkfreed
english_name: Funkfreed (VIZ, Funimation); Funk Freed ( Unlimited Adventure )
devil_fruit_english_name: Elephant-Elephant Fruit (Funimation dub, VIZ) Eleph-Eleph Fruit (VIZ)
intro_text: Funkfreed is Spandam 's sword , which has been animated by the Zou Zou no Mi , becoming an Elephant Sword ( 象剣 , Zōken ? ) . [ 2 ] As such, he also serves as a pet and unofficial bodyguard for Spandam, compensating his master's physical slightness. [ 4 ]

name: Furrari
intro_text: Furrari [ 2 ] is the king of the Nagagutsu Kingdom and one of fifty monarchs who took part in the Levely . [ 2 ] He is the father of Tritobu . [ 1 ]

name: G-5
intro_text: G-5 Statistics Japanese Name: 海軍G・L第5支部 Romanized Name: Kaigun Gurando Rain Dai-Go Shibu English Name: G-5 First appearance: Chapter 681 ( cover ) [ 1 ] Region: New World Affiliates: Marines G-5 , officially Marine "Grand Line" Fifth Branch ( 海軍G・L第5支部 , Kaigun Gurando Rain Dai-Go Shibu ? ) , is a Marine Base located in the New World , near the Red Line. It was first mentioned by Aokiji after the Summit War of Marineford and according to him, it is full of problems. Smoker requested a transfer to this branch in order to "keep his targets close". [ 2 ] Initially opposed to the Straw Hat Pirates , the unit teamed up with them and the Heart Pirates to stop Caesar Clown on Punk Hazard , and so they serve as major allies in the Punk Hazard Arc .

name: Gaburu
epithet: "Child of the Revolution" ( 革命の子 , Kakumei no Ko ? )
intro_text: Commander Gaburu ( ガブル隊長 , Gaburu Taichō ? ) was a revolutionist commander who led a militia group on an unknown island . His resemblance to Caribou caused misunderstandings in the cover story Caribou's Kehihihihi in the New World . [ 1 ] He is the grandson of Baburu .

name: Gab
epithet: "Howling" Gab ( “ハウリング”ガブ , "Hauringu" Gabu ? )
intro_text: "Howling" Gab [ 2 ] is one of the Senior Officers of the Red Hair Pirates . [ 1 ]

occupation: Guardian of the Island of Rare Animals Pirate (former)

name: Galdino
affiliation: Cross Guild ; Buggy's Delivery ; Buggy Pirates ; Buggy and Alvida Alliance ; Baroque Works (formerly)
occupation: Pirate ; Officer Agent (former); Prisoner of the Great Prison (former)
alias: "Mr. 3" ( Mr. 3 , Misutā Surī ? )
epithet: "Loan Shark" ( 闇金 , Yamikin ? )
intro_text: "Loan Shark" Galdino , [ 8 ] [ 9 ] alias Mr. 3 , [ 1 ] is a former officer agent of Baroque Works , partnered with "Miss Goldenweek" Marianne . [ 5 ] As an officer agent of Baroque Works, he and his partner were assigned to intercept and eliminate the Straw Hat Pirates in Little Garden , but failed. He served in the syndicate until shortly before its dissolution at the Straw Hat Pirates' hands. After being sent to Impel Down , he assisted Buggy and Monkey D. Luffy during their prison breakout and the Summit War of Marineford . When the war ended, he became a member of the Buggy Pirates . [ 4 ] After Buggy became a Warlord of the Sea , the Buggy and Alvida Alliance evolved into the Underworld organization known as Buggy's Delivery . [ 3 ] The organization was integrated into a larger one, Cross Guild , of which he is currently a member. [ 2 ] He is the main antagonist of the Little Garden Arc and a supporting antagonist of the Arabasta Saga as a whole, one of the central characters of the Miss Goldenweek's "Operation: Meet Baroque Works" cover arc (along with the rest of Baroque Works ' Officer Agents), and a supporting ally during the Impel Down and Marineford Arcs .

name: Galley-La Company
intro_text: Galley-La Company Statistics Japanese Name: ガレーラカンパニー Romanized Name: Garēra Kanpanī Official English Name: Galley-La Company First Appearance: Chapter 323 ; Episode 230 [ 1 ] Affiliation: Water 7 [ 1 ] Occupation: Company of Shipwrights [ 1 ] Leader(s): Iceburg [ 2 ] The Galley-La Company is a prominent company of shipwrights . The company, which has been established for seven years, builds ships for citizens and pirates , as well as for the World Government . Water 7 , the island the company is on, is said to be the home of the best shipwrights in the world. The company is led by Iceburg , the mayor of Water 7 and the elder apprentice of the legendary shipwright Tom . [ 2 ]

name: Galaxy
intro_text: General Galaxy [ 2 ] is one of the automata created on Karakuri Island by Dr. Tsukimi . General Galaxy was first introduced in cover story of Enel's Great Space Operations .

name: Gally
first_appearance: Episode 48 ; Romance Dawn Story ; Chapter 902 ; Episode 877
epithet: "Crescent-Moon Gally" ( 三日月のギャリー , Mikazuki no Gyarī ? , Funimation: "Gally the Crescent")
intro_text: "Crescent-Moon" Gally is the captain of the Gally Pirates , currently active in the East Blue . [ 2 ] He is notable as a character that predates One Piece proper, serving as the main antagonist of the first Romance Dawn prototype. [ 6 ] Since then, he has mostly appeared in non-canon portions of the anime (including [ 4 ] a loose adaptation of Romance Dawn ), though he was eventually confirmed as a canon character by a manga cameo at the conclusion of the Whole Cake Island Arc . [ 2 ] [ 3 ]

name: Gama Pyonnosuke

name: Fujitora
alias: "Fujitora" ( 藤虎 , Fujitora ? , literally meaning "Wisteria Tiger")
intro_text: Issho , better known by his alias Fujitora , is an Admiral in the Marines . [ 3 ] Once the captain of a guard force in the former Aoi Kingdom , [ 4 ] he was conscripted through a World Military Draft during the two-year timeskip, being appointed to fill one of the Admiral vacancies caused by Kuzan 's resignation and Sakazuki 's promotion alongside his co-worker Ryokugyu . [ 9 ] A proponent of "Humane Justice", Fujitora notably spearheaded a campaign for the abolishment of the " Seven Warlords of the Sea " system, [ 10 ] which came to pass during the most recent Levely . [ 11 ] Fujitora was first mentioned by Sakazuki when the latter was discussing plans to deal with Monkey D. Luffy and Trafalgar Law on Dressrosa . [ 2 ] His following mission and actions on Dressrosa made him the first Admiral to physically appear post-timeskip and the secondary antagonist of the Dressrosa Arc .

name: Gambo
intro_text: Gambo is the deputy commander of the South Army in the Revolutionary Army and the assistant of Lindbergh . [ 2 ]

name: Gancho
intro_text: Gancho is the king , also called "Tonta-Chief" ( トンタ長 , Tonta-Chō ? ) , of the Tontatta Kingdom . [ 1 ] He is the father of Mansherry .

name: Gangaru
intro_text: Gangaru [ 3 ] is a samurai and member of the Beasts Pirates . He was formerly a member of the Mimawarigumi serving Kurozumi Orochi until Orochi's seeming death. [ 1 ] [ 2 ]

name: Gan Fall
english_name: Ganfor (VIZ; Funimation simulcast); Gan Fall (Funimation); Gunfall (4Kids)
epithet: "Knight of the Sky" ( 空の騎士 , Sora no Kishi ? , VIZ and Funimation: Sky Knight, 4Kids: Sky Lord)
intro_text: Gan Fall [ 3 ] is the current God of Skypiea . A venerable figure who served in that role for decades, he was overthrown by Enel and cast out of power for six years. During his exile, he roamed the sky as a mercenary known as the Knight of the Sky . [ 1 ] [ 2 ] He is an ally of the Straw Hat Pirates during the Skypiea Arc .

name: Ganryu
intro_text: Ganryu [ 3 ] was a member of the Roger Pirates until the crew's dissolution. [ 1 ] His current whereabouts and status are unknown.

name: Gantonio

name: Ganzui
devil_fruit_english_name: Bomb-Bomb Fruit (4Kids, Funimation, Odex); Boom-Boom Fruit (Viz)
intro_text: Ganzui was a member of the Rocks Pirates . [ 2 ] A smuggler by trade, he lost a Davy Back Fight and subsequently joined Rocks in his pursuits. Sometime after the God Valley Incident , he perished, and his corpse was subsequently retrieved and revived by Gecko Moria as Zombie #889 , a General Zombie . [ 1 ]

name: Gattenshochinosukeo

name: Gecko Islands
intro_text: Gecko Islands Statistics Japanese Name: ゲッコー諸島 Romanized Name: Gekkō Shotō English Name: Gecko Islands First appearance: Chapter 23 ; Episode 8 [ 1 ] Region: East Blue The Gecko Islands [ 2 ] is the archipelago where Syrup Village is located. It is the third island the Straw Hat Pirates visited.

name: Garp
japanese_name: モンキー・ D ・ガープ
epithet: "Garp the Fist" ( ゲンコツのガープ , Genkotsu no Gāpu ? ) ; Hero of the Marines ( 海軍の英雄 , Kaigun no Eiyū ? ) (VIZ: "Naval Hero")
intro_text: Monkey D. Garp , [ 12 ] also known as "Garp the Fist" , [ 7 ] is an extremely famous and powerful Marine Vice Admiral . He is the father of Monkey D. Dragon , [ 13 ] the paternal grandfather of Monkey D. Luffy , [ 14 ] and the adoptive grandfather of Portgas D. Ace . He was responsible for overseeing Ace's birth and raising a young Luffy, before entrusting them both to the Dadan Family . A contemporary of Gol D. Roger in his prime, Garp came to be known as the only Marine that could seriously challenge the Pirate King, with feats to match; his participation in the God Valley Incident , that led to the defeat and disbanding of the infamous Rocks Pirates , won him the title "Hero of the Marines" . [ 15 ] At the same time, he has mentored many younger Marines into prominence, including once-Admiral Kuzan and SWORD members Koby and Helmeppo . [ 16 ] After Ace's death at the Summit War of Marineford , Garp became an instructor to focus on training new recruits; [ 5 ] while the public believes him to be retired, he still retains the rank of Vice Admiral. [ 17 ] During his mission to rescue Koby from the Blackbeard Pirates , Garp was badly injured and imprisoned on Hachinosu , [ 18 ] being officially declared "missing in action" by the Marines. [ 19 ] Garp was first introduced during the Diary of Koby-Meppo cover arc , where he first took charge of training Koby and Helmeppo . Due to his actions, he is the main antagonist of the Post-Enies Lobby Arc and a supporting antagonist in the Marineford Arc .

name: Gecko Pirates
intro_text: Gecko Pirates Statistics Japanese Name: ゲッコー海賊団 Romanized Name: Gekkō Kaizokudan Official English Name: Gecko Pirates First Appearance: Chapter 969 ; Episode 971 [ 1 ] Captain: Gecko Moria The Gecko Pirates were the former pirate crew of Gecko Moria . [ 1 ]

name: Genbo
intro_text: Genbo is one of the Shandia warriors who fought to take back Upper Yard from Enel . [ 1 ] After the timeskip, he joined the God's Guards under Wyper . [ 2 ]

name: Gecko Moria
affiliation: Thriller Bark Pirates ( Mysterious Four ); Seven Warlords of the Sea (former); Gecko Pirates (former)
occupation: Pirate Captain ; Warlord of the Sea (former)
alias: Kouzuki Moria ( 光月もりあ , Kōzuki Moria ? , VIZ: "Kozuki Moria")
intro_text: Gecko Moria [ 11 ] is the captain of the Thriller Bark Pirates and a former member of the Seven Warlords of the Sea [ 2 ] who resides on Thriller Bark , the largest ship in the world . His bounty is 320,000,000, which was frozen until he lost his Warlord position. [ 10 ] Born in the West Blue , [ 5 ] Moria was raised by the people of Ringo in Wano Country and given the name Kouzuki Moria . He set out to sea as captain of the Gecko Pirates , but returned to Wano to battle Kaidou , resulting in the extermination of his crew. [ 6 ] This traumatic event led Moria to seek power through an army of zombies , constructed by his subordinate, Dr. Hogback . To that end he stole the shadows of several beings with his Kage Kage no Mi powers, including Brook and several members of the Straw Hat Pirates , bringing him into conflict with them. His zombie army was ultimately destroyed and the captured shadows set free after his defeat by the Straw Hats, but he retained his position as a Warlord. He took part in the Summit War of Marineford , [ 12 ] but afterwards was stripped of his title with the World Government unsuccessfully attempting to kill him. [ 3 ] [ 13 ] Two years after the war, Moria came into conflict with the Blackbeard Pirates . [ 14 ] [ 15 ] He was also cloned by Vegapunk as one of the Seraphim to replace the Warlords. [ 16 ] He is the main antagonist of the Thriller Bark Saga and a major antagonist in the Marineford Arc .

name: Genrin
intro_text: Genrin [ 2 ] is an old man who lives in Ebisu Town . [ 1 ]

name: Gem
alias: "Mr. 5" ( Mr. 5 , Misutā Faibu ? )
