[ 2 ] He now works as a fireman at the new Spiders Cafe alongside most of his former colleagues. He was one of the main antagonists of the Whisky Peak Arc and the tertiary antagonist of the Little Garden Arc .

[ 2 ] He is a major antagonist during the Skypiea Arc , and later the central character from Gedatsu's Accidental Blue-Sea Life Cover Page Serial. He now works at Ukkari Hot-Springs Resort .

affiliation: New Giant Warrior Pirates ; Buggy's Delivery (former); Straw Hat Grand Fleet
intro_text: Gerd [ 3 ] is a giant from Elbaph [ 1 ] and the doctor of the New Giant Warrior Pirates . She was formerly an S-Class ranked mercenary for Buggy's Delivery . [ 2 ] She is a major ally of the Straw Hat Pirates during the Elbaph Arc .

name: George Mach

name: Germa Kingdom
intro_text: Germa Kingdom Statistics Japanese Name: ジェルマ王国 Romanized Name: Jeruma Ōkoku English Name: Kingdom of Germa First appearance: Chapter 832 ; Episode 787 [ 1 ] Region: North Blue (formerly); New World The Germa Kingdom , also known as the Kingdom of Science ( 科学の国 , Kagaku no Kuni ? ) , [ 2 ] is the world 's only seafaring kingdom, and a former member nation of the World Government . [ 3 ] About 300 years ago, it was the center of the Germa Empire ( ジェルマ帝国 , Jeruma Teikoku ? ) , [ 4 ] which was formed by the Vinsmoke Family 's conquest of the North Blue . [ 5 ] Today, the kingdom remains under Vinsmoke rule, and is serviced militarily as the Underworld army known as Germa 66 . In an attempt to retake control of the North Blue, King Vinsmoke Judge bartered with the Emperor Big Mom to form an alliance between his kingdom and the Big Mom Pirates in exchange for the Germa Kingdom's advanced technology , and attempted to seal the pact by marrying off his estranged son, Sanji , to Big Mom's 35th daughter, Charlotte Pudding . The Germa Kingdom was assembled at Whole Cake Island in the New World , [ 1 ] but then later departed after Big Mom revealed her treachery. The World Government later disassociated themselves from the Germa Kingdom for attempting to ally themselves with the Big Mom Pirates. [ 6 ]

name: Gatherine
intro_text: Gatherine is a cafeteria worker at Enies Lobby . [ 1 ]

name: Genzo
intro_text: Genzo [ 2 ] is the sheriff of Cocoyasi Village , and an unofficial but long-serving parental figure to Nami and Nojiko . [ 1 ] He is an ally of the Straw Hat Pirates during the Arlong Park Arc .

name: Giant Warrior Pirates
english_name: Giant Pirates; Giant Pirate Warrior Band / Pirate Giants; Giant Pirate Crew (VIZ, current); Giant Warrior Pirates (Funimation, former)
intro_text: Giant Warrior Pirates Statistics Japanese Name: 巨兵海賊団 Romanized Name: Kyo Hei Kaizoku-dan Official English Name: Giant Pirates; Giant Pirate Warrior Band / Pirate Giants; Giant Pirate Crew (VIZ, current); Giant Warrior Pirates (Funimation, former) First Appearance: Chapter 129 ; Episode 78 [ 1 ] Captain: Jarul and Jorul (original crew, former); Dorry and Brogy Main Ship: Great Magni (original crew, former); Great Eirik (Destroyed) † Total Bounty: At least 3,600,000,000 [ bounty 1 ] At least 200,000,000 [ bounty 2 ] The Giant Warrior Pirates is a pirate crew made up of giants from Elbaph lead by Dorry and Brogy . Before them, the crew's captains were Jarul and Jorul . They disbanded 102 years ago when Dorry and Brogy began their duel, but reunited once they returned to Elbaph. [ 2 ] [ 3 ] They are major allies of the Straw Hat Pirates during the Egghead Arc . During Dorry and Brogy's absence, Hajrudin formed a spiritual revival crew, the New Giant Warrior Pirates , who are a part of the Straw Hat Grand Fleet .

Ace 's execution. They consist of at least eight giants. [ 1 ]

name: Gild Tesoro
english_name: Gild Tesoro (Funimation), Guild Tesoro (Simulcast subs), Gildo Tesoro ( Burning Blood )
epithet: "Golden Emperor" ( 黄金帝 , Ōgon Tei ? ) ; "Monster of the New World" ( 新世界の怪物 , Shin Sekai no Kaibutsu ? )
intro_text: Gild Tesoro , [ 9 ] also known as the "Golden Emperor" ( 黄金帝 , Ōgon Tei ? ) , was the owner and proprietor of Gran Tesoro , the largest entertainment city-ship in the world. Formerly a slave of the World Nobles , Tesoro became a global kingpin with dealings with the World Government and the Underworld infamously known as the "Monster of the New World" ( 新世界の怪物 , Shin Sekai no Kaibutsu ? ) and one of the wealthiest people in the world. [ 3 ] He served as the main antagonist of One Piece Film: Gold , during which he invited the Straw Hat Pirates aboard his ship as part of an elaborate show to enslave and execute them in lavish fashion, only to meet a crushing defeat by Luffy and be subsequently arrested by the Marines .

name: Ginny
occupation: East Army Captain of the Revolutionary Army, Slave (former)
residence: South Blue ( Sorbet Kingdom ); Mary Geoise (former)
intro_text: Ginny [ 5 ] was the former East Army commander of the Revolutionary Army , having joined the group alongside Bartholomew Kuma 22 years ago, back when they were known as the Freedom Fighters . [ 6 ] She is the late mother of Jewelry Bonney . [ 7 ] She was previously a slave from the Porco Kingdom who was forced to take part in the Native Hunting Competition on God Valley 38 years ago. [ 1 ] [ 3 ] She and Emporio Ivankov were responsible for orchestrating the God Valley Incident as a means of escaping the Native Hunting Competition. She was captured by the World Government and became the eighth wife to a World Noble . [ 8 ] She was also one of Jaygarcia Saturn 's test subjects and developed the Sapphire Scales disease after a failed experiment. [ 9 ] Ginny was then released from slavery and used the little time remaining to her to return to the Sorbet Kingdom with her child, dying as a result. [ 7 ]

[ 4 ] Due to his actions, he can be considered the secondary antagonist of the Baratie Arc , although he eventually ends up aiding Monkey D. Luffy and Sanji .

name: God Valley
intro_text: God Valley Statistics Japanese Name: ゴッドバレー Romanized Name: Goddo Barē English Name: God Valley First appearance: Chapter 957 ; Episode 958 [ 1 ] Region: West Blue [ 2 ] God Valley was an island in the West Blue unaffiliated with the World Government , where the so-called God Valley Incident took place 38 years ago. [ 2 ] The island has since disappeared without a trace, having sunk beneath the ocean following the eponymous incident. [ 1 ] [ 3 ] It is notably the birthplace of Shanks of the Four Emperors and his twin brother, Saint Figarland Shamrock . [ 4 ] In addition, the island is the birthplace of Rocks D. Xebec and was a safe haven for the Davy Family , including Rocks' son, Marshall D. Teach . [ 5 ]

name: Going Merry
japanese_name: ゴーイング・メリー号
english_name: Going Merry (Funimation uncut dub, Odex) Merry Go (VIZ, Funimation edited-for-tv dub) SS Merry Go (4Kids Dub)
intro_text: Going Merry Statistics Japanese Name: ゴーイング・メリー号 Romanized Name: Gōingu Merī-gō Official English Name: Going Merry (Funimation uncut dub, Odex) Merry Go (VIZ, Funimation edited-for-tv dub) SS Merry Go (4Kids Dub) Debut: Chapter 41 ; Episode 17 [ 1 ] Affiliation: Straw Hat Pirates Completion Date: January 22nd [ 2 ] Status: Destroyed Height: 1100 cm (36'1") [ 3 ] Length: 1300 cm (42'8") [ 3 ] Japanese VA : Houko Kuwashima ( Klabautermann ) Funi English VA : Brittney Karbowski (Klabautermann) The Going Merry [ 4 ] was the first full-sized ship owned by the Straw Hat Pirates , a caravel that served as their main transportation through the East Blue , and the Grand Line up until Water 7 . It was often affectionally referred to as simply Merry ( メリー , Merī ? ) by the crew. Originally designed by Kaya 's servant Merry , it was gifted to the Straw Hats for defending Syrup Village against the Black Cat Pirates . Over time, it came to be loved by the crew as a home and as a friend, so much so that she eventually developed a life of her own and became a genuine crew member. Unfortunately, the Going Merry took an inordinate amount of damage during her "lifetime", being blown up, impaled, sliced up multiple times, and partially eaten by Wapol . Eventually, the Merry could no longer continue and after helping the Straw Hats escape Enies Lobby , it received a Viking funeral. [ 5 ] After destruction, the Merry was succeeded by the Thousand Sunny , a ship specially built by Franky (and the Galley-La Company ) to maintain the "soul" of its predecessor. [ 6 ]

name: Goki
intro_text: Goki is a member of the Numbers in the Beasts Pirates , representing the number "five". [ 2 ] Due to his actions and role, he is a minor antagonist in the Wano Country Arc .

He is also one of the central characters in "Gang" Bege's Oh My Family Cover Page Serial.

name: Grand Line
intro_text: Grand Line Statistics Japanese Name: 偉大なる航路 Romanized Name: Gurando Rain Official English Name: Grand Line First Appearance: Chapter 2 ; Episode 1 (mentioned) [ 1 ] Chapter 48 ; Episode 23 (shown) [ 2 ] Meaning: Great Sea Route Compass: Log Pose , Eternal Pose The Grand Line is an ocean route which wraps around the entire Blue Planet , south of the North and East Blues and north of the South and West Blues . It is separated from the Blues on both the north and south ends by the Calm Belt . The Grand Line is split into two sections by the Red Line : the first section is known as Paradise and the second is known as the New World . Reputed as the "pirate's graveyard," the sea and the islands possess a vast number of unpredictable phenomena that are not seen anywhere else in the world, many of which make sailing extremely difficult. Additionally, the Grand Line is home to the world's most powerful people and groups, including the Three Great Powers . Only one group, the Roger Pirates , has managed to fully sail across the Grand Line, and this achievement is what caused their captain Gol D. Roger to be labeled as the "Pirate King". The Grand Line serves as the setting of most of the series, with almost everything since the Arabasta Saga being set in it.

name: Great Michael
intro_text: Great Michael [ 2 ] is an infamous New World pirate captain who allied with Whitebeard . [ 1 ]

name: Gol D. Roger
japanese_name: ゴール・ D ・ロジャー
alias: Gold Roger ( ゴールド・ロジャー , Gōrudo Rojā ? )
epithet: Pirate King ( 海賊王 , Kaizoku-Ō ? , King of the Pirates (English versions))
intro_text: Gol D. Roger , [ 7 ] [ 3 ] more commonly known as Gold Roger , [ 1 ] was a legendary pirate who, as captain of the Roger Pirates , held the title of Pirate King and possessed the legendary treasure known as the One Piece . [ 1 ] He was also the lover of Portgas D. Rouge and the biological father of Portgas D. Ace . [ 8 ] Roger was the first pirate in history since Joy Boy to circumnavigate the Grand Line , culminating in reaching its final island which he named Laugh Tale . However, knowing that his life was limited by an incurable disease, Roger disbanded his crew and turned himself in to be executed. Though the World Government staged the execution as a public spectacle to discourage piracy, Roger used his final words to ensure the opposite, openly declaring that the One Piece belonged to anyone that could find it. As such, he singlehandedly began the Great Pirate Era . [ 1 ] [ 9 ] Because of his past actions and achievements, Roger is a central background character in the series as a whole.

name: Green Bit
english_name: Greenbit (Viz Manga); Green Bit (Funimation and Crunchyroll Simulcast)
intro_text: Green Bit Statistics Japanese Name: グリーンビット Romanized Name: Gurīn Bitto English Name: Greenbit (Viz Manga); Green Bit (Funimation and Crunchyroll Simulcast) First appearance: Chapter 710 ; Episode 639 [ 1 ] Region: New World Green Bit is a seemingly uninhabited island in the New World located immediately north of Dressrosa . [ 2 ] Law first mentioned the island when he was speaking to Smoker on Punk Hazard . [ 3 ] Its underground is home to the Tontatta Kingdom . [ 4 ]

name: Gold Roger
japanese_name: ゴール・ D ・ロジャー
alias: Gold Roger ( ゴールド・ロジャー , Gōrudo Rojā ? )
epithet: Pirate King ( 海賊王 , Kaizoku-Ō ? , King of the Pirates (English versions))
intro_text: Gol D. Roger , [ 7 ] [ 3 ] more commonly known as Gold Roger , [ 1 ] was a legendary pirate who, as captain of the Roger Pirates , held the title of Pirate King and possessed the legendary treasure known as the One Piece . [ 1 ] He was also the lover of Portgas D. Rouge and the biological father of Portgas D. Ace . [ 8 ] Roger was the first pirate in history since Joy Boy to circumnavigate the Grand Line , culminating in reaching its final island which he named Laugh Tale . However, knowing that his life was limited by an incurable disease, Roger disbanded his crew and turned himself in to be executed. Though the World Government staged the execution as a public spectacle to discourage piracy, Roger used his final words to ensure the opposite, openly declaring that the One Piece belonged to anyone that could find it. As such, he singlehandedly began the Great Pirate Era . [ 1 ] [ 9 ] Because of his past actions and achievements, Roger is a central background character in the series as a whole.

name: Guilty Jury
occupation: Jury members of the Enies Lobby court, Pirates (former)
intro_text: Guilty Jury Statistics Japanese Name: 有罪陪審員 Romanized Name: Yūzai Baishin'in Official English Name: Guilt Jury (VIZ); Guilty Jury (Funimation) First Appearance: Chapter 384 ; Episode 271 [ 1 ] Affiliation: World Government ( Baskerville ) [ 2 ] Occupation: Jury members of the Enies Lobby court, Pirates (former) [ 2 ] Leader(s): Baskerville Residency: Enies Lobby The Guilty Jury , [ 3 ] [ 4 ] [ 5 ] comprising of "Eleven Righteous Jurors" ( 公正なる「11人の陪審員」 , Kōsei-naru Jūichinin no Baishin'in ? ) , [ 6 ] are the strongest and most fearsome of the troops at Enies Lobby under Baskerville 's command. [ 2 ] They are eleven men each wielding a large ball on a chain. They wear masks and they have the word "Guilty" ( 有罪 , Yūzai ? ) tattooed on their left arm. [ 7 ]

name: Guillotine
intro_text: Guillotine [ 3 ] is a Marine Vice Admiral and one of the nine that took part in the Egghead Incident . [ 1 ] He serves as a minor antagonist in the Egghead Arc .

name: Guernika
intro_text: Guernika [ 3 ] [ 2 ] was a masked agent of CP0 . [ 1 ] While in Wano Country for negotiations with Shogun Kurozumi Orochi , [ 4 ] Guernika played a relevant role in the Raid on Onigashima . On the World Government 's order, he interfered in the duel between Kaidou and Monkey D. Luffy , resulting in the latter's temporary loss, [ 5 ] for which he was murdered by Kaidou as punishment. [ 6 ] Due to his actions and role, he was a supporting antagonist during the Wano Country Arc .

name: Gyaro
intro_text: Gyaro is a member of the Macro Pirates . He is a pop-eyed goldfish fish-man . He was also a member of the Sun Pirates , before its disbanding. [ 2 ]

name: Gyoro, Nin, and Bao
japanese_name: ギョロ, ニン, バオ
intro_text: Gyoro , Nin , and Bao were a trio of oddly shaped Soldier Zombies that were first seen reporting to Moria about the Straw Hats ' arrival. [ 1 ]

name: Gurutaro
intro_text: Gurutaro [ 3 ] is a samurai who was part of the Mimawarigumi 41 years ago. [ 2 ] He was also a retainer of the Kouzuki Family . [ 1 ]

name: Gyro
affiliation: Gyro Pirates , New Fish-Man Pirates (ruse, former)
epithet: "Crab-Hand Gyro" ( 蟹手のジャイロ , Kanite no Jairo ? )
intro_text: Crab-Hand Gyro is the captain of the Gyro Pirates from South Blue that was on its way to the New World before an unfortunate meeting with the New Fish-Man Pirates . [ 1 ]

name: Gyukimaru
affiliation: Shimotsuki Family ( Shimotsuki Ushimaru ); Kouzuki Family ( Kawamatsu )
alias: Gyukimaru ( 牛鬼丸 , Gyūkimaru ? )
epithet: "Gyukimaru on Oihagi Bridge" ( おいはぎ橋の牛鬼丸 , Oihagi-bashi no Gyūkimaru ? , Viz: "Gyukimaru on Bandit's Bridge")
devil_fruit_name: Hito Hito no Mi, Model: Onyudo
intro_text: Onimaru is a komagitsune who was once the companion of the late daimyo of Ringo , Shimotsuki Ushimaru . [ 3 ] After the death of his master, he joined forces with Kawamatsu in collecting weapons for the final battle against Kaidou and protecting them from robbers. After Kawamatsu was captured, Onimaru posed as a human known as Gyukimaru on Oihagi Bridge , stealing weapons from people while continuing to guard the graves. [ 3 ] [ 1 ] [ 2 ]

name: Gyogyo
intro_text: Gyogyo [ 4 ] is a member of the Bonney Pirates . He was once a resident of the Sorbet Kingdom , having been a friend of Bartholomew Kuma and Ginny since childhood. After the Summit War of Marineford , he was arrested by Admiral Akainu following his crew's defeat against the Blackbeard Pirates .

name: Hachinosu
intro_text: Hachinosu Present Past Statistics Japanese Name: ハチノス Romanized Name: Hachinosu English Name: Fullalead (VIZ), Beehive (Funimation subs) First appearance: Chapter 306 ; Episode 208 (mentioned) [ 1 ] Chapter 925 ; Episode 917 [ 2 ] Region: New World Affiliates: Rocks Pirates (formerly) Ochoku (formerly) Blackbeard Pirates Hachinosu , also known as Pirate Island ( 海賊島 , Kaizoku-jima ? ) , is a New World island known to be a " Pirate Paradise" ( 海賊達の楽園 , Kaizoku-tachi no Rakuen ? ) that is currently occupied by the Blackbeard Pirates . [ 2 ] It is said to be where the Davy Back Fight originated [ 1 ] and where the legendary Rocks Pirates were formed. [ 3 ] Following the downfall of the Rocks Pirates during the God Valley Incident , the island was ruled by Ochoku until the Rocky Port Incident , where he was ousted by Blackbeard . [ 4 ] Blackbeard intends to turn Hachinosu into a World Government -allied nation, under the preliminary name of Blackbeard Kingdom ( 黒ひげ王国 , Kurohige Ōkoku ? ) . [ 5 ]

name: Gyoru
intro_text: Gyoru [ 4 ] is a fishmonger in Foosha Village and the husband of Chicken . Luffy bought fish from him when he was a kid. [ 1 ]

name: Hakowan
intro_text: Hakowan [ 2 ] is Wapol 's pet dog, acquired after Wapol was permanently deposed from Drum Island .

name: Hakugan
intro_text: Hakugan [ 4 ] is the helmsman of the Heart Pirates .

name: Ham Burger
intro_text: Ham Burger is the king of the Ballywood Kingdom , acting as chairman of the most recent Levely . [ 2 ]

name: Hack
intro_text: Hack [ 3 ] was one of the archaeologists of Ohara . [ 2 ]

name: Han
intro_text: Han-ko is a child from Ebisu Town . [ 1 ]

name: Hana
intro_text: O-Hana [ 2 ] is a citizen of Wano Country , residing in the Flower Capital . [ 1 ]

name: Hammond
intro_text: Hammond is a Daggertooth pike conger fish-Man and a member of the now disbanded New Fish-Man Pirates . [ 2 ] He serves as a supporting antagonist in the Fish-Man Island Arc .

name: Hangan
intro_text: Hangan [ 2 ] is an infamous New World pirate captain who allied with Whitebeard . [ 1 ]

name: Hamlet
intro_text: Hamlet is a Shinuchi in the Beasts Pirates . [ 1 ] During the raid on Onigashima , he was tamed by the power of the Kibi Kibi no Mi and joined the side of the Ninja-Pirate-Mink-Samurai Alliance . [ 3 ]

name: Hamburg
epithet: "Four-Footed Dash Freak" ( 四足ダッシュの奇人 , Yonsoku Dasshu no Kijin ? )
intro_text: Hamburg is a combatant of the Foxy Pirates and the leader of the Groggy Monsters . [ 3 ] Alongside Porche , he is one of Foxy 's last remaining crewmates. [ 4 ] Due to his actions, he is a major antagonist during the Long Ring Long Land Arc .

name: Hanzo
affiliation: Beasts Pirates ; Orochi Oniwabanshu (former); Kouzuki Family Oniwabanshu (anime only, former)
intro_text: Hanzo [ 6 ] is a ninja and a member of the Beasts Pirates . [ 2 ] He previously was a member of the Orochi Oniwabanshu which served the shogun of Wano Country , Kurozumi Orochi . [ 1 ] Due to his actions and role, he is a minor antagonist in the Wano Country Arc .

name: Hannyabal
intro_text: Hannyabal [ 4 ] is the warden of Impel Down . Formerly the Vice Warden, [ 3 ] he was promoted to Magellan 's position following the mass breakout . [ 2 ] Due to his actions and role, he is a major antagonist in the Impel Down Arc .

name: Hanger
intro_text: Hanger is an employee at Robecca Hanberg , a clothing store in Loguetown . Nami tried on all of his best clothes, but did not buy any. [ 1 ]

name: Happa Yamao
intro_text: Happa Yamao [ 1 ] is a civilian of Water 7 whom Usopp bought wood and supplies from in order to repair the Going Merry . He is an old bandit turned carpenter who moved to Water 7 from the "Gourmet City", Pucci . [ 2 ]

name: Hanji
intro_text: Hanji is a former prisoner of Udon 's Prisoner Mine . [ 2 ]

name: Happo Navy
intro_text: Happo Navy Statistics Japanese Name: 八宝水軍 Romanized Name: Happō Suigun Official English Name: Happosui Army; Happo Navy ( WT100 2nd ) First Appearance: Chapter 704 ; Episode 633 [ 1 ] Captain: Sai , Chinjao (former) Main Ship: Happosai Total Bounty: At least 752,000,000 [ bounty 1 ] [ 2 ] At least 542,000,000 [ bounty 2 ] [ 3 ] The Happo Navy is a pirate crew [ 4 ] led by the Chinjao Family of the Kano Country . [ 5 ] Under Sai , the Happo Navy is the third ship of the Straw Hat Grand Fleet . [ 6 ] They also are one of the central characters from The Stories of the Self-Proclaimed Straw Hat Grand Fleet Cover Page Serial.

name: Harald
affiliation: Elbaph Royal Family; Knights of God
occupation: King of the Warland Kingdom; Knight of God; Devoted Blade of God (former)
intro_text: Harald was the most recent king of Elbaph [ 3 ] and a member of the Knights of God . [ 4 ] He is the father of Hajrudin and Loki , [ 3 ] born respectively from Ida , his original lover, and Estrid , his official spouse. [ 6 ] Celebrated as Elbaph's greatest king, Harald spent most of his reign campaigning to undo his homeland's negative reputation as a warmongering nation and affiliate it with World Government . Among his local accomplishments were the construction of the Walrus School and the several branch routes that connect Elbaph's villages together. However, 14 years ago Harald was betrayed by the World Government , who attempted to corrupt him in order to enslave the giants as soldiers. He was able to foil their plot by having his son Loki kill him, though the true reason for his death would not become known by the rest of Elbaph until the present day. [ 7 ] Harald's life and death make him a major figure in the events of the Elbaph Arc .

name: Haredas
intro_text: Haredas is an old man who lives in Weatheria . [ 1 ] He was Nami 's tutor in weather-manipulation during the timeskip.

name: Hajrudin
affiliation: New Giant Warrior Pirates ; Buggy's Delivery (resigned); Straw Hat Grand Fleet ; Elbaph Royal Family (Illegitimate)
occupation: Captain of the Sixth Ship of the Straw Hat Grand Fleet ; Pirate Captain ; Mercenary (former); Prince (Illegitimate)
intro_text: Hajrudin [ 1 ] is a giant warrior described as being from the "new generation" of Elbaph . [ 7 ] He is the illegitimate son of the late King Harald and his original lover Ida , as well as the older half-brother of Prince Loki . [ 8 ] [ 9 ] A century after the Giant Warrior Pirates ' disbandment, Hajrudin formed the New Giant Warrior Pirates in an attempt to revive the legendary crew; [ 10 ] they formerly served as S-class pirate mercenaries for Buggy 's Pirate Dispatch Organization . [ 2 ] Hajrudin competed in the Corrida Colosseum on Dressrosa , where he would team up with Monkey D. Luffy and the Straw Hat Pirates to overthrow Donquixote Doflamingo 's regime. Following this, Hajrudin swore his crew's allegiance to Luffy and became the captain of the sixth ship of the Straw Hat Grand Fleet . [ 3 ] He is a major ally during the Dressrosa and Elbaph Arcs , and one of the central characters of The Stories of the Self-Proclaimed Straw Hat Grand Fleet Cover Page Serial.

name: Hareji
intro_text: Hareji [ 4 ] is a former prisoner of Udon 's prisoner mines. [ 1 ] In the past, he was a resident of the Flower Capital . [ 3 ] In the anime credits and closed captions, he was named Tetsu ( テツ ? ) . [ 5 ]

name: Haritsu Kendiyo
japanese_name: ハリーツ・ケンディヨ
intro_text: Haritsu Kendiyo [ 2 ] is a pirate captain whose crew was captured by the Kid Pirates as they tried to escape back to Paradise from the New World . [ 1 ]

name: Happygun
intro_text: Happygun [ 2 ] is an infamous New World pirate captain who allied with Whitebeard . [ 1 ]

name: Hara
intro_text: Hara [ 2 ] is a resident who lives in the Flower Capital of Wano Country . [ 1 ]

name: Haruta
intro_text: Haruta [ 4 ] is the former 12th division commander of the Whitebeard Pirates . [ 1 ]

name: Hatcha
intro_text: Hatcha is a member of the Numbers in the Beasts Pirates , representing the number "eight". [ 1 ] Due to his actions and role, he is a minor antagonist in the Wano Country Arc .

name: Hasami
intro_text: Hasami is a giant desert crab from Sandy Island , and a friend of Matsuge the camel. [ 1 ] Originally an inhabitant of the deserts near Rainbase , he currently works as an employee of Ukkari Hot-Spring Island . He serves as an ally to the Straw Hat Pirates during the Arabasta Arc .

name: Hattori
intro_text: Hattori is Rob Lucci 's pet pigeon, and initially acted as the target of his ventriloquism. [ 1 ] [ 3 ]

name: Harpy
occupation: Caesar's secretary (Undercover); Doflamingo's spy; Pirate Officer
intro_text: Monet was a scout and assistant for Caesar Clown and his underlings in the research facility on Punk Hazard . [ 7 ] She was, in truth, a member and officer [ 3 ] of the Donquixote Pirates and was sent as a deep cover agent by Doflamingo . [ 2 ] [ 8 ] She was also the older sister of Sugar . [ 9 ] Due to her mission and actions, she could be regarded as the tertiary antagonist of the Punk Hazard Arc .

name: Hatsume
intro_text: Hatsume [ 3 ] is a samurai and member of the Beasts Pirates . She was formerly a member of the Mimawarigumi serving Kurozumi Orochi until Orochi's seeming death. [ 1 ] [ 2 ]

name: Headband Catfish Village
intro_text: Headband Catfish Village Statistics Japanese Name: ハチマキナマズ村 Romanized Name: Hachimaki Namazu-mura English Name: Village of the Headband-Wearing Catfish First appearance: Chapter 214 ( cover ) [ 1 ] Region: Sea Floor [ 1 ] Headband Catfish Village is a small village located beneath the seas of Paradise [ citation needed ] where many catfish reside. [ 1 ]

name: Hawkman
intro_text: Hawkman [ 2 ] is a Gifter in the Beasts Pirates . [ 1 ]

name: Heat
intro_text: Heat [ 4 ] is a member of the Kid Pirates . [ 1 ]

name: Hawkins Pirates
intro_text: Hawkins Pirates Statistics Japanese Name: ホーキンス海賊団 Romanized Name: Hōkinsu Kaizokudan Official English Name: Hawkins Pirates First Appearance: Chapter 498 ; Episode 392 [ 1 ] Captain: Basil Hawkins Main Ship: Grudge Dolph Total Bounty: At least 320,000,000 [ bounty 1 ] [ 2 ] At least 249,000,000 [ bounty 2 ] [ 3 ] The Hawkins Pirates are an infamous and notable rookie pirate crew introduced in Sabaody Archipelago around the time the Straw Hat Pirates arrived there two years ago. [ 1 ] As such, they are part of the Worst Generation , with their captain being Basil Hawkins . After having been part of a short-lived alliance with the Kid and On Air Pirates , the crew became subordinate to the Beasts Pirates , and thus operated in Wano Country . [ 4 ] Currently the fate of the captain and the whereabouts of the rest of the crew are unknown. [ 5 ]

name: Heppoko
intro_text: Heppoko [ 3 ] [ 4 ] is a member of the Alvida Pirates and the triplet brother of Peppoko and Poppoko . [ 2 ]

name: Hera
epithet: "Hera the Thundercloud" ( 雷雲のヘラ , Raiun no Hera ? )
intro_text: Hera the Thundercloud is a thundercloud homie created by Big Mom at Wano Country as a replacement for Zeus . She is a special kind of homie, having received a soul fragment from Big Mom herself, [ 1 ] and serves as one of her personal weapons, alongside Prometheus and Napoleon .

name: Herb
intro_text: Herb [ 2 ] was a Shandia from 400 years ago. She was Kalgara 's wife and Mousse 's mother. [ 1 ]

name: Helmeppo
occupation: Lieutenant Commander ; Chief Petty Officer (promoted); Chore Boy (promoted)
intro_text: Lieutenant Commander Helmeppo [ 6 ] is a Marine officer and the son of ex-Marine Captain "Axe-Hand" Morgan . Once a civilian who shamelessly exploited his father's status, [ 1 ] he (together with Koby ) underwent extensive training under Vice Admiral Garp [ 8 ] to become a full-fledged serviceman, [ 9 ] currently holding the rank of lieutenant commander . [ 2 ] He is also a member of the secret group known as SWORD . [ 10 ] Due to his actions during his initial appearance, he can be considered a supporting antagonist of the Romance Dawn Arc . He and Koby are also the protagonists of Diary of Koby-Meppo Cover Page Serial.

name: Heracles
intro_text: Heracles is a strange warrior that used to reside in the Greenstone forest in the Boin Archipelago . He trained Usopp in the use of Pop Greens for two years. [ 1 ]

name: Hibari
intro_text: Hibari is a Marine Commander and a member of SWORD . [ 1 ]

name: Hidayu
intro_text: Hidayu is a samurai who allied with the Kouzuki Family . [ 3 ] After waiting 20 years for the return of the Nine Red Scabbards , he affiliated with the Ninja-Pirate-Mink-Samurai Alliance to raid Onigashima . [ 1 ]

name: Higuma
intro_text: Higuma was a bandit and the leader of the Higuma Bandits ( ヒグマ山賊団 , Higuma Sanzoku-dan ? ) , active in the mountains of Dawn Island . [ 2 ] He was the first antagonist to be introduced in the series, and the first of three in the Romance Dawn Arc (third of three in the anime). [ 1 ] [ 6 ]

name: Hihimaru
epithet: "Raging Baboon of the Mountain" ( 山の暴れ狒々 , Yama no Abare Hihi ? )
intro_text: Hihimaru is a baboon that was formerly a guard for the Beasts Pirates before being tamed by Tama . [ 2 ]

name: Hewitt
intro_text: Hewitt was the chef of the Bellamy Pirates . [ 2 ]

name: Heart Pirates
intro_text: Heart Pirates Statistics Japanese Name: ハートの海賊団 Romanized Name: Hāto no Kaizokudan Official English Name: Heart Pirates First Appearance: Chapter 498 ; Episode 392 [ 2 ] Captain: Trafalgar D. Water Law Main Ship: Polar Tang (Destroyed) † [ 1 ] Total Bounty: At least 3,000,001,500 [ bounty 1 ] [ 3 ] At least 500,000,500 [ bounty 2 ] [ 4 ] At least 440,000,500 [ bounty 3 ] [ 5 ] At least 200,000,500 [ bounty 4 ] [ 2 ] [ 6 ] The Heart Pirates are an infamous and notable rookie pirate crew from the North Blue and introduced on Sabaody Archipelago around the time the Straw Hat Pirates arrived there two years ago. Their captain, Trafalgar D. Water Law , is a member of the Worst Generation [ 2 ] and a former member of the Seven Warlords of the Sea . [ 5 ] [ 4 ] They were in an alliance with the Straw Hat Pirates , Kouzuki Family , and Mink Tribe with the goal of taking down both Donquixote Doflamingo of the Seven Warlords of the Sea and Kaidou of the Four Emperors . [ 7 ] The alliance was dissolved after their objective of taking down Doflamingo and Kaidou was achieved. [ 8 ] Following the events of Wano, the crew was attacked on Winner Island by the Blackbeard Pirates and were utterly defeated in the ensuing battle. [ 9 ] Save for Law and Bepo, the fate of the crew is unknown.

name: Hatchan
epithet: Six Sword Style Hachi ( 六刀流のハチ , Rokutōryū no Hachi ? )
intro_text: Hatchan , [ 7 ] nicknamed " Hachi " ( ハチ , Hachi ? ) , is an octopus fish-man who was an officer of the Arlong Pirates before their defeat, [ 1 ] and a member of the Sun Pirates before that. [ 3 ] After the rest of the Arlong Pirates were arrested, Hatchan was the sole member to escape, [ 8 ] and went on many adventures which ended in him opening a floating takoyaki restaurant [ 2 ] and meeting up again with the Straw Hat Pirates . He was one of the major antagonists of the Arlong Park Arc . He is also the central character of the Hatchan's Sea-Floor Stroll Cover Page Serial. Later, along with Camie , he is one of the main supporting characters of both the Sabaody Archipelago and Fish-Man Island Arcs as an ally of the Straw Hat Pirates .

name: Hildon
intro_text: Hildon was a Wild Zombie that resembled a stitched-up vampire. [ 1 ] He appeared to act as a messenger in-between the members of Thriller Bark 's Mysterious Four , reporting to them noteworthy events that were happening throughout the island ship before it fell. [ 2 ]

name: Hilmungardr
intro_text: Hilmungardr is a giant serpent that lives in the Land of Gods . [ 1 ]

name: Hikoichi
english_name: Supersonic Duck Squadron Super Spot-Billed Duck Troops ( OPCG )
intro_text: Super Spot-Billed Duck Troops Statistics Japanese Name: 超カルガモ部隊 Romanized Name: Chō Karugamo Butai Official English Name: Supersonic Duck Squadron Super Spot-Billed Duck Troops ( OPCG ) First Appearance: Chapter 180 ; Episode 111 [ 1 ] Affiliation: Arabasta Kingdom Leader(s): Karoo The Super Spot-Billed Duck Troops [ 2 ] are a family of seven Super Spot-Billed Ducks (and later one camel) who serve the kingdom of Arabasta . They are led by their captain Karoo , and are reputed to be the fastest troop in the kingdom of Arabasta . [ 1 ] All of the ducks have the strange theme of wearing different types of hats and various other jewelry and clothing. Also strange was that the last member to join the squad, Matsuge , is a camel who helped the Straw Hats confront Baroque Works .

name: Hikkomitsukumai
intro_text: Hikkomitsukumai [ 3 ] is a retainer of the Kurozumi Family [ 2 ] and a prison guard who lives in the Flower Capital of Wano Country . [ 1 ]

name: Himuro
intro_text: Himuro [ 3 ] is a samurai and a member of the Beasts Pirates . [ 2 ] He was previously a member of the Mimawarigumi , which served as the police force of the shogun of Wano Country , Kurozumi Orochi . [ 1 ] Due to his actions and role, he is a minor antagonist in the Wano Country Arc .

name: Hip
intro_text: Hip [ 2 ] is a member of the Kid Pirates . [ 1 ]

name: Hippie
epithet: "Hippie the Skull Curry" ( ヒッピー・ザ・ドクロカレー , Hippī za Dokurokarē ? )
intro_text: Hippie the Skull Curry is the captain of the Endurance Curry Pirates . [ 1 ]

name: Hina
epithet: "Black Cage Hina" ( 黒檻のヒナ , Kuro Ori no Hina ? )
devil_fruit_english_name: Bind-Bind Fruit ( VIZ ); Cage-Cage Fruit ( 4Kids , Funimation )
intro_text: "Black Cage" Hina is a Marine Rear Admiral and a former classmate of Vice Admiral Smoker . [ 4 ] She currently leads the Black Cage Corps , a unit (containing Jango and Fullbody [ 8 ] [ 9 ] among others) tasked with patrolling the seas around the Arabasta Kingdom . Originally introduced as a captain , she was promoted to the rank of rear admiral some time after the Summit War of Marineford . [ 3 ] Due to her actions and role, she is a supporting antagonist in the Arabasta Arc and a minor antagonist in the Marineford Arc .

name: Hippo Gentleman
english_name: Hippo Gallant (VIZ); Gentleman Hippopotamus (Funimation sub); Hippo Gentleman (Funimation dub)
intro_text: Hippo Gentleman was a Wild Zombie who was the vice commander of the Wild Zombies. [ 2 ]

name: Hippan Natte
intro_text: Hippan Natte [ 2 ] is a Waiter of the Beasts Pirates who serves as a guard in the Prisoner Mine of the Udon region.

name: Hiramera
intro_text: Hiramera is an olive flounder mermaid and one of the top five Mermaid Cafe Dancers . [ 2 ] [ 1 ]

name: Hitsugisukan
intro_text: Duke Hitsugisukan is a sheep mink and the former ruler of the Mokomo Dukedom before Inuarashi and Nekomamushi . [ 2 ]

name: Hiro Gomon
intro_text: Hiro Gomon is a member of the Endurance Curry Pirates . [ 1 ]

name: Hiroshi
intro_text: Hiroshi [ 2 ] is a resident of Bakura Town in Wano Country who runs a restaurant alongside Wakasa ; the two of them own a tanuki named Saikoro which the sumo wrestler Urashima forced to be cooked and served to him. [ 1 ]

name: Hiriluk
intro_text: Dr. Hiriluk [ 2 ] was a quack doctor from Drum Island , as well as Tony Tony Chopper 's father figure. [ 4 ] He was also a former thief. [ 5 ] He died seven years ago by drinking an explosive formula—a form of preemptive suicide, as his life was already curtailed by both disease and external threats .

name: Hoe
affiliation: King Neptune ; Fish-Man Island ( Ryugu Kingdom )
intro_text: Hoe is the pet whale of King Neptune who uses him as a means of transportation. The only word he can say is his own name.

name: Hocker
intro_text: Hocker [ 3 ] was the owner of the Pet Food Shop in Orange Town and the owner of Chouchou .

name: Ho
intro_text: Dr. Ho [ 3 ] is the palace medic of Arabasta 's royal family. He seems to hold Drum medicine in high regard. [ 2 ]

name: Hiyoko/Niwatori
epithet: "Baron Tamago" ( タマゴ男爵 , Tamago Danshaku ? )
intro_text: Baron Tamago [ 2 ] (also known as Viscount Hiyoko and Count Niwatori in his second and third form respectively) is a knight-ranked combatant of the Big Mom Pirates , [ 4 ] who originates from the Longleg Tribe . He and his partner Pekoms were responsible for collecting the monthly payment of sweets from Fish-Man Island in exchange for Big Mom 's protection. [ 1 ] Due to his actions and role, he is a minor antagonist in the Fish-Man Island Arc and Dressrosa Saga , and a supporting antagonist in the Whole Cake Island Saga .

name: Hody Jones
japanese_name: ホーディ・ジョーンズ
english_name: Hordy Jones (Funimation) Hody Jones (Viz, Special Edited Version );
affiliation: New Fish-Man Pirates ; Ally of the Flying Pirates (former); Ryugu Kingdom (former)
intro_text: Hody Jones [ 1 ] is a great white shark fish-man , [ 8 ] the captain of the New Fish-Man Pirates before their downfall, [ 3 ] and a former soldier of the Neptune Army . [ 4 ] He is an admirer and militant believer of Arlong 's ideals, [ 9 ] [ 10 ] and the main antagonist of the Fish-Man Island Arc .

name: Hocha
intro_text: Hocha [ 2 ] was one of the archaeologists of Ohara . [ 1 ]

name: Hokahoka Pirates
intro_text: Hokahoka Pirates Statistics Japanese Name: ホカホカ海賊団 Romanized Name: Hokahoka Kaizokudan Official English Name: Hoka-Hoka Pirates First Appearance: Chapter 224 ; Episode 146 [ 1 ] The Hokahoka Pirates [ 2 ] are a pirate crew whom Okome belongs to as a first mate . [ 1 ]

name: Hogback
epithet: "Doctor Hogback" ( ドクトル・ホグバック , Dokutoru Hogubakku ? ) "Genius Surgeon" ( 天才外科医 , Tensai Gekai ? )
intro_text: Doctor Hogback is the world-renowned "Genius Surgeon" [ 3 ] who joined the Thriller Bark Pirates under the employment of Gecko Moria [ 6 ] and assisted him in creating his undead army . [ 7 ] He was one of the crew's Mysterious Four [ 2 ] and the secondary antagonist of the Thriller Bark Saga . He also acts as the de facto main antagonist in the anime only Great Mikoshi Race Arc .

name: Holy
intro_text: Holy is a dog raised and trained by Ohm . In addition to being Ohm's pet , he is a skilled martial artist in his own right. [ 1 ] [ 3 ]

name: Honner
intro_text: Dr. Honner [ 2 ] was the doctor aboard Mont Blanc Noland 's expedition fleet 400 years ago. [ 1 ]

name: Hop
intro_text: Hop [ 2 ] is a member of the Kid Pirates . [ 1 ]

name: Hongo
intro_text: Hongo [ 4 ] is the one of the Senior Officers and the doctor [ 3 ] of the Red Hair Pirates . [ 1 ]

name: Hoisassa
intro_text: Hoisassa [ 2 ] is a retainer of the Kurozumi Family .

name: Horseman
intro_text: Horseman [ 2 ] is a Gifter in the Beasts Pirates and an attendant of Bao Huang . [ 1 ]

name: Holed'em
intro_text: Holed'em [ 3 ] is a Shinuchi of the Beasts Pirates , who resides in Bakura Town . [ 2 ] He is the son of Norinosuke , a Wano Country citizen. [ 4 ] Due to his actions and role, he is a supporting antagonist in the Wano Country Arc and a minor antagonist in the Oni Child Yamato's Golden Harvest Surrogate Pilgrimage cover story.

name: Hotori and Kotori
intro_text: Hotori and Kotori are the younger triplet brothers of Satori . They are lieutenants of the Divine Soldiers , an army of 50 warriors under the command of Yama , their leader, and Enel . [ 3 ] Hotori is the middle triplet, while Kotori is the youngest. [ 2 ] They are minor antagonists during the Skypiea Arc .

name: Hound
devil_fruit_name: Inu Inu no Mi, Model: Hound
intro_text: Hound [ 3 ] is a Marine Vice Admiral and one of the nine that took part in the Egghead Incident . [ 1 ] He serves as a minor antagonist in the Egghead Arc .

name: Hotei
occupation: Samurai ; Pirate ; Captain of the Mimawarigumi (former)
intro_text: Hotei is the former captain of the Mimawarigumi , a samurai police force in Wano Country that served the shogun Kurozumi Orochi until he was deposed by Kaidou . [ 2 ] Due to his actions and role, he is a minor antagonist in the Wano Country Arc .

name: House
intro_text: House [ 3 ] is a member of the Kid Pirates . [ 1 ]

name: Hound Pets
intro_text: Hound Pets Statistics Japanese Name: ハウンドペッツ Romanized Name: Haundo Pettsu Official English Name: Hound Pets First Appearance: Chapter 499 ; Episode 393 Affiliation: Human Auction House Occupation: Slave Trader Leader(s): Peterman The Hound Pets are a slave trading group based in the Sabaody Archipelago , who kidnapped Camie . They are led by Peterman . [ 1 ]

name: Hototogisu
intro_text: Hototogisu [ 2 ] is a Marine Vice Admiral and a subordinate of Vice Admiral Tsuru . [ 1 ]

name: Human Auctioning House
japanese_name: 人間 オークション会場
intro_text: Human Auctioning House Statistics Japanese Name: 人間 オークション会場 Romanized Name: Hyūman Ōkushon Kaijō English Name: Human Auctioning House First appearance: Chapter 501 , Episode 394 Region: Paradise The Human Auctioning House —euphemistically referred to by the Marines as the Public Employment Security Office ( 職業安定所 , Shokugyō Anteijo ? ) [ 1 ] —was a center of slave trade and a bidding house for selling living beings as slaves. It is located on Sabaody Archipelago 's Grove 1. It was owned by Donquixote Doflamingo until he gave it to Disco , who managed it until it was attacked by the Straw Hat Pirates . [ 2 ] Like most of the things affiliated with Doflamingo, it bears the Donquixote Pirates Jolly Roger —a smiley-face with the cancel symbol over it. After the Celestial Dragon Hit-and-Run Incident , Doflamingo stopped running it in favor of other more lucrative pursuits and it went bankrupt, leaving it out of business.

name: Humphrey
intro_text: Humphrey [ 2 ] is a bartender at Sabaody Archipelago .

name: Hublot
intro_text: Hublot [ 2 ] is a member of the Spade Pirates . [ 1 ]

name: Hustle
intro_text: Hustle is a member of the Krieg Pirates and a combat instructor. [ 2 ]

name: Hyoutauros
intro_text: Hyoutauros [ 3 ] is a former member of the Centaur Patrol Unit under Brownbeard , having served as one of Caesar Clown ’s henchmen. [ 1 ] He is a jaguar centaur .

name: Ibiributsu
intro_text: Ibiributsu [ 2 ] is a Waiter of the Beasts Pirates who serves as a guard in the Prisoner Mine of the Udon region of Wano Country . He is in charge of exchanging meal tickets for kibi dango . [ 1 ]

name: Hyota
english_name: Kicking Claw Force; Elite Alabastian Royal Guards
intro_text: The Tsumegeri Guards were four of the most powerful soldiers in the Arabasta Kingdom . They drank the Hero Water and attempted to take down Crocodile , but failed and died from the water's side effects shortly after Crocodile refused to even fight them to give them an honorable death. [ 1 ]

name: Hyouzou
occupation: Mercenary ; Pirate ; Assassin ; Pirate Officer ; Swordsman
intro_text: Hyouzou [ 7 ] is a poisonous blue-ringed octopus merman . Prior to his imprisonment, he was a mercenary [ 3 ] and working as the New Fish-Man Pirates ' assassin , [ 2 ] and later became one of the officers . Hyouzou was also known as the best swordsman on Fish-Man Island . [ 4 ] Due to his actions and role, he is considered to be a major antagonist in the Fish-Man Island Arc .

name: Iceburg
occupation: President of the Galley-La Company ; Mayor of Water 7
intro_text: Iceburg [ 7 ] is the president of the Galley-La Company and the mayor of Water 7 . [ 2 ] [ 3 ] He was formerly one of Tom's Workers , being one of Tom 's two apprentices alongside Franky . He is a central character for the Water 7 Arc and the Water 7 Saga as a whole, due to being the original inheritor of the Pluton blueprints given to him by Tom which CP9 sought after.

name: Ibusu
intro_text: Ibusu is a supposed pirate captain who affiliates and trades with the Donquixote Pirates . [ 1 ] As his ship is later discovered to be a trading vessel for the Doerena Kingdom , it is unknown if he is truly a pirate captain. [ 2 ]

name: Hyougoro
alias: "Grandpa Hyo" ( ヒョウじい , Hyō-jii ? , English: "Old Man Hyo")
epithet: "Hyougoro of the Flower" ( 花のヒョウ五郎 , Hana no Hyōgorō ? , English: "Hyogoro the Flower")
intro_text: Hyougoro of the Flower [ 7 ] [ 8 ] is the former yakuza boss of the Flower Capital and the most famous yakuza in Wano Country during the Kouzuki Family 's reign. [ 3 ] During Kurozumi Orochi 's reign, he was imprisoned in Udon 's prisoner mines until he was freed by Monkey D. Luffy . As a prisoner, he was known as Grandpa Hyo ( ヒョウじい , Hyō-jii ? ) . [ 1 ]

name: Ideaman
intro_text: Ideaman is a member of Krieg Pirates . He is the Staff Officer of Planning. [ 2 ]

name: Ida
residence: Elbaph (Fisherman Village); Samuwanai Island (former); Bunt Kingdom (former)
intro_text: Ida [ 3 ] was a giantess hailing from Samuwanai Island in the South Blue who once worked at a circus in the Bunt Kingdom . She ran a notorious bar alongside Mato in Elbaph . Ida was the unofficial mentor, advisor and long-time lover of King Harald of Elbaph, and the mother of his firstborn Hajrudin . [ 1 ] She was also the foster mother to Hajrudin's half-brother Prince Loki , after Loki's birth mother, Queen Estrid , disowned him and died. [ 4 ] Ida passed away fifteen years ago after being poisoned by Estrid's relatives to prevent her from claiming the fortune they believed was entitled to their family, [ 5 ] which sent Loki into a murderous rage of revenge for his foster mother.

name: Ideo Pirates
intro_text: Ideo Pirates Statistics Japanese Name: イデオ海賊団 Romanized Name: Ideo Kaizokudan Official English Name: Ideo Pirate Crew First Appearance: Chapter 799 ; Episode 744 [ 1 ] Captain: Ideo [ 2 ] The Ideo Pirates , formerly known as the XXX Gym Martial Arts Alliance ( XXX ジム格闘連合 , Toripuru-Ekkusu Jimu Kakutō Rengō ? , pronounced "Triple X Gym Martial Arts Alliance") is a pirate crew led by Ideo [ 2 ] and the fourth ship of the Straw Hat Grand Fleet . [ 3 ] The crew's four members were allies of Luffy during the Dressrosa Arc . They also are one of the central characters from The Stories of the Self-Proclaimed Straw Hat Grand Fleet Cover Page Serial.

name: Ilisia Kingdom
intro_text: Ilisia Kingdom Statistics Japanese Name: イリシア王国 Romanized Name: Irishia Ōkoku English Name: Ilisia First appearance: Chapter 823 ; Episode 777 [ 1 ] Region: West Blue [ 2 ] Affiliates: World Government The Ilisia Kingdom [ 3 ] [ 1 ] is a country in the West Blue . It is affiliated with the World Government , and its ruler is allowed a seat at the Levely . [ 4 ]

name: Ikkaku
intro_text: Ikkaku [ 2 ] is a member of the Heart Pirates . [ 1 ]

name: Ikaros Much
intro_text: Ikaros Much [ 4 ] is a giant squid fish-man and was an officer of the New Fish-Man Pirates before their downfall and disbandment. Due to his actions and role, he is considered to be a major antagonist in the Fish-Man Island Arc .

name: Ideo
affiliation: Ideo Pirates ; Straw Hat Grand Fleet
occupation: Captain of the Fourth Ship of the Straw Hat Grand Fleet ; Pirate Captain ; Boxer
epithet: "Destruction Cannon" ( 破壊砲 , Hakai Hō ? )
intro_text: "Destruction Cannon" Ideo [ 9 ] is an XXX-rank boxer [ 6 ] and a member of the Longarm Tribe , [ 10 ] as well as the captain of the Ideo Pirates [ 4 ] and of the fourth ship of the Straw Hat Grand Fleet . [ 3 ] He joined as a gladiator at the Corrida Colosseum to compete for the Mera Mera no Mi , [ 1 ] where he met three other gladiators with whom he would form the then-XXX Gym Martial Arts Alliance, [ 3 ] as well as Monkey D. Luffy , to whom he eventually pledged his loyalty. [ 5 ] He is an ally of Luffy during the Dressrosa Arc , and one of the central characters from The Stories of the Self-Proclaimed Straw Hat Grand Fleet Cover Page Serial.

name: Igaram
occupation: Captain of the Royal Guard; Frontier Agent (former); Bounty Hunter (former); Mayor of Whisky Peak (undercover, former)
alias: "Mr. 8" ( Misutā Eito ? ) (former); "Igarappoi" ( イガラッポイ ? )
intro_text: Igaram [ 4 ] is the captain of the Arabasta royal guard (captain of Arabasta security in the English dub). [ 2 ] He aided Nefertari Vivi in infiltrating Baroque Works as a Frontier Agent and took on the codename Mr. 8 . [ 3 ] He was partnered with Miss Monday . [ 3 ] He is also Terracotta 's husband. [ 6 ] He is an ally of the Straw Hat Pirates during the Whisky Peak (after being a minor antagonist) and Arabasta Arcs.

name: Imu
affiliation: World Government ( Nerona Family ); First Twenty
intro_text: Saint Nerona Imu is the King of the World ( 世界の王 , Sekai no Ō ? ) who occupies the Empty Throne , giving him sole authority over the World Government . [ 2 ] [ 3 ] One of the First Twenty responsible for the creation of the World Government and the only one alive today, [ 2 ] his status has been kept an absolute secret from the world at large for over 800 years since the Void Century . [ 4 ] With the ambition of finally bringing the Great War to a decisive conclusion, Imu directed his subordinates the Five Elders to procure Dr. Vegapunk 's invention, the Mother Flame , [ 5 ] and ordered the Knights of God to annex Elbaph in an invasion that he eventually personally participated in. [ 6 ] Imu first appeared during the Levely Arc . Due to his status and actions, he is the main antagonist of the Elbaph Arc , an overarching antagonist in the Egghead Arc , and one of the primary overarching antagonists of the Final Saga and the One Piece series as a whole.

name: Igarappoi
occupation: Captain of the Royal Guard; Frontier Agent (former); Bounty Hunter (former); Mayor of Whisky Peak (undercover, former)
alias: "Mr. 8" ( Misutā Eito ? ) (former); "Igarappoi" ( イガラッポイ ? )
intro_text: Igaram [ 4 ] is the captain of the Arabasta royal guard (captain of Arabasta security in the English dub). [ 2 ] He aided Nefertari Vivi in infiltrating Baroque Works as a Frontier Agent and took on the codename Mr. 8 . [ 3 ] He was partnered with Miss Monday . [ 3 ] He is also Terracotta 's husband. [ 6 ] He is an ally of the Straw Hat Pirates during the Whisky Peak (after being a minor antagonist) and Arabasta Arcs.

name: Impel Down Prisoners
intro_text: Impel Down Statistics Japanese Name: インペルダウン Romanized Name: Inperu Daun English Name: Impel Down First appearance: Chapter 525 ; Episode 422 [ 1 ] Region: Calm Belt Affiliates: World Government Marines Impel Down , also known as the Underwater Prison ( 海底監獄 , Kaitei Kangoku ? ) and the Great Prison ( 大監獄 , Dai Kangoku ? ) , is a government-controlled stronghold in Paradise together with Marineford and Enies Lobby . It is the World Government 's maximum-security prison for the most dangerous criminals and pirates . [ 2 ] It is located underwater in the middle of the Calm Belt and part of the Tarai Current . [ 3 ] Impel Down is the main setting of the Impel Down Arc , with the prison's staff acting as the main antagonist group in the same arc.

name: Impel Down Staff

name: Inbi
intro_text: Inbi is a member of the Numbers in the Beasts Pirates , representing the number "one". [ 2 ]

affiliation: Tontatta Kingdom Scouting Unit ; Tontatta Pirates ; Straw Hat Grand Fleet
intro_text: Inhel [ 2 ] is a dwarf from the Tontatta Kingdom who first appeared in the Riku Royal Army Headquarters beneath the Flower Field. [ 1 ]

name: Inoichibannosuke
intro_text: Inoichibannosuke [ 2 ] is a firefighter who works for the fire department Igumi ( い組 ? ) , which he claims is the best in Wano Country . [ 1 ]

name: Inspector General
intro_text: Marine Ranks Statistics Explained in: SBS Volume 8 [ 1 ] SBS Volume 24 [ 2 ] SBS Volume 29 [ 3 ] SBS Volume 98 [ 4 ] The ranks within the Marine System are fairly straightforward, where each rank is clearly delineated. [ 1 ] Officers present at Marine Headquarters are considered the elite forces of the Marines, about three ranks higher in terms of power from those of the same rank at other bases. All ranks present from "Lieutenant" above are usually trained here, exceptions being those in command of other Marine bases which includes Axe-Hand Morgan and Nezumi . [ 3 ] This page will list the Marine ranks and the soldiers who hold the titles.

name: Instructor

[ 1 ] Officers present at Marine Headquarters are considered the elite forces of the Marines, about three ranks higher in terms of power from those of the same rank at other bases. All ranks present from "Lieutenant" above are usually trained here, exceptions being those in command of other Marine bases which includes Axe-Hand Morgan and Nezumi . name: Inukai
intro_text: Inukai [ 2 ] is a Wano Country official. [ 1 ]

name: Inuarashi
affiliation: Mokomo Dukedom ; Musketeers ; Kouzuki Family ; Inuarashi Musketeer Squad ; Ninja-Pirate-Mink-Samurai Alliance (disbanded); Nine Red Scabbards ; Roger Pirates (former); Whitebeard Pirates (former)
occupation: Daimyo ; Ruler of the Mokomo Dukedom (former); Commander of the Musketeers; Retainer; Samurai ; Pirate Apprentice (former)
residence: Zou (former) ( Kurau City ) Wano Country ( Kuri )
epithet: "Duke Inuarashi" ( イヌアラシ公爵 , Inuarashi Kōshaku ? , English versions: "Duke Dogstorm") "Ruler of Day" ( 昼の王 , Hiru no Ō ? , Simulcast subs: "King of Day")
intro_text: Duke Inuarashi is a canine mink . He was one of the two rulers of the Mokomo Dukedom , [ 7 ] dubbed the " Ruler of Day ", [ 11 ] holding the position from 6:00 AM to 6:00 PM. [ 14 ] He currently serves as the daimyo of Kuri . [ 6 ] Inuarashi and Nekomamushi served as retainers for the Kouzuki Family of Wano Country , [ 8 ] as members of Kouzuki Oden 's Nine Red Scabbards . [ 4 ] The pair also followed Oden as he travelled with the Whitebeard Pirates and Roger Pirates . [ 5 ] Pedro has claimed Inuarashi and Nekomamushi must not be allowed to die because "the world is waiting for them". [ 15 ] He is an ally of the Straw Hat Pirates during the Whole Cake Island Saga and the Wano Country Saga .

name: Inazuma
affiliation: Kamabakka Kingdom ; Newkama Land ; Revolutionary Army ; Impel Down (former)
occupation: Revolutionary; Prisoner of the Great Prison (former)
devil_fruit_english_name: Snip-Snip Fruit (VIZ and Funimation); Shear-Shear Fruit (One Piece Official YouTube Channel)
intro_text: Inazuma [ 5 ] is a newkama and the deputy commander of the G Army in the Revolutionary Army , serving under Emporio Ivankov as his right hand man/woman. [ 6 ]

name: Inuppe
intro_text: Inuppe [ 3 ] was a Wild Zombie on Thriller Bark in the service of Gecko Moria . He was animated with Sanji 's shadow [ 1 ] and eventually assigned to guard Hogback . [ 4 ] Due to his actions and role, he is a supporting antagonist in the Thriller Bark Arc .

name: Ipponume
intro_text: Ipponume [ 2 ] is Ipponmatsu 's wife. [ 1 ]

name: Ipponmatsu
intro_text: Ipponmatsu [ 2 ] is the owner of an arms shop in Loguetown and Ipponume 's husband. He was the former owner of both Sandai Kitetsu and Yubashiri . [ 1 ]

name: Iron Giant
epithet: "Iron Giant" ( 鉄の巨人 , Tetsu no Kyojin ? )
intro_text: Emet , [ 3 ] also known as the Iron Giant , is a robot created around the time of the Void Century who was a friend of Joy Boy . Since that time it has been mostly de-powered, only reactivating in two known instances. The first instance occurred 200 years ago when it nearly attacked Mary Geoise . Afterwards, it was smuggled away and kept on Egghead , [ 1 ] [ 4 ] where in the present day it was used to guard Vegapunk 's prerecorded video being broadcasted from within itself. [ 5 ] After hearing the Drums of Liberation from Monkey D. Luffy , Emet powered back up and aided the Straw Hat Pirates in battling the Five Elders . [ 6 ] Emet is an ally during the Egghead Arc .

name: Invisible Man
occupation: Reporter Soldier Zombies and General Zombies Commander
alias: "Absa" ( アブサ , Abusa ? )
epithet: Absalom of the Graveyard ( 墓場のアブサロム , Hakaba no Abusaromu ? )
intro_text: Absalom of the Graveyard was the commander of the Soldier Zombies and General Zombies of Thriller Bark prior to its collapse. [ 4 ] He was one of the Mysterious Four [ 2 ] of the Thriller Bark Pirates and one of the major antagonists of the Thriller Bark Saga . Sometime during the timeskip, he became a reporter under the alias Absa . [ 3 ] At some point, he was abducted by the Blackbeard Pirates and killed to poach his Devil Fruit , powers with his ability going to Shiryu . [ 8 ]

name: Ishilly
intro_text: Ishilly is a striped beakfish mermaid and one of the top five Mermaid Cafe Dancers . [ 3 ]

name: Iscat
intro_text: Iscat is a giant cat previously locked in the Land of Gods ' diorama, where it ruled Bigstein Castle . [ 2 ] It is the Sun God's pet.

name: Island Eater
intro_text: Island Eater [ 1 ] was a giant goldfish that inhabited the sea near Little Garden . He was said to be the main reason ships leaving the island never reached their destination. [ 4 ] He was classified as a Type C creature, "Big Savage". [ 5 ]

name: Isa
intro_text: Isa [ 2 ] is a Shandia woman and Aisa 's mother. [ 1 ]

name: Island of Rare Animals
japanese_name: 珍獣島 (manga) 伝説の宝島 (anime)
english_name: Island of Rare Animals (manga) Legendary Treasure Island ( Funimation , Odex ) Golden Island ( 4Kids )
intro_text: Island of Rare Animals Statistics Japanese Name: 珍獣島 (manga) 伝説の宝島 (anime) Romanized Name: Chinjū Jima (manga) Densetsu no Takara-jima (anime) English Name: Island of Rare Animals (manga) Legendary Treasure Island ( Funimation , Odex ) Golden Island ( 4Kids ) First appearance: Chapter 22 ; Episode 18 Region: East Blue The Island of Rare Animals , alternatively known as the Legendary Treasure Island in the anime, is an island in the East Blue populated by bizarre "hybrid" animals. It is currently known to have only two human inhabitants: Gaimon and Sarfunkel .

name: Islanders
intro_text: Kuja Statistics Japanese Name: 九蛇 Official English Name: Kuja First Appearance: Chapter 498 ; Episode 392 [ 1 ] Features: All female Homeland: Amazon Lily The Kuja are an all-female human tribe inhabiting the island of Amazon Lily , currently ruled by "Pirate Empress" Boa Hancock . Due to their physical and cultural isolation from the world at large, most of them were completely ignorant of men prior to Luffy 's unwitting arrival on their island. [ 2 ]

name: Ishigo Shitemanna
japanese_name: イーシゴ・シテマンナ
intro_text: Ishigo Shitemanna [ 3 ] is an appraiser in Water 7 . [ 2 ]

name: Islewan
intro_text: Islewan [ 3 ] is an infamous New World pirate captain who was once a member of the Whitebeard Pirates , [ 4 ] before forming his own crew subordinate to Whitebeard . [ 1 ]

name: Isshi-100
affiliation: Sakura Kingdom ; Bliking Pirates (disbanded); Drum Kingdom (former)

[ 2 ] They are an outgrowth of the Isshi-20 ( イッシー 20 , Isshī Tuenti ? ) , a group of twenty doctors that formerly served Drum's king Wapol until he was permanently deposed. [ 1 ]
