name: Itomimizu
intro_text: Itomimizu is the former Foxy Pirates ' game official and serves as the announcer and commentator of the Davy Back Fight events. He rides on a very large bird named Chuchun .

name: Ivan X
english_name: Supersonic Duck Squadron Super Spot-Billed Duck Troops ( OPCG )
intro_text: Super Spot-Billed Duck Troops Statistics Japanese Name: 超カルガモ部隊 Romanized Name: Chō Karugamo Butai Official English Name: Supersonic Duck Squadron Super Spot-Billed Duck Troops ( OPCG ) First Appearance: Chapter 180 ; Episode 111 [ 1 ] Affiliation: Arabasta Kingdom Leader(s): Karoo The Super Spot-Billed Duck Troops [ 2 ] are a family of seven Super Spot-Billed Ducks (and later one camel) who serve the kingdom of Arabasta . They are led by their captain Karoo , and are reputed to be the fastest troop in the kingdom of Arabasta . [ 1 ] All of the ducks have the strange theme of wearing different types of hats and various other jewelry and clothing. Also strange was that the last member to join the squad, Matsuge , is a camel who helped the Straw Hats confront Baroque Works .

name: Issho
alias: "Fujitora" ( 藤虎 , Fujitora ? , literally meaning "Wisteria Tiger")
intro_text: Issho , better known by his alias Fujitora , is an Admiral in the Marines . [ 3 ] Once the captain of a guard force in the former Aoi Kingdom , [ 4 ] he was conscripted through a World Military Draft during the two-year timeskip, being appointed to fill one of the Admiral vacancies caused by Kuzan 's resignation and Sakazuki 's promotion alongside his co-worker Ryokugyu . [ 9 ] A proponent of "Humane Justice", Fujitora notably spearheaded a campaign for the abolishment of the " Seven Warlords of the Sea " system, [ 10 ] which came to pass during the most recent Levely . [ 11 ] Fujitora was first mentioned by Sakazuki when the latter was discussing plans to deal with Monkey D. Luffy and Trafalgar Law on Dressrosa . [ 2 ] His following mission and actions on Dressrosa made him the first Admiral to physically appear post-timeskip and the secondary antagonist of the Dressrosa Arc .

name: Iyan'eno Chinode
japanese_name: イヤンエーノウ・チノデ
intro_text: Iyan'eno Chinode is a writer for the fashion column "Streetcorner Collection" in the World Economy News Paper . [ 2 ]

name: Iwatobi
intro_text: Iwatobi is the king of the Whiteland Kingdom ( ホワイトランド王国 , Howaitorando Ōkoku ? ) in the North Blue [ 3 ] and one of fifty monarchs who took part in the Levely . [ 2 ]

name: Jabari
intro_text: Jabari [ 2 ] is a CP6 agent. [ 1 ]

name: Ivankov
japanese_name: エンポリオ・イワンコフ
affiliation: Revolutionary Army ; Freedom Fighters (former); Kamabakka Kingdom ; Newkama Land (former)
occupation: G Army Commander of the Revolutionary Army; Queen of the Kamabakka Kingdom; Queen of Newkama Land (former); Slave (former)
epithet: "Okama King" ( オカマ王 , Okama Ō ? ) ; "Miracle Person" ( 奇跡の人 , Kiseki no Hito ? )
devil_fruit_english_name: Horm-Horm Fruit (VIZ and Funimation); Hor-Hor Fruit (One Piece Official YouTube Channel)
intro_text: Emporio Ivankov , [ 7 ] or Iva for short, is the queen of the Kamabakka Kingdom , known as "Okama King" and a "Miracle Person" . [ 8 ] He is one of the Revolutionary Army 's founding members, [ 2 ] as well as the commander of the G Army, which covers the Grand Line . [ 9 ] A former slave of the World Nobles , [ 10 ] he escaped during the Native Hunting Competition on God Valley and was responsible for the God Valley Incident along with Ginny . [ 11 ] He was formerly a prisoner of Impel Down , where he was kept in Level 5, but lived in the secret "Okama Paradise" in Level 5.5. [ 1 ] After escaping Impel Down and participating in the Summit War of Marineford , he returned to his post as queen of Kamabakka Kingdom . [ 12 ] He acts as an ally of Luffy during the Impel Down and Marineford Arcs.

name: Jacksonbanner
intro_text: Jacksonbanner [ 3 ] was the musician of the Roger Pirates [ 2 ] until the crew's dissolution. His current whereabouts and status are unknown.

name: Jaguar
intro_text: Jaguar [ 3 ] is a member of the Kid Pirates . [ 1 ]

name: Iva
japanese_name: エンポリオ・イワンコフ
affiliation: Revolutionary Army ; Freedom Fighters (former); Kamabakka Kingdom ; Newkama Land (former)
occupation: G Army Commander of the Revolutionary Army; Queen of the Kamabakka Kingdom; Queen of Newkama Land (former); Slave (former)
epithet: "Okama King" ( オカマ王 , Okama Ō ? ) ; "Miracle Person" ( 奇跡の人 , Kiseki no Hito ? )
devil_fruit_english_name: Horm-Horm Fruit (VIZ and Funimation); Hor-Hor Fruit (One Piece Official YouTube Channel)
intro_text: Emporio Ivankov , [ 7 ] or Iva for short, is the queen of the Kamabakka Kingdom , known as "Okama King" and a "Miracle Person" . [ 8 ] He is one of the Revolutionary Army 's founding members, [ 2 ] as well as the commander of the G Army, which covers the Grand Line . [ 9 ] A former slave of the World Nobles , [ 10 ] he escaped during the Native Hunting Competition on God Valley and was responsible for the God Valley Incident along with Ginny . [ 11 ] He was formerly a prisoner of Impel Down , where he was kept in Level 5, but lived in the secret "Okama Paradise" in Level 5.5. [ 1 ] After escaping Impel Down and participating in the Summit War of Marineford , he returned to his post as queen of Kamabakka Kingdom . [ 12 ] He acts as an ally of Luffy during the Impel Down and Marineford Arcs.

name: Jailer Beasts
intro_text: Jailer Beasts Statistics Japanese Name: 獄卒獣 Romanized Name: Gokusotsujū Official English Name: Jailer Beasts (VIZ); Demon Guards (Funimation) First Appearance: Chapter 525 ; Episode 422 Leader: Sadi Status: Active The five Jailer Beasts are the most feared creatures of Impel Down , [ 1 ] who are under the command of Sadi . [ 2 ] [ 3 ]

name: Izou
affiliation: Whitebeard Pirates (former); Kouzuki Family ; Ninja-Pirate-Mink-Samurai Alliance
occupation: 16th Division Commander (former); Samurai ; Retainer of the Kouzuki Family
residence: Wano Country ( Ringo ) Wano Country ( Kuri )
intro_text: Izou was the former 16th division commander of the Whitebeard Pirates [ 2 ] and prior to this, a retainer of the Wano Country daimyo Kouzuki Oden . He was the older brother of fellow retainer Kikunojo . [ 4 ] He was an ally in both the Marineford and Wano Country Arcs , the latter of which he would ultimately lose his life fighting CP0 agent Maha to prevent him from chasing the Straw Hats.

name: Jaguar D. Saul
japanese_name: ハグワール・ D ・サウロ
affiliation: Walrus School ; Marines (defected) ; Clan of D.
intro_text: Jaguar D. Saul is a giant and former Vice Admiral who deserted the Marines [ 2 ] and happened to wash ashore on Ohara . [ 1 ] During the Buster Call that destroyed Ohara 22 years ago, he risked his life to protect a young Nico Robin and ended up frozen by fellow former Vice Admiral Kuzan . [ 8 ] While Robin and the World Government presumed that he had died, he had actually survived. After collecting the books that Ohara's scholars sacrificed themselves to save, he brought them to Elbaph and went into hiding, [ 5 ] after which he stayed and became a history teacher for the Walrus School , located on Elbaph's "Sun World" level. He is a major ally of the Straw Hat Pirates during the Elbaph Arc .

name: Jaki
intro_text: Jaki is a member of the Numbers in the Beasts Pirates , representing the number "four". [ 2 ] Due to his actions and role, he is a minor antagonist in the Wano Country Arc .

name: Jaya
intro_text: Jaya Present Past Statistics Japanese Name: ジャヤ Romanized Name: Jaya English Name: Jaya First appearance: Chapter 222 ; Episode 146 [ 1 ] Region: Paradise Log: 4 days [ 2 ] Jaya is a lawless island in Paradise popular with pirates . 400 years ago, it—with more than twice its current landmass—was the homeland of the Shandia . Canonically, it is the fifth place visited by the Straw Hat Pirates on the Grand Line and the main setting of the Jaya Arc .

name: Jalmack
intro_text: Saint Jalmack is a World Noble who visited the Goa Kingdom twelve years ago. [ 1 ] He acts as a minor antagonist during the Post-War Arc , as he was the one responsible for causing Sabo 's long-term amnesia.

name: Jarul
epithet: "Mountain Beard" Jarul ( 山ひげのヤルル , Yamahige no Yaruru ? , VIZ: Beardhill)
intro_text: "Mountain Beard" Jarul is a giant and former co-captain of the Giant Warrior Pirates , alongside Jorul . Along with Jorul, he is known as a hero of the giants, [ 1 ] and after Jorul's death, Jarul is currently the oldest giant in the world. [ 3 ] He has a great-great-granddaughter, Ylva , who is a student at the Walrus School . [ 5 ]

name: Jaygarcia Saturn
japanese_name: ジェイガルシア・サターン聖
occupation: Co-Head of the World Government (Public) ; Warrior God of Science and Defense ( 科学防衛武神 , Kagaku Bōei Bushin ? , English versions: "Godhead of Science & Defense") ; Scientist
intro_text: Saint Jaygarcia Saturn [ 6 ] [ 7 ] was a World Noble who served as one of the Five Elders publicly heading the World Government . [ 1 ] A scientist by trade, [ 4 ] he held the title Warrior God of Science and Defense during his tenure. [ 3 ] Living for over two centuries, Saturn was a central figure in the Egghead Incident , where he personally led the Marine siege on Egghead with the goal of assassinating Dr. Vegapunk . [ 8 ] However, due to Saturn's failure to stop Monkey D. Luffy from escaping, Imu stripped him of his immortality , resulting in his death. His position as one of the Five Elders was granted to Figarland Garling . [ 9 ] Due to his actions and role, Saturn served as the main antagonist of the Egghead Arc and one of the overarching antagonists of the One Piece series, along with the other Elders, until his death.

name: Jean Ango
epithet: "Jean the Bandit" ( 追剥のジャン , Oihagi no Jan ? )
intro_text: Jean Ango , also known as Jean the Bandit , is a bounty hunter . He joined as a gladiator at the Corrida Colosseum to compete for the Mera Mera no Mi . [ 1 ]

name: Jean Bart
affiliation: Heart Pirates ; his own crew (former); Ninja-Pirate-Mink-Samurai Alliance
intro_text: Jean Bart is a pirate who was originally introduced as Saint Rosward 's slave, being part of his Pirate Captain Collection. [ 1 ] He currently serves under Trafalgar Law as a member of the Heart Pirates after being freed from the World Noble . [ 3 ]

name: Jabra
devil_fruit_name: Inu Inu no Mi, Model: Wolf
intro_text: Jabra [ 4 ] is an agent of CP0 . [ 2 ] He was previously an agent of CP9 , [ 3 ] being the third strongest of this agency. [ 7 ] He was one of the major antagonists during the Enies Lobby Arc .

name: Jean Noueilles
occupation: Pirate ; Sea Urchin Armor Spine Squad Commander
alias: "Captain Porcupinefish" ( ハリセンボン隊長 , Harisenbon-taichō ? , English versions: "Captain Harisenbon")
intro_text: Jean Noueilles , [ 3 ] also known as Captain Porcupinefish , [ 4 ] is a porcupinefish fish-man and a member of the now disbanded New Fish-Man Pirates . He was the commander of the Sea Urchin Armor Spine Squad. [ 2 ] In the anime, he is named " Harisenbon " ( ハリセンボン , Harisenbon ? ) , based on his "Captain Porcupinefish" alias.

name: Jeep
intro_text: Jeep [ 2 ] is the king of the South Fire Kingdom ( 南ファイアー王国 , Minami Faiā Ōkoku ? , WT100 2nd : "Kingdom of South Firea" ) and one of fifty monarchs who took part in the Levely . He is also the father of Wheel . [ 1 ] [ 2 ]

name: Jack
occupation: All-Star ; Captain of the Mammoth ; De Facto Ruler of Kuri (former)
epithet: "Jack the Drought" ( 旱害のジャック , Kangai no Jakku ? )
devil_fruit_name: Zou Zou no Mi, Model: Mammoth
devil_fruit_english_name: Elephant-Elephant Fruit, Ancient Zoan Model: Mammoth (Funimation), Eleph-Eleph Fruit Ancient Zoan Model Mammoth
intro_text: Jack the Drought is a giant grouper fish-man , [ 5 ] an All-Star of the Beasts Pirates as one of Kaidou 's three closest confidants , and captain of the Mammoth , prior to its destruction. [ 2 ] He was formerly the ruler of Kuri region in Wano Country . [ 4 ] He was first briefly mentioned when being notified of Caesar Clown 's capture by viewers of Caesar's broadcast of the Punk Hazard incident . [ 9 ] Due to his actions and role, he is the main antagonist of the Zou Arc , and a major antagonist in the Wano Country Arc .

name: Jean Goen
intro_text: Jean Goen is a prisoner on Level 1 of Impel Down . [ 2 ]

name: Jeet
affiliation: Ideo Pirates ; Straw Hat Grand Fleet
intro_text: Jeet [ 5 ] is a criminal and a former bounty hunter who joined as a gladiator at the Corrida Colosseum to compete for the Mera Mera no Mi , along with his partner, Abdullah . [ 1 ] He is an ally of Luffy during the Dressrosa Arc . After the battle with the Donquixote Pirates at Dressrosa , he joined the XXX Gym Martial Arts Alliance, which later converted to a pirate crew called the Ideo Pirates . [ 3 ] [ 2 ]

name: Jeet‎
affiliation: Ideo Pirates ; Straw Hat Grand Fleet
intro_text: Jeet [ 5 ] is a criminal and a former bounty hunter who joined as a gladiator at the Corrida Colosseum to compete for the Mera Mera no Mi , along with his partner, Abdullah . [ 1 ] He is an ally of Luffy during the Dressrosa Arc . After the battle with the Donquixote Pirates at Dressrosa , he joined the XXX Gym Martial Arts Alliance, which later converted to a pirate crew called the Ideo Pirates . [ 3 ] [ 2 ]

name: Jango
english_name: Django (Viz, 4Kids, Funimation subs); Jango (Funimation dub, WT100 , live-action series)
occupation: Marine Lieutenant Commander ; Marine Seaman Recruit (promoted); Pirate (former); Captain (former), First Mate (former), Dancer (former)
epithet: "One-Two" Jango (as a pirate) ( 1・2のジャンゴ , Ichi Ni no Jango ? ) ; "Jango the Turncoat" (Marine) ( 寝返りのジャンゴ , Negaeri no Jango ? )
intro_text: The subject of this article is sometimes called Django . Jango the Turncoat is a hypnotist and Marine lieutenant commander [ 3 ] serving under Rear Admiral Hina . Formerly the first mate —and for a time captain —of the Black Cat Pirates known as "One-Two" Jango , [ 2 ] [ 4 ] he enlisted in the Marines after finding an unlikely friendship with Fullbody , who helped him to secure a pardon. [ 10 ] Due to his actions, Jango is the secondary antagonist of the Syrup Village Arc and a minor antagonist in the Arabasta and Marineford Arcs . He is also the titular main protagonist of the Jango's Dance Paradise cover arc .

name: Jerry
intro_text: Jerry is a Cipher Pol agent of CP6 . He was found as head of security of the Puffing Tom 's seventh passenger car, which Sanji invaded to rescue Nico Robin . He comes from Karate Island in the South Blue , and claims to be a boxing champion. [ 1 ] He was one of the antagonists during the Sea Train voyage in the Water 7 Arc .

name: Jibuemon
occupation: Retainer of the Kouzuki Family; Samurai
intro_text: Jibuemon is a former retainer from Kibi serving under the Kouzuki Shogunate . As a hatamoto , he directly served under the former shogun , Kouzuki Sukiyaki . [ 1 ]

name: Jigoku Benten
affiliation: Beasts Pirates ; Orochi Oniwabanshu (former); Kurozumi Family (former)
intro_text: Jigoku Benten [ 6 ] is a kunoichi and a member of the Beasts Pirates . [ 3 ] She previously was a member of the Orochi Oniwabanshu which served the shogun of Wano Country , Kurozumi Orochi . [ 2 ] Due to her actions and role, she is a minor antagonist in the Wano Country Arc .

name: Jigokukamabuta Megatenpanchiro
japanese_name: 地獄釜蓋 目我点藩血ロウ
intro_text: Jigokukamabuta Megatenpanchiro [ 2 ] was a retainer of Shimotsuki Family under the Daimyo of Hakumai , Shimotsuki Yasuie . [ 1 ]

name: Jigra
intro_text: Jigra was an organ trader and a member of the Underworld who attempted to attack the Big Mom Pirates . [ 1 ] In the anime, he is also part of the Organ Dealing Assassination Group . [ 2 ]

name: Jewelry Bonney
residence: South Blue ( Sorbet Kingdom ) (former); Egghead (former, temporary)
alias: Conney ( コニー , Konī ? )
epithet: "Big Eater" ( 大喰らい , Ō-Gurai ? , English versions: "Glutton")
intro_text: Jewelry Bonney , [ 9 ] also known as the "Big Eater" , is a pirate from the South Blue and the captain of the Bonney Pirates . [ 1 ] She is one of twelve pirates who are referred to as the " Worst Generation " and the only female member of the group. [ 10 ] Bonney is the daughter of Ginny and the adopted daughter of Bartholomew Kuma , [ 11 ] the former King of the Sorbet Kingdom (making her Sorbet's former princess ). Thanks to experiments conducted by Jaygarcia Saturn of the Five Elders , Bonney acquired the powers of the Toshi Toshi no Mi , [ 12 ] which allows her to manipulate the age of herself and others at will. She also inherited the Sapphire Scales disease from her mother, forcing her to live inside Kuma's church through her early childhood. After Kuma sacrificed his body and free will to the World Government in exchange for Dr. Vegapunk curing Bonney, she ventured forth from her home to become a pirate in search of her father, using her ability to appear as a young woman in her twenties, despite still being a little girl, having been ten years old during her debut and now being twelve after the timeskip . [ 13 ] . [ 14 ] Bonney eventually succeeded in reuniting with her father after he saved her life during the Egghead Incident . [ 12 ] Upon reaching the Sabaody Archipelago , Bonney had a bounty of 140,000,000. [ 1 ] Two years later, it was raised to 320,000,000. [ 8 ] Bonney is a companion and major ally of the Straw Hat Pirates during the Egghead Arc and Elbaph Arc .

name: Jiron
intro_text: Jiron is the deputy commander of the North Army in the Revolutionary Army and the assistant of Karasu .

name: Jobo
intro_text: Jobo [ 2 ] is a citizen of Mock Town . [ 1 ]

name: Jigoro
epithet: "Jigoro of the Wind" ( 風のジゴロウ , Kaze no Jigorō ? )
intro_text: Jigoro of the Wind was a master swordsman who was subsequently revived by Gecko Moria as Zombie #850 , a General Zombie . He was animated with Zoro 's shadow [ 1 ] and eventually assigned to guard Hogback . [ 5 ] Due to his actions and role, he is a supporting antagonist in the Thriller Bark Arc .

name: Johanna
intro_text: Johanna is a student at the Walrus School on Elbaph . [ 1 ]

name: Jinbe
affiliation: Straw Hat Pirates ; Straw Hat Grand Fleet ; Sun Pirates (former); Ally of the Big Mom Pirates (former); Seven Warlords of the Sea (former); Ryugu Kingdom (resigned); Impel Down (former); Ninja-Pirate-Mink-Samurai Alliance (disbanded)
occupation: Pirate ; Helmsman ; Senior Officer ; Captain (former); Warlord of the Sea (former); Soldier (former); Prisoner of the Great Prison (former)
epithet: "Knight of the Sea" Jinbe ( 海侠のジンベエ , Kaikyō no Jinbē ? , English versions: "First Son of the Sea") "Boss Jinbe" ( ジンベエ親分 , Jinbē Oyabun ? )
intro_text: "Knight of the Sea" Jinbe [ 1 ] is the helmsman of the Straw Hat Pirates and one of the Senior Officers of the Straw Hat Grand Fleet . [ 3 ] He is the tenth member of the crew and the ninth to join, doing so during the Wano Country Arc . [ 16 ] Jinbe is a whale shark fish-man and a powerful master of Fish-Man Karate . His dream is to fulfill his former captain Fisher Tiger 's dying wish of coexistence and equality between humans and fish-men. He was a member of the Sun Pirates , eventually becoming its second captain after the death of their original captain, Tiger. [ 9 ] He eventually became one of the Seven Warlords of the Sea , though he resigned during the Summit War of Marineford . [ 5 ] [ 9 ] Vegapunk later cloned Jinbe as one of the Seraphim , S-Shark , to replace the Warlords. [ 17 ] Prior to and amidst said war, Jinbe befriended Monkey D. Luffy , and two years later allied with him and his crew to prevent the New Fish-Man Pirates ' coup d'état against the Ryugu Kingdom 's Neptune Royal Family . Luffy thereafter invited him to join the Straw Hat Pirates, but Jinbe held it off until severing ties with Big Mom during the Whole Cake Island Arc . [ 2 ] After staying behind in Totto Land to protect the Sun Pirates from Big Mom's wrath, Jinbe returned to the Straw Hats during the Wano Country Arc, officially announcing his status as a member of the crew. [ 16 ] He first gained a bounty of 76,000,000 due to him being a member of the Sun Pirates. It was later increased to 250,000,000 after Jinbe became the new captain of the Sun Pirates before it was frozen after he joined the Seven Warlords. Upon resigning his position as a Warlord at the Summit War of Marineford, his bounty was reinstated at 438,000,000. [ 13 ] Following the Raid on Onigashima , his bounty was increased to 1,100,000,000. [ 3 ]

name: John Giant
japanese_name: ジョン・ジャイアント
intro_text: John Giant is a Vice Admiral in the Marine Headquarters , [ 2 ] and the first giant to ever enlist in the Marines . [ 6 ]

name: Jorge
intro_text: Jorge [ 2 ] was the head of the Judicial Ship that sailed to Water 7 . He was the one who judged Tom for his support of the Pirate King Gol D. Roger . [ 1 ]

name: Johnny
intro_text: Johnny [ 3 ] along with Yosaku are old friends and former bounty hunting partners of Roronoa Zoro . He is an ally of the Straw Hat Pirates during the Baratie Arc and the Arlong Park Arc .

name: John
affiliation: Rocks Pirates (former); Thriller Bark Pirates (post mortem)
epithet: Captain John ( キャプテン・ジョン , Kyaputen Jon ? )
intro_text: Captain John was a famous pirate captain who was once a member of the infamous Rocks Pirates prior to forming his own crew. [ 2 ] He was notable for collecting one of the most significant treasures in the world ; his fabled treasure cave and the riches within, which are notably long sought after by Buggy . [ 3 ] After his death, his corpse was found by Dr. Hogback and modified into one of the General Zombies for Gecko Moria . [ 1 ]

name: Joseph
intro_text: Joseph [ 2 ] is a masked agent of CP0 and a Longarm tribesman . [ 1 ] Due to his actions and role, he is a supporting antagonist during the Wano Country Arc .

name: Joy Boy
devil_fruit_name: Hito Hito no Mi, Model: Nika
intro_text: Joy Boy was a man from the Great Kingdom born 900 years ago at the start of the Void Century , as well as the first pirate in history . [ 1 ] An extremely relevant figure in the Void Century, Joy Boy played an important role in the history of Fish-Man Island and left behind a certain item of unimaginable value on the last island of the Grand Line , thus becoming a legendary and remembered figure in the world . He was first mentioned on the Poneglyph read by Nico Robin while at the Sea Forest . [ 2 ] After Monkey D. Luffy awakened his Mythical Zoan-type Devil Fruit , the Hito Hito no Mi, Model: Nika (also referred to as the Paramecia-type Devil Fruit "Gomu Gomu no Mi"), his heartbeat took on the sound of the " Drums of Liberation " ( 解放のドラム , Kaihō no Doramu ? ) . Upon hearing the sound, Zunesha proclaimed that Joy Boy had returned. [ 4 ] Emet also mistook Luffy for the original Joy Boy, [ 5 ] and Nerona Imu similarly used the term Joy Boy to refer to Luffy. [ 6 ]

name: Jorul
epithet: "Waterfall Beard" Jorul ( 滝ひげのヨルル , Takihige no Yoruru ? , VIZ: Beardfall)
intro_text: "Waterfall Beard" Jorul was a giant and former co- captain of the Giant Warrior Pirates , along with Jarul . He was known as a hero of the giants and one of the world's oldest warriors. [ 1 ] 63 years ago, Jorul was mortally wounded during an attempt to stop a young, rampaging Charlotte Linlin , leading to his eventual death soon after.

name: Jesus Burgess
japanese_name: ジーザス・バージェス
english_name: Jesus Burgess (VIZ, uncut dub); G. Zass Burgess (edited dub)
occupation: Titanic Captain (Captain of the First Ship); Helmsman
alias: "Mr. Store" ( Mr.ストア , Misutā Sutoa ? )
epithet: "Champion" ( チャンピオン , Chanpion ? )
intro_text: Jesus Burgess , [ 7 ] better known as the "Champion" , is the helmsman [ 3 ] and one of the Ten Titanic Captains of the Blackbeard Pirates , serving as the captain of the first ship of the fleet . [ 2 ] Due to his actions and role, he is a minor antagonist in the Jaya Arc , a supporting antagonist in the Impel Down , Marineford , and Dressrosa Arcs , a minor antagonist in the Egghead Arc , and a major antagonist in the Final Saga .

name: Joshu
intro_text: Joshu [ 2 ] is a cat and Edison 's assistant on Egghead . [ 1 ]

name: Judy
intro_text: Judy [ 4 ] is Marie 's fiancé . He was shot by Charlos when he tried to rescue her. [ 2 ]

name: Jugemu Jugemuko
intro_text: Jugemu Jugemuko [ 2 ] is a young girl from the Hakumai region of the Wano Country . [ 1 ] She is the sister of Chokyumei-no Chosuke .

name: Jozu
epithet: "Diamond" Jozu ( ダイヤモンド・ジョズ , Daiyamondo Jozu ? )
intro_text: "Diamond" Jozu [ 4 ] [ 8 ] is the former 3rd division commander of the Whitebeard Pirates , [ 2 ] serving as one of the crew's most prominent members.

name: Julius
intro_text: Julius is an infamous New World pirate captain who allied with Whitebeard . [ 1 ] [ 2 ]

name: Jumper
intro_text: Jumper [ 4 ] is a Gifter in the Beasts Pirates . [ 1 ]

name: Junan
intro_text: Junan [ 2 ] is a codfish fish-man [ 3 ] and a cashier at Pappag 's Criminal Brand store. [ 1 ]

occupation: Leader of Yellow Kabu Squad; Pirate

name: Juki
intro_text: Juki is a member of the Numbers in the Beasts Pirates , representing the number "ten". [ 2 ] Due to his actions and role, he is a minor antagonist in the Wano Country Arc .

name: Jujiro
intro_text: Jujiro is a samurai who allied with the Kouzuki Family . [ 3 ] After waiting 20 years for the return of the Nine Red Scabbards , he affiliated with the Ninja-Pirate-Mink-Samurai Alliance to raid Onigashima . [ 1 ]

name: Kadar
intro_text: Rear Admiral Kadar is a Marine Rear Admiral at the G-2 Marine base from fifteen years ago. His current location and rank are unknown. [ 1 ]

name: Jörmungandr
intro_text: Jörmungandr is a giant serpent from Elbaph mythology. It was manifested into reality from the fear of one of the Walrus School children [ 1 ] by Rimoshifu Killingham , using the power of his Devil Fruit . [ 2 ]

name: Kagero
intro_text: Kagero is a priest and samurai who allied with the Kouzuki Family . [ 3 ] After waiting 20 years for the return of the Nine Red Scabbards , he affiliated with the Ninja-Pirate-Mink-Samurai Alliance for the Raid on Onigashima . [ 1 ]

name: Kagikko
intro_text: Kagikko is a member of the Krieg Pirates and a locksmith. [ 3 ]

name: Kairo Kureyo
intro_text: Kairo Kureyo is a prisoner on Level 5 of Impel Down . [ 3 ]

name: Kairiken
intro_text: Kairiken [ 3 ] is a bounty hunter at Sabaody Archipelago . [ 1 ]

name: Kairen
intro_text: Kairen is a righteye flounder mermaid and one of the top five Mermaid Cafe Dancers . [ 2 ]

name: Kaidou
affiliation: Beasts Pirates ; Rocks Pirates (former); Four Emperors (former)
residence: Wano Country ( Onigashima ); Vodka Kingdom (former); Hachinosu (former)
epithet: "Kaidou of the Beasts" ( 百獣のカイドウ , Hyakujū no Kaidō ? , English versions: "Kaido, King of the Beasts") "The Strongest Creature" ( 最強の生物 , Saikyō no Seibutsu ? ) "Wise King" ( 明王 , Myōō ? , English versions: "Deity")
devil_fruit_name: Uo Uo no Mi, Model: Seiryu
devil_fruit_english_name: Fish-Fish Fruit, Model: Azure Dragon Fish-Fish Fruit, Azure Dragon Model
intro_text: Kaidou of the Beasts , [ 14 ] renowned as the world 's "Strongest Creature" , [ 18 ] [ 11 ] is the Governor-General of the Beasts Pirates [ 6 ] and was formerly one of the Four Emperors who ruled over the New World . [ 5 ] He is also the father of Yamato . [ 19 ] Once a child soldier in the service of the Vodka Kingdom , Kaidou escaped being drafted by the Marines and joined the legendary Rocks Pirates as an apprentice in his teenage years. [ 4 ] A few years after the God Valley Incident , he formed his own pirate crew and built it up into a powerful military force determined to challenge the World Government and change the world. [ 20 ] Kaidou then joined forces with Wano Country 's shogun Kurozumi Orochi [ 21 ] and occupied Onigashima as his base for nearly three decades. [ 9 ] In the present day, Kaidou formed an unprecedented pirate alliance with fellow Emperor and former crewmate Big Mom for the purpose of taking over the world. He then betrayed Orochi to enact his New Onigashima Project for Wano. [ 22 ] The plan never came to fruition, however, as Onigashima was raided by the Ninja-Pirate-Mink-Samurai Alliance on that very same night and Kaidou was ultimately bested by Monkey D. Luffy . [ 23 ] Following this defeat, Kaidou lost his position among the Four Emperors. [ 24 ] Kaidou was first referred to by Monkey D. Garp in the Post-Enies Lobby Arc when he revealed the existence of the Four Emperors, [ 5 ] and was then first directly mentioned by Gecko Moria in the Thriller Bark Arc . [ 25 ] [ 26 ] Before he debuted in person, his voice was heard in a flashback that Kouzuki Momonosuke had when first disembarking on Dressrosa . [ 27 ] [ 28 ] Due to his actions, he can be considered the overarching antagonist of the Dressrosa Saga , the main antagonist of the Wano Country Arc and Saga , and a major antagonist of the second half of the series.

name: Kalgara
epithet: "The Demon of Shandora" ( シャンドラの魔物 , Shandora no Mamono ? ) ; "The Great Warrior of Shandora" ( シャンドラの大戦士 , Shandora no Dai Senshi ? )
intro_text: Kalgara [ 2 ] was a warrior of the Shandia who lived on Jaya around 400 years ago. He was renowned among his people as the "Great Warrior of Shandora" and feared as the "Demon of Shandora" by outsiders. [ 1 ] During his life, he befriended the later infamous explorer Mont Blanc Noland , and the two promised to meet again. However, both men met tragic ends before this promise could be fulfilled. [ 4 ] Kalgara died in battle against the Skypiean forces after a part of Jaya was sent to the sky by the Knock Up Stream . [ 4 ] Until his final moments, he regretted being unable to ring the Golden Bell to signal their presence to Noland. His legacy lived on after his death, as a statue of him was erected in the Hidden Cloud Village . [ 5 ] His bloodline also continued through his daughter Mousse , [ 6 ] and Wyper is his descendant. [ 7 ]

name: Kamabakka Kingdom
intro_text: Momoiro Island Statistics Japanese Name: モモイロ 島 Romanized Name: Momoiro Airando English Name: Peachy Island First appearance: Chapter 523 ; Episode 419 [ 1 ] Region: Paradise Affiliates: Revolutionary Army Momoiro Island is an island in Paradise . It is located close to the Lulusia Kingdom . [ 2 ] The island is filled with pink animals and plants. It is home to the Kamabakka Kingdom ( カマバッカ王国 , Kamabakka Ōkoku ? , "Kamabakka Queendom" in the Viz Manga) , a place where "those with a heart of a maiden" gather. The name of the kingdom literally translates to "full of transvestites ", which is exactly what the island is filled with. Sanji was sent to this island by Bartholomew Kuma during the events of Sabaody Archipelago Arc , but still spent two years on the island honing his skills. The leader of the island is the revolutionary "Queen" Emporio Ivankov , who escaped from Impel Down 's level 5.5 and returned to the island with a crew of newkama. After the destruction of Baltigo , the Revolutionary Army moved their base of operations to this island. [ 2 ]

name: Kakunoshin
intro_text: Kakunoshin is a samurai who allied with the Kouzuki Family . [ 3 ] After waiting 20 years for the return of the Nine Red Scabbards , he affiliated with the Ninja-Pirate-Mink-Samurai Alliance to raid Onigashima . [ 1 ]

name: Kakukaku
intro_text: Kakukaku [ 2 ] is a resident of Water 7 who was among the townspeople as they discussed the attempted murder of Iceburg . [ 1 ]

name: Kamakiri
intro_text: Kamakiri is one of the Shandia warriors who fought to take back Upper Yard from Enel . [ 1 ] After the timeskip, he joined the God's Guards under Wyper . [ 2 ]

name: Kaku
epithet: "Mountain Wind" ( 山風 , Yamakaze ? )
devil_fruit_name: Ushi Ushi no Mi, Model: Giraffe
intro_text: Kaku [ 12 ] is a masked agent of CP0 . [ 2 ] He was previously an assassin of CP9 , operating undercover in order to obtain the Pluton blueprints from Iceburg . [ 5 ] While undercover, he acted as one of the five foremen of Galley-La Company 's Dock One, specializing in mechanics, diagnostics, and housecalls. [ 6 ] He is a major antagonist in the Water 7 and Enies Lobby Arcs , and a supporting antagonist in the Egghead Arc , later turned reluctant temporary ally of the Straw Hat Pirates during the latter Arc.

name: Kamekichi
intro_text: Kamekichi [ 2 ] is a newspaper deliveryman in the Flower Capital who announced reports of Kamazo the Manslayer and Ushimitsu Kozo . [ 1 ]

name: Kamijiro
intro_text: Kamijiro is a lion's head, legs, and tail that are attached to Holed'em 's body due to his consumption of a lion SMILE . [ 1 ] [ 2 ]

name: Kamazo
affiliation: Kid Pirates ; Kurozumi Orochi (defected); Ninja-Pirate-Mink-Samurai Alliance (disbanded)
alias: "Kamazo the Manslayer" ( 人斬り鎌ぞう , Hitokiri Kamazō ? , VIZ: "Hitokiri Kamazo")
epithet: "Massacre Soldier" ( 殺戮武人 , Satsuriku Bujin ? , VIZ: "Murder Machine")
intro_text: "Massacre Soldier" Killer [ 9 ] is a pirate from the South Blue and a combatant of the Kid Pirates . He is one of twelve pirates who are referred to as the " Worst Generation ". [ 10 ] After the timeskip, his bounty has been raised from 162,000,000 to 200,000,000. [ 8 ] Following the confrontation with Kaidou , Killer ate a defective SMILE [ 11 ] and took on the alias of Kamazo the Manslayer , a street murderer in Wano Country [ 4 ] who secretly acted as an assassin working for the shogun, Kurozumi Orochi , [ 3 ] until the shogun discarded him after he had failed his mission to kill Toko . [ 12 ] He later reunites with his crew and becomes an ally member of the Ninja-Pirate-Mink-Samurai Alliance during the Wano Country Arc .

name: Kanezenny
intro_text: Kanezenny [ 2 ] is an elderly farm woman from Nico Robin 's past. [ 3 ]

name: Kaneshiro
intro_text: Kaneshiro is the shipwright of the Arlong Pirates [ 3 ] and a goldfish fish-man . [ 5 ] He was previously a member of the Sun Pirates . [ 2 ]

name: Kamakirigirl
intro_text: Kamakirigirl [ 3 ] is a Gifter in the Beasts Pirates . [ 1 ] During the Raid on Onigashima , she was tamed by the power of the Kibi Kibi no Mi and joined the side of the Ninja-Pirate-Mink-Samurai Alliance . [ 2 ]

name: Kano Country
intro_text: Kano Country Statistics Japanese Name: 花ノ国 Romanized Name: Kano Kuni English Name: Kano Kingdom [ n 1 ] First appearance: Chapter 823 ; Episode 777 [ 1 ] Region: West Blue [ 1 ] Affiliates: World Government The Kano Country is a nation in the West Blue where the Chinjao Family came from. [ 2 ]

name: Kalifa
intro_text: Kalifa [ 1 ] is an agent of CP0 . [ 2 ] Before the timeskip, she was an agent of CP9 , [ 5 ] operating undercover as Iceburg 's secretary at the Galley-La Company . [ 4 ] She is also Laskey 's daughter and the older sister of Alpha . [ 10 ] [ 11 ] She was one of the major antagonists during the Water 7 and Enies Lobby Arcs .

name: Kanjuro
affiliation: Kurozumi Family ; Kouzuki Family (undercover); Nine Red Scabbards (undercover); Ninja-Pirate-Mink-Samurai Alliance (undercover); Beasts Pirates (former)
occupation: Theatre Performer (former); Spy of the Kurozumi Family; Samurai ; Retainer of the Kouzuki Family (undercover)
residence: Wano Country ( Kuri ) Wano Country ( Kibi ) (former)
epithet: "Evening Shower" ( 夕立ち , Yūdachi ? ) ; Ghost of Kibi ( 希美の妖怪 , Kibi no Yōkai ? , VIZ Media: Goblin of Kibi)
intro_text: Kurozumi Kanjuro , nicknamed "Evening Shower" Kanjuro , [ 7 ] was a samurai from the Kuri region of Wano Country and a member of the Kurozumi Family . After losing his parents, he was instructed by Kurozumi Orochi to operate undercover within the Kouzuki Family . Kanjuro became Kouzuki Oden 's retainer and one of the Nine Red Scabbards while secretly aiding Orochi in his rise to power and efforts to eliminate the Kouzuki bloodline, by feeding him information. [ 2 ] [ 3 ] He would continue to do so until he revealed himself as Orochi's spy just before the Raid on Onigashima , leading to his former comrades engaging in battle with him until he was lethally wounded by Kin'emon during a final skirmish, dubbing it his final act. [ 12 ] He was born 54 years before the present day, but traveled 20 years forward in time when he was 34 years old. [ 5 ] [ 8 ] He acted as an ally to the Straw Hat Pirates in his undercover role during the Dressrosa Arc and Zou Arc , but was revealed to be a major antagonist of the Wano Country Arc during its third act.

name: Karin
intro_text: Karin is a student at the Walrus School on Elbaph . [ 1 ]

name: Kappa
intro_text: Kappa is a young shoeshine-boy in Nanohana .

name: Karakuri Island
intro_text: Karakuri Island Present Before destruction Statistics Japanese Name: からくり島 Romanized Name: Karakuri-jima English Name: Karakuri Island (Mechanical Island) First appearance: Chapter 448 ; [ 1 ] Episode 418 [ 2 ] Region: Paradise Type: Winter Island Karakuri Island is an island somewhere in Paradise on which resides the Future Country Baldimore ( 未来国バルジモア , Mirai-koku Barujimoa ? , Future Land Baldimore in the Viz Manga and FUNimation subs) . It was first featured in Enel 's cover story . This is where Dr. Tsukimi built his own automata . [ 1 ] The country specializes in advanced technology, such as cyborgs and mechanical structures. As such, it is hailed as the "Future Country" and the birthplace of the genius, Vegapunk . After Bartholomew Kuma sent him to the island, Franky spent two years studying Vegapunk's technology.

name: Karma
intro_text: Karma [ 3 ] is an octopus fish-man [ 2 ] and the captain of the Takotopus Pirates , an infamous New World pirate crew subordinate to the Whitebeard Pirates . [ 1 ]

name: Kasa
intro_text: Kasa [ 2 ] is an elderly woman from Raijin Island . [ 1 ]

name: Kasagoba
intro_text: Kasagoba [ 2 ] is a marbled rockfish fish-man and was a member of the now disbanded New Fish-Man Pirates prior to their downfall. [ 1 ] In the anime, he is named Kasagon ( カサゴン , Kasagon ? ) . [ 3 ]

name: Karasu
occupation: North Army Commander of the Revolutionary Army
intro_text: Karasu is a member of the Revolutionary Army , serving as one of its executive officers and the commander of the North Army. [ 2 ]

name: Kashigami
epithet: "God of the Sun" ( 太陽の神 , Taiyō no Kami ? ) "God of the Rain" ( 雨の神 , Ame no Kami ? ) "God of the Forest" ( 森の神 , Mori no Kami ? ) "God of the Earth" ( 大地の神 , Daichi no Kami ? )
intro_text: Kashigami was a giant snake that lived on Jaya four centuries ago. It was worshiped by the Shandia as a god until it was slain by Mont Blanc Noland . [ 1 ] It is the grandparent of Nola , who lives in Skypiea in the present day. [ 3 ]

name: Katsuzo
intro_text: Katsuzo was a citizen of Wano Country . He died 41 years before the present day, and his cremated body was used by Kouzuki Oden to cook a pot of oden. [ 1 ]

name: Kashii
intro_text: Kashii , [ 5 ] together with Oimo , was one of the two giants who guarded the front gate of Enies Lobby [ 2 ] for over fifty years until he and Oimo realized they were tricked by the World Government . [ 4 ] He is a member of the Giant Warrior Pirates . He and Oimo became major allies to the Straw Hat Pirates during the Enies Lobby Arc and Egghead Arc .

name: Kaya
intro_text: Kaya is a young woman who lives in the largest mansion in Syrup Village on the Gecko Islands . She is a close friend of Usopp and is currently studying to become a doctor . [ 1 ] She is an ally of the Straw Hat Pirates during the Syrup Village Arc .

name: Karoo
affiliation: Super Spot-Billed Duck Troops , Nefertari Vivi , Straw Hat Pirates (former), Baroque Works (former)
occupation: Pet ; Royal Transport; Captain of the Super Spot-Billed Duck Troops; Pirate (former)
intro_text: Karoo [ 2 ] is Nefertari Vivi 's pet super spot-billed duck , a fleet riding bird (one of the fastest modes of transportation available in the Arabasta Kingdom ). [ 1 ] Alongside his owner Vivi, Karoo infiltrated the organization known as Baroque Works . With her, he ended up traveling with the Straw Hat Pirates for most of the Arabasta Saga after their cover was blown. He is the leader of the Super Spot-Billed Duck Troops in Arabasta.

name: Kazekage
intro_text: Kazekage [ 4 ] is a ninja and a member of the Beasts Pirates . [ 2 ] He previously was a member of the Orochi Oniwabanshu which served the shogun of Wano Country , Kurozumi Orochi . [ 1 ] Due to his actions and role, he is a minor antagonist in the Wano Country Arc .

name: Kazenbo
intro_text: Kazenbo was a flaming ghost-like entity created by Kurozumi Kanjuro , with the power of the Fude Fude no Mi , for the purpose of destroying Onigashima . It was created to symbolize the "burning hatred" ( 燃える怨念 , moeru onnen ? ) of the Kurozumi Family against those who wronged them. [ 1 ]

name: Kechatch
intro_text: Kechatch [ 2 ] is an infamous New World pirate captain who allied with Whitebeard . [ 1 ]

name: Kebi
intro_text: Kebi [ 2 ] was a member of the Sand-Sand Clan and, later, of the Arabasta Rebel Army . [ 1 ]

name: Kentauros
english_name: Supersonic Duck Squadron Super Spot-Billed Duck Troops ( OPCG )
intro_text: Super Spot-Billed Duck Troops Statistics Japanese Name: 超カルガモ部隊 Romanized Name: Chō Karugamo Butai Official English Name: Supersonic Duck Squadron Super Spot-Billed Duck Troops ( OPCG ) First Appearance: Chapter 180 ; Episode 111 [ 1 ] Affiliation: Arabasta Kingdom Leader(s): Karoo The Super Spot-Billed Duck Troops [ 2 ] are a family of seven Super Spot-Billed Ducks (and later one camel) who serve the kingdom of Arabasta . They are led by their captain Karoo , and are reputed to be the fastest troop in the kingdom of Arabasta . [ 1 ] All of the ducks have the strange theme of wearing different types of hats and various other jewelry and clothing. Also strange was that the last member to join the squad, Matsuge , is a camel who helped the Straw Hats confront Baroque Works .

name: Kenzan Island
intro_text: Kenzan Island Statistics Japanese Name: 剣山島 Romanized Name: Kenzan-tō English Name: Sword Mountain Island First appearance: Chapter 596 ; Episode 512 Region: Paradise Kenzan Island is an island somewhere in Paradise , where the Tehna Gehna Kingdom ( テーナ・ゲーナ王国 , Tēna Gēna Ōkoku ? , VIZ: "Longarm Kingdom") is located.

name: Keith
intro_text: Keith [ 3 ] is a monkey mink and a member of the Guardians who protect the Mokomo Dukedom at night. [ 1 ]

name: Kelly Funk
intro_text: Kelly Funk is an assassin from the Mogaro Kingdom and Bobby Funk 's older brother. He joined as a gladiator at the Corrida Colosseum to compete for the Mera Mera no Mi . [ 1 ]

name: Kiba
intro_text: Kiba is a giant from Elbaph and the principal of the Walrus School . He is a former member of the Giant Warrior Pirates . [ 1 ]

name: Kikipatsu
intro_text: Kikipatsu is a member of the Blackbeard Pirates . [ 2 ]

name: Kibagaeru
intro_text: Kibagaeru [ 1 ] was the captain of the Fanged Toad Pirates until he lost to Foxy at the Davy Back Fight and joined his crew but eventually left sometime during the Timeskip . Due to his anime-exclusive actions, he can be considered one of the main antagonists of the Foxy's Return Arc .

name: Kibin
intro_text: Commodore Kibin [ 3 ] is a Marine officer that participated in the Summit War of Marineford . [ 1 ] While his canon name and rank are unknown, he was given the name "Kibin" and the rank Commodore in the anime.

name: Kiev
affiliation: Galley-La Company (Zambai's Company Union); Franky Family (former)
intro_text: Kiev is a ship dismantler from Water 7 . Initially part of the Franky Family , he is now working for the Galley-La Company as part of the Zambai's Company Union.

name: Kid Pirates
intro_text: Kid Pirates Statistics Japanese Name: キッド海賊団 Romanized Name: Kiddo Kaizokudan Official English Name: Kid Pirates First Appearance: Chapter 498 ; Episode 392 [ 1 ] Captain: Eustass Kid Main Ship: Victoria Punk (Destroyed) † Total Bounty: At least 3,200,000,000 [ bounty 1 ] At least 670,000,000 [ bounty 2 ] At least 477,000,000 [ bounty 3 ] The Kid Pirates are an infamous and notable rookie pirate crew introduced during the Sabaody Archipelago Arc during the time the Straw Hat Pirates arrived there two years ago. As such, they are part of the Worst Generation . Like the Straw Hats, this crew had two bounties above 100,000,000. Both members had slightly higher bounties than the respective members of the Straw Hat Pirates before the timeskip. Their captain is Eustass Kid . Following the events on Wano , the crew attempted to attack the Red Hair Pirates on Elbaph . However, in the ensuing battle, their captain was defeated by Shanks , and their ship was decimated at sea with the remaining members on it. [ 2 ] The current fate of the crew is unknown.

name: Kawamatsu
affiliation: Kouzuki Family ; Nine Red Scabbards ; Ninja-Pirate-Mink-Samurai Alliance (disbanded)
occupation: Daimyo ; Retainer of the Kouzuki Family; Samurai ; Sumo Wrestler; Highway Robber (former)
residence: Wano Country ( Kuri ); Wano Country ( Hakumai )
alias: Gyukimaru ( 牛鬼丸 , Gyūkimaru ? )
epithet: "Kawamatsu the Kappa" ( 河童の河松 , Kappa no Kawamatsu ? ) , "Yokozuna Kawamatsu" ( 横綱河松 , Yokozuna Kawamatsu ? )
intro_text: Kawamatsu the Kappa is a Japanese puffer fish-man [ 9 ] who is a yokozuna -ranked sumo wrestler. As a child, he was shipwrecked in Wano and orphaned soon afterwards. After Kouzuki Oden rescued him from an attempted lynching, he went on to serve as one of Oden's Nine Red Scabbards until Oden's death 20 years ago. [ 1 ] After spending 7 years watching over Oden's daughter Hiyori , Kawamatsu was imprisoned by the Beasts Pirates for 13 years until Monkey D. Luffy ultimately freed him. He then reunited with the Nine Red Scabbards and joined their effort to fight Kurozumi Orochi and Kaidou and avenge Oden. [ 10 ] [ 4 ] Following Kouzuki Momonosuke 's ascent to shogun , he serves as the daimyo of Hakumai . [ 3 ] He is an ally of the Straw Hat Pirates during the Wano Country Arc .

name: Kikyo
intro_text: Kikyo is a Kuja warrior from Amazon Lily . [ 1 ]

name: Kimel
intro_text: Kimel [ 2 ] is a member of the Spade Pirates . [ 1 ]

name: Kinderella
occupation: Miss Universe; Queen of the Evil Black Drum Kingdom
epithet: "Miss Universe" ( ミス・ユニバース , Misu Yunibāsu ? )
intro_text: Kinderella , [ 4 ] also known as Miss Universe , is a woman who married Wapol after he became the head of his own corporation. Two years after that, she became the queen of the Evil Black Drum Kingdom when Wapol became its king . [ 2 ]

name: Kinbo
intro_text: Kinbo [ 2 ] is a boy who lives in Okobore Town of Kuri with his mother Yame and his little brother. [ 1 ]

name: Kin'emon
affiliation: Kouzuki Family ; Ninja-Pirate-Mink-Samurai Alliance (Dissolved); Nine Red Scabbards
occupation: Samurai ; Great Elder of the Shogunate; Retainer of the Kouzuki Family; Leader of the Nine Red Scabbards; Thief (former)
residence: Wano Country ( Kuri ); Flower Capital (Shogun Castle)
epithet: "Foxfire Kin'emon" ( 狐火の錦えもん , Kitsune-bi no Kin'emon ? )
devil_fruit_english_name: Garb-Garb Jutsu (VIZ and Funimation); Garb-Garb Fruit (One Piece Official YouTube Channel)
intro_text: "Foxfire" Kin'emon [ 10 ] is a samurai from the region of Kuri in Wano Country [ 5 ] who currently serves the shogunate as a great elder in the Flower Capital . [ 14 ] Once a thug in his youth, [ 15 ] he became a retainer of the Kouzuki Family [ 2 ] and the leader of Kouzuki Oden 's Nine Red Scabbards . [ 4 ] He was born 56 years before the present day, but traveled 20 years forward in time when he was 36 years old. [ 8 ] Due to Wano Country having been taken over by Shogun Kurozumi Orochi , an ally of Kaidou of the Four Emperors , Kin'emon set out on a seafaring quest to recruit warriors for his cause, bringing alongside him his master Kouzuki Momonosuke and his fellow retainers Kanjuro and Raizo . After a series of misadventures, Kin'emon ended up on the island of Punk Hazard , where he met and joined forces with the Straw Hat Pirates , posing as Momonosuke's father during the journey to Zou . He is one of the central allies of the Straw Hats during the Dressrosa , Whole Cake Island and Wano Country Sagas. [ 16 ] [ 17 ]

name: Killer
affiliation: Kid Pirates ; Kurozumi Orochi (defected); Ninja-Pirate-Mink-Samurai Alliance (disbanded)
alias: "Kamazo the Manslayer" ( 人斬り鎌ぞう , Hitokiri Kamazō ? , VIZ: "Hitokiri Kamazo")
epithet: "Massacre Soldier" ( 殺戮武人 , Satsuriku Bujin ? , VIZ: "Murder Machine")
intro_text: "Massacre Soldier" Killer [ 9 ] is a pirate from the South Blue and a combatant of the Kid Pirates . He is one of twelve pirates who are referred to as the " Worst Generation ". [ 10 ] After the timeskip, his bounty has been raised from 162,000,000 to 200,000,000. [ 8 ] Following the confrontation with Kaidou , Killer ate a defective SMILE [ 11 ] and took on the alias of Kamazo the Manslayer , a street murderer in Wano Country [ 4 ] who secretly acted as an assassin working for the shogun, Kurozumi Orochi , [ 3 ] until the shogun discarded him after he had failed his mission to kill Toko . [ 12 ] He later reunites with his crew and becomes an ally member of the Ninja-Pirate-Mink-Samurai Alliance during the Wano Country Arc .

name: King
epithet: "King the Conflagration" ( 火災のキング , Kasai no Kingu ? , English versions: "King the Wildfire")
devil_fruit_name: Ryu Ryu no Mi, Model: Pteranodon
intro_text: King the Conflagration is one of the three All-Stars of the Beasts Pirates and Kaidou 's right-hand man. [ 5 ] Born as Arber , [ 3 ] he is a member of the near-extinct lunarian race from the Red Line , noted for their ability to create fire. [ 6 ] [ 7 ] [ 8 ] [ 3 ] He was a prisoner and test subject on Punk Hazard 34 years ago, where a sample of his Lineage Factor was extracted from him before he was freed and recruited by Kaidou. That same genetic material would be used by Dr. Vegapunk decades later as a key component in the creation of the Seraphim . [ 9 ] Due to his actions and role, he is a major antagonist in the Wano Country Arc .

name: Kinga
intro_text: Kinga [ 3 ] is an infamous New World pirate captain who was once a member of the Whitebeard Pirates [ 4 ] before forming his own crew subordinate to Whitebeard . [ 3 ]

name: Kingbaum
intro_text: Kingbaum is a tree homie , a member of the Big Mom Pirates , and the master of the Seducing Woods on Whole Cake Island . [ 1 ] However, he was forced to serve the Straw Hat Pirates due to them possessing Charlotte Linlin 's Vivre Card . [ 4 ]

name: Kinoko
intro_text: Kinoko [ 4 ] is a former prisoner on Level 5 of Impel Down [ 2 ] and is currently a member of the Buggy Pirates , joining after his escape from Impel Down and the Summit War of Marineford . [ 3 ]

name: Kirintauros
intro_text: Kirintauros [ 2 ] is a former member of the Centaur Patrol Unit under Brownbeard , having served as one of Caesar Clown ’s henchmen. [ 1 ] He is a giraffe centaur .

name: Kirinkodanuki
affiliation: Animals of the Island of Rare Animals
intro_text: Kirinkodanuki [ 2 ] is an animal who lives on the Island of Rare Animals . [ 1 ] Like all the animals on the island, he is protected by Gaimon . [ 3 ]

name: Kingdew
intro_text: Kingdew [ 4 ] is the former 11th division commander of the Whitebeard Pirates .

name: Kiku
affiliation: Kouzuki Family ; Nine Red Scabbards ; Ninja-Pirate-Mink-Samurai Alliance (disbanded)
occupation: Daimyo of Ringo; Samurai ; Retainer of the Kouzuki Family; Tea House Poster Girl
residence: Wano Country ( Ringo ); Wano Country ( Kuri ) (former)
alias: O-Kiku ( お菊 , O-Kiku ? , English: "Okiku")
epithet: "Kikunojo of the Lingering Snow" ( 残雪の菊之丞 , Zansetsu no Kikunojō ? , English: "Kikunojo of the Fallen Snow")
intro_text: Kikunojo of the Lingering Snow , more commonly referred to as Kiku , is a samurai from Wano Country and a retainer for the Kouzuki Family , serving as one of Kouzuki Oden 's Nine Red Scabbards . [ 2 ] She is also the younger sister of Izou and the daughter of the dancing school head of the Hanayanagi School ( 花柳流 , Hanayanagi-ryū ? ) in Ringo . [ 8 ] After traveling forward in time , she worked as a tea house poster girl in Okobore Town while gathering information for the planned rebellion. [ 1 ] [ 5 ] She participated in the Raid on Onigashima where she battled Kaidou alongside the other Scabbards, losing her left arm to one of Kaidou's attacks. [ 9 ] Following Kouzuki Momonosuke 's ascent to shogun , she serves as the daimyo of Ringo. [ 4 ] She is an ally of the Straw Hat Pirates during the Wano Country Arc .

name: Kisegawa
intro_text: Kisegawa is a geisha from the Flower Capital of Wano Country . She once possessed the blueprints of Kaidou 's fortress on Onigashima . [ 1 ]

name: Kitton
intro_text: Kitton is a boy who lives in Karakuri Island . He has a grandfather who takes care of him, as well as a cyborg dog named Taroimo . [ 1 ]

name: Knights of God
english_name: Holy Knights of God (VIZ); Holy Knights (VIZ, former)
intro_text: Knights of God Statistics Japanese Name: 神の騎士団 Romanized Name: Kami no Kishidan Official English Name: Holy Knights of God (VIZ); Holy Knights (VIZ, former) First Appearance: Chapter 907 ; Episode 887 [ 1 ] Affiliation: World Government Occupation: Royal Guards Supreme Commander: Figarland Garling [ 2 ] Residency: Mary Geoise (Shangara) [ 3 ] The Knights of God [ 4 ] are an elite squad of warriors from the Holy Land Mary Geoise , with authority to oversee the World Nobles . [ 5 ] They operated under the command of their Supreme Commander, Saint Figarland Garling , [ 2 ] but Garling's command over the Knights in any capacity is now unknown following his promotion to one of the Five Elders . [ 6 ] Due to their actions and role, they are the secondary antagonists of the Elbaph Arc and a major antagonist group of the Final Saga .

name: Kiwi
epithet: Square Sisters ( スクエアシスターズ , Sukuea Shisutāzu ? )
intro_text: Mozu and Kiwi , also known as the Square Sisters due to their square-like hairstyle, are two women from Water 7 who were part of the Franky Family . They were both very loyal to Franky , going with him everywhere and tending to imitate every pose he made. [ 2 ] They are both allies of the Straw Hat Pirates during the end of the Water 7 and beginning of the Enies Lobby Arc (starting off as minor antagonists in the former). Currently, they jointly manage Blueno 's old bar in Water 7. [ 6 ]

name: Koala Mercenaries
japanese_name: 雇われ暴力団コアラ組
intro_text: The Koala Mercenaries [ 1 ] are a trio of bodyguards who watch over Rain Dinners .

name: Kobe
intro_text: Kobe is a resident of the Flower Capital in Wano Country and the landlord for the Longhouses. He once possessed the blueprints of Kaidou 's fortress on Onigashima . [ 1 ]

name: Klahadore
alias: "Klahadore" ( クラハドール , Kurahadōru ? , Odex : Klahadoll)
epithet: "Kuro of a Hundred Plans" ( 百計のクロ , Hyakkei no Kuro ? , English: "Kuro of a Thousand Plans")
intro_text: Kuro of a Hundred Plans is the captain of the Black Cat Pirates . After faking his own capture and execution, [ 7 ] he assumed the alias Klahadore and infiltrated Syrup Village 's wealthiest family, acting as servant and caretaker to their young daughter Kaya [ 8 ] with the intent of seizing her fortune. [ 9 ] His scheme would ultimately be thwarted by Kaya's friend Usopp and the Straw Hat Pirates who came to his aid. [ 10 ] He is the main antagonist of the Syrup Village Arc .

[ 2 ] She is also the younger sister of Izou and the daughter of the dancing school head of the Hanayanagi School ( 花柳流 , Hanayanagi-ryū ? ) in Ringo . [ 8 ] After traveling forward in time , she worked as a tea house poster girl in Okobore Town while gathering information for the planned rebellion.
