[ 9 ] Following Kouzuki Momonosuke 's ascent to shogun , she serves as the daimyo of Ringo. [ 4 ] She is an ally of the Straw Hat Pirates during the Wano Country Arc .

name: Kizaru
alias: Kizaru ( 黄猿 , Kizaru ? , literally meaning "Yellow Monkey")
intro_text: Borsalino , [ 8 ] [ 9 ] more commonly known by his alias Kizaru , [ 1 ] is an Admiral in the Marines . [ 2 ] After Kuzan resigned from the Marines and Sakazuki was promoted to Fleet Admiral, Kizaru is now the only remaining Admiral from the previous trio. He was first mentioned by Nico Robin during the Straw Hats' initial encounter with Aokiji. [ 2 ] Due to his actions and role, Kizaru is the secondary antagonist of the Sabaody Archipelago Arc and Marineford Arc , and the tertiary antagonist of the Egghead Arc .

name: Koala
occupation: Revolutionary Army Officer ; Assistant Fish-Man Karate Instructor; Slave (former)
residence: Baltigo (former); Foolshout Island (former); Mary Geoise (former); Momoiro Island
intro_text: Koala [ 7 ] is a high ranking officer of the Revolutionary Army , serving as the Fish-Man Karate assistant instructor. She started as a slave on Mary Geoise , but was then set free by Fisher Tiger 's rampage. She sailed along with the Sun Pirates to reach her home town . Approximately two years later, she left her family to join the Revolutionary Army, where she often works alongside both Sabo and Hack . She first debuted as a child during a flashback in the Fish-Man Island Arc . She made her reappearance during the Dressrosa Arc . [ 2 ]

name: Koda
intro_text: Koda [ 3 ] is a Marine Chef , Kyuji 's wife and mother of Moda . [ 4 ]

name: Koito
intro_text: Koito [ 2 ] is a young girl residing in Ebisu Town of the Wano Country . [ 1 ]

name: Koiwa
intro_text: Koiwa [ 2 ] is a man who lived in the Wano Country 41 years ago. [ 1 ]

name: Kojuro
intro_text: Kojuro is a samurai who allied with the Kouzuki Family . [ 3 ] After waiting 20 years for the return of the Nine Red Scabbards , he affiliated with the Ninja-Pirate-Mink-Samurai Alliance to raid Onigashima . [ 1 ]

name: Koby
affiliation: Marines ( SWORD ), Marine 153rd Branch (former); Alvida Pirates (defected)
occupation: Marine Captain ; Master Chief Petty Officer (promoted), Chore Boy (promoted); Pirate Ship Caretaker (former)
epithet: "Hero" ( 英雄 , Eiyū ? )
intro_text: Koby the Hero [ 13 ] is a Marine Captain , [ 3 ] currently serving in the SWORD special forces unit. [ 14 ] Alongside fellow SWORD member Helmeppo , he was trained and mentored into prominence under the legendary Vice Admiral Garp . Originally a cabin boy enslaved by the Alvida Pirates , Koby was freed and befriended by Monkey D. Luffy , becoming Luffy's first traveling companion. Though he soon left to pursue his dream of Marine service, he continues to regard Luffy highly; after entering full-fledged service, he briefly reunited with Luffy on two occasions, as both friend and adversary. Overall, Koby has experienced a meteoric rise in the Marines, with many accomplishments and the Rocky Port Incident in particular cementing him as a public hero. [ 15 ] During an arrest attempt on Boa Hancock , he was captured by the Blackbeard Pirates [ 16 ] but eventually escaped with the help of Perona , his SWORD colleagues, and his mentor Garp. [ 17 ] For his atypical status, the Cross Guild has assigned Koby a 5-star bounty , worth 500,000,000. [ 11 ] He is Luffy's ally during the Romance Dawn Arc , and co-features with Helmeppo as a central character in the Diary of Koby-Meppo cover arc . Since then, he has appeared as a supporting character (with brief antagonistic roles) in the Post-Enies Lobby Arc and the Marineford Arc , with more tertiary appearances in the Levely Arc , the Wano Country Arc , and the Egghead Arc .

name: Komachiyo
intro_text: Komachiyo is a komainu that resides in the Kuri region of Wano Country . [ 3 ] It has been Kurozumi Tama 's best friend since their childhood. [ 4 ] [ 5 ]

name: Komane
intro_text: Komane is the deposed princess of the Lulusia Kingdom , being the daughter of the former king Seki . [ 2 ] [ 3 ]

name: Konbu
intro_text: Konbu is a child who lived in Punk Hazard 's Biscuits Room . [ 2 ] He was freed with the rest of the children by the Straw Hat Pirates .

name: Kokoro
intro_text: Kokoro is an icefish mermaid [ 5 ] and the stationmaster for Shift Station , a Sea Train station near Water 7 . [ 1 ] She was also Tom 's secretary during the days of Tom's Workers . [ 2 ] Kokoro poses as a human, hiding her mermaid physique because her tail fin forked in two around the age of 30 and allowed her to walk on land. [ 5 ] She has a granddaughter named Chimney , who accompanies her everywhere. [ 1 ] She is an ally of the Straw Hat Pirates during the Water 7 Arc and, later on, the Enies Lobby Arc .

name: Kong
intro_text: Kong [ 5 ] is the Commander-in-Chief of the World Government . [ 2 ] He was a Fleet Admiral of the Marines at the time of the Battle of Edd War twenty-seven years ago. [ 1 ] Some time after, he was promoted while Sengoku eventually became the new Fleet Admiral.

name: Kotatsu
intro_text: Kotatsu [ 2 ] is a member of the Spade Pirates . [ 1 ]

name: Koushirou
intro_text: Shimotsuki Koushirou [ 1 ] [ 3 ] is a member of the Shimotsuki Family and a master swordsman , he was both the teacher of as well as the distant relative of Roronoa Zoro . He is also the father of the late Shimotsuki Kuina [ 4 ] and son of Shimotsuki Kouzaburou . [ 5 ] He is the master of Isshin Dojo in Shimotsuki Village . [ 2 ]

name: Koshi Falcon
intro_text: Koshi Falcon [ 2 ] is a Gifter in the Beasts Pirates . [ 1 ]

name: Kop
intro_text: Kop [ 3 ] is a member of the Franky Family .

name: Kouzuki Toki
affiliation: Kouzuki Family ; Amatsuki Family ; Whitebeard Pirates (former); Roger Pirates (former)
intro_text: Kouzuki Toki , [ 4 ] née Amatsuki , was the wife of the daimyo of Kuri , Kouzuki Oden and the mother of Kouzuki Momonosuke and Kouzuki Hiyori . [ 5 ] She was born around 830 years before the present day. By the time she was 26 years old, she jumped forward in time with her Devil Fruit ability and arrived 30 years before the present when she met Oden [ 2 ] and stayed with him for 10 years until he was executed . She was killed during the destruction of Oden Castle . [ 1 ] [ 6 ]

name: Komurasaki
residence: Wano Country ( Kuri ; Flower Capital ); Flower Capital (Shogun Castle)
alias: "Komurasaki" ( 小紫 , Komurasaki ? )
intro_text: Kouzuki Hiyori [ 7 ] [ 6 ] is the daughter of the late Kouzuki Oden and Kouzuki Toki and the younger sister of Kouzuki Momonosuke . [ 8 ] [ 9 ] To hide her identity, Hiyori became known as Komurasaki , [ 10 ] working as an oiran of the tayū ( 太夫 , tayū ? ) rank, the highest of all. [ 2 ] However, after she angered Kurozumi Orochi , Denjiro (in his disguise as Kyoshiro) staged a killing of Komurasaki in order to keep Hiyori safe. [ 11 ] [ 9 ] She is the one who gave her late father's legendary sword Enma to Roronoa Zoro in exchange for Shusui . After Kaidou was defeated in the Raid on Onigashima , she revealed to Wano that she was still alive as well as her true identity. Hiyori now lives in the Flower Capital with her brother after he became the new Shogun . She is also the caretaker of Toko . Hiyori is a supporting ally of the Straw Hat Pirates during the Wano Country Saga .

name: Kouzuki Sukiyaki
residence: Wano Country ( Amigasa Village , formerly Flower Capital )
alias: "Tenguyama Hitetsu" ( 天狗山飛徹 , Tenguyama Hitetsu ? )
intro_text: Kouzuki Sukiyaki [ 6 ] is the former shogun of Wano Country . He is the father of the late daimyo of Kuri , Kouzuki Oden , as well as the grandfather of current shogun Kouzuki Momonosuke and Hiyori . The descendant of the legendary swordsmith Kotetsu , he is a swordsmith by hobby [ 7 ] and crafted one of Roronoa Zoro 's swords, Sandai Kitetsu , [ 8 ] as well as Ame no Habakiri , which was previously wielded by Oden and currently by his son, Momonosuke. Around three decades before the present day, he was deposed from the shogunate and imprisoned by the usurper Kurozumi Orochi . Escaping sometime after Oden's execution 20 years ago, Sukiyaki went into hiding and lived as a hermit under the name Tenguyama Hitetsu ; he resided in Amigasa Village in Kuri and raised the young girl Kurozumi Tama as his ward. [ 1 ] After Orochi was overthrown and his grandson Momonosuke took power, Sukiyaki revealed his identity to his family and their retainers, but chose to remain hidden from the general public due to his shame over what he allowed to happen to Wano. [ 9 ]

name: Koze
intro_text: Koze and Packy were members of the Yes Pirates . [ 1 ]

name: Koza
affiliation: Arabasta Kingdom ; Sand-Sand Clan (former); Rebel Army (former)
occupation: Environmental Minister; Rebel Army leader (former); Sand-Sand Clan leader (former);
intro_text: Koza is Princess Nefertari Vivi 's childhood friend. As a child, he was the leader of the Sand-Sand Clan . [ 4 ] Years later, he became the leader of the Arabasta Rebellion . [ 3 ] He later became the environmental minister of the Arabasta Kingdom . [ 2 ]

name: Kouzuki Family
intro_text: Kouzuki Family Statistics Japanese Name: 光月家 Romanized Name: Kōzuki-ke Official English Name: Kozuki Clan; Kouzuki Clan ( OPCG ) First Appearance: Chapter 684 ; Episode 609 [ 1 ] Leader(s): Kouzuki Momonosuke , [ 2 ] Residency: Wano Country The Kouzuki Family [ 3 ] is a powerful family that ruled over Wano Country until their downfall twenty years ago at the hands of Kurozumi Orochi aided by Kaidou . [ 4 ] The family has existed for centuries [ 5 ] being responsible for the original invention of the Poneglyphs [ 6 ] and formed close ties with the people of the Mokomo Dukedom on Zou . [ 7 ] After Kaidou and Orochi's defeats during the Raid on Onigashima , the Kouzuki family regained their position in the shogunate of Wano, led by Kouzuki Momonosuke .

name: Kouzuki Hiyori
residence: Wano Country ( Kuri ; Flower Capital ); Flower Capital (Shogun Castle)
alias: "Komurasaki" ( 小紫 , Komurasaki ? )
intro_text: Kouzuki Hiyori [ 7 ] [ 6 ] is the daughter of the late Kouzuki Oden and Kouzuki Toki and the younger sister of Kouzuki Momonosuke . [ 8 ] [ 9 ] To hide her identity, Hiyori became known as Komurasaki , [ 10 ] working as an oiran of the tayū ( 太夫 , tayū ? ) rank, the highest of all. [ 2 ] However, after she angered Kurozumi Orochi , Denjiro (in his disguise as Kyoshiro) staged a killing of Komurasaki in order to keep Hiyori safe. [ 11 ] [ 9 ] She is the one who gave her late father's legendary sword Enma to Roronoa Zoro in exchange for Shusui . After Kaidou was defeated in the Raid on Onigashima , she revealed to Wano that she was still alive as well as her true identity. Hiyori now lives in the Flower Capital with her brother after he became the new Shogun . She is also the caretaker of Toko . Hiyori is a supporting ally of the Straw Hat Pirates during the Wano Country Saga .

name: Kraken
intro_text: Surume [ 4 ] is a kraken [ 7 ] and famous giant creature which dwells in the deepest parts of the ocean . [ 1 ] He was enslaved by the New Fish-Man Pirates , but later became the pet of Monkey D. Luffy , who was the one who gave Surume his name. [ 7 ]

name: Krieg Pirates
intro_text: Krieg Pirates Statistics Japanese Name: クリーク海賊団 Romanized Name: Kurīku Kaizokudan Official English Name: Pirate Armada First Appearance: Chapter 45 ; Episode 21 [ 1 ] Admiral: Krieg [ 1 ] Main Ship: Dreadnaught Sabre Total Bounty: At least 29,000,000 [ bounty 1 ] The Krieg Pirates , also known as the Pirate Armada ( 海賊艦隊 , Kaizoku Kantai ? ) , are an East Blue pirate fleet led by Don Krieg . At their height, they boasted some five thousand men across fifty ships, and held the most notorious reputation in the East Blue, until they were decimated by Dracule Mihawk . [ 1 ] Sometime after the events of the Baratie Arc , Krieg, Gin and Pearl managed to make it to the New World where they now reside on Hachinosu . Due to their actions and role, they are the main antagonists of the Baratie Arc .

name: Kuja
intro_text: Kuja Statistics Japanese Name: 九蛇 Official English Name: Kuja First Appearance: Chapter 498 ; Episode 392 [ 1 ] Features: All female Homeland: Amazon Lily The Kuja are an all-female human tribe inhabiting the island of Amazon Lily , currently ruled by "Pirate Empress" Boa Hancock . Due to their physical and cultural isolation from the world at large, most of them were completely ignorant of men prior to Luffy 's unwitting arrival on their island. [ 2 ]

name: Kuina
intro_text: Shimotsuki Kuina [ 2 ] was a childhood friend, relative and rival of Roronoa Zoro . She was the daughter of Shimotsuki Koushirou [ 6 ] and the granddaughter of Shimotsuki Kouzaburou [ 7 ] making her a descendant of Wano Country 's famed Shimotsuki Family . [ 8 ] Her death at the age of eleven drove much of Zoro's ambitions as a swordsman , including his development of the Three Sword Style . [ 1 ]

name: Kujaku
intro_text: Kujaku is a Marine Rear Admiral [ 5 ] stationed at Marine Base G-14 [ 1 ] and also a member of SWORD . She is the granddaughter of Marine Vice Admiral Tsuru . [ 5 ] Kujaku was first introduced during the "Gang" Bege's Oh My Family Cover Page Serial as a brief antagonist. She made her proper debut in the main series during the Egghead Arc .

name: Kukai
intro_text: Kukai is a samurai and member of the Spade Pirates . [ 2 ]

name: Krieg
epithet: "Don Krieg" ( 首領 ・クリーク , Don Kurīku ? ) ; "Pirate Fleet Admiral" ( 海賊艦隊提督 , Kaizoku Kantai Teitoku ? ) ; "Ruler of the East Blue " ( 東の海 の覇者 , Īsuto Burū no Hasha ? ) ; "Foul Play Krieg" ( ダマし討ちのクリーク , Damashi-uchi no Kurīku ? )
intro_text: Don Krieg is the admiral of the Krieg Pirates , widely reputed as Foul-Play Krieg for his underhanded methods. [ 1 ] At his height, he was also known as the Pirate Fleet Admiral , commanding a fleet of fifty ships (totaling some 5,000 pirates ) throughout the East Blue . [ 6 ] After effectively dominating East Blue piracy, Krieg attempted to conquer the Grand Line , only to have his fleet decimated by Dracule Mihawk of the Seven Warlords of the Sea . Fleeing back to the East Blue, he tried to capture the Baratie as his new ship, but met further defeat from Monkey D. Luffy . Taken away from the Baratie by his right-hand man Gin , Krieg continued his pirating career, eventually arriving at the pirate island Hachinosu . Due to his actions and role, he is the main antagonist of the Baratie Arc .

name: Kumagoro
intro_text: Kumagoro is a resident of the Flower Capital in Wano Country . He once possessed the blueprints of Kaidou 's fortress on Onigashima . [ 1 ]

name: Kouzuki Oden
affiliation: Kouzuki Family ; Roger Pirates (former); Whitebeard Pirates (former)
epithet: "Idiot Lord" ( バカ殿 , Bakatono ? , VIZ: "Fool of a Lord")
intro_text: Kouzuki Oden [ 7 ] was the daimyo of Kuri in Wano Country and the son of the former shogun Kouzuki Sukiyaki , being a member of the Kouzuki Family . He was the husband of Kouzuki Toki and the father of Momonosuke and Hiyori . Additionally, he was the leader of a group of legendary and powerful samurai known as the Nine Red Scabbards , with all of them serving as his retainers and most trusted allies. [ 2 ] For 5 years of his life, Oden set out to sea and became a pirate , serving as the 2nd division commander of the Whitebeard Pirates [ 10 ] and later becoming a member of the Roger Pirates . After finding Joy Boy 's treasure on Laugh Tale , Oden journeyed home and made it his goal to open Wano's borders to the world by finally taking his father's place as shogun. [ 11 ] However, he met opposition from his usurper Kurozumi Orochi and the pirate Kaidou , who executed him 20 years before the present, in an event known as the Legendary Hour . [ 3 ] Oden's name was first mentioned during the Zou Arc . [ 3 ] He is the posthumous overarching protagonist of the Wano Country Arc , being the protagonist of a series of events taking place in and outside Wano in the past.

name: Kumadori
intro_text: Kumadori [ 4 ] is an agent of CP0 . [ 2 ] Before the time skip, he was an agent of CP9 . [ 3 ] He is also the son of Kumadori Yamanbako . [ 8 ] He was one of the major antagonists during the Enies Lobby Arc .

name: Kouzuki Momonosuke
english_name: Kozuki Momonosuke (VIZ); Kouzuki Momonosuke ( WT100 , OPCG )
residence: Wano Country ( Kuri ); Flower Capital (Shogun Castle)
devil_fruit_name: Uo Uo no Mi, Model: Seiryu ( Artificial )
devil_fruit_english_name: Fish-Fish Fruit, Model: Azure Dragon Fish-Fish Fruit, Azure Dragon Model
intro_text: Kouzuki Momonosuke [ 12 ] is the current shogun of Wano Country . [ 4 ] A member of the Kouzuki Family , he is the son of the late daimyo of Kuri Kouzuki Oden and his wife Toki , the grandson of the former shogun Sukiyaki , and the older brother of Hiyori . Momonosuke was born 28 years ago while his parents were sailing with the Whitebeard Pirates . [ 5 ] Though rightfully the heir to the shogunate after Oden, the Kouzuki Family was deposed by the Kurozumi Family during Oden's travels, and attempts were made on Momonosuke's life by Kurozumi Orochi 's administration. [ 13 ] Oden was executed when Momonosuke was 8, and Orochi and Kaidou began waging open warfare to eliminate the Kouzuki bloodline. To keep Momonosuke safe, Toki sent him 20 years forward in time with several of his retainers. [ 14 ] Upon reappearing, Momonosuke and his men went out to sea to recruit allies for a planned battle against Orochi and Kaidou. To conceal his identity, Momonosuke pretended to be the son of his retainer Kin'emon . Throughout their voyage, return to Wano, and climactic battle with Kaidou's forces, Momonosuke steadily grew to accept and assume his role as the leader of the Kouzuki Family and their allies. [ 3 ] To be of better use during the conflict, Momonosuke had his retainer Shinobu use her Juku Juku ability to age his body 20 years, though he remains a child mentally. [ 8 ] The Ninja-Pirate-Mink-Samurai Alliance emerged victorious from this war, and Momonosuke attained his rightful position of shogun to unanimous support from the Wano citizens; he would go on to be renowned as one of Wano's greatest leaders. [ 4 ] He was first mentioned when Kin'emon told Sanji that he came to Punk Hazard to rescue his "son". [ 15 ] His given name was revealed when the samurai was asking if the captive children in the Biscuits Room had seen him, [ 16 ] and his clan name was revealed when Kin'emon spoke of his true heritage. [ 3 ] He is a major ally of the Straw Hat Pirates during the entirety of the Dressrosa and Wano Country Sagas .

name: Kuja Pirates
intro_text: Kuja Pirates Statistics Japanese Name: 九蛇海賊団 Romanized Name: Kuja Kaizokudan Official English Name: Kuja Pirates First Appearance: Chapter 516 ; Episode 415 [ 1 ] Captain: Boa Hancock (current) Tritoma (former) Shakuyaku (former, two generations ago) [ 2 ] Gloriosa (former, three generations ago) Main Ship: Perfume Yuda Total Bounty: At least 1,739,000,000 [ bounty 1 ] At least 160,000,000 [ bounty 2 ] The Kuja Pirates (literally meaning "Nine Snakes Pirates") is a crew of female pirates from Amazon Lily . All of the crew members are women chosen from the Kuja tribe of their homeland. Their captain is the Empress of the Kuja tribe, as well as the former member of the Seven Warlords of the Sea , Boa Hancock . Second in command are Hancock's younger sisters, Boa Sandersonia and Boa Marigold . Though only the elite warriors of the tribe were selected to be members of the Kuja Pirates crew, every member of the Kuja tribe has been classified as a pirate by the World Government whether they are an islander or an actual pirate.

name: Kumashi
intro_text: Kumashi was a stuffed bear zombie of the Thriller Bark Pirates who acted as Perona 's servant [ 2 ] and the commander-in-chief of the Wild Zombies [ 3 ] prior to being purified by Usopp . Due to his actions and role, he is a supporting antagonist in the Thriller Bark Arc.

name: Kumate Island
intro_text: Kumate Tribe Statistics Japanese Name: クマテ族 Romanized Name: Kumate-zoku Official English Name: Kumate Tribe (VIZ); Bear Claw Tribe (Funimation) First Appearance: Chapter 62 ( cover ); Episode 47 [ 1 ] Features: Cannibals Homeland: Kumate Island The Kumate Tribe is a group of cannibalistic people in East Blue .

name: Kuni
intro_text: Kuni is a gangster and a member of the Kyoshiro Family in Wano Country . [ 1 ]

name: Kumate Tribe
intro_text: Kumate Tribe Statistics Japanese Name: クマテ族 Romanized Name: Kumate-zoku Official English Name: Kumate Tribe (VIZ); Bear Claw Tribe (Funimation) First Appearance: Chapter 62 ( cover ); Episode 47 [ 1 ] Features: Cannibals Homeland: Kumate Island The Kumate Tribe is a group of cannibalistic people in East Blue .

name: Kunyun
intro_text: Kunyun is a member of the Numbers in the Beasts Pirates , representing the number "nine". [ 1 ] She works under Black Maria . Due to her actions and role, she is a minor antagonist in the Wano Country Arc .

name: Kureha
occupation: Head- Doctor of the Sakura Kingdom; Leader of the Isshi-100
alias: "Doctorine" ( ドクトリーヌ , Dokutorīnu ? )
epithet: "Witch" ( 魔女 , Majo ? ) ; "Master of Doctors" ( マスターオブ医者 , Masutā Obu Isha ? )
intro_text: Dr. Kureha [ 6 ] is an elderly doctor who works on Drum Island . She is referred to as "witch" by some people. She is Tony Tony Chopper 's mentor and adoptive mother, taking him under her care after the death of Hiriluk . She is also head of the Isshi-100 . [ 7 ] She is an ally of the Straw Hat Pirates during the Drum Island Arc .

name: Kurotsuru
intro_text: Dr. Kurotsuru , [ 2 ] also named "Dr. Black Beard" based on the same name on the lapel of his coat, [ 1 ] is a doctor who appeared in Ace's cover story .

name: Kuromarimo
intro_text: Kuromarimo [ 3 ] was the evil magistrate ( 悪代官 , aku daikan ? ) during Wapol's rule on Drum Island, and was the highest-ranking law officer below Wapol . [ 2 ] [ 4 ] After fleeing Drum Island to escape Blackbeard 's attack, Kuromarimo became part of the Bliking Pirates . Due to his actions and role, he is a major antagonist in the Drum Island Arc .

name: Kuroobi
intro_text: Kuroobi [ 6 ] is a ray fish-man and an officer of the Arlong Pirates , [ 2 ] who was once a member of the Sun Pirates . [ 3 ] He is one of the major antagonists of the Arlong Park Arc .

name: Kuro
alias: "Klahadore" ( クラハドール , Kurahadōru ? , Odex : Klahadoll)
epithet: "Kuro of a Hundred Plans" ( 百計のクロ , Hyakkei no Kuro ? , English: "Kuro of a Thousand Plans")
intro_text: Kuro of a Hundred Plans is the captain of the Black Cat Pirates . After faking his own capture and execution, [ 7 ] he assumed the alias Klahadore and infiltrated Syrup Village 's wealthiest family, acting as servant and caretaker to their young daughter Kaya [ 8 ] with the intent of seizing her fortune. [ 9 ] His scheme would ultimately be thwarted by Kaya's friend Usopp and the Straw Hat Pirates who came to his aid. [ 10 ] He is the main antagonist of the Syrup Village Arc .

name: Kurosawa
intro_text: Kurosawa is a samurai who allied with the Kouzuki Family . [ 2 ] After waiting 20 years for the return of the Nine Red Scabbards , he affiliated with the Ninja-Pirate-Mink-Samurai Alliance to raid Onigashima . [ 1 ]

name: Kurozumi Higurashi
intro_text: Kurozumi Higurashi was a member of the Kurozumi Family and a major supporter of Kurozumi Orochi . [ 1 ] [ 3 ] She was killed by Kaidou for her interruption in his fight with Kouzuki Oden . [ 4 ] Due of her actions and role, she was a major overarching antagonist in the Wano Country Arc and Saga .

name: Kurozumi Semimaru
intro_text: Kurozumi Semimaru was a member of the Kurozumi Family and a major supporter of Kurozumi Orochi . [ 1 ] [ 3 ]

name: Kurozumi Kanjuro
affiliation: Kurozumi Family ; Kouzuki Family (undercover); Nine Red Scabbards (undercover); Ninja-Pirate-Mink-Samurai Alliance (undercover); Beasts Pirates (former)
occupation: Theatre Performer (former); Spy of the Kurozumi Family; Samurai ; Retainer of the Kouzuki Family (undercover)
residence: Wano Country ( Kuri ) Wano Country ( Kibi ) (former)
epithet: "Evening Shower" ( 夕立ち , Yūdachi ? ) ; Ghost of Kibi ( 希美の妖怪 , Kibi no Yōkai ? , VIZ Media: Goblin of Kibi)
intro_text: Kurozumi Kanjuro , nicknamed "Evening Shower" Kanjuro , [ 7 ] was a samurai from the Kuri region of Wano Country and a member of the Kurozumi Family . After losing his parents, he was instructed by Kurozumi Orochi to operate undercover within the Kouzuki Family . Kanjuro became Kouzuki Oden 's retainer and one of the Nine Red Scabbards while secretly aiding Orochi in his rise to power and efforts to eliminate the Kouzuki bloodline, by feeding him information. [ 2 ] [ 3 ] He would continue to do so until he revealed himself as Orochi's spy just before the Raid on Onigashima , leading to his former comrades engaging in battle with him until he was lethally wounded by Kin'emon during a final skirmish, dubbing it his final act. [ 12 ] He was born 54 years before the present day, but traveled 20 years forward in time when he was 34 years old. [ 5 ] [ 8 ] He acted as an ally to the Straw Hat Pirates in his undercover role during the Dressrosa Arc and Zou Arc , but was revealed to be a major antagonist of the Wano Country Arc during its third act.

name: Kurozumi Orochi
affiliation: Wano Country ( Kurozumi Family ); Beasts Pirates (former)
residence: Wano Country ( Flower Capital ; Orochi Castle)
devil_fruit_name: Hebi Hebi no Mi, Model: Yamata no Orochi
devil_fruit_english_name: Snake-Snake Fruit, Model: Eight Headed Serpent
intro_text: Kurozumi Orochi [ 4 ] was the former shogun of Wano Country and one of the last members of the Kurozumi Family . [ 3 ] Persecuted in his youth due to his grandfather's failed attempt to seize the shogunate from the Kouzuki Family , Orochi encountered some relatives who helped him formulate another attempt to become shogun. This plan succeeded, with Orochi deposing the Kouzuki Family around three decades before the present day after allying with Kaidou of the Four Emperors . [ 2 ] Orochi ruled Wano tyrannically until he was deposed by none other than Kaidou, who betrayed him to seize Wano for himself; [ 6 ] Orochi survived Kaidou's attack and tried to kill everyone on Onigashima out of spite but was then killed after two encounters with the Kouzuki Family's Nine Red Scabbards who he knew had been prophesied to overthrow him. [ 7 ] [ 8 ] Due to his actions and role, he is the secondary antagonist of the first half and a supporting antagonist in the second half of the Wano Country Arc , and one of the two secondary antagonists of the Wano Country Saga overall.

name: Kyo
occupation: Pirate ; Hitman ; Mobster ( 極道 , Gokudō ? )
epithet: "Silver Axe" ( 銀斧 , Ginbu ? )
intro_text: Kyo , [ 1 ] also known as Silver Axe , is a mobster-turned- pirate , a former member of the Rocks Pirates , [ 2 ] and a rival of Shiki . [ 1 ]

name: Kurozumi Tama
intro_text: Kurozumi Tama , [ 2 ] commonly known as O-Tama ( お玉 ? ) , is a girl from the region of Kuri in Wano Country . She is a kasa weaver working under Tenguyama Hitetsu , [ 1 ] as well as a kunoichi in training under the apprenticeship of Shinobu . [ 6 ] She is the last known survivor of the Kurozumi Family . [ 2 ] Tama befriended Portgas D. Ace four years ago, having wished to join his crew at the time. She is a major ally of the Ninja-Pirate-Mink-Samurai Alliance during the Wano Country Arc .

name: Kuzan
occupation: Titanic Captain (Captain of the Tenth Ship); Admiral (former); Vice Admiral (former)
alias: Aokiji ( 青キジ , Aokiji ? , literally meaning "Blue Pheasant")
devil_fruit_english_name: Ice-Ice Fruit ( Funimation ); Chilly-Chilly Fruit ( VIZ )
intro_text: Kuzan , [ 6 ] [ 12 ] better known by his alias Aokiji , [ 13 ] is one of the Ten Titanic Captains of the Blackbeard Pirates , serving as the captain of the tenth ship of the fleet . [ 2 ] [ 5 ] Before joining Blackbeard 's crew, he served as a Marine Admiral , [ 1 ] having been taught by Monkey D. Garp . [ 5 ] He was nominated by Sengoku for the position of Fleet Admiral ; however, after fighting Sakazuki for the position and losing, Kuzan resigned from the Marines. [ 14 ] [ 4 ] Kuzan was the antagonist of the second part of the Long Ring Long Land Arc ; in the anime, he is instead one of the main antagonists of the Foxy's Return Arc . He is later a secondary antagonist of the Marineford Arc , a minor antagonist in the Egghead Arc , and a major antagonist in the Final Saga .

name: Kyuin
intro_text: Kyuin is a former member of the Donquixote Pirates , and the former boss of the SMILE Factory on Dressrosa . [ 1 ]

name: Kyoshiro
affiliation: Kouzuki Family ; Nine Red Scabbards ; Kyoshiro Family ; Kurozumi Family (undercover); Ninja-Pirate-Mink-Samurai Alliance (disbanded)

residence: Wano Country ( Flower Capital ) Wano Country ( Kibi )
alias: "Kyoshiro" ( 狂死郎 , Kyōshirō ? ) "Ushimitsu Kozo" ( 丑三つ小僧 , Ushimitsu Kozō ? , Meaning "Witching Hour Boy")
epithet: "Dozing Kyoshiro" ( 居眠り狂死郎 , Inemuri Kyōshirō ? , VIZ: "Napping Kyoshiro")
intro_text: Denjiro is a samurai from Wano Country and one of the Nine Red Scabbards who served as Kouzuki Oden 's retainers. [ 7 ] He currently serves as the daimyo of Kibi . [ 4 ] After becoming grief-stricken over Oden's execution 20 years ago, Denjiro's facial structure changed, and he started going under the name Kyoshiro . With this new identity, he became a yakuza boss and recruited followers to form the Kyoshiro Family . Eventually, he started working for Oden's usurper, shogun Kurozumi Orochi , as his money changer and bodyguard; he would successfully keep his true allegiance to the Kouzuki Family a secret and bide his time until the Scabbards finally reunited to take down Orochi and Kaidou . [ 2 ] [ 1 ] [ 8 ] Apart from his Kyoshiro identity, Denjiro would disguise himself at night to rob the wealthy Flower Capital citizens and give to the poor residents of Ebisu Town , earning him the moniker "Ushimitsu Kozo" . He also took care of Oden's daughter Kouzuki Hiyori for the past 13 years, raising her to become the oiran Komurasaki. [ 2 ]

name: Kyuji
intro_text: Kyuji [ 3 ] is a Marine chef , Koda 's husband, and Moda 's father. [ 1 ]

name: Kyuka Island
english_name: Kyuka Island [ N 1 ] Vacation Island [ N 2 ] Cukor Island [ N 3 ] Holiday Island [ N 4 ]
intro_text: Kyuka Island Statistics Japanese Name: キューカ島 Romanized Name: Kyūka-jima English Name: Kyuka Island [ N 1 ] Vacation Island [ N 2 ] Cukor Island [ N 3 ] Holiday Island [ N 4 ] First appearance: Chapter 117 ; Episode 70 [ 1 ] Region: Paradise [ 1 ] Kyuka Island is an island located in Paradise . It is where Mr. 3 and Miss Goldenweek took their days off when they were not on missions. [ 1 ]

name: Laboon
intro_text: Laboon [ 3 ] is an Island Whale the Straw Hat Pirates encounter immediately after entering the Grand Line . He is native to the West Blue and is classified as a Type A creature, "Big Friendly", and at the top of both the size and friendliness scale. [ 6 ] 50 years ago, after being separated from his pod as a baby, Laboon became a close companion of the Rumbar Pirates , but he had to be left behind under Crocus 's care due to the dangers of the Grand Line. The pirates promised they would come back for Laboon someday, so the whale still awaits their return to this day. As a former and the only surviving member of the Rumbar Pirates, it is Brook 's ultimate goal to reunite with Laboon. Because many events of the Reverse Mountain Arc happen within his innards, Laboon could be considered one of the main settings for that story arc alongside the Twin Cape .

name: Lacroix
intro_text: Vice Admiral Lacroix is a Marine vice admiral and a member of the Giant Squad . [ 3 ]

name: Lacuba
intro_text: Lacuba [ 6 ] is a pirate famed as a devious tactician who was captured and taken to the Human Auctioning House .

name: Lady Tree
intro_text: Lady Tree is a tree homie living in the Seducing Woods on Whole Cake Island . [ 1 ] She's also Kingbaum 's fiancée. [ 2 ]

name: Kyukyu
intro_text: Dr. Kyukyu [ 2 ] is a doctor in Water 7 . He examined Iceburg after he was shot by the CP9 .

It was built and ruled by Road , claiming to be the "Sun God". [ 2 ]

name: Laffitte
english_name: Lafitte (VIZ, uncut dub); Raffit (edited dub); Laffitte ( WT100 )
occupation: Titanic Captain (Captain of the Fifth Ship); Navigator ; Sheriff (former)

intro_text: Laffitte , [ 8 ] nicknamed "Demon Sheriff" , [ 5 ] is the navigator [ 2 ] and one of the Ten Titanic Captains of the Blackbeard Pirates , serving as the captain of the fifth ship of the fleet . [ 5 ] He is also a former West Blue policeman known for countless acts of police brutality, which resulted in his exile from that sea. [ 3 ] Due to his actions and role, he is a minor antagonist in the Jaya Arc , a supporting antagonist in the Impel Down and Marineford Arcs , and a major antagonist in the Final Saga .

name: Kyros
alias: "Thunder Soldier of Rage" ( 怒りの雷兵 , Ikari no Kaminari Hei ? , Viz: "The Angry Lightning Soldier") ; "The Invincible Gladiator"
intro_text: Kyros [ 7 ] is a legendary gladiator who fought in the Corrida Colosseum until he left to become captain of the royal army of Dressrosa. [ 8 ] He was later turned into a toy , causing everyone to forget his existence, becoming a One-Legged Soldier ( 片足の兵隊 , Kata-ashi no Heitai ? ) , also known as the " Thunder Soldier of Rage ". [ 9 ] He is the former captain of the Riku Royal Army ( リク王軍 , Riku Ō Gun ? ) , [ 10 ] [ 11 ] the father of Rebecca , [ 12 ] the husband of Scarlett , and the son-in-law of Riku Doldo III . [ 13 ] He spent ten years as a toy before being freed by the success of his own Operation SOP . [ 14 ] After helping bring down the Donquixote Pirates , Kyros currently lives with Rebecca. [ 15 ] He is an ally of the Straw Hat Pirates during the Dressrosa Arc .

name: Lao G
intro_text: Lao G [ 5 ] is an officer of the Donquixote Pirates ' Diamante Army. [ 6 ] Due to his actions and role, he is a supporting antagonist during the Dressrosa Arc .

name: Laskey
intro_text: Laskey [ 2 ] is a former CP9 agent and the father of current Cipher Pol agents Kalifa and Alpha .

name: Lieutenant
intro_text: Marine Ranks Statistics Explained in: SBS Volume 8 [ 1 ] SBS Volume 24 [ 2 ] SBS Volume 29 [ 3 ] SBS Volume 98 [ 4 ] The ranks within the Marine System are fairly straightforward, where each rank is clearly delineated. [ 1 ] Officers present at Marine Headquarters are considered the elite forces of the Marines, about three ranks higher in terms of power from those of the same rank at other bases. All ranks present from "Lieutenant" above are usually trained here, exceptions being those in command of other Marine bases which includes Axe-Hand Morgan and Nezumi . [ 3 ] This page will list the Marine ranks and the soldiers who hold the titles.

name: Lily
intro_text: Lily was a member of the Bellamy Pirates . She was first seen with Sarquiss on Jaya Island. She was the only member of the minor crew members in Bellamy's crew that was openly named. [ 1 ] Lily appeared in most of the events the crew were involved with during the Jaya Arc. She was last seen when Doflamingo came to punish Bellamy .

name: Lim
intro_text: Lim [ 6 ] is a young woman who lives on Waford as the Sky Priestess. She is a descendant of Rita Suerte . [ 7 ] She appears in One Piece Odyssey as a key ally to the Straw Hat Pirates . Lim actually embodies two people, with the second being a copy of the first. 200 years ago, during Waford 's fall, the original Lim placed herself into cryo-sleep. She created the copy Lim to monitor the island in her absence; however, not all her memories were extracted correctly, causing the copy Lim to not correctly remember her past. Throughout One Piece Odyssey , nearly all actions are performed by the copy Lim, while the original Lim takes the form of the "Mysterious Voice".

affiliation: Night Butterfly Pirates ; Red Hair Pirates

intro_text: "Igniting" Linaria [ 2 ] is the captain of the Night Butterfly Pirates , a crew subordinate to the Red Hair Pirates . [ 1 ]

name: Lilith
intro_text: Lilith , also designated as Punk-02 ( PUNK-02 , Panku-Tsū ? ) , is one of six satellites of Dr. Vegapunk , embodying his aspect of "evil". [ 3 ] She is a major ally of the Straw Hat Pirates during the Egghead and Elbaph Arcs , and ultimately the only Vegapunk to escape with them after the Egghead Incident . [ 4 ]

name: Limejuice

Due to the climate, dinosaurs are still alive there. This is the second island on the Grand Line that the Straw Hat Pirates visit and the setting of the Little Garden Arc .

intro_text: "Warrior" Leo is a dwarf from the Tontatta Kingdom and the leader of the " Tonta Corps " ( トンタ兵長 , Tonta-heichō ? ) , [ 4 ] which was later reformed as a pirate crew now known as the Tontatta Pirates , with Leo now acting as the captain. [ 9 ] He is the captain of the fifth ship of the Straw Hat Grand Fleet . [ 3 ] He is an ally of the Straw Hat Pirates during the Dressrosa Arc , and one of the central characters from The Stories of the Self-Proclaimed Straw Hat Grand Fleet Cover Page Serial.

affiliation: Little Pirates ; Subordinate of the Whitebeard Pirates
intro_text: Little Oars Jr. (also referred to as Oars III on his flag) [ 5 ] is the captain of the Little Pirates , [ 2 ] a descendant of Oars , and a former subordinate of the Whitebeard Pirates . He is among the several New World pirates that aided the Whitebeard Pirates in saving Ace from execution by the World Government . [ 1 ]

name: Loguetown
english_name: Roguetown; Logue Town (Funimation, formerly) ; Loague Town ( Odex ) ; Loguetown ( OPCG )
intro_text: Loguetown Statistics Japanese Name: ローグタウン Romanized Name: Rōgutaun English Name: Roguetown; Logue Town (Funimation, formerly) ; Loague Town ( Odex ) ; Loguetown ( OPCG ) First appearance: Chapter 1 ; We Are! [ 1 ] Region: East Blue Loguetown is a prominent city situated on the Polestar Islands ( ポルスター諸島 , Porusutā Shotō ? ) [ 2 ] in the East Blue . Spanning nearly the entire island it occupies—save for a few steep hills—it serves as a vital port of call for the surrounding seas. Its strategic location, lying in close proximity to the Reverse Mountain and just beyond the visible reach of the Red Line , makes it an essential stop for almost all East Blue ships , especially pirate ships, seeking to resupply before venturing into the perilous waters of the Grand Line . The town is famed as both the birthplace and the execution site of the former Pirate King, Gol D. Roger . This dual distinction earned it its poetic epithet : the "Town of the Beginning and the End" ( 始まりと終わりの町 , Hajimari to Owari no Machi ? ) . [ 3 ] It serves as the principal setting of the Loguetown Arc .

name: Lola
japanese_name: シャーロット・ローラ
affiliation: Rolling Pirates ; Charlotte Family ; Thriller Bark Victim's Association (former)
epithet: "Marriage Proposal Lola" ( 求婚のローラ , Kyūkon no Rōra ? , English versions: "Lola the Proposer")
intro_text: Charlotte Lola [ 5 ] is the captain of the Rolling Pirates and the 23rd daughter and 53rd child of the Charlotte Family . Her mother is the former Emperor Charlotte Linlin [ 2 ] and her father is Linlin's 25th husband, Pound . She is the younger twin sister of Chiffon [ 7 ] [ 8 ] and Gotti 's wife. She was Totto Land 's Minister of Chocolate ( チョコレート大臣 , Chokorēto Daijin ? ) before she ran away after being arranged to marry Prince Loki of Elbaph . [ 3 ] Wanting to marry for love, she proposed so many times to the point of being called " Marriage Proposal Lola " until she finally married Gotti. She was a member of the Thriller Bark Victim's Association after her shadow was stolen by Gecko Moria and placed into a warthog zombie also named Lola . She is an ally of the Straw Hat Pirates during the Thriller Bark Arc . She is also one of the central characters in "Gang" Bege's Oh My Family Cover Page Serial.

name: Loki
epithet: "Accursed Prince" ( 呪いの王子 , Noroi no Ōji ? ) ; "Shame of Elbaph" ( エルバフの恥 , Erubafu no Haji ? ) ; "Sun God" ( 太陽の神 , Taiyō no Kami ? ) (self-proclaimed)
devil_fruit_name: Ryu Ryu no Mi, Model: Nidhöggr
intro_text: Loki is the prince of Elbaph , being the son of King Harald and Queen Estrid , the younger half-brother of Hajrudin , and the foster son of Ida . [ 8 ] An outcast since childhood, Loki was tasked by Harald to kill him to spare Elbaph from the World Government 's attempt to control the giants. After doing so, Loki refused to clear his name earning him a reputation as the "Shame of Elbaph" , and he instead set out to sea to take revenge against the World Government. Loki was later brought back to Elbaph by Shanks and imprisoned for the next six years [ 9 ] before being freed by Luffy and Hajrudin to assist them against the World Government's latest attempt to annex the land of giants. [ 10 ] A devotee of the legendary pirate Rocks D. Xebec , Loki has long sought the destruction of the current world that the “Sun God” Nika is prophesied to bring, and in the present day has declared himself as the Sun God who will end the world. [ 6 ] First mentioned in the Whole Cake Island Arc , he is a major ally of the Straw Hat Pirates in the Elbaph Arc .

name: Lola (Zombie)
intro_text: Lola was a Wild Zombie created by Dr. Hogback and animated by Gecko Moria 's powers , using the shadow of Charlotte Lola . [ 3 ]

While following the Log Pose , it is preceded by Skypiea and followed by Water 7 .

intro_text: Lvneel Kingdom Statistics Japanese Name: ルブニール王国 Romanized Name: Rubunīru Ōkoku English Name: Lvneel Kingdom First appearance: Chapter 292 ; Episode 189 Region: North Blue The Lvneel Kingdom is a kingdom in the North Blue . This is where Mont Blanc Noland was born and where he was executed. This is also Mont Blanc Cricket 's ancestral home. [ 1 ]

intro_text: Lulusia Kingdom Statistics Japanese Name: ルルシア王国 Romanized Name: Rurushia Ōkoku English Name: Lulusia; Lulucia ( OPCG ; formerly VIZ & Funimation) First appearance: Chapter 272 (cover); [ 1 ] Episode 880 [ 2 ] Region: Paradise [ 3 ] Affiliates: Revolutionary Army ; World Government (formerly) [ 4 ] The Lulusia Kingdom was a historical World Government -affiliated kingdom located in Paradise . It was located south-west to Marine Base G-2 , [ 5 ] and close to Momoiro Island [ 6 ] and Mary Geoise . [ 7 ] The country was ruled by King Seki , but following the events of the latest Levely , the citizens decided to revolt against him as part of the Eight-Nation Revolution [ 4 ] and imprisoned him and his daughter, Princess Komane . [ 3 ] Following the Raid on Onigashima , the kingdom was completely destroyed without a trace by the World Government using an unknown weapon, fueled by the artificially created Mother Flame , and was subsequently erased from history. [ 8 ]

intro_text: MADS Statistics Japanese Name: MADS Romanized Name: Mazzu Official English Name: MADS First Appearance: Chapter 1068 ; Episode 1103 [ 1 ] Occupation: Scientists Leader(s): Vegapunk [ 2 ] Main Ship: MADS Research Ship MADS , [ 3 ] also known as the Laboratory for Peace ( 平和研究所 , Heiwa Kenkyūjo ? ) , [ 4 ] was a lawless scientific research institute led by Vegapunk . It was active for thirteen years between 26-39 years ago before being shut down by the World Government . [ 5 ] [ 6 ] [ 7 ] A spiritual successor of the group, NEO MADS , was formed under the command of former MADS members Vinsmoke Judge and Caesar Clown . [ 8 ]

Along with the other Elders, he is one of the main antagonists of the Final Saga and one of the overarching antagonists of the One Piece series.

name: Marco
epithet: "Marco the Phoenix" ( 不死鳥マルコ , Fushichō Maruko ? )
devil_fruit_name: Tori Tori no Mi, Model: Phoenix
devil_fruit_english_name: Tweet-Tweet Fruit, Phoenix Model (Crunchy subs) Bird-Bird Fruit, Model: Phoenix (One Piece Official YouTube Channel)
intro_text: Marco the Phoenix [ 6 ] [ 11 ] is the former 1st division commander of the Whitebeard Pirates . [ 2 ] Once starting out as an apprentice on the crew, [ 4 ] he eventually came to be Whitebeard 's closest confidant and right-hand man. [ 12 ] After his captain's death during the Summit War of Marineford , Marco assumed leadership of the Whitebeard Pirates until the crew's disbandment following the Payback War . [ 13 ] In the year since the disbandment, Marco worked as a doctor in Whitebeard's home village on Sphinx ; [ 3 ] following the Raid on Onigashima , during which Marco acted as an ally to the Ninja-Pirate-Mink-Samurai Alliance , Marco permanently retired from piracy, returning to his duties as a doctor on Sphinx. [ 14 ] Marco is a major ally during the Marineford and Wano Country Arcs .

name: Marilyn
intro_text: Marilyn [ 2 ] is a woman that lives in Skypiea . She was Miss Skypiea forty-two years ago.

japanese_name: マンマイヤー・ 軍子 宮
affiliation: Knights of God ; World Nobles ( Manmayer Family )
occupation: Knight of God; Devoted Blade of God (former); Princess (former)
epithet: "Father-Killing Princess" ( 父殺しの姫 , Chichi-goroshi no Hime ? )
intro_text: Saint Manmayer Gunko [ 6 ] [ 7 ] is a World Noble and a member of the Knights of God . [ 3 ] [ 4 ] Previously, she was a Devoted Blade of God serving under the Knights of God 38 years ago during the events of the God Valley Incident . [ 5 ] She was previously known as Princess Shuri ( シュリ姫 , Shuri Hime ? ) and acquainted with Brook , although her memories of the past are seemingly repressed by Nerona Imu . She is believed to have killed her father, who was Brook's benefactor. [ 1 ] Due to her actions and role, she is the secondary antagonist of the Elbaph Arc .

name: Marianne
alias: "Miss Goldenweek" ( ミス・ゴールデンウィーク , Misu Gōruden Wīku ? , Odex/Funimation: "Miss Golden Week"; 4Kids: "Ms. April Fools Day")
epithet: "Flag-Bearer of Freedom" ( 自由の旗手マリアンヌ , Jiyū no Kishu Mariannu ? )
intro_text: Marianne , [ 4 ] also known as the "Flag-Bearer of Freedom" and more commonly by her alias Miss Goldenweek , is a former officer agent of Baroque Works and the partner of Mr. 3 . [ 3 ] She is currently working as a painter at the new Spider's Cafe alongside many of her former colleagues. [ 2 ] She is the secondary antagonist of the Little Garden Arc and the protagonist in Miss Goldenweek's "Operation: Meet Baroque Works" .

name: Marie
intro_text: Marie is the thirteenth wife of Saint Charlos . Before being enslaved by Charlos, she worked as a nurse in the Sabaody Archipelago , and was the fiancée of Judy . [ 1 ]

name: Marin
intro_text: Marin is a male slave who was forced to dress as a mermaid by his owner. [ 1 ]

name: Marine Headquarters Court
intro_text: The Marine Headquarters Court consists of three judges and was seen in Jango's cover story. [ 1 ]

name: Mario
intro_text: Mario is a dog that tore off the arm of a toy citizen of Dressrosa . [ 1 ]

name: Marlon
epithet: "Don Marlon" ( 首領 ・マーロン , Don Māron ? )
intro_text: Don Marlon was a member of the Rocks Pirates and a gangster from the West Blue . He joined Rocks D. Xebec after losing a Davy Back Fight , [ 1 ] but was later killed during the World Government 's abduction of Shakuyaku . [ 3 ]

name: Mash
occupation: Holder of the Takoyaki recipe and sauce
intro_text: Mash is a giant octopus that appeared in Hatchan's Sea-Floor Stroll . [ 1 ]

name: Marumieta
intro_text: Marumieta is the only [ 3 ] daughter of Bimine , the mayor of Pucci . [ 2 ]

name: Mashikaku
intro_text: Chief Petty Officer Mashikaku [ 4 ] is a subordinate of Smoker and Tashigi . However, it is unknown if he remained with the two after they transferred to G-5 as he is not seen with the G-5 Marines.

name: Marshall D. Teach
japanese_name: マーシャル・ D ・ティーチ
english_name: Marshall D. Teech (VIZ, Funimation subs, edited dub); Marshall D. Teach (Funimation uncut dub)
affiliation: Blackbeard Pirates ; Four Emperors ; Clan of D. ( Davy Family ); Seven Warlords of the Sea (former); Whitebeard Pirates 2nd Division (defected)
occupation: Pirate ; Admiral ; Emperor ; Apprentice (former); Warlord of the Sea (former)
epithet: "Blackbeard" ( 黒ひげ , Kurohige ? ) ("Black Beard" in the edited dub)
intro_text: Marshall D. Teach , [ 19 ] most commonly referred to by his epithet "Blackbeard" , [ 2 ] is the admiral of the Blackbeard Pirates , [ 9 ] and one of the Four Emperors that rule over the New World . [ 3 ] He is the son of the legendary pirate Rocks D. Xebec [ 20 ] and his wife Eris , making him a member of the nearly-extinct Davy Family and a descendant of Davy D. Jones , [ 21 ] which is only known to a small number of individuals, including his own crew, the Five Elders , [ 22 ] and Nerona Imu . [ 23 ] He is the only known person in history to wield the powers of two Devil Fruits . [ 24 ] Teach started out his pirate career as an apprentice of the Whitebeard Pirates , then later became a member of the crew's 2nd Division. [ 7 ] However, he murdered Thatch , the 4th Division Commander, in order to steal the Yami Yami no Mi , a rare darkness-based Logia Devil Fruit with the power to nullify the Devil Fruit abilities of others. [ 8 ] He then fled from Whitebeard's crew and, after defeating the infamous 2nd Division Commander Portgas D. Ace and handing him over to the Marines , [ 5 ] was awarded a position among the Seven Warlords of the Sea . He only held the position briefly, though, using it to infiltrate the great underwater prison Impel Down and escaping with multiple infamous Level 6 prisoners recruited into his crew. Upon arriving at the Summit War of Marineford , [ 6 ] he resigned from his position and murdered Whitebeard , mysteriously stealing his quake-generating power . This, along with his victory in the Payback War [ 25 ] and conquest of the majority of Whitebeard's territories during the timeskip , resulted in his acknowledgement as one of the Four Emperors, as well as him being considered a part of the " Worst Generation " along with the eleven Supernovas . [ 26 ] After the Rocky Port Incident , he turned the island of Hachinosu into his base of operations with the ambition of having it officially accepted into the World Government as the Blackbeard Kingdom. [ 27 ] [ 28 ] Teach initially had no bounty ; [ 5 ] however, after resigning from the Seven Warlords, recruiting several dangerous criminals to his crew from Impel Down, and becoming one of the Four Emperors, he received a bounty of 2,247,600,000. [ 18 ] Following the downfalls of Kaidou and Big Mom during the Wano Country Arc , his bounty was increased to 3,996,000,000 for unknown reasons. [ 17 ] Due to his actions throughout the series, namely his current plans and his key role in the deaths of Portgas D. Ace and Whitebeard , Teach serves as a central antagonist of the entire series. During the series' first half , he is an unseen minor antagonist in the Drum Island Arc , a minor antagonist in the Jaya Arc , the secondary antagonist of the Post-Enies Lobby Arc , and the overarching antagonist of the Summit War Saga . During the series' second half , he is a minor antagonist in the Dressrosa Arc and Wano Country Arc , a supporting antagonist in the Egghead Arc , and one of the main antagonists of the Final Saga .

name: Masira
epithet: "Salvage King" Masira ( サルベージ王マシラ , Sarubēji-Ō Mashira ? )
intro_text: "Salvage King" Masira [ 4 ] is the boss ( 園長 , bosu ? ) of the Masira Pirates and the head of a simian ship salvage operation near Jaya Island. His sworn brother is Shoujou and both of them are members of the Saruyama Alliance , headed by Mont Blanc Cricket . He and Shoujou are both fans of Mont Blanc Noland 's exploits and the fairy tale book based on them. He became an ally of the Straw Hat Pirates during the Jaya Arc .

name: Masira Pirates
english_name: Monkey Mt. Allies (4Kids) ; Saruyama Alliance (Funimation) ; Monkey Mountain Allied Force (VIZ) ; Monkey Mountain Alliance ( OPCG )
intro_text: Saruyama Alliance Statistics Japanese Name: 猿山連合軍 Romanized Name: Saruyama Rengō-gun Official English Name: Monkey Mt. Allies (4Kids) ; Saruyama Alliance (Funimation) ; Monkey Mountain Allied Force (VIZ) ; Monkey Mountain Alliance ( OPCG ) First Appearance: Chapter 219 ; Episode 144 [ 2 ] Captain: Mont Blanc Cricket Main Ship: Victory Hunter ; Utan Sonar ; Unnamed Third Ship [ 1 ] Total Bounty: At least 84,000,000 [ bounty 1 ] The Saruyama Alliance (lit. "Monkey Mountain Alliance") is a Pirate Alliance formed between three pirate captains : Mont Blanc Cricket and his surrogate sons, the brothers "Salvage King" Masira and "Sonar King" Shoujou . As an alliance, it joins the brothers' respective crews, the Masira Pirates and the Shoujou Pirates .

name: Massui
intro_text: Massui [ 2 ] is a Waiter in the Beasts Pirates . [ 1 ]

name: Masked Deuce
intro_text: Masked Deuce is an alias used by the first member of Ace 's pirate crew, the Spade Pirates , usually referred to as just "Deuce" or "Deu". He abandoned his real name, which remains unknown, but is known to have come from a prominent East Blue family of medical professionals. [ 2 ] Despite nominally being the head of the crew besides Ace, Deuce could struggle being respected by the crew, often relying on Skull and Mihar , the crew's other officers. [ 3 ] Deuce also came to be referred to as "Doc" by at least Whitebeard after being integrated into the medical staff of the Whitebeard Pirates . [ 4 ] In the non-canon One Piece episode A , Deuce became a journalist for "Big News" Morgans after the dissolution of the Whitebeard Pirates, specializing in the Straw Hat Pirates and the Revolutionary Army . Despite Morgans' protests, he refused to publicize his writings on Ace. [ 5 ]

name: Master of the Sky
epithet: "Master of the Sky" ( 空の主 , Sora no Nushi ? )
intro_text: Nola , [ 6 ] known to many as the Master of the Sky , [ 2 ] is a giant snake who lives on Upper Yard in Skypiea . Having lived for over four centuries, the snake was once the companion of Kalgara and Mont Blanc Noland back when Upper Yard was still part of Jaya . It is the grandchild of the snake Kashigami , whom the Shandia once worshiped as a god. [ 3 ]

name: Master
affiliation: NEO MADS ; Donquixote Pirates (former); Marines (former); MADS (former)
alias: "Cedar" ( シーダー , Shīdā ? ) "'Gangster' Gastino" ( “ギャングスター”ガスティーノ , Gyangusutā Gasutīno ? )
epithet: "Master" ( M , Masutā ? )
intro_text: Caesar Clown , [ 5 ] who was referred to as " Master " by his subordinates, [ 1 ] is a scientist , the leading expert on chemical weapons of mass destruction, [ 5 ] and one of the co-founders of NEO MADS . [ 2 ] Caesar is a former colleague of Vegapunk , having worked with him both in MADS [ 5 ] [ 13 ] and later the World Government research facility on Punk Hazard , [ 5 ] [ 6 ] an island that Caesar went on to devastate with a toxic gas explosion , [ 14 ] earning him a bounty of 300,000,000. [ 11 ] Years later, Caesar returned to the island in secret to continue his illegal experiments [ 5 ] until his defeat at the hands of the Straw Hat Pirates and Trafalgar Law . [ 15 ] One of his projects was the production of SAD , a chemical that he supplied to the Warlord Donquixote Doflamingo to be used in the manufacturing of SMILEs , artificial Devil Fruits which were sold to the Emperor Kaidou to help create an army of Zoans . [ 16 ] After a period as a hostage of the Straw Hat- Heart Pirate Alliance , he fell into the custody of Big Mom on Whole Cake Island . [ 17 ] There, Caesar was liberated by the Fire Tank Pirates and forced to take part in an assassination attempt against Big Mom. [ 18 ] Following the plan's failure, Caesar finally parted ways with his former captors [ 19 ] and escaped with the Vinsmoke Family to the Germa Kingdom , [ 20 ] where he would establish NEO MADS with fellow ex-MADS member Vinsmoke Judge . [ 2 ] Caesar is the main antagonist of the Punk Hazard Arc and a reluctant ally of the Straw Hat Pirates during the Dressrosa Arc , Zou Arc , and Whole Cake Island Arc . He is also a major character in Germa 66's Ahh... An Emotionless Excursion Cover Page Serial.

name: Matryo Princesses
intro_text: The Matryo Princesses are the princesses of the Roshwan Kingdom . [ 1 ] Their names, in order from largest to smallest, are Matryosaka ( マトリョーサカ ? ) , [ 2 ] Matryosuka ( マトリョースカ ? ) , [ 3 ] Matryoseka ( マトリョーセカ ? ) , [ 4 ] and Matryosoka ( マトリョーソカ ? ) . [ 5 ]

name: Mato
intro_text: Mato [ 3 ] is a notorious giant bartendress from Elbaph . [ 1 ]

name: Matsuge
english_name: Eyelashes (VIZ), Eyelash (4Kids, Funimation dub), Lashes (Funimation subs), Matsuge ( WT100 )
intro_text: Matsuge [ 4 ] is a yasa camel who accompanied the Straw Hat Pirates during the Arabasta Arc . He is classified as a Type-A creature, "Big Friendly" [ 5 ] and currently works as a member of the Super Spot-Billed Duck Troops .

name: Maujii
affiliation: Tontatta Kingdom ; Tontatta Pirates ; Straw Hat Grand Fleet
intro_text: Maujii [ 3 ] is a dwarf from Tontatta Kingdom and the aide of Princess Mansherry . [ 1 ]

name: Mayushika
intro_text: Mayushika [ 3 ] is one of the Shandia warriors who fought against Enel .

name: McKinley
intro_text: McKinley is a member of God Guardians (previously known as the White Berets), Skypiea 's police force. [ 1 ] He initially serves as a minor antagonist in the Skypiea Arc , but later becomes an (indirect) ally to the Straw Hat Pirates .

name: McGuy
epithet: "Thunder Lord" ( 雷卿 , Raikyō ? )
intro_text: "Thunder Lord" McGuy is an infamous New World pirate captain who allied with Whitebeard . [ 1 ]

name: Meadows
intro_text: Meadows is a gladiator who competed in the Corrida Colosseum for the Mera Mera no Mi . [ 1 ]

name: Maynard
alias: "Capman" ( キャップマン , Kyappuman ? )
epithet: "Maynard the Pursuer" ( 追撃のメイナード , Tsuigeki no Meinādo ? )
intro_text: Maynard the Pursuer is a vice admiral who appears in the Dressrosa Arc . He was registered as a gladiator to compete at the Corrida Colosseum for the Mera Mera no Mi , but was defeated before he could participate. [ 1 ]

name: Marines
english_name: Navy ( VIZ , 4Kids , edited Funimation dub, Odex); Marines (Funimation, live-action series )
intro_text: Marines Statistics Japanese Name: 海軍 Romanized Name: Kaigun Official English Name: Navy ( VIZ , 4Kids , edited Funimation dub, Odex); Marines (Funimation, live-action series ) First Appearance: Chapter 3 ; Episode 1 Affiliation: World Government Fleet Admiral : Sakazuki (Current) Sengoku (Former) Kong (Former) The Marines are the seaborne military forces of the World Government , responsible for maritime law enforcement and naval warfare. They maintain a presence on all of the world 's known seas, through countless branch offices ; however, the vast majority of their forces are focused on the Grand Line , in which resides their base of operations, Marine Headquarters . Collectively, they stand as one of the Three Great Powers , alongside the Four Emperors and the Seven Warlords of the Sea (prior to their replacement by the Seraphim ). Due to their actions and role, they are one of the major antagonist groups of the series overall, specifically serving as the main antagonists of the Romance Dawn , Loguetown , Enies Lobby , Sabaody Archipelago , Marineford , Return to Sabaody and Egghead Arcs. They are also antagonists in various non-canon material, such as the Warship Island , Goat Island , G-8 and Marine Rookie filler arcs, the fifth and eleventh movies, and the third , sixth and tenth specials.

name: Medaka Mermaid Quintuplets
japanese_name: メダカの人魚の五つ子
intro_text: The Medaka Mermaid Quintuplets are five young Japanese rice fish mermaids who are friends with Camie . Their names are Ichika ( イチカ ? ) , Nika ( ニカ ? ) , Sanka ( サンカ ? ) , Yonka ( ヨンカ ? ) , and Yonka Two ( ヨンカツー , Yonka Tsū ? ) . [ 1 ]

name: Mecha-Shark
intro_text: The Mecha-Shark is a cyborg shark created by Vegapunk [ 1 ] alongside the Sea Beast Weapons .

name: Merfolk
intro_text: Merfolk Statistics Japanese Name: 人魚 Romanized Name: Ningyo Official English Name: Merfolk (Mermaid; Merman) First Appearance: Chapter 195 (cover page); Episode 306 [ 1 ] Features: Fish-like tail Homeland: Fish-Man Island [ 2 ] Slave Price: Young female: 70,000,000 Parted females: 10,000,000 Males: 1,000,000 [ 3 ] Merfolk are one of the two major humanoid races that inhabit the sea (the other being the fish-men ). Both races are ruled by the Great Knight of the Sea, King Neptune .

name: Megalo
intro_text: Megalo is a shark that lives on Fish-Man Island . He is the beloved pet of princess Shirahoshi [ 3 ] and former pet of the Neptune Army. [ 2 ]

name: Mero
intro_text: Mero is a smelt-whiting mermaid and one of the top five Mermaid Cafe Dancers . [ 2 ] [ 1 ]

name: Mezasuzowan Pisuo
japanese_name: メザスゾワン・ピースオ
intro_text: Mezasuzowan Pisuo [ 3 ] is a member of the Germ Pirates . [ 2 ]

name: Mihar
epithet: "Indoor Mihar" ( インドアのミハール , Indoa no Mihāru ? )
intro_text: "Indoor" Mihar [ 2 ] is a member of the Spade Pirates and, subsequently, the Whitebeard Pirates . [ 1 ]

name: Merry
intro_text: Merry is Kaya 's butler, and the original designer of the Going Merry . He is an ally of the Straw Hat Pirates during the Syrup Village Arc .

name: Mikio Itoo
intro_text: Mikio Itoo is a background joke character created by Eiichiro Oda , and arguably the first Easter Egg featured in One Piece . [ 4 ] He is a caricature of Mikio Ito ( いとうみきお , Itō Mikio ? ) , a Yokohama -born manga creator whom Oda knew as a fellow assistant to Nobuhiro Watsuki . Like Oda, Ito went on to publish his own series in Weekly Shonen Jump , such as Normandy Secret Club and Mysterious Murasame-kun . Within the world of One Piece , Itoo appears to be a wanted gunman with a bounty of one million yen . How many belly this would amount to is unknown.

name: Mikazuki
intro_text: Mikazuki [ 3 ] is the captain and only named member of the Big Helmet Pirates .

name: Miles
intro_text: Miles is a trumpetfish merman [ 2 ] and a trumpeter in a swing jazz orchestra from Fish-Man Island . [ 1 ]

name: Michael and Hoichael
japanese_name: マイケル ホイケル
intro_text: Michael and Hoichael are two troublemaker children in the backstreets of Water 7 . They idolize Franky , and even dress like him and use his motto as their own: "Mm, super!!", and similarly idolize Paulie . [ 1 ] However, their backstreet delinquency has earned them ire from at least Tilestone and Peepley Lulu . [ 5 ] Before the timeskip , they were part of class 6-5 of the Water 7 Back Alley Elementary School ( ウォーターセブン裏町小学校 , Wōtā Sebun Uramachi Shōgakkō ? , VIZ: "Water Seven Back Alley Elementary School") backstreet elementary school. [ 1 ]

name: Millet Pine
intro_text: Millet Pine [ 4 ] was the torturer ( 拷問係 , gōmon-gakari ? ) [ 3 ] of the Roger Pirates until the crew's dissolution. [ 1 ]

name: Milky
intro_text: Milky [ 3 ] is a reindeer mink and a member of the Guardians . [ 2 ]

name: Minatomo
intro_text: Minatomo is a legendary carpenter in Wano Country and the leader of a guild that Franky joined to get access to the blueprints of Kaidou 's fortress . [ 2 ] He is related to another person, whose name is also Minatomo , who is a descendant of someone who traveled from Wano to East Blue . [ 3 ]

name: Milo
alias: Onepoco ( ワンポコ , Wanpoko ? , Viz: Onepoko)
intro_text: Milo is a citizen of Dressrosa . While he was a toy , he was known as " Onepoco ". [ 1 ]

name: Minister of the Right
intro_text: The Minister of the Right is a seahorse merman in service to King Neptune . While it is not clear exactly what his job entails, he appears to have some administrative and military duties. He also appears to be a guard or commander as he and the other guards hurried to the princess when she needed help. His actual name is unknown.

name: Mink Tribe
intro_text: Mink Tribe Statistics Japanese Name: ミンク族 Romanized Name: Minku-zoku Official English Name: Minks Mink Tribe (Funimation) [ 1 ] First Appearance: Chapter 498 ; Episode 392 [ 2 ] Features: Furry Mammalian-like humanoids Homeland: Zou [ 3 ] Slave Price: 700,000 [ 4 ] The Mink Tribe , also known as the Warrior Beast Tribe ( 戦獣民族 , Senjū-minzoku ? , English versions: "Battlebeast Tribe") , are a race of humanoids with furry mammalian features. Most live in the Mokomo Dukedom on top of Zou , where their tribe has remained largely isolated from human civilizations for 1,000 years. [ 3 ] They were first mentioned in the list of slave prices that Duval showed to Sanji . [ 4 ]

name: Millions
intro_text: Baroque Works Statistics Japanese Name: バロックワークス Romanized Name: Barokku Wākusu Official English Name: Baroque Works First Appearance: Chapter 103 ; Episode 62 [ 1 ] Occupation: Underworld bounty hunters [ 2 ] President: Mr. 0 [ 3 ] Transport: Baroque Works Ships ; Banchi Coach Total Bounty: At least 389,700,000 [ bounty 1 ] Baroque Works [ 2 ] was a criminal syndicate created by the Warlord Crocodile to destabilize and conquer the Arabasta Kingdom (and, by extension, acquire the ancient superweapon Pluton ). For this sole purpose, it conducted countless acts of espionage, sabotage, and murder over a span of years, ultimately manipulating Arabasta into civil war. [ 4 ] [ 5 ] While the syndicate mostly employed common bounty hunters and mercenaries (motivated [ 3 ] by the half-truth that they were building a new, "ideal" nation), its elite members contained highly formidable warriors and spies. Despite multiple setbacks, its endgame Operation Utopia [ 6 ] nearly succeeded in every objective, and was only narrowly stopped by the combined efforts of Princess Nefertari Vivi , the Straw Hat Pirates , and a unit of Marines led by then- Captain Smoker . After Operation Utopia's failure, the syndicate was exposed and dismantled, with Crocodile and most of his subordinates—many personally defeated by the Straw Hats—arrested by the Marines. In time, however, many of them would escape and continue to impact world events . Due to their actions and role, they are collectively the main antagonists of the Arabasta Saga , with varying members being the focus of each individual arc (excluding the Drum Island Arc ). Several ex-members also serve as the protagonists of the Miss Goldenweek's "Operation: Meet Baroque Works" cover arc , and supporting characters in the Impel Down Arc and Marineford Arc .

name: Minister of the Left
intro_text: The Minister of the Left is a catfish merman in service of King Neptune . While it is not clear what his job entails, it appears to involve some sort of administrative and military duties. His actual name is currently unknown.

name: Minochihuahua
intro_text: Minochihuahua is the newest Jailer Beast in Impel Down . He is an Awakened Zoan Devil Fruit user who ate a fruit that allows him to turn into a chihuahua.

name: Minorhinoceros
intro_text: Minorhinoceros is one of the five Jailer Beasts of Impel Down . He is an Awakened Zoan Devil Fruit user, having eaten a Devil Fruit that allows him to turn into a blue rhinoceros. [ 3 ] Due to his actions, he can be considered a supporting antagonist of the Impel Down Arc .

name: Minoruba
intro_text: Minoruba [ 3 ] is a bounty hunter on Sabaody Archipelago . [ 1 ]

name: Minotaurus
intro_text: Minotaurus is one of Impel Down 's Jailer Beasts . [ 4 ] [ 2 ] He is an awakened Zoan Devil Fruit user who ate a fruit that allows him to turn into a Holstein cow. [ 5 ] Due to his actions, he can be considered a supporting antagonist of the Impel Down Arc .

name: Misery
intro_text: Misery is a homie created by Big Mom as an attack during the Raid on Onigashima . She is formed from the Maser Saber combination of Prometheus , Hera , and Napoleon . [ 1 ]

name: Minozebra
intro_text: Minozebra is one of the five Jailer Beasts of Impel Down . [ 3 ] He is an Awakened Zoan Devil Fruit user that ate a fruit that allows him to turn into a zebra. [ 4 ] Due to his actions, he can be considered a supporting antagonist of the Impel Down Arc .

name: Minokoala
intro_text: Minokoala is one of the five Jailer Beasts of Impel Down . He is an Awakened Zoan Devil Fruit user that ate a fruit that allows him to turn into a koala. [ 3 ] Due to his actions, he can be considered a supporting antagonist of the Impel Down Arc .

She is one of the main antagonists of the Whisky Peak Arc and a tertiary antagonist of the Little Garden Arc .

intro_text: Nico Robin , [ 17 ] also known by her epithet "Devil Child" [ 7 ] and the "Light of the Revolution" , [ 8 ] is the archaeologist of the Straw Hat Pirates and one of the Senior Officers of the Straw Hat Grand Fleet . [ 3 ] She is the seventh member of the crew and the sixth to join, doing so at the end of the Arabasta Arc . She temporarily left the crew during the Water 7 Arc but rejoined during the Enies Lobby Arc . Born into a family of archaeologists, Robin is the daughter of Nico Olvia . Robin ate the Hana Hana no Mi at a young age, giving her the power to reproduce her body parts (or her entire body) on any surface at will. As the sole survivor of the destroyed West Blue island Ohara , she is currently one of only two people in the world known to have the ability to read and decipher Poneglyphs , a skill which is considered forbidden and threatening to the World Government . She acted as the vice president and supreme commander of Baroque Works as "Miss All Sunday" , [ 1 ] serving and partnering herself directly with the organization's president; the ex- Warlord : Crocodile , who operated under the codename "Mr. 0". She was the secondary antagonist of the Arabasta Arc and Saga , before joining the Straw Hats. Her dream is to find the Rio Poneglyph which tells the true history of the world, specifically the Void Century . She gained a bounty of 79,000,000 at the age of 8 due to her ability to read poneglyphs after the destruction of Ohara. It later increased to 80,000,000 after the Straw Hats invaded Enies Lobby to rescue her and escape. After the Dressrosa Arc , it was increased to 130,000,000. Following the Raid on Onigashima , her bounty was increased to 930,000,000. [ 3 ]

intro_text: "Poison Spider" Zala , [ 4 ] better known by her alias Miss Doublefinger , was the second highest ranking female officer agent in the secret organization known as Baroque Works . As an officer agent, she was partnered with Mr. 1 . [ 3 ] She also used the alias of Paula while she acted as the owner of Spiders Cafe in Arabasta . She was a major antagonist during the Arabasta Arc . After the group's dissolution, she went back to being the owner of the New Spiders Cafe alongside most of her Baroque Works colleagues. [ 7 ]

intro_text: Marianne , [ 4 ] also known as the "Flag-Bearer of Freedom" and more commonly by her alias Miss Goldenweek , is a former officer agent of Baroque Works and the partner of Mr. 3 . [ 3 ] She is currently working as a painter at the new Spider's Cafe alongside many of her former colleagues. [ 2 ] She is the secondary antagonist of the Little Garden Arc and the protagonist in Miss Goldenweek's "Operation: Meet Baroque Works" .

name: Miss Friday
intro_text: Miss Friday is a vulture and a member of the criminal organization Baroque Works , being a part of the Unluckies ( 13日の金曜日 , Anrakkīzu ? ) along with Mr. 13 . They were a team that served as messengers for Mr. 0 and were also responsible for executing any Baroque Works agents that fail their missions. [ 1 ] She is classified as a Type D creature, "Small Savage". [ 4 ]

[ 1 ] She was a major antagonist during the Arabasta Arc . After the downfall of Baroque Works, she works as a "princess" at the new Spiders Cafe alongside most of her former colleagues.

intro_text: Nefertari Vivi [ 10 ] is the princess of the Arabasta Kingdom . [ 2 ] She is the daughter of Nefertari Cobra and Titi , and along with the rest of her family, she bears the initial D. in her name. [ 11 ] During her childhood, Vivi was part of the Sand-Sand Clan , being the vice-leader of the group led by her friend Koza . Vivi debuted as one of the main antagonists of the Reverse Mountain Arc as a Bounty Hunter , under the Baroque Works codename Miss Wednesday . [ 1 ] During this time, she was partnered with fellow Frontier Agent , Mr. 9 . However, after the events of the Whisky Peak Arc , Vivi and her pet duck Karoo ended up joining the Straw Hat Pirates for most of the Arabasta Saga once she was discovered to be a spy plotting against Baroque Works. Vivi left the Straw Hats after defeating Baroque Works to stay in her home country, [ 12 ] but is still considered a member of the crew and has been keeping track of their progress throughout the series. [ 13 ] After attending the most recent Levely , she became a fugitive after Imu and the Five Elders learned she carried the "D." initial , and was forced to flee Mary Geoise and take shelter alongside Wapol aboard Morgans ' airship.

name: Mjosgard

intro_text: Saint Donquixote Mjosgard was a World Noble and member of the Donquixote Family , one of the 20 royal families that founded the World Government . [ 4 ] After an attempt to recapture his freed fish-man slaves went awry, Mjosgard met Queen Otohime of Fish-Man Island 's Ryugu Kingdom [ 1 ] and became their ally and a supporter of their efforts to integrate with humans, opposing the extreme racism typically associated with the World Nobles' normal ideology. During the most recent Levely , he would directly oppose other World Nobles from threatening Otohime's family, [ 4 ] which resulted in his execution. [ 5 ] [ 2 ]
