intro_text: Mohji the Beast Tamer [ 6 ] is a pirate and the first mate of the Buggy Pirates and a member of the Buggy and Alvida Alliance . He is a pet tamer, usually accompanied by his pet lion Richie . [ 3 ] He was a member of Buggy's Delivery , and now currently a member of Cross Guild . Due to his actions, he can be considered the secondary antagonist of the Orange Town Arc , and a minor antagonist in the Loguetown Arc .

name: Mokomo Dukedom
intro_text: Mokomo Dukedom Statistics Japanese Name: モコモ公国 Romanized Name: Mokomo Kōkoku English Name: Mokomo Dukedom First appearance: Chapter 804 ; Episode 753 [ 1 ] Region: New World ( Zou ) The Mokomo Dukedom [ 2 ] is the civilization developed by the Mink Tribe on the living island of Zou in the New World . [ 3 ] In the past, it was led by Hitsugisukan , [ 4 ] who was succeeded by the "Ruler of Day," Duke Inuarashi , and the "Ruler of Night," Master Nekomamushi . [ 5 ] The two rulers then retired at the end of Wano Country Arc to become Kouzuki Momonosuke 's retainers, entrusting the nation to Carrot . [ 6 ]

name: Momoo
occupation: Arlong Pirates' pet (former); Caribou Pirates' steed (former)
epithet: "Momoo the Sea Cow" ( 海牛モーム , Kaigyū Mōmu ? )
intro_text: Momoo [ 5 ] is a giant sea cow from the Grand Line , and the first Sea Beast seen in the series. [ 6 ] [ 7 ] He is classified as a Type A creature, "Big Friendly". [ 8 ] Originally, he was utilized by the Arlong Pirates as a method of intimidation towards the residents of the Conomi Islands . After Arlong's defeat, he was captured and briefly employed as a draft animal by the Caribou Pirates .

name: Momonga
occupation: Vice Admiral ; Base Commander of G-1
intro_text: Vice Admiral Momonga [ 5 ] is a Marine officer and the Base Commander of the G-1 Marine Base. [ 2 ] He was one of the five Vice Admirals who had led the Buster Call on Enies Lobby . [ 1 ] He served as a minor antagonist of the Marineford Arc .

name: Momoiro Island
intro_text: Momoiro Island Statistics Japanese Name: モモイロ 島 Romanized Name: Momoiro Airando English Name: Peachy Island First appearance: Chapter 523 ; Episode 419 [ 1 ] Region: Paradise Affiliates: Revolutionary Army Momoiro Island is an island in Paradise . It is located close to the Lulusia Kingdom . [ 2 ] The island is filled with pink animals and plants. It is home to the Kamabakka Kingdom ( カマバッカ王国 , Kamabakka Ōkoku ? , "Kamabakka Queendom" in the Viz Manga) , a place where "those with a heart of a maiden" gather. The name of the kingdom literally translates to "full of transvestites ", which is exactly what the island is filled with. Sanji was sent to this island by Bartholomew Kuma during the events of Sabaody Archipelago Arc , but still spent two years on the island honing his skills. The leader of the island is the revolutionary "Queen" Emporio Ivankov , who escaped from Impel Down 's level 5.5 and returned to the island with a crew of newkama. After the destruction of Baltigo , the Revolutionary Army moved their base of operations to this island. [ 2 ]

name: Monda
intro_text: Monda is a Star Shark and a former pet animal of the Foxy Pirates . [ 1 ] He left the crew sometime during the Timeskip .

name: Monjii
intro_text: Monjii [ 2 ] is a monkey mink . [ 1 ]

name: Monet
occupation: Caesar's secretary (Undercover); Doflamingo's spy; Pirate Officer
intro_text: Monet was a scout and assistant for Caesar Clown and his underlings in the research facility on Punk Hazard . [ 7 ] She was, in truth, a member and officer [ 3 ] of the Donquixote Pirates and was sent as a deep cover agent by Doflamingo . [ 2 ] [ 8 ] She was also the older sister of Sugar . [ 9 ] Due to her mission and actions, she could be regarded as the tertiary antagonist of the Punk Hazard Arc .

name: Momonosuke
english_name: Kozuki Momonosuke (VIZ); Kouzuki Momonosuke ( WT100 , OPCG )
residence: Wano Country ( Kuri ); Flower Capital (Shogun Castle)
devil_fruit_name: Uo Uo no Mi, Model: Seiryu ( Artificial )
devil_fruit_english_name: Fish-Fish Fruit, Model: Azure Dragon Fish-Fish Fruit, Azure Dragon Model
intro_text: Kouzuki Momonosuke [ 12 ] is the current shogun of Wano Country . [ 4 ] A member of the Kouzuki Family , he is the son of the late daimyo of Kuri Kouzuki Oden and his wife Toki , the grandson of the former shogun Sukiyaki , and the older brother of Hiyori . Momonosuke was born 28 years ago while his parents were sailing with the Whitebeard Pirates . [ 5 ] Though rightfully the heir to the shogunate after Oden, the Kouzuki Family was deposed by the Kurozumi Family during Oden's travels, and attempts were made on Momonosuke's life by Kurozumi Orochi 's administration. [ 13 ] Oden was executed when Momonosuke was 8, and Orochi and Kaidou began waging open warfare to eliminate the Kouzuki bloodline. To keep Momonosuke safe, Toki sent him 20 years forward in time with several of his retainers. [ 14 ] Upon reappearing, Momonosuke and his men went out to sea to recruit allies for a planned battle against Orochi and Kaidou. To conceal his identity, Momonosuke pretended to be the son of his retainer Kin'emon . Throughout their voyage, return to Wano, and climactic battle with Kaidou's forces, Momonosuke steadily grew to accept and assume his role as the leader of the Kouzuki Family and their allies. [ 3 ] To be of better use during the conflict, Momonosuke had his retainer Shinobu use her Juku Juku ability to age his body 20 years, though he remains a child mentally. [ 8 ] The Ninja-Pirate-Mink-Samurai Alliance emerged victorious from this war, and Momonosuke attained his rightful position of shogun to unanimous support from the Wano citizens; he would go on to be renowned as one of Wano's greatest leaders. [ 4 ] He was first mentioned when Kin'emon told Sanji that he came to Punk Hazard to rescue his "son". [ 15 ] His given name was revealed when the samurai was asking if the captive children in the Biscuits Room had seen him, [ 16 ] and his clan name was revealed when Kin'emon spoke of his true heritage. [ 3 ] He is a major ally of the Straw Hat Pirates during the entirety of the Dressrosa and Wano Country Sagas .

name: Monjiro
intro_text: Monjiro is a samurai who allied with the Kouzuki Family . [ 3 ] After waiting 20 years for the return of the Nine Red Scabbards , he affiliated with the Ninja-Pirate-Mink-Samurai Alliance to raid Onigashima . [ 1 ]

name: Monster
intro_text: Monster [ 7 ] is one of the Senior Officers and musicians [ 5 ] of the Red Hair Pirates . [ 4 ] He first appeared playing with his crew at the Partys Bar . [ 2 ]

name: Mont Blanc Noland
japanese_name: モンブラン・ノーランド
english_name: Mont Blanc Noland [ Note 1 ] Montblanc Noland [ Note 2 ] Monbran Noland [ Note 3 ] Mombran Noland [ Note 4 ]
epithet: "Liar Noland" ( うそつきノーランド , Usotsuki Nōrando ? )
intro_text: Mont Blanc Noland [ 2 ] was an admiral in the Lvneel Kingdom and a famous explorer who made multiple trips into the Grand Line . He discovered a City of Gold on Jaya , but found upon returning there with Lvneel's king that it had disappeared , causing him to be executed. He was then memorialized in a fairy tale as a liar and trickster.

name: Moodie
intro_text: Moodie [ 4 ] is a woman who Fullbody took to the Baratie . [ 2 ]

name: Monkey D. Garp
japanese_name: モンキー・ D ・ガープ
epithet: "Garp the Fist" ( ゲンコツのガープ , Genkotsu no Gāpu ? ) ; Hero of the Marines ( 海軍の英雄 , Kaigun no Eiyū ? ) (VIZ: "Naval Hero")
intro_text: Monkey D. Garp , [ 12 ] also known as "Garp the Fist" , [ 7 ] is an extremely famous and powerful Marine Vice Admiral . He is the father of Monkey D. Dragon , [ 13 ] the paternal grandfather of Monkey D. Luffy , [ 14 ] and the adoptive grandfather of Portgas D. Ace . He was responsible for overseeing Ace's birth and raising a young Luffy, before entrusting them both to the Dadan Family . A contemporary of Gol D. Roger in his prime, Garp came to be known as the only Marine that could seriously challenge the Pirate King, with feats to match; his participation in the God Valley Incident , that led to the defeat and disbanding of the infamous Rocks Pirates , won him the title "Hero of the Marines" . [ 15 ] At the same time, he has mentored many younger Marines into prominence, including once-Admiral Kuzan and SWORD members Koby and Helmeppo . [ 16 ] After Ace's death at the Summit War of Marineford , Garp became an instructor to focus on training new recruits; [ 5 ] while the public believes him to be retired, he still retains the rank of Vice Admiral. [ 17 ] During his mission to rescue Koby from the Blackbeard Pirates , Garp was badly injured and imprisoned on Hachinosu , [ 18 ] being officially declared "missing in action" by the Marines. [ 19 ] Garp was first introduced during the Diary of Koby-Meppo cover arc , where he first took charge of training Koby and Helmeppo . Due to his actions, he is the main antagonist of the Post-Enies Lobby Arc and a supporting antagonist in the Marineford Arc .

name: Monkey D. Luffy
japanese_name: モンキー・ D ・ルフィ
affiliation: Straw Hat Pirates ; Straw Hat Grand Fleet ; Four Emperors ; Clan of D. ; Dadan Family (former); Baratie (temporary, former); Impel Down (former); Ninja-Pirate-Mink-Samurai Alliance (disbanded)
occupation: Pirate Captain ; Emperor ; Senior Captain of the Grand Fleet; Prisoner (former); Chore Boy (temporary, former); Bandit (former)
alias: Lucy ( ルーシー , Rūshī ? ) Luffy-tarou ( ルフィ太郎 , Rufitarō ? , English versions: "Luffytaro") Luffy-no-Umi ( ルフィの海 , Rufinoumi ? ) Joy Boy ( ジョイボーイ , Joi Bōi ? )
epithet: Straw Hat Luffy ( 麦わらのルフィ , Mugiwara no Rufi ? )
devil_fruit_name: Gomu Gomu no Mi (Hito Hito no Mi, Model: Nika )
intro_text: Monkey D. Luffy , commonly known as "Straw Hat Luffy" or simply "Straw Hat" , [ 10 ] is the founder and captain of the Straw Hat Pirates . [ 26 ] [ 27 ] He pursues the legendary treasure of the late Gol D. Roger in order to become the new Pirate King [ 28 ] and reach a further, untold dream (currently known to only his crew, family and closest friends). [ 29 ] [ 30 ] He believes that being the Pirate King means having the most freedom in the world . [ 31 ] Born on Dawn Island , Luffy is the son of Revolutionary leader Monkey D. Dragon [ 32 ] and grandson of the Marine hero Monkey D. Garp [ 33 ] and as such is a member of the Clan of D . Most of his childhood was shaped by Garp and Curly Dadan , [ 34 ] under whose care he befriended and swore brotherhood to the late Portgas D. Ace [ 35 ] and Sabo . [ 36 ] However, he draws his greatest inspiration from the pirate Shanks , who (unwittingly) enabled him to eat the Devil Fruit that turned his body into rubber , [ 37 ] sacrificed an arm to save his life, and gifted his signature straw hat as a symbol of their vow to reunite someday, after Luffy became a great pirate. [ 38 ] As a pirate, Luffy has actively opposed countless regional, national, and global powers, beginning with several established East Blue pirates and extending to the Marines, the Seven Warlords of the Sea , Cipher Pol , the World Nobles and Five Elders , and even the Four Emperors of the New World . Despite his young age and relatively short career, he has triumphed over a majority of these, successfully invading and indirectly causing the annihilation of Enies Lobby , escaping the impregnable Impel Down , enabling several key developments in the Summit War of Marineford , and defeating three Warlords and an Emperor in direct combat. At the same time, he carries a great penchant for attracting friends and allies; in addition to personally engaging every member of his crew, he has earned regard and gratitude among many nations, fellow pirates, the Revolutionary Army, and even several Marines. Luffy has gained worldwide infamy through his accomplishments, heritage, and general recklessness, drawing many large bounties [ 23 ] [ 22 ] [ 21 ] [ 20 ] [ 19 ] [ 18 ] as well as the focused hostility of the World Government , Marine Headquarters , and Fleet Admiral Sakazuki in particular. [ 39 ] Currently, he is recognized as a central member of the Worst Generation , [ 40 ] the unwilling leader of the seven-crew Straw Hat Grand Fleet , and—in wake of defeating Kaidou during the Raid on Onigashima —one of the Four Emperors , with a bounty of 3,000,000,000. [ 4 ] Since the awakening of the Gomu Gomu no Mi for the first time in centuries, Luffy has also been heralded as the second coming of Joy Boy , as well as the current incarnation of the Sun God, Nika . He is the main protagonist of the One Piece manga and anime series .

name: Moon
intro_text: Moon Statistics Japanese Name: 月 Romanized Name: Tsuki English Name: Moon First appearance: Chapter 5 [ 1 ] ; Episode 12 [ 2 ] Region: Outer space The Moon is a giant celestial body, a rock-composed sphere, that orbits the Blue Planet . For the world's inhabitants, it is typically the main (if not only) source of natural light at nighttime.

name: Moon Isaac Jr.
japanese_name: ムーン・アイザック Jr.
intro_text: Moon Isaac Jr. [ 3 ] was a member of the Roger Pirates and their tactical staff officer ( 戦術参謀 , senjutsu sanbō ? ) [ 2 ] until the crew's dissolution. His current whereabouts and status are unknown. [ 1 ]

name: Monkey D. Dragon
japanese_name: モンキー・ D ・ドラゴン
affiliation: Revolutionary Army ; Clan of D. ; Freedom Fighters (former); Marines (defected)
occupation: Supreme Commander of the Revolutionary Army; Captain of the Freedom Fighters (former)
epithet: "Rebellious Dragon" ( 反逆竜 , Hangyaku Ryū ? , Funimation: "The Insurgent Serpent") "World's Worst Criminal" ( 世界最悪の犯罪者 , Sekai Saiaku no Hanzaisha ? , Funimation: "World's Most Heinous Criminal")
intro_text: Monkey D. Dragon , [ 10 ] also known as the "Rebellious Dragon" , [ 7 ] is the supreme commander [ 6 ] and founder of the Revolutionary Army (originally the Freedom Fighters ). [ 3 ] A former Marine , his disgust with the organization's actions in the God Valley Incident , and its brutality in the Ohara Incident led to him forming the Revolutionary Army to oppose the World Government in its entirety. [ 4 ] Having campaigned toward its downfall for over thirty years, he is labeled the " World's Worst Criminal ". [ 5 ] Dragon is the father of Monkey D. Luffy and the son of Monkey D. Garp , and likewise was born and raised in the Goa Kingdom . [ 2 ] He was also responsible for saving Sabo 's life after a World Noble attack, eventually raising the boy into his second-in-command. Dragon was first introduced in the Loguetown Arc , where he helped Luffy escape from Marine captain Smoker 's clutches. Since then, he has periodically appeared as a key background character.

name: Morgan
occupation: Marine Captain (former); Marine Lieutenant Commander (former); Marine Chief Petty Officer (former)
epithet: Axe-Hand Morgan ( 斧手のモーガン , Onote no Mōgan ? )
intro_text: "Axe-Hand" Morgan [ 4 ] is a former Marine captain , the father of Helmeppo and the first significant Marine officer to appear in the storyline. [ 1 ] After his defeat by Monkey D. Luffy and Roronoa Zoro , he was stripped of his rank for his many abuses of power. He is the third antagonist of the Romance Dawn Arc , serving as the main antagonist of the Shells Town subsection. He is also the main antagonist of the Diary of Koby-Meppo cover-page serial.

name: Morgans
occupation: World Economy News Paper President; Emperor of the Underworld
epithet: "Big News" ( ビッグニュース , Biggu Nyūsu ? )
devil_fruit_name: Tori Tori no Mi, Model: Albatross
devil_fruit_english_name: Tweet-Tweet Fruit, Albatross Model (Crunchy subs) Bird-Bird Fruit, Model: Albatross (One Piece Official YouTube Channel)
intro_text: "Big News" Morgans is the president of the World Economy News Paper and one of the emperors of the Underworld . [ 3 ] His first appearance was during the Whole Cake Island Arc , as one of the more high-profile guests in Big Mom's Tea Party . Since then, Morgans has been a frequent figure in the world 's ongoings, usually by being the first to report on them to the general public.

name: Moqueca
intro_text: Moqueca [ 3 ] is the king of the Samba Kingdom ( サンバ王国 , Sanba Ōkoku ? ) in the South Blue and one of fifty monarchs who took part in the Levely . [ 2 ] [ 3 ]

name: Mororon
intro_text: Mororon is the queen of the Tajine Kingdom and one of fifty monarchs who took part in the Levely . [ 1 ]

name: Mont Blanc Cricket
japanese_name: モンブラン・クリケット
english_name: Mont Blanc Cricket (Viz), Montblanc Cricket (Uncut Funimation), Monbran Cricket (Edited Funimation), Mombran Cricket (4Kids)
affiliation: Saruyama Alliance ; Mont Blanc Family ; His original crew (former)
intro_text: Mont Blanc Cricket [ 2 ] is an inhabitant of Jaya , living in a small home behind the façade of a castle. He is the distant descendant of Mont Blanc Noland [ 4 ] and the "Last Boss" ( 最終園長 , Rasuto Bosu ? ) of the Saruyama Alliance . [ 1 ] He is an ally of the Straw Hat Pirates during the Jaya Arc , and led the Saruyama Alliance in helping them reach Skypiea .

name: Mosa
intro_text: Mosa is a mysterious friend of Loki . [ 1 ]

name: Morley
occupation: West Army Commander of the Revolutionary Army; Pirate (former); Prisoner of Impel Down (former)
epithet: "Morley of Fur" ( 毛皮のモーリー , Kegawa no Mōrī ? )
intro_text: Morley of Fur is a giant and a newkama , [ 4 ] as well as the commander of the West Army in the Revolutionary Army . [ 1 ] Morley's existence was first alluded by Emporio Ivankov during the Impel Down Arc , as the one responsible for the creation of Newkama Land . [ 5 ]

name: Mornin
intro_text: Mornin [ 2 ] is the mayor of Syrup Village , and one of several villagers who used Usopp 's antics as a makeshift alarm clock.

name: Mosh
intro_text: Mosh [ 2 ] is a member of the Kid Pirates . [ 1 ]

name: Mottled
intro_text: Mottled [ 1 ] [ 4 ] is a Sea King . [ 2 ] It is one of the six Sea Kings that speak to Shirahoshi when she fully manifests the power of Poseidon . [ 5 ]

name: Motobaro
intro_text: Motobaro is the pet bison of Duval . [ 1 ] He is used by Duval as a steed, and can also swim on water.

name: Mountain God
intro_text: The Mountain God , respectfully called Yama-san ( 山さん , Yama-san ? , VIZ Media: Yama) by Kouzuki Oden and his retainers, [ 2 ] is a giant boar that lived in the forests of Wano Country as late as thirty years ago. In what became known as the Mountain God Incident , it was cut down by Kouzuki Oden during its attack on Flower Capital , [ 4 ] but it ultimately survived the ordeal. [ 2 ] It later became a retainer of the Kouzuki Family alongside its child, Koyama . [ 3 ]

name: Mouthto Mouthyan
japanese_name: マウストゥー・マウスヤン
intro_text: Mouthto Mouthyan [ 2 ] is a citizen of Dressrosa . [ 1 ]

name: Motzel
intro_text: Mr. Motzel [ 3 ] is a gourmand and one of the known customers of the Baratie . [ 1 ]

name: Mousse
intro_text: Mousse was the daughter of Kalgara and Herb [ 3 ] and was considered the most beautiful of the Shandia women on the island of Jaya four hundred years ago. [ 4 ]

name: Moyle
occupation: Member of the Divine Squad; Slave
intro_text: Moyle [ 4 ] is a Skypiean and the father of Mochi . He originally worked for Gan Fall in the Divine Squad , but after Enel took over, he and the other members were forced to work in God's Army [ 3 ] until they were betrayed and almost killed. [ 5 ]

name: Mozambia
intro_text: Vice Admiral Mozambia [ 3 ] is a Marine officer who attended the meeting with the Seven Warlords of the Sea to discuss Crocodile 's replacement. [ 1 ]

name: Mouseman
intro_text: Mouseman is a Gifter in the Beasts Pirates . He resides in Bakura Town . [ 1 ]

name: Mr. 10
alias: Mr. 10
intro_text: Mr. 10 is the partner to Miss Tuesday and a Frontier Agent in the Baroque Works rankings. He was first mentioned by Nefertari Vivi , [ 1 ] who explained how Baroque Works was organized to the Straw Hat Pirates . Neither him nor his partner are seen in the series, but concept art of him does exist. [ 2 ]

name: Mozu and Kiwi
epithet: Square Sisters ( スクエアシスターズ , Sukuea Shisutāzu ? )
intro_text: Mozu and Kiwi , also known as the Square Sisters due to their square-like hairstyle, are two women from Water 7 who were part of the Franky Family . They were both very loyal to Franky , going with him everywhere and tending to imitate every pose he made. [ 2 ] They are both allies of the Straw Hat Pirates during the end of the Water 7 and beginning of the Enies Lobby Arc (starting off as minor antagonists in the former). Currently, they jointly manage Blueno 's old bar in Water 7. [ 6 ]

name: Mountain Ricky
japanese_name: マウンテン・リッキー
intro_text: Mountain Ricky [ 1 ] is a former member of the Foxy Pirates . He fought George Mach before the third round of the Davy Back Fight . [ 1 ]

name: Mr. 11
alias: Mr. 11
intro_text: Mr. 11 was a Frontier Agent for Baroque Works [ 1 ] and the partner of Miss Thursday . [ 4 ]

name: Mr. 12
alias: Mr. 12
intro_text: Mr. 12 is the partner of Miss Saturday and a Frontier Agent in the Baroque Works rankings. He was first mentioned by Nefertari Vivi , who explained how Baroque Works was organized to the Straw Hat Pirates . [ 1 ]

name: Mr. 13
japanese_name: ミスター・サーティーン
intro_text: Mr. 13 is an otter and a member of the criminal organization Baroque Works , being a part of the Unluckies ( 13日の金曜日 , Anrakkīzu ? ) along with Miss Friday . They were a team that served as messengers for Mr. 0 and were also responsible for executing any Baroque Works agents that fail their missions. [ 1 ] He is classified as a Type D creature, "Small Savage". [ 4 ]

name: Mr. 1
occupation: Pirate ; Assassin ; Officer Agent (former); Bounty Hunter (former)
alias: "Mr. 1" ( Mr. 1 , Misutā Wan ? )
epithet: "The Killer" ( 殺し屋 , Koroshiya ? )
intro_text: "The Killer" Daz Bonez , [ 4 ] alias Mr. 1 , is a former bounty hunter [ 3 ] and the former highest-ranked male Officer Agent of Baroque Works . His partner was Miss Doublefinger . [ 1 ] After escaping Impel Down , he traveled with Crocodile in the New World [ 7 ] and later joined Crocodile's new organization, Cross Guild . [ 2 ] He was a major antagonist during the Arabasta Arc and a tentative ally in the Impel Down and Marineford Arcs .

name: Mozu
epithet: Square Sisters ( スクエアシスターズ , Sukuea Shisutāzu ? )
intro_text: Mozu and Kiwi , also known as the Square Sisters due to their square-like hairstyle, are two women from Water 7 who were part of the Franky Family . They were both very loyal to Franky , going with him everywhere and tending to imitate every pose he made. [ 2 ] They are both allies of the Straw Hat Pirates during the end of the Water 7 and beginning of the Enies Lobby Arc (starting off as minor antagonists in the former). Currently, they jointly manage Blueno 's old bar in Water 7. [ 6 ]

name: Mr. 3
affiliation: Cross Guild ; Buggy's Delivery ; Buggy Pirates ; Buggy and Alvida Alliance ; Baroque Works (formerly)
occupation: Pirate ; Officer Agent (former); Prisoner of the Great Prison (former)
alias: "Mr. 3" ( Mr. 3 , Misutā Surī ? )
epithet: "Loan Shark" ( 闇金 , Yamikin ? )
intro_text: "Loan Shark" Galdino , [ 8 ] [ 9 ] alias Mr. 3 , [ 1 ] is a former officer agent of Baroque Works , partnered with "Miss Goldenweek" Marianne . [ 5 ] As an officer agent of Baroque Works, he and his partner were assigned to intercept and eliminate the Straw Hat Pirates in Little Garden , but failed. He served in the syndicate until shortly before its dissolution at the Straw Hat Pirates' hands. After being sent to Impel Down , he assisted Buggy and Monkey D. Luffy during their prison breakout and the Summit War of Marineford . When the war ended, he became a member of the Buggy Pirates . [ 4 ] After Buggy became a Warlord of the Sea , the Buggy and Alvida Alliance evolved into the Underworld organization known as Buggy's Delivery . [ 3 ] The organization was integrated into a larger one, Cross Guild , of which he is currently a member. [ 2 ] He is the main antagonist of the Little Garden Arc and a supporting antagonist of the Arabasta Saga as a whole, one of the central characters of the Miss Goldenweek's "Operation: Meet Baroque Works" cover arc (along with the rest of Baroque Works ' Officer Agents), and a supporting ally during the Impel Down and Marineford Arcs .

name: Mr. 7
alias: Mr. 7
intro_text: Mr. 7 is a former Frontier Agent of Baroque Works , being half of a sniper duo along with his partner, Miss Father's Day . [ 1 ] He replaced the previous agent of the same codename when the latter died in the line of duty. [ 2 ] He is a minor antagonist in the Arabasta Arc .

name: Mr. 5
alias: "Mr. 5" ( Mr. 5 , Misutā Faibu ? )
epithet: "Gem of the Border" ( 国境のジェム , Kokkyō no Jemu ? )
devil_fruit_english_name: Bomb-Bomb Fruit (4Kids, Funimation, Odex); Boom-Boom Fruit (Viz)
intro_text: Gem of the Border , [ 4 ] better known by his alias Mr. 5 , [ 1 ] was formerly the lowest-ranked officer agent in Baroque Works along with his partner, Miss Valentine . [ 2 ] He now works as a fireman at the new Spiders Cafe alongside most of his former colleagues. He was one of the main antagonists of the Whisky Peak Arc and the tertiary antagonist of the Little Garden Arc .

name: Mr. 4
alias: "Mr. 4" ( Mr. 4 , Misutā Fō ? , BStation : "Mr. Four")
epithet: "Catcher-Killing" Babe ( キャッチャー殺しのベーブ , Kyatchā-Goroshi no Bēbu ? )
intro_text: "Catcher-Killing" Babe , [ 3 ] better known by his alias Mr. 4 , is a former officer agent of the Baroque Works and partner of Miss Merry Christmas . [ 1 ] He is also Miss Thursday 's older brother, [ 5 ] and Lassoo 's owner. After the group's dissolution, he became a delivery boy for the New Spiders Cafe . [ 2 ] He was a major antagonist during the Arabasta Arc .

name: Mr. 2 Bon Kurei
occupation: Queen of Newkama Land ; Officer Agent (former); Prisoner of the Great Prison
alias: "Mr. 2 Bon Kurei" ( Mr. 2 ・ボン・クレー , Misutā Tsū Bon Kurē ? , Official Translation: Mr. 2 Bon Clay)
epithet: "Bentham of the Wild" ( 荒野のベンサム , Kōya no Bensamu ? )
intro_text: Bentham of the Wild , alias Mr. 2 Bon Kurei , [ 7 ] [ 4 ] is a newkama and former Baroque Works officer agent . [ 8 ] [ 3 ] He was a major antagonist during the Arabasta Arc , and (along with his fellow Officer Agents) one of the central characters in Miss Goldenweek's "Operation: Meet Baroque Works" . While he was once an enemy of Luffy 's as a member of Baroque Works, [ 9 ] the two became quick friends, leading Bon Kurei to sacrifice himself for Luffy both at Arabasta [ 10 ] and later at Impel Down [ 11 ] , being one of his main allies during that Story Arc . He is currently the queen of Newkama Land . [ 2 ]

name: Mr. 6
alias: Mr. 6
intro_text: Mr. 6 is the partner of Miss Mother's Day and the top Frontier Agent in the Baroque Works rankings. He was first mentioned by Nefertari Vivi , who explained how Baroque Works was organized to the Straw Hat Pirates . [ 1 ]

name: Mr. 2
occupation: Queen of Newkama Land ; Officer Agent (former); Prisoner of the Great Prison
alias: "Mr. 2 Bon Kurei" ( Mr. 2 ・ボン・クレー , Misutā Tsū Bon Kurē ? , Official Translation: Mr. 2 Bon Clay)

While he was once an enemy of Luffy 's as a member of Baroque Works, [ 9 ] the two became quick friends, leading Bon Kurei to sacrifice himself for Luffy both at Arabasta [ 10 ] and later at Impel Down [ 11 ] , being one of his main allies during that Story Arc . He is currently the queen of Newkama Land . [ 2 ]

name: Mr. 8
occupation: Captain of the Royal Guard; Frontier Agent (former); Bounty Hunter (former); Mayor of Whisky Peak (undercover, former)
alias: "Mr. 8" ( Misutā Eito ? ) (former); "Igarappoi" ( イガラッポイ ? )
intro_text: Igaram [ 4 ] is the captain of the Arabasta royal guard (captain of Arabasta security in the English dub). [ 2 ] He aided Nefertari Vivi in infiltrating Baroque Works as a Frontier Agent and took on the codename Mr. 8 . [ 3 ] He was partnered with Miss Monday . [ 3 ] He is also Terracotta 's husband. [ 6 ] He is an ally of the Straw Hat Pirates during the Whisky Peak (after being a minor antagonist) and Arabasta Arcs.

name: Mr. Love
intro_text: Mr. Love [ 2 ] is one of Baroque Works ' Billions [ citation needed ] who posed as a member of the Rebel Army. [ 1 ]

name: Mr. 9
alias: Mr. 9
intro_text: Mr. 9 is the code name of a former Frontier Agent and bounty hunter of Baroque Works , and Miss Wednesday 's former assigned partner during her infiltration. [ 2 ] Due to his actions, he is one of the main antagonists of the Reverse Mountain Arc , and a supporting antihero in the Whisky Peak Arc .  After the fall of Baroque Works, he stayed at Whisky Peak, and eventually bore a son with Miss Monday . [ 4 ]

name: Mr. Mellow
intro_text: Mr. Mellow is one of the only identified members of Baroque Works ' Billions . [ 3 ] He is apparently the leader of at least some of the Billions, as he ordered an unsuccessful attack on Portgas D. Ace and oversaw the murder of Mr. 11 . [ 4 ] [ 2 ]

name: Mr. Momora
intro_text: Mr. Momora [ 2 ] was a member of the Roger Pirates until the crew's dissolution. His current whereabouts and status are unknown.

name: Mr. Beans
intro_text: Mr. Beans [ 5 ] is a former Baroque Works Millions agent who was stationed at Whisky Peak alongside his partner, Miss Catherina . [ 6 ] He worked under the Frontier Agents Mr. 8 , Miss Monday , Mr. 9 and Miss Wednesday . [ 2 ]

name: Mr. Shimizu
intro_text: Mr. Shimizu [ 5 ] was a Baroque Works Millions agent stationed at Whisky Peak . He worked under the Frontier Agents Mr. 8 , Miss Monday , Mr. 9 and Miss Wednesday . [ 2 ]

name: Muchana
intro_text: Muchana is a doctor who currently works in Impel Down 's medical room. [ 2 ] [ 1 ]

name: Mugren
intro_text: Colonel Mugren [ 2 ] was a member of the Roger Pirates until the crew's dissolution. His current whereabouts and status are unknown.

name: Muginn
intro_text: Muginn is a giant raven that lives in the Land of Gods . [ 1 ]

name: Mukkashimi Tower
intro_text: Mukkashimi Tower [ 2 ] is a spectator at the Corrida Colosseum . [ 1 ]

name: Mr. 9‎
alias: Mr. 9
intro_text: Mr. 9 is the code name of a former Frontier Agent and bounty hunter of Baroque Works , and Miss Wednesday 's former assigned partner during her infiltration. [ 2 ] Due to his actions, he is one of the main antagonists of the Reverse Mountain Arc , and a supporting antihero in the Whisky Peak Arc .  After the fall of Baroque Works, he stayed at Whisky Peak, and eventually bore a son with Miss Monday . [ 4 ]

name: Mummy
intro_text: Mummy is a sorcerer who joined as a gladiator at the Corrida Colosseum to compete for the Mera Mera no Mi . [ 1 ]

name: Muret
intro_text: Muret was the doctor of the Bellamy Pirates . [ 3 ] [ 2 ]

name: Muti
intro_text: Muti [ 2 ] is Koala 's mother. [ 1 ]

name: Mummy Mee
intro_text: Mummy Mee [ 2 ] is one of the houseparents, alongside Daddy Dee , of a World Government -affiliated orphanage situated on the Conomi Islands . [ 1 ]

name: Mysterious Masked Man
intro_text: Blueno is an agent of CP0 . [ 2 ] Before the time skip, he was previously an agent of CP9 ; [ 10 ] operating undercover as the bartender of a bar in Water 7 . [ 5 ] He was one of the major antagonists during the Water 7 Arc and a minor antagonist during the Enies Lobby Arc .

name: Namakura Island
intro_text: Namakura Island Statistics Japanese Name: ナマクラ島 Romanized Name: Namakura-tō English Name: Lazy Bones Island First appearance: Chapter 524 ; Episode 421 Region: Paradise Namakura Island is an island located somewhere in the Paradise region of the Grand Line . It is home to the nation of Harahettania ( ハラヘッターニャ , Harahettānya ? , English versions: "Hungeria") , also known as the Land of Poverty ( 貧困の国 , Hinkon no Kuni ? ) . Brook was sent to this island by Bartholomew Kuma during the events of the Sabaody Archipelago Arc .

name: Nako
intro_text: Dr. Nako is a doctor from Cocoyasi Village . [ 1 ] He is an ally of the Straw Hat Pirates during the Arlong Park Arc .

name: Nakaiwa
intro_text: Nakaiwa [ 2 ] is a man who lived in the Wano Country 41 years ago. [ 1 ]

name: Musketeer Masked Woman
intro_text: Kalifa [ 1 ] is an agent of CP0 . [ 2 ] Before the timeskip, she was an agent of CP9 , [ 5 ] operating undercover as Iceburg 's secretary at the Galley-La Company . [ 4 ] She is also Laskey 's daughter and the older sister of Alpha . [ 10 ] [ 11 ] She was one of the major antagonists during the Water 7 and Enies Lobby Arcs .

name: Nanday
intro_text: Nanday [ 4 ] is the infant son of Mr. 9 and Miss Monday . [ 1 ]

name: Namur
intro_text: Namur [ 4 ] is a fish-man and the former 8th division commander of the Whitebeard Pirates . [ 1 ]

name: Nangi
intro_text: Nangi is a member of the Numbers in the Beasts Pirates , representing the number "seven". [ 1 ] Due to his actions and role, he is a minor antagonist in the Wano Country Arc .

name: Nami
affiliation: Straw Hat Pirates ; Straw Hat Grand Fleet ; Arlong Pirates (defected); Ganzack Pirates (movie, former); Golden Lion Pirates (movie, former); Ninja-Pirate-Mink-Samurai Alliance (disbanded)
occupation: Navigator ; Senior Officer ; Thief; Pirate Officer (Arlong Pirates, former); Kunoichi (temporary)
residence: Oykot Kingdom (former) Cocoyasi Village (former); Weatheria (former, temporary)
alias: "Namizo" ( ナミゾウ , Namizō ? ) "O-Nami" ( おナミ , Onami ? , English versions: "Onami")
epithet: Cat Burglar ( 泥棒猫 , Dorobō Neko ? )
intro_text: "Cat Burglar" Nami [ 12 ] is the navigator of the Straw Hat Pirates and one of the Senior Officers of the Straw Hat Grand Fleet . [ 4 ] She is the third member of the crew and the second to join, doing so during the Orange Town Arc . [ 20 ] She is the adoptive sister of Nojiko after the two were orphaned and taken in by Bell-mère . She was formerly a member of the Arlong Pirates who initially joined the Straw Hats to rob them in order to buy back her village from Arlong , and served as a supporting antagonist during the Baratie Arc . However, she legitimately joined the Straw Hats after they defeated Arlong. Her dream is to make a map of the entire world . [ 21 ] She first gained a bounty of 16,000,000 following the raid on Enies Lobby . It later increased to 66,000,000 after the Dressrosa Arc . Following the Raid on Onigashima , her bounty was increased to 366,000,000. [ 4 ]

name: Napoleon
epithet: "Napoleon the Bicorne" ( 二角帽 のナポレオン , Baikōn no Naporeon ? )
intro_text: Napoleon the Bicorne is a homie taking the form of a bicorne hat that is worn by Big Mom . [ 5 ] He can also become a sword homie that Big Mom uses in combat. [ 8 ] He is a special kind of homie, as he received a soul fragment from Big Mom herself, [ 5 ] and serves as one of her personal weapons alongside Prometheus and Hera , and formerly Zeus .

name: Nash
intro_text: Nash is a giant shield homie that is owned by Goldberg of the New Giant Warrior Pirates . [ 1 ]

name: Needle God
intro_text: The Needle God is a giant hedgehog that lives in the Land of Gods , within Bigstein Castle . [ 1 ]

name: Natto
intro_text: Natto [ 2 ] is a former member of the Sand-Sand Clan and, later, of the Arabasta Rebel Army . [ 3 ]

name: Nashi
intro_text: Nashi [ 3 ] is the king of the Ringo Kingdom ( リンゴ王国 , Ringo Ōkoku ? ) and one of fifty monarchs who took part in the Levely . [ 2 ] [ 3 ]

name: Nefertari Lili
japanese_name: ネフェルタリ・ D ・リリィ
english_name: Nefeltari D. Lily (VIZ) Nefertari D. Lily (Funimation) Nefeltari Lily ( WT100 2nd )
affiliation: Arabasta Kingdom ; Nefertari Family ; World Government ; Clan of D.
intro_text: Nefertari D. Lili was the queen of the Arabasta Kingdom during the time of the Void Century , being one of the twenty monarchs credited with the founding of the World Government . However, Lili was the only one who chose not to become a World Noble and move to Mary Geoise ; but before she could return to her home country, she mysteriously vanished. [ 1 ] Aside from that, little is known about her except that she had a younger brother who succeeded her as the ruler of Arabasta in her absence. Lili is the earliest known carrier of the Will of D. , being supposedly the main individual responsible for the presence of the poneglyphs around the world . For this reason, her actions could be considered a major driving force of the overall plot of the series.

name: Nefertari D. Lili
japanese_name: ネフェルタリ・ D ・リリィ
english_name: Nefeltari D. Lily (VIZ) Nefertari D. Lily (Funimation) Nefeltari Lily ( WT100 2nd )

name: Nefertari Cobra
japanese_name: ネフェルタリ・コブラ
english_name: Nefeltari Cobra (VIZ, Movie 8); Nefertari Cobra (Funimation, live-action series); Nefeltari Nebra (4Kids)
intro_text: Nefertari Cobra [ 5 ] was the 12th king of the Arabasta Kingdom , [ 6 ] the former patriarch of Nefertari Family , husband of the late Nefertari Titi and father of Nefertari Vivi . He was related to Nefertari D. Lili , one of the First Twenty monarchs who founded the World Government , and secretly bore her initial D. in his name. [ 7 ] He was a major character throughout the Arabasta Arc and a two-time participant of the Levely , having played a key role in the vote that led to the dissolution of the Seven Warlords of the Sea in the latest one. During the latest Levely, Cobra was murdered by Imu and the Five Elders after learning about the former's existence and sacrificing himself so Sabo could escape. [ 8 ]

name: Nefertari Titi
japanese_name: ネフェルタリ・ティティ
intro_text: Nefertari Titi [ 2 ] [ 3 ] was the queen of the Arabasta Kingdom , Nefertari Cobra 's wife, and Nefertari Vivi 's mother.

name: Neggy
intro_text: Neggy [ 3 ] is the queen of the Gingapore Kingdom ( ギンガポール王国 , Gingapōru Ōkoku ? ) and one of fifty monarchs who took part in the Levely . [ 2 ] [ 3 ]

name: Negikuma Maria
english_name: Maria Onion Bear (VIZ); Mrs. Negi (Funimation) Big Mama (4Kids)
intro_text: Negikuma Maria [ 2 ] is a resident of Drum Island , and friend of Dalton . [ 1 ]

name: Neo Marines
english_name: Neo Navy (Funimation subs) Neo Marines (Funimation dub)
intro_text: Neo Marines Statistics Japanese Name: NEO海軍 Romanized Name: Neo Kaigun Official English Name: Neo Navy (Funimation subs) Neo Marines (Funimation dub) First Appearance: Episode 575 Leader: Z Ship: White Tiger The Neo Marines were a splinter faction of former Marines led by admiral Z in order to annihilate all pirates in the New World . They are the main antagonist group of One Piece Film: Z . [ 1 ]

name: Nefertari Vivi
english_name: Nefeltari Vivi; [ N 1 ] Vivi Nefertari; [ N 2 ] Nefertari Vivi [ N 3 ]
affiliation: Arabasta Kingdom ( Nefertari Family ); Straw Hat Pirates (former); Baroque Works (double agent); Clan of D. ; Sand-Sand Clan (former)
occupation: Princess of Arabasta; Pirate (former); Bounty Hunter (former); Frontier Agent (former); Sand-Sand Clan Vice-Leader (former)
alias: "Miss Wednesday" ( ミス・ウェンズデー , Misu Wenzudē ? ) , "Ms. Wednesday" (4Kids dub)
intro_text: Nefertari Vivi [ 10 ] is the princess of the Arabasta Kingdom . [ 2 ] She is the daughter of Nefertari Cobra and Titi , and along with the rest of her family, she bears the initial D. in her name. [ 11 ] During her childhood, Vivi was part of the Sand-Sand Clan , being the vice-leader of the group led by her friend Koza . Vivi debuted as one of the main antagonists of the Reverse Mountain Arc as a Bounty Hunter , under the Baroque Works codename Miss Wednesday . [ 1 ] During this time, she was partnered with fellow Frontier Agent , Mr. 9 . However, after the events of the Whisky Peak Arc , Vivi and her pet duck Karoo ended up joining the Straw Hat Pirates for most of the Arabasta Saga once she was discovered to be a spy plotting against Baroque Works. Vivi left the Straw Hats after defeating Baroque Works to stay in her home country, [ 12 ] but is still considered a member of the crew and has been keeping track of their progress throughout the series. [ 13 ] After attending the most recent Levely , she became a fugitive after Imu and the Five Elders learned she carried the "D." initial , and was forced to flee Mary Geoise and take shelter alongside Wapol aboard Morgans ' airship.

name: Nekozaemon
intro_text: Nekozaemon was a cat created by Kurozumi Kanjuro using the power of the Fude Fude no Mi . It was created to aid him, Kin'emon , and Bariete scale Zunesha 's leg to reach Zou , though it ultimately failed in its goal. [ 1 ]

name: Neoki
intro_text: Neoki [ 2 ] is a Waiter of the Beasts Pirates who serves as a guard in the Prisoner Mine of the Udon region.

name: Nekomamushi
affiliation: Mokomo Dukedom ; Guardians ; Kouzuki Family ; Ninja-Pirate-Mink-Samurai Alliance (disbanded); Nine Red Scabbards ; Roger Pirates (former); Whitebeard Pirates (former)
occupation: Yakuza Boss ; Ruler of Mokomo Dukedom (former); Guardian of the Whale Forest (former); Retainer; Samurai ; Pirate Apprentice (former)
residence: Zou ( Whale Forest ) (Former) Wano Country ( Flower Capital )
epithet: "Master Nekomamushi" ( ネコマムシの旦那 , Nekomamushi no Dan'na ? , Viz: "The Cat Viper" Funimation: "Master Cat Viper") "Ruler of Night" ( 夜の王 , Yoru no Ō ? , Simulcast subs: "King of Night")
intro_text: Master Nekomamushi is a feline mink and the former guardian of the Whale Forest on Zou . [ 8 ] He was one of the two rulers of the Mokomo Dukedom , dubbed the "Ruler of Night" , [ 7 ] holding the position from 6:00 PM to 6:00 AM. [ 14 ] He and Inuarashi serve as retainers for the Kouzuki Family of Wano Country , [ 9 ] as members of the Nine Red Scabbards . [ 4 ] Alongside Inuarashi he was once a member of the Whitebeard Pirates and Roger Pirates , serving under Kouzuki Oden . [ 5 ] Pedro has claimed that he and Inuarashi must not be allowed to die because "the world is waiting for them". [ 15 ] After Kaidou 's fall from power, Nekomamushi became a yakuza boss in the Flower Capital . [ 16 ] He is an ally of the Straw Hat Pirates during the Whole Cake Island and Wano Country Sagas .

name: Neptune
occupation: King of the Ryugu Kingdom; Prince (former)
epithet: God of the Sea ( 海神 , Kaishin ? ) ; Great Knight of the Sea ( 海の大騎士 , Umi no Dai-kishi ? )
intro_text: King Neptune is a coelacanth merman and the king of the Ryugu Kingdom on Fish-Man Island . [ 1 ] He is also the current patriarch of the Neptune Family , father of Fukaboshi , Ryuboshi , Manboshi , and Shirahoshi , [ 2 ] and the husband of the late Queen Otohime .

name: Nerine
intro_text: Nerine [ 3 ] is a member of the Kuja from Amazon Lily . [ 1 ]

name: New Giant Warrior Pirates
intro_text: New Giant Warrior Pirates Statistics Japanese Name: 新巨兵海賊団 Romanized Name: Shin Kyo Hei Kaizoku-dan Official English Name: New Giant Pirates First Appearance: Chapter 706 ; Episode 639 [ 1 ] Captain: Hajrudin Main Ship: Naglfar The New Giant Warrior Pirates [ 2 ] are a pirate crew of giants led by Hajrudin . The crew is a spiritual revival of the Giant Warrior Pirates that disbanded 100 years ago. They were once part of Buggy's Delivery , before leaving to become the sixth ship of the Straw Hat Grand Fleet after the events on Dressrosa . They are one of the central characters from The Stories of the Self-Proclaimed Straw Hat Grand Fleet Cover Page Serial and are major allies in the Elbaph Arc .

name: New Fish-Man Pirates
intro_text: New Fish-Man Pirates Statistics Japanese Name: 新魚人海賊団 Romanized Name: Shin Gyojin Kaizoku-dan Official English Name: New Fish-Man Pirates First Appearance: Chapter 607 ; Episode 527 Captain: Hody Jones The New Fish-Man Pirates were a pirate crew led by Hody Jones . The crew was comprised almost entirely of fish-men residing on Fish-Man Island , though they also included several merfolk , sea beasts , and enslaved humans . The New Fish-Man Pirates were the most prominent figures in the long history of human/fish-men hate over their hero Fisher Tiger 's death. [ 1 ] They carried on the legacy of Arlong , having established their crew based on Arlong's ideals. [ 2 ] Like Arlong, they wished to make fish-men the supreme race and aimed to sink the humans into the ocean. [ 3 ] Following their defeat at the hands of the Straw Hat Pirates and the arrest of their captain and officers , the New Fish-Man Pirates are no longer active. The remaining crew members were allowed to live on the mainland of Fish-Man Island under the supervision of the Royal Army while their human slaves were freed and allowed to leave the island. Due to their actions and role, they are the main antagonists of the Fish-Man Island Arc .

name: Nezumi
intro_text: Captain Nezumi is a Marine captain of the 16th Branch in the East Blue . [ 1 ] Highly corrupt, he covered up the vast majority of Arlong 's actions in the Conomi Islands in exchange for bribe money. Due to his actions, he can be considered the secondary antagonist of the Arlong Park Arc . He is also the one responsible for officially making Monkey D. Luffy a wanted criminal to the World Government by requesting his first ever bounty .

name: Nero
epithet: "Nero the Sea Weasel" ( 海イタチのネロ , Umi Itachi no Nero ? )
intro_text: Nero the Sea Weasel was the newest agent of CP9 [ 2 ] and part of the team escorting Nico Robin to Enies Lobby . [ 1 ] He was one of the antagonists during the Puffing Tom 's voyage in the Water 7 Arc .

name: Newkama Land
intro_text: Impel Down Statistics Japanese Name: インペルダウン Romanized Name: Inperu Daun English Name: Impel Down First appearance: Chapter 525 ; Episode 422 [ 1 ] Region: Calm Belt Affiliates: World Government Marines Impel Down , also known as the Underwater Prison ( 海底監獄 , Kaitei Kangoku ? ) and the Great Prison ( 大監獄 , Dai Kangoku ? ) , is a government-controlled stronghold in Paradise together with Marineford and Enies Lobby . It is the World Government 's maximum-security prison for the most dangerous criminals and pirates . [ 2 ] It is located underwater in the middle of the Calm Belt and part of the Tarai Current . [ 3 ] Impel Down is the main setting of the Impel Down Arc , with the prison's staff acting as the main antagonist group in the same arc.

name: Nerona Imu
affiliation: World Government ( Nerona Family ); First Twenty
intro_text: Saint Nerona Imu is the King of the World ( 世界の王 , Sekai no Ō ? ) who occupies the Empty Throne , giving him sole authority over the World Government . [ 2 ] [ 3 ] One of the First Twenty responsible for the creation of the World Government and the only one alive today, [ 2 ] his status has been kept an absolute secret from the world at large for over 800 years since the Void Century . [ 4 ] With the ambition of finally bringing the Great War to a decisive conclusion, Imu directed his subordinates the Five Elders to procure Dr. Vegapunk 's invention, the Mother Flame , [ 5 ] and ordered the Knights of God to annex Elbaph in an invasion that he eventually personally participated in. [ 6 ] Imu first appeared during the Levely Arc . Due to his status and actions, he is the main antagonist of the Elbaph Arc , an overarching antagonist in the Egghead Arc , and one of the primary overarching antagonists of the Final Saga and the One Piece series as a whole.

name: Nico Olvia
intro_text: Nico Olvia was an archaeologist from Ohara who studied the Poneglyphs two decades ago, [ 2 ] the mother of Nico Robin , [ 1 ] and the older sister of Oran and paternal aunt of Mizuira . [ 5 ] While sailing with a group of fellow archaeologists, Olvia was captured by the Marines for conducting forbidden research. With the help of Jaguar D. Saul , she was able to return to Ohara and briefly reunite with her daughter, but soon perished in the Buster Call alongside the other archaeologists. [ 6 ]

name: Night Butterfly Pirates
japanese_name: ナイトバタフライ海賊団
intro_text: Night Butterfly Pirates Statistics Japanese Name: ナイトバタフライ海賊団 Romanized Name: Naito Batafurai Kaizoku-dan Official English Name: Night Butterfly Pirates First Appearance: Chapter 1079 ; Episode 1112 [ 1 ] Captain: Linaria The Night Butterfly Pirates are a pirate crew subordinate to the Red Hair Pirates led by Linaria . [ 2 ]

name: Niho Navy
intro_text: Niho Navy Statistics Japanese Name: 二宝水軍 Romanized Name: Nihō Suigun Official English Name: Nihosui Army; Niho Navy ( WT100 2nd ) First Appearance: Chapter 771 ; Episode 710 (mentioned), [ 1 ] Chapter 879 cover [ 2 ] The Niho Navy is a fleet led by Chichilisia [ 2 ] that planned to join forces with the Happo Navy until Sai called off his engagement . [ 1 ]

name: Nightcrab Girl
intro_text: Nightcrab Girl [ 2 ] is a Gifter in the Beasts Pirates . [ 1 ]

name: Nico Robin
affiliation: Straw Hat Pirates ; Straw Hat Grand Fleet ; Baroque Works (defected); Foxy Pirates (filler, temporary); Ohara Archaeologists (former); Revolutionary Army (former, temporarily); Ninja-Pirate-Mink-Samurai Alliance (disbanded)
occupation: Archaeologist ; Senior Officer ; Geisha (temporary); Assassin (former); Baroque Works Vice President (former); Rain Dinners manager (former); Revolutionary (former, temporarily); Slave (former)
alias: "Miss All Sunday" ( ミス・オールサンデー , Misu Ōrusandē ? , Ms. Sunday (4Kids dub)) (former) "O-Robi" ( おロビ , Orobi ? , English versions: "Orobi")
epithet: "Devil Child" ( 悪魔の子 , Akuma no Ko ? , English versions: "Demon Child") ; "Light of the Revolution" ( 革命の灯 , Kakumei no Tomoshibi ? )
devil_fruit_english_name: Hana-Hana Fruit ( 4Kids ); Flower-Flower Fruit ( VIZ / Funimation )
intro_text: Nico Robin , [ 17 ] also known by her epithet "Devil Child" [ 7 ] and the "Light of the Revolution" , [ 8 ] is the archaeologist of the Straw Hat Pirates and one of the Senior Officers of the Straw Hat Grand Fleet . [ 3 ] She is the seventh member of the crew and the sixth to join, doing so at the end of the Arabasta Arc . She temporarily left the crew during the Water 7 Arc but rejoined during the Enies Lobby Arc . Born into a family of archaeologists, Robin is the daughter of Nico Olvia . Robin ate the Hana Hana no Mi at a young age, giving her the power to reproduce her body parts (or her entire body) on any surface at will. As the sole survivor of the destroyed West Blue island Ohara , she is currently one of only two people in the world known to have the ability to read and decipher Poneglyphs , a skill which is considered forbidden and threatening to the World Government . She acted as the vice president and supreme commander of Baroque Works as "Miss All Sunday" , [ 1 ] serving and partnering herself directly with the organization's president; the ex- Warlord : Crocodile , who operated under the codename "Mr. 0". She was the secondary antagonist of the Arabasta Arc and Saga , before joining the Straw Hats. Her dream is to find the Rio Poneglyph which tells the true history of the world, specifically the Void Century . She gained a bounty of 79,000,000 at the age of 8 due to her ability to read poneglyphs after the destruction of Ohara. It later increased to 80,000,000 after the Straw Hats invaded Enies Lobby to rescue her and escape. After the Dressrosa Arc , it was increased to 130,000,000. Following the Raid on Onigashima , her bounty was increased to 930,000,000. [ 3 ]

name: Nigeratta
intro_text: Nigeratta [ 3 ] is a man from Nico Robin 's past. [ 2 ]

name: Nika
epithet: "Sun God Nika" ( 太陽の神ニカ , Taiyō no Kami Nika ? ) "Warrior of Liberation" ( 解放の戦士 , Kaihō no Senshi ? )
intro_text: Nika is the name of a legendary warrior revered as the Sun God by slaves from ancient times and whose existence is tied to Elbaph mythology and folklore. He was first mentioned by Who's-Who , who heard about the legend from a prison guard during his imprisonment by the World Government . [ 1 ] According to Dr. Vegapunk , Nika's existence is only recorded in the most ancient of texts, having been otherwise erased in more modern documents. [ 4 ] Nika's legend has also been passed down for generations in the nearly extinct Buccaneer race, and a form of his legend appears to have been passed down among Elbaph giants , who also worship him and hold festivals in honor of the "Sun God". [ 5 ] [ 6 ] While Nika is mostly revered as a "Warrior of Liberation" and a symbol of freedom, there are some who also fear or decry him as a mere bedtime tale for children, such as those amongst the World Nobles . [ 7 ] Even in Elbaph, due to a translation from their holy text, the Harley , Nika is feared by some of the youth as a "God of Destruction". While it is unknown if Nika actually existed, there exists a Mythical Zoan -type Devil Fruit called the Hito Hito no Mi, Model: Nika that allows the consumer to gain Nika's traits and abilities. During the Void Century , this power was held by Joy Boy , the world's first pirate who led the Great Kingdom in a Great War against the Twenty Kingdoms . [ 8 ] [ 9 ] Currently, the fruit's power is in the possession of Monkey D. Luffy ; [ 3 ] he is sometimes addressed as "Nika" or "Sun God" by those who know of the legend. [ 10 ] [ 5 ] [ 11 ] Nerona Imu and the Five Elders have spent centuries attempting to secure the fruit, presumably due to its connection to Joy Boy, and were even responsible for covering up its identity by renaming it to the " Gomu Gomu no Mi "; as a result, not even members of the Four Emperors and their respective crews seem to be aware of the fruit's true nature.

name: Ninjin
intro_text: Ninjin is a former member of the Usopp Pirates , along with Piiman and Tamanegi , before Usopp joined the Straw Hat Pirates . [ 1 ] He is an ally of the Straw Hat Pirates during the Syrup Village Arc .

name: Ninth
intro_text: Ninth [ 2 ] is an infamous New World pirate captain who allied with Whitebeard . [ 1 ]

name: Nitro
intro_text: Nitro [ 3 ] is a jelly homie that is often seen with Charlotte Pudding . [ 2 ]

name: Noble
intro_text: Noble Statistics Japanese Name: 貴族 Romanized Name: Kizoku First Appearance: Chapter 497 ; Episode 391 Noble is a state-privileged status which is generally hereditary. Titles of nobility are usually associated with present or former monarchies. The term originally referred to those who were "known" or "notable" and was applied to the highest social class in pre-modern societies.

name: Noble Croc
intro_text: The Noble Croc [ 4 ] is a crocodile homie that lives in the Seducing Woods on Whole Cake Island . [ 1 ]

name: Nodoi Wakan
intro_text: Nodoi Wakan [ 2 ] is a Waiter of the Beasts Pirates who serves as a guard in the Prisoner Mine of the Udon region.

name: Niwatori
epithet: "Baron Tamago" ( タマゴ男爵 , Tamago Danshaku ? )
intro_text: Baron Tamago [ 2 ] (also known as Viscount Hiyoko and Count Niwatori in his second and third form respectively) is a knight-ranked combatant of the Big Mom Pirates , [ 4 ] who originates from the Longleg Tribe . He and his partner Pekoms were responsible for collecting the monthly payment of sweets from Fish-Man Island in exchange for Big Mom 's protection. [ 1 ] Due to his actions and role, he is a minor antagonist in the Fish-Man Island Arc and Dressrosa Saga , and a supporting antagonist in the Whole Cake Island Saga .

name: Nojiko
intro_text: Nojiko is the owner of a mikan farm in Cocoyasi Village and the adoptive older sister of Nami . [ 6 ] They were raised together by their adoptive mother, Bell-mère . [ 7 ] She is an ally of the Straw Hat Pirates during the Arlong Park Arc .

name: Nola
epithet: "Master of the Sky" ( 空の主 , Sora no Nushi ? )
intro_text: Nola , [ 6 ] known to many as the Master of the Sky , [ 2 ] is a giant snake who lives on Upper Yard in Skypiea . Having lived for over four centuries, the snake was once the companion of Kalgara and Mont Blanc Noland back when Upper Yard was still part of Jaya . It is the grandchild of the snake Kashigami , whom the Shandia once worshiped as a god. [ 3 ]

name: Nokokuwa Police
intro_text: Nokokuwa Police [ 2 ] is a Shinuchi of the Beasts Pirates [ 1 ] and part of the Armored Division led by Sasaki . [ 3 ] During the Raid on Onigashima , he was tamed by the power of the Kibi Kibi no Mi and joined the side of the Ninja-Pirate-Mink-Samurai Alliance . [ 4 ]

name: Noriko
intro_text: Noriko [ 2 ] is a nori maker who lives in Ebisu Town . [ 1 ]

name: Nokotti
intro_text: Nokotti [ 2 ] is a Waiter of the Beasts Pirates who serves as a guard in the Prisoner Mine of the Udon region. She acted as the gyōji during the Sumo Inferno held by Queen . [ 1 ]

name: Norinosuke
intro_text: Norinosuke [ 2 ] is a self-proclaimed shaman from the Flower Capital of the Wano Country [ 1 ] and the father of Beasts Pirates officer Holed'em . [ 2 ]

name: North Blue
intro_text: North Blue Statistics Japanese Name: 北の海 Romanized Name: Nōsu Burū Official English Name: North Blue First Appearance: Chapter 292 ; Episode 189 [ 1 ] Compass: Ordinary compass Literal Meaning: Ocean of the North The North Blue is the ocean which makes up the north part of the Blue Sea split by the Red Line and the Grand Line . It is separated from the East Blue by the Red Line and the West Blue by the New World half of the Grand Line. [ 2 ] It is known to be the birthplace of the Straw Hat Pirates ' cook , Sanji , who also happens to be part of the Vinsmoke Family (which once ruled the region in the past); the legendary explorer Mont Blanc Noland and his descendants ; Marine Admirals Sakazuki and Borsalino , and three members of the Worst Generation : Trafalgar Law , Basil Hawkins , and X Drake . The Donquixote Pirates crew, led by former Warlord of the Sea Donquixote Doflamingo , was also started in this sea, where it achieved infamy. Other notable pirate crews include the Bellamy Pirates and the Caribou Pirates . The goggles that Usopp bought in Loguetown are said to be a new model from the North Blue. [ 3 ] Popular literature includes Liar Noland and Sora, Warrior of the Sea .

name: Nubon
affiliation: Tontatta Kingdom ; Tonta Corps ; Straw Hat Grand Fleet
intro_text: Nubon [ 3 ] is a dwarf from Tontatta Kingdom who first appeared on Green Bit . [ 1 ]

name: Nox Pirates
intro_text: Nox Pirates Statistics Japanese Name: ノックス海賊団 Romanized Name: Nokkusu Kaizokudan Official English Name: Nox Pirates First Appearance: Chapter 651 ; Episode 571 [ 1 ] Captain: Pedro (former) Total Bounty: At least 382,000,000 [ bounty 1 ] The Nox Pirates , [ 2 ] [ 3 ] initially known as the Nox Expedition Party ( ノックス探検隊 , Nokkusu Tanken-tai ? ) , [ 4 ] was a pirate crew of minks led by Pedro . They initially set sail from Zou as explorers with the intention of finding poneglyphs , but were chased by the World Government and ended up receiving bounties . The crew was defeated in Totto Land [ 5 ] five years ago, causing it to be disbanded. [ 2 ]

name: Number
intro_text: Numbers Statistics Japanese Name: ナンバーズ Romanized Name: Nanbāzu Official English Name: Numbers First Appearance: Chapter 954 ; Episode 955 [ 1 ] Affiliation: Beasts Pirates [ 1 ] The Numbers are a group within the Beasts Pirates made up of artificially produced ancient giants . Originally created on Punk Hazard , they were deemed to be unsuccessful and were eventually bought by Kaidou . They later resided on Onigashima and served as combatants for the crew. [ 2 ]

name: Nugire Yainu
intro_text: Nugire Yainu was the shipwright of the Black Cat Pirates and the crew member who was killed by the Marines three years prior to Kuro enacting his plan.

name: Nyasha
intro_text: Nyasha [ 2 ] is a giant cat owned by the Vinsmoke Family that pulls their royal carriage. [ 1 ]

name: Nure-Onna
intro_text: Nure-Onna [ 2 ] is a Gifter in the Beasts Pirates who works under Black Maria . [ 1 ]

name: Oars
occupation: Special Zombie ; Leader of clan of evil giants (former)
epithet: "Devil" ( 魔人 , Majin ? , VIZ: "Beast") ; "Continent-Puller" ( 国引き , Kunihiki ? )
intro_text: Oars the Continent-Puller , also known as the "Devil" , was an infamous ancient giant . Around 500 years, he wreaked havoc on the seas by conquering countries and hauling away entire islands, which he used to create a "nation of villains". He eventually died in the Land of Ice . [ 3 ] After he died, his body was unearthed by the Thriller Bark Pirates [ 1 ] and was subsequently revived by Gecko Moria as Zombie #900 , a Special Zombie . [ 2 ] As the member of Moria's army animated using the stolen shadow of Monkey D. Luffy , he was a major obstacle that the Straw Hat Pirates had to overcome during their adventure on Thriller Bark . He is the direct ancestor of Little Oars Jr. [ 10 ] Due to his actions, he is a major antagonist of the Thriller Bark Arc .

name: Octopako
intro_text: Octopako is an octopus fish-woman whom Hatchan tried to win over during his cover story , Hatchan's Sea-Floor Stroll . [ 1 ]

name: Ochoku
occupation: Pirate Guru; Admiral of Pirate Island (former)
intro_text: Ochoku is a former member of the Rocks Pirates . [ 2 ] Following his time with the crew he became the ruler of Hachinosu , before being overthrown by Blackbeard during the Rocky Port Incident . [ 3 ]

name: Oars Jr.
affiliation: Little Pirates ; Subordinate of the Whitebeard Pirates
intro_text: Little Oars Jr. (also referred to as Oars III on his flag) [ 5 ] is the captain of the Little Pirates , [ 2 ] a descendant of Oars , and a former subordinate of the Whitebeard Pirates . He is among the several New World pirates that aided the Whitebeard Pirates in saving Ace from execution by the World Government . [ 1 ]

name: Officer
intro_text: Marine Ranks Statistics Explained in: SBS Volume 8 [ 1 ] SBS Volume 24 [ 2 ] SBS Volume 29 [ 3 ] SBS Volume 98 [ 4 ] The ranks within the Marine System are fairly straightforward, where each rank is clearly delineated. [ 1 ] Officers present at Marine Headquarters are considered the elite forces of the Marines, about three ranks higher in terms of power from those of the same rank at other bases. All ranks present from "Lieutenant" above are usually trained here, exceptions being those in command of other Marine bases which includes Axe-Hand Morgan and Nezumi . [ 3 ] This page will list the Marine ranks and the soldiers who hold the titles.

name: Octopus Merman
occupation: Mercenary ; Pirate ; Assassin ; Pirate Officer ; Swordsman
intro_text: Hyouzou [ 7 ] is a poisonous blue-ringed octopus merman . Prior to his imprisonment, he was a mercenary [ 3 ] and working as the New Fish-Man Pirates ' assassin , [ 2 ] and later became one of the officers . Hyouzou was also known as the best swordsman on Fish-Man Island . [ 4 ] Due to his actions and role, he is considered to be a major antagonist in the Fish-Man Island Arc .

name: Oide
intro_text: Oide [ 2 ] is a little girl who lives in Sphinx . She is the owner of Tama . [ 1 ]

name: Ohara
intro_text: Ohara Post-Incident Pre-Incident Statistics Japanese Name: オハラ Romanized Name: Ohara English Name: Ohara First appearance: Chapter 374 ; Episode 263 [ 1 ] Region: West Blue [ 1 ] Ohara is an island located in West Blue . [ 1 ] The island consisted primarily of archaeologists , and is the birthplace of Nico Robin . The island's surface was destroyed 22 years ago by a Buster Call . This is an important event behind the ongoings of the Water 7 Saga with far-reaching consequences in the Final Saga . [ 2 ]

name: Ohm
epithet: Skybreeder ( スカイブリーダー , Sukaiburīdā ? )
intro_text: "Skybreeder" Ohm is one of four priests of the former God Enel and a high-ranking member of God's Army . Together with his giant dog steed Holy , he subjected God's enemies to the Ordeal of Iron on Upper Yard . Due to his affiliation and actions, he is a major antagonist in the Skypiea Arc .

name: Okama
intro_text: Okama Statistics Japanese Name: オカマ Official English Name: Queers (FUNimation) First Appearance: Chapter 129 ; Episode 78 [ 1 ] Features: Crossdressing Sex change Homeland: Momoiro Island , other locations Okama are people who were born male but have adopted various female traits, ranging from simply crossdressing to actually changing their biological sex. The Kamabakka Kingdom is the okama kingdom, [ 2 ] although okama live all over the world.

name: Okome
intro_text: Okome [ 3 ] is the first mate and the only known member of the Hokahoka Pirates . [ 3 ]

name: Oli
intro_text: Crone Oli is a pirate captain subordinate to the Red Hair Pirates . [ 1 ] [ 2 ]

name: Olav
intro_text: Olav is a student at the Walrus School on Elbaph . [ 1 ] He is the grandson of Oimo . [ 2 ]

name: Oimo
intro_text: Oimo is a giant from Elbaph and a member of the Giant Warrior Pirates under Dorry and Brogy . [ 3 ] He has a grandson attending the Walrus School on Elbaph; Olav . [ 6 ] After being captured by the Marines 50 years ago, he and his comrade Kashii were tricked into serving as the guards of Enies Lobby 's main gate. During the Enies Lobby Arc , Oimo and Kashii defected against the World Government and allied themselves with the Straw Hat Pirates , Galley-La Company , and Franky Family . [ 3 ] During the Egghead Arc , Oimo and Kashii became major allies of the Straw Hat Pirates as members of the Giant Warrior Pirates.

name: Oiwa
intro_text: Oiwa [ 2 ] is a man who lived in the Wano Country 41 years ago. [ 1 ]

name: Okame
intro_text: Okame [ 3 ] was a member of the Sand-Sand Clan and, later, of the Arabasta Rebel Army . [ 1 ]

name: On Air Pirates
intro_text: On Air Pirates Statistics Japanese Name: オンエア海賊団 Romanized Name: On Ea Kaizokudan Official English Name: On-Air Pirates First Appearance: Chapter 498 ; Episode 392 [ 1 ] Captain: Scratchmen Apoo Main Ship: Stay Tune Total Bounty: At least 350,000,000 [ bounty 1 ] [ 2 ] At least 198,000,000 [ bounty 2 ] [ 3 ] The On Air Pirates are an infamous and notable rookie pirate crew discovered on the Sabaody Archipelago around the time the Straw Hat Pirates arrived two years ago. As such, they are part of the Worst Generation , with their captain being Scratchmen Apoo . During the timeskip, they became a subordinate crew to the Beasts Pirates . [ 4 ]

name: Onigumo
intro_text: Vice Admiral Onigumo is a Marine officer, and one of the five vice admirals who led the Buster Call on Enies Lobby . [ 1 ] His name was revealed in the third databook . [ 4 ] Due to his actions, he is a minor antagonist in the Enies Lobby and Marineford Arcs .

name: Omasa
epithet: "Blood-Writing Omasa" ( 血文字の大マサ , Chimoji no Ōmasa ? )
intro_text: "Blood-Writing" Omasa is a yakuza boss who was in charge of the Udon region in Wano Country . He was imprisoned in Udon by the Beasts Pirates , but was freed when Luffy took over the prison. [ 1 ] [ 2 ]

name: Oran
intro_text: Oran [ 3 ] was the husband of Roji , the father of Mizuira , the younger brother of Nico Olvia , and the maternal uncle and foster parent of Nico Robin . [ 1 ]

name: Onimaru
affiliation: Shimotsuki Family ( Shimotsuki Ushimaru ); Kouzuki Family ( Kawamatsu )
alias: Gyukimaru ( 牛鬼丸 , Gyūkimaru ? )
epithet: "Gyukimaru on Oihagi Bridge" ( おいはぎ橋の牛鬼丸 , Oihagi-bashi no Gyūkimaru ? , Viz: "Gyukimaru on Bandit's Bridge")
devil_fruit_name: Hito Hito no Mi, Model: Onyudo
intro_text: Onimaru is a komagitsune who was once the companion of the late daimyo of Ringo , Shimotsuki Ushimaru . [ 3 ] After the death of his master, he joined forces with Kawamatsu in collecting weapons for the final battle against Kaidou and protecting them from robbers. After Kawamatsu was captured, Onimaru posed as a human known as Gyukimaru on Oihagi Bridge , stealing weapons from people while continuing to guard the graves. [ 3 ] [ 1 ] [ 2 ]

name: Orbit
intro_text: Orbit Statistics Japanese Name: 客船オービット号 Romanized Name: Kyakusen Ōbitto Gō Official English Name: Orbit Debut: Chapter 56 ; Episode 26 [ 1 ] Affiliation: Neutral Status: Destroyed Orbit [ 2 ] was a cruise ship from East Blue . Sanji was a trainee chef aboard it.

name: Organ Islands
intro_text: Organ Islands Statistics Japanese Name: オルガン諸島 Romanized Name: Orugan Shotō English Name: Organ Islands [ 1 ] First appearance: Chapter 8 ; Episode 4 [ 2 ] Region: East Blue The Organ Islands is the archipelago where Orange Town is located. [ 3 ]

name: Orange Town
english_name: Orange Town ( Funimation , Odex , later Viz ) Port Town ( 4Kids , early Viz ) Orange Village ( Grand Adventure )
intro_text: Orange Town Statistics Japanese Name: オレンジの町 Romanized Name: Orenji no Machi English Name: Orange Town ( Funimation , Odex , later Viz ) Port Town ( 4Kids , early Viz ) Orange Village ( Grand Adventure ) First appearance: Chapter 8 ; Episode 4 Region: Organ Islands Orange Town [ 1 ] is a small, 42-year old town visited by the Straw Hat Pirates during the Orange Town Arc . Its mayor, Boodle , is not only the town's current leader but also one of its founding figures. [ 2 ] During its occupation by the Buggy Pirates , the town suffered significant damage, prompting most of the villagers to flee to safer parts of the island. However, once Luffy defeated Buggy , the townspeople returned to reclaim and rebuild their home. Luffy purposely left behind a bag of loot from Nami 's stash worth 500,000 to help them rebuild their town. [ 3 ] [ 4 ]

name: Ossamondo
intro_text: Ossamondo [ 2 ] is a member of the Spade Pirates . [ 1 ]

name: Orlumbus
affiliation: Yonta Maria Grand Fleet ; Straw Hat Grand Fleet ; Standing Kingdom
occupation: Captain of the Seventh Ship of the Straw Hat Grand Fleet ; Pirate ; Admiral ; Adventurer (former)
epithet: "Massacre Ruler" ( 殺戮支配者 , Satsuriku Shihaisha ? , Viz: "Savage Surmounter") "Made-Up Explorer" ( 偽りの冒険野郎 , Itsuwari no Bōken Yarō ? , Viz: "Adventurer of Lies") "Pioneer Explorer" ( 開拓冒険家 , Kaitaku Bōken-ka ? , Viz: "Adventuring Pioneer")
intro_text: "Massacre Ruler" Orlumbus is a former adventurer from the Standing Kingdom [ 5 ] and the admiral of the Yonta Maria Grand Fleet . [ 3 ] He joined as a gladiator at the Corrida Colosseum to compete for the Mera Mera no Mi . [ 1 ] After the final battle against Donquixote Doflamingo , Orlumbus pledged his loyalty to Monkey D. Luffy and became a pirate and the captain of the seventh ship of the Straw Hat Grand Fleet . [ 4 ] He is an ally of Luffy during the Dressrosa Arc , and one of the central characters from The Stories of the Self-Proclaimed Straw Hat Grand Fleet Cover Page Serial.

intro_text: Sun Pirates Statistics Japanese Name: タイヨウの海賊団 Romanized Name: Taiyō no Kaizokudan Official English Name: Sun Pirates First Appearance: Chapter 620 ; Episode 540 [ 1 ] Captain: Fisher Tiger ; (Deceased) † Jinbe (Former) ‡ Main Ship: Snapper Head (Destroyed) † Stolen Marine Ship (Former) ‡ Total Bounty: Unknown [ bounty 1 ] [ 2 ] [ 3 ] At least 438,000,000 [ bounty 2 ] [ 4 ] At least 250,000,000 [ bounty 3 ] [ 5 ] At least 306,000,000 [ bounty 4 ] [ 6 ] The Sun Pirates , sometimes known as the Fish-Man Pirates ( 魚人海賊団 , Gyojin Kaizoku-dan ? ) , are a pirate crew formed by the late Fisher Tiger . [ 7 ] The crew is notable for having Jinbe and Arlong as part of its members, the former eventually becoming the second captain of the crew, and later, one of the Seven Warlords of the Sea . This crew split apart into three factions eleven years ago: the Sun Pirates under Jinbe, the Arlong Pirates under Arlong, and the Macro Pirates under Macro . The Sun Pirates were pardoned by the World Government when Jinbe became a Warlord of the Sea , but lost the pardon when he abdicated his title. They later went to serve under Emperor Big Mom until Jinbe rebelled and joined the Straw Hat Pirates .

name: Otohime
epithet: Incarnation of Love ( 愛の化身 , Ai no Keshin ? )
intro_text: Queen Otohime was a goldfish mermaid , the queen of the Ryugu Kingdom , the wife of king Neptune , [ 2 ] and the mother of Fukaboshi , Ryuboshi , Manboshi , and Shirahoshi . Otohime was a political activist who worked hard for union and peace between fish-men plus merfolk and humans , dreaming of having her people emigrate from the Sea Floor to the surface. Ten years ago, she was assassinated by Hody Jones , who had framed a human pirate as the instigator of the deed. She is one of the two posthumous overarching protagonists of the Fish-Man Island Arc (alongside Fisher Tiger ).

name: PX-1
intro_text: Pacifista Prototype Mark III Statistics Japanese Name: パシフィスタ Romanized Name: Pashifisuta Official English Name: Pacifista First Appearance: Chapter 505 ; Episode 399 [ 1 ] Features: Clones of Bartholomew Kuma (Prototypes) [ 2 ] Affiliations: Marines Occupations: Cyborgs ; human weapons Homeland: Egghead The Pacifista are human weapons ( 人間兵器 , ningen-heiki ? ) developed by the former Marine head scientist, Dr. Vegapunk . The standard models are clones of the former Warlord Bartholomew Kuma , who were cybernetically enhanced into cyborgs. [ 2 ] Kuma himself was the cyborg prototype for the project. As stated by Sentomaru , the funds required for the construction of just one Pacifista are roughly equal to that of a Marine-issued battleship. [ 3 ] Sentomaru noted that after the timeskip, the first Pacifista models were prototypes ( 試作品 , purototaipu ? ) from two years ago, meaning that the Pacifista project has been updated and modified. [ 4 ] The new models are dubbed " Mark III " ( マーク Ⅲ , Māku Surī ? , VIZ.: Mk. III) and stationed on the island of Egghead and show superiority to the outdated models. Furthermore, a small group of elite Pacifista, the Seraphim , eventually reached completion and were used in the hunt for the Seven Warlords of the Sea after the group's abolishment. [ 5 ]

name: Outlook III
intro_text: Outlook III [ 2 ] is a noble of the Goa Kingdom . He is the husband of Didit , the biological father of Sabo , and the adoptive father of Sterry . [ 1 ]

name: Pandaman
residence: Panda Island ( パンダ島 , Panda-jima ? )
intro_text: Pandaman is a joke character created by Eiichiro Oda , and one of the most prominent easter eggs in One Piece . Originally designed for a Kinnikuman character creation contest, [ 5 ] Pandaman has gone on to make cameo appearances in many manga chapters, anime episodes, films , and more. He is particularly prominent in several of the video games, even being playable in the first Grand Battle! and its immediate sequel . Due to his status as a joke character, most if not all concrete data on Pandaman has been revealed through the SBS , and may or may not be serious on Oda's part.

name: Part
intro_text: Part [ 3 ] is a member of the Bonney Pirates . He was once a resident of the Sorbet Kingdom , having been a friend of Bartholomew Kuma and Ginny since young adulthood. After the Summit War of Marineford , he was arrested by Admiral Akainu following his crew's defeat against the Blackbeard Pirates .

name: Pascia
intro_text: Pascia is a female dancer, who was to be sold at the Auction House . [ 1 ]

name: Papas
