name: Patty
intro_text: Patty is one of the main cooks at the Baratie , currently serving as the restaurant's head pâtissier. [ 3 ]

name: Pappag
intro_text: Pappag [ 2 ] is a starfish who is Camie 's pet and teacher. He is the creator of the Criminal fashion line and is mentoring Camie to be a fashion designer.

name: Pavlik
intro_text: Pavlik [ 2 ] is an infamous New World pirate captain who allied with Whitebeard . [ 1 ]

name: Peachbeard
intro_text: Peachbeard is the epithet of the captain of the Peachbeard Pirates , who are subordinates of the Emperor Blackbeard . [ 1 ]

name: Peachbeard Pirates
intro_text: Peachbeard Pirates Statistics Japanese Name: 桃ひげ海賊団 Romanized Name: Momohige Kaizokudan Official English Name: Peachbeard Pirates First Appearance: Chapter 904 ; Episode 880 [ 1 ] Captain: Peachbeard [ 1 ] Total Bounty: At least 52,000,000 [ bounty 1 ] The Peachbeard Pirates is a pirate crew under captain Peachbeard that affiliated themselves with the Blackbeard Pirates . [ 1 ]

name: Paulie
occupation: Vice President of Galley-La ; Dock One Foreman (promoted); Shipwright
intro_text: Paulie is the current vice president of the Galley-La Company in Water 7 . [ 3 ] Before being promoted, he was one of the five Dock One foremen, specializing in rigging, knots, and masts. [ 4 ] He became an ally of the Straw Hat Pirates during the end of the Water 7 Arc and the beginning of the Enies Lobby Arc .

name: Pearl
occupation: Commander of the Krieg Pirates ' second unit
epithet: "Pearl the Iron Wall" ( 鉄壁のパール , Teppeki no Pāru ? , [EN] [-] VIZ : "Invincible Pearl"; Odex : "Iron Shield Man"; 4Kids : "Pearl of the Invincible Iron Wall"; Funimation : "Pearl the Invincible Shield" )
intro_text: Pearl the Iron Wall is the commander of the Krieg Pirates ' second unit. [ 2 ] Due to his actions, he can be considered the tertiary antagonist of the Baratie Arc .

name: Pekkori
intro_text: Pekkori is the village mayor of Harahettania , the Land of Poverty, situated on Namakura Island in Paradise . He directed the ritual in which he and his people "summoned" Brook , though they were trying to summon the devil. [ 1 ]

name: Peepley Lulu
intro_text: Peepley Lulu [ 3 ] is one of the five foremen of the Galley-La Company 's Dock 1 in Water 7 . [ 1 ] His specialties as a shipwright are pitch , block and tackle , and blacksmithing . [ 2 ] He became an ally of the Straw Hat Pirates during the end of the Water 7 Arc and the beginning of the Enies Lobby Arc .

name: Pekoms
alias: "Nazoms" ( ナゾムズ , Nazomuzu ? , Viz: "Mystoms")
intro_text: Pekoms [ 8 ] [ 6 ] is a combatant of the Big Mom Pirates and a lion mink . [ 1 ] [ 4 ] He is partnered with Tamago , and both are responsible for collecting the monthly payment of sweets from Fish-Man Island in exchange for Big Mom 's protection. [ 1 ] Pekoms originally sailed the seas under Pedro [ 9 ] as a member of the Nox Pirates before he and some of the crew joined the Big Mom Pirates. [ 10 ] [ 2 ] During the Whole Cake Island Arc , he betrayed the crew in an attempt to help Monkey D. Luffy escape Totto Land and honor Pedro's self-sacrifice.

name: Pellini
affiliation: Tontatta Kingdom ; Tontatta Pirates ; Straw Hat Grand Fleet
intro_text: Pellini [ 3 ] is a dwarf from Tontatta Kingdom who first appeared on Green Bit . [ 1 ]

name: Page One
devil_fruit_name: Ryu Ryu no Mi, Model: Spinosaurus
intro_text: Page One [ 5 ] is a former member of the Tobiroppo , the strongest Shinuchi of the Beasts Pirates . [ 1 ] He is the son of the former Warlord of the Sea Hanafuda and younger brother of fellow former Tobiroppo Ulti . [ 6 ] [ 7 ] Due to his actions and role, he is a supporting antagonist in the Wano Country Arc . Following the downfall of the Beasts Pirates, Page One and his sister became followers of Yamato after being saved from Who's-Who and became one of his allies in the Oni Child Yamato's Golden Harvest Surrogate Pilgrimage Cover Page Serial. [ 2 ]

name: Peppoko
intro_text: Peppoko [ 3 ] [ 4 ] is a member of the Alvida Pirates and the triplet brother of Heppoko and Poppoko . [ 2 ]

name: Petermoo
intro_text: Petermoo [ 4 ] was the gunner [ 3 ] of the Roger Pirates . [ 1 ]

name: Penguin
intro_text: Penguin [ 6 ] is a member of the Heart Pirates . [ 1 ]

name: Peterman
intro_text: Peterman is the head of a kidnapping gang called the Hound Pets , located in Sabaody Archipelago , [ 1 ] and a minor antagonist of the Sabaody Archipelago Arc .

name: Perona
affiliation: Thriller Bark Pirates ( Mysterious Four ); Dracule Mihawk (former)
occupation: Pirate ; Wild Zombies and Surprise Zombies Commander
epithet: "Ghost Princess" ( ゴーストプリンセス , Gōsuto Purinsesu ? )
intro_text: "Ghost Princess" Perona [ 7 ] is a member of the Thriller Bark Pirates and the former commander of the Wild Zombies and Surprise Zombies , prior to Thriller Bark 's collapse. [ 3 ] She was introduced as one of the Mysterious Four , the highest-ranking officers of Thriller Bark; [ 2 ] however, she was sent to Kuraigaina Island by Bartholomew Kuma before the defeat of Gecko Moria 's army. She resided in the island's castle for about two years, and during the timeskip she begrudgingly helped Roronoa Zoro during the his training under Dracule Mihawk . [ 8 ] She briefly helped the Straw Hat Pirates when they returned to Sabaody, stopping a battalion of Marines with her Horo-Horo ghosts. [ 9 ] Due to her actions, she can be considered a major antagonists of the Thriller Bark Saga and an ally of Roronoa Zoro and the Straw Hat Pirates during the timeskip and Return to Sabaody Arc .

name: Pickles
epithet: "Tackle Machine" ( タックルマシーン , Takkuru Mashīn ? )
intro_text: Pickles , also known as the "Tackle Machine" , is a former combatant of the Groggy Monsters of the Foxy Pirates . [ 1 ] Due to his actions, he is a major antagonist of the Long Ring Long Land Arc .

name: Pierre
intro_text: Pierre is a Sky Dot Bird belonging to Gan Fall . [ 1 ]

name: Piiman
intro_text: Piiman is a former member of the Usopp Pirates , along with Ninjin and Tamanegi , from before Usopp joined the Straw Hat Pirates . [ 1 ] He is an ally of the Straw Hat Pirates during the Syrup Village Arc .

name: Pica
intro_text: Pica is one of the top three officers of the Donquixote Pirates . [ 2 ] He occupies the Spade seat of the Donquixote Family [ 1 ] and is the leader of the crew's Pica Army subdivision. [ 6 ] Due to his actions and role, he is one of the major antagonists in the Dressrosa Arc .

intro_text: Pell the Falcon [ 2 ] is one of the two head guards in the Arabasta Kingdom that serve under Igaram , the other being Chaka . [ 1 ] He is said to be the strongest fighter in all of Arabasta. [ 4 ]

affiliation: Mokomo Dukedom ; Guardians ; ; Ninja-Pirate-Mink-Samurai Alliance ; Nox Expedition Party\Pirates (former)

intro_text: Pedro of the Treetops was a jaguar mink and captain of the Guardians . [ 4 ] He was the former captain of the Nox Pirates who sailed in search of a Poneglyph , and he earned a bounty of 382,000,000 in the process, but his journey was cut short in Totto Land . [ 10 ] He returned to Totto Land to accompany the Sanji Retrieval Team in their quest to rescue Sanji . [ 11 ] During the escape from Whole Cake Island, Pedro sacrificed himself to ensure his team's escape, as he believed the Straw Hats will bring about the Dawn of the World . [ 12 ] He was a major ally in the Whole Cake Island Saga .

name: Pirate
intro_text: Pirate Statistics Japanese Name: 海賊 Romanized Name: Kaizoku First Appearance: Chapter 1 ; Episode 1 A pirate is, broadly speaking, any professional criminal that operates wholly or partially on the Blue Planet 's seas , especially people conducting robbery by ship . In most, if not all, cases they lead or belong to a group of like-minded criminals, known as a crew and the acts they commit are referred to as piracy . Though not the only existing type of criminal, pirates appear to comprise most of the world's significant bounty heads , and—with the possible exception of the Revolutionary Army —constitute the strongest opposition to the authority of the World Government and Marines . The first pirate in history was Joy Boy , who sailed 900 years ago during the Void Century . [ 1 ]

intro_text: Poppy [ 3 ] [ 2 ] is a member of the Kuja tribe. [ 1 ]

intro_text: Portgas D. Rouge was the mother of Portgas D. Ace and the lover of Gol D. Roger . [ 1 ]

name: Porche
intro_text: Porche is a combatant of the Foxy Pirates . She is considered an idol by the crew and is loved by all of the men. [ 1 ] Due to her actions, she is a major antagonist during the Long Ring Long Land Arc , and a supporting antagonist in the Foxy's Return and Spa Island filler Arcs.

name: Potato
intro_text: Potato [ 2 ] [ 3 ] is a member of the Bonney Pirates . He was once a resident of the Sorbet Kingdom . After the Summit War of Marineford , he was arrested by Admiral Akainu following his crew's defeat against the Blackbeard Pirates .

name: Potaufeu
intro_text: Potaufeu [ 2 ] is a king and one of fifty monarchs who took part in the Levely . [ 1 ]

name: Potsun
intro_text: Dr. Potsun [ 2 ] is an Arabasta doctor who runs an isolated clinic in the desert. He managed to recuperate Pell after his near-fatal sacrifice at Alubarna . [ 1 ]

name: Poro
intro_text: Poro is a bookstore owner [ 4 ] from Orange Town . [ 1 ]

name: Prince Grus
intro_text: Prince Grus is a Marine Rear Admiral stationed at Marine base G-14 and a member of SWORD . [ 2 ] His fellow SWORD members also refer to Grus by the title of Prince ( 王子 , Ōji ? ) which differs from his surname. [ 2 ] [ 5 ] Grus was first introduced during the "Gang" Bege's Oh My Family Cover Page Serial as a brief antagonist. [ 1 ] He made his proper debut in the main series during the Egghead Arc .

name: Pound

He is an ally of the Straw Hat Pirates during the Whole Cake Island Arc . He is also a major character in the "Gang" Bege's Oh My Family serial.

name: Pudos

intro_text: Pythagoras , also designated as Punk-04 ( PUNK-04 , Panku-Fō ? ) , is one of the six satellites of Dr. Vegapunk , embodying his aspect of "wisdom". [ 3 ] He is an ally of the Straw Hat Pirates during the Egghead Arc .

name: Queen
occupation: All-Star ; Scientist ; De Facto Ruler of Udon (former)

intro_text: Queen the Plague is an All-Star of the Beasts Pirates as one of Kaidou 's three closest confidants . [ 2 ] He was formerly the ruler of the Udon region in Wano Country . [ 9 ] Born as Scien , [ 7 ] he previously was also part of the rogue scientific research team MADS before joining Kaidou. [ 3 ] Queen is also the absentee father of Franky of the Straw Hat Pirates , whom he abandoned 26 years ago during his time at MADS. [ 10 ] [ 11 ] [ 12 ] Due to his actions and role, he is a major antagonist in the Wano Country Arc .

name: Ragnir
occupation: Loki's warhammer ; guardian of the Ryu Ryu no Mi, Model: Nidhöggr (former)
intro_text: Ragnir ("Iron Thunder") [ 2 ] is a giant warhammer brought to life by a Zoan -type Devil Fruit , which allows it to transform into a giant squirrel. After having spent centuries serving as the guardian of Elbaph 's national Devil Fruit treasure, the Ryu Ryu no Mi, Model: Nidhöggr , Ragnir judged Prince Loki as worthy to eat it 14 years ago and subsequently became his personal weapon. [ 3 ]

name: Raijin Island
intro_text: Raijin Island Statistics Japanese Name: ライジン島 Romanized Name: Raijin-tō English Name: Raijin Island First appearance: Chapter 594 ; Episode 511 Region: New World Raijin Island [ 1 ] is one of the three islands in the New World which someone has to travel to if they are following their Log Pose after passing through the Red Line via Fish-Man Island .

name: Punk Hazard
intro_text: Punk Hazard Statistics Japanese Name: パンクハザード島 Romanized Name: Panku Hazādo-tō English Name: Punk Hazard First appearance: Chapter 655 ; Episode 579 [ 1 ] Region: New World Punk Hazard is a World Government owned island located in the New World and is the first island the Straw Hat Pirates disembark on after arriving in the New World due to a distress call they received. [ 1 ] A poisonous gas leak occurred on the island, causing the World Government to close off the island. During the two year timeskip , former Admiral Kuzan and current Fleet Admiral Sakazuki fought for the position of Fleet Admiral, causing each half of the island to be contaminated because of Kuzan's Hie Hie no Mi and Sakazuki's Magu Magu no Mi . It is the main setting of the Punk Hazard Arc .

name: Red Hair Pirates
intro_text: Red Hair Pirates Statistics Japanese Name: 赤髪海賊団 Romanized Name: Akagami Kaizoku-dan Official English Name: Red-Haired Pirates (VIZ, 4Kids); Red-Hair Pirates (Funimation) First Appearance: Chapter 1 ; Episode 4 [ 1 ] Chief: Shanks Main Ship: Red Force Total Bounty: At least 4,142,900,000 [ bounty 1 ] The Red Hair Pirates are an extremely infamous and powerful pirate crew ruling in the New World , captained by their chief , Red-Haired Shanks , one of the Four Emperors and a former apprentice of the Roger Pirates . The Red Hair Pirates are the first pirate crew to appear in the manga and the second to appear (next to the Alvida Pirates ) in the anime. They are the main influences of both Luffy and Usopp 's journeys, the former being inspired by Shanks and the latter being motivated to become a great warrior of the sea by his father Yasopp , a member of the crew.

name: Rebecca
epithet: "The Undefeated Woman" ( 無敗の女 , Muhai no Onna ? ) "The Phantom Princess" ( 幻の王女 , Maboroshi no Ōjo ? )
intro_text: Rebecca [ 8 ] is the daughter of Scarlett and Kyros , the niece of Viola and the granddaughter of Riku Doldo III . [ 9 ] She is the former crown princess of Dressrosa , [ 10 ] who forfeited her title to live with her father [ 11 ] and currently serves as a lady-in-waiting to her aunt, Viola. [ 2 ] While living under Donquixote Doflamingo 's regime, she was imprisoned and forced to fight as a gladiator at the Corrida Colosseum . She joined a tournament to compete for the Mera Mera no Mi , winning the D Block and battling in the finals before Sabo claimed the Devil Fruit . [ 1 ] She is an ally of the Straw Hat Pirates during the Dressrosa Arc .

name: Red King
intro_text: Red King is a Marine Vice Admiral and one of the nine that took part in the Egghead Incident . [ 1 ] He serves as a minor antagonist in the Egghead Arc .

name: Portgas D. Ace
japanese_name: ポートガス・ D ・エース
english_name: Portgas D. Ace (uncut dub); Portgaz D. Ace (VIZ, Funimation subs); Portgaz D. Trace (edited dub)
affiliation: Whitebeard Pirates ; Spade Pirates (former); Clan of D. ; Dadan Family (former); Impel Down (former)
occupation: 2nd Division Commander ; Pirate ; Captain (former); Prisoner of the Great Prison (former); Thief (former); Bandit (former)
epithet: "Fire Fist" Ace ( 火拳のエース , Hiken no Ēsu ? ) ("Heat Fist Trace" in the edited dub)
devil_fruit_english_name: Flame-Flame Fruit ( VIZ , Funimation ); Flare-Flare Fruit ( 4Kids , Funimation subs)
intro_text: Portgas D. Ace , [ 11 ] born as Gol D. Ace [ 6 ] and nicknamed "Fire Fist" Ace , [ 5 ] was the captain of the Spade Pirates [ 3 ] before being recruited into the Whitebeard Pirates and becoming its 2nd division commander . [ 2 ] The biological son of the late Pirate King Gol D. Roger and Portgas D. Rouge , [ 12 ] Ace was put in the care of Monkey D. Garp and Curly Dadan after Roger's death, which is where he became the sworn brother of Monkey D. Luffy [ 7 ] and Sabo . [ 13 ] Due to Roger's absence from his life, Ace disowned his father and took his mother's surname, ultimately declaring that his captain Whitebeard was his true father. [ 14 ] Ace's pursuit of his former subordinate Blackbeard for the murder of their crewmate Thatch led to him being captured after their duel on Banaro Island , and he was turned in to the Marines , who held a public execution for him on Marineford due to his heritage; this triggered the Summit War of Marineford . While freed from bondage, Ace would ultimately die at the hands of Admiral Akainu while protecting Luffy. [ 15 ] Ace's death proved the final catalyst following the Straw Hats' defeat at Sabaody that would make Luffy put his crew's journey on hiatus so they could all train for the next two years and return powerful enough to survive the New World on their own, paving the way for the second half of the series . His reincarnated Devil Fruit would eventually be consumed by his sworn brother, Sabo, ensuring that his will would live on . Ace first appeared at the end of the Drum Island Arc , but was only formally introduced in the Arabasta Arc , where he acts as a brief ally of the Straw Hat Pirates. He is a central figure during the Summit War Saga . He is also the protagonist of Ace's Great Blackbeard Search cover arc .

name: Rhodes
english_name: Giant Pirates; Giant Pirate Warrior Band / Pirate Giants; Giant Pirate Crew (VIZ, current); Giant Warrior Pirates (Funimation, former)
intro_text: Giant Warrior Pirates Statistics Japanese Name: 巨兵海賊団 Romanized Name: Kyo Hei Kaizoku-dan Official English Name: Giant Pirates; Giant Pirate Warrior Band / Pirate Giants; Giant Pirate Crew (VIZ, current); Giant Warrior Pirates (Funimation, former) First Appearance: Chapter 129 ; Episode 78 [ 1 ] Captain: Jarul and Jorul (original crew, former); Dorry and Brogy Main Ship: Great Magni (original crew, former); Great Eirik (Destroyed) † Total Bounty: At least 3,600,000,000 [ bounty 1 ] At least 200,000,000 [ bounty 2 ] The Giant Warrior Pirates is a pirate crew made up of giants from Elbaph lead by Dorry and Brogy . Before them, the crew's captains were Jarul and Jorul . They disbanded 102 years ago when Dorry and Brogy began their duel, but reunited once they returned to Elbaph. [ 2 ] [ 3 ] They are major allies of the Straw Hat Pirates during the Egghead Arc . During Dorry and Brogy's absence, Hajrudin formed a spiritual revival crew, the New Giant Warrior Pirates , who are a part of the Straw Hat Grand Fleet .

name: Revolutionaries
intro_text: Revolutionary Army Statistics Japanese Name: 革命軍 Romanized Name: Kakumei-gun Official English Name: Revolutionary Army First Appearance: Chapter 100 ; Episode 52 [ 1 ] Supreme Commander: Monkey D. Dragon Transport: Wind Granma , Ships , Carriages Total Bounty: At least 2,564,000,000 [ Bounty 1 ] Residency: Kamabakka Kingdom ; [ 2 ] Baltigo (former) [ 3 ] The Revolutionary Army is a military organization founded and led by Monkey D. Dragon . Originally known as the Freedom Fighters before assuming their current name, they are the most prominent force in the world that directly opposes the World Government and seeks to dismantle it. [ 4 ] [ 5 ] They are particularly against the World Nobles of Mary Geoise who control and benefit from the corruption of the World Government. [ 6 ] The Army and its members have repeatedly assisted the Straw Hat Pirates . [ 7 ] [ 8 ] [ 9 ] [ 10 ] Their former base of operations was the island of Baltigo , [ 11 ] but after an intensive battle with the Blackbeard Pirates , [ 3 ] they relocated to Momoiro Island , home of the Kamabakka Kingdom . [ 2 ]

intro_text: Riku Doldo III [ 4 ] is the recrowned king of Dressrosa after the defeat of Donquixote Doflamingo , [ 5 ] who dethroned him a decade ago. intro_text: Road is a giant from Elbaph [ 3 ] who is the navigator of the New Giant Warrior Pirates and was formerly an S-Class ranked mercenary for Buggy's Delivery . [ 1 ] In addition, he rules over a personal diorama full of entrapped humans and giant animals as its " Sun God ". [ 4 ] He is the older brother of Bjorn . [ 7 ] He served as a minor antagonist in the beginning of the Elbaph Arc , but later became an ally of the Straw Hat Pirates .

name: Rob Lucci
epithet: "Massacre Weapon" ( 殺戮兵器 , Satsuriku Heiki ? )
devil_fruit_name: Neko Neko no Mi, Model: Leopard
devil_fruit_english_name: Cat-Cat Fruit Leopard Model (VIZ); Cat-Cat Fruit, Model: Leopard (VIZ, Funimation)
intro_text: Rob Lucci , [ 1 ] [ 13 ] also known as "Massacre Weapon" , [ 5 ] is a masked agent of CP0 . [ 3 ] Originally, he was introduced as part of CP9 , reputed as the assassin unit's strongest member in history. [ 14 ] Operating undercover to obtain the Pluton blueprints from Iceburg , [ 4 ] he worked as a sawyer, treenail, and bolt specialist for the Galley-La Company 's Dock 1 in Water 7 . [ 1 ] After his defeat by Monkey D. Luffy at Enies Lobby , Lucci was dismissed from CP9 by Spandam , who declared him and the other assassins responsible for the Straw Hats ' havoc on Enies Lobby. However, within the next two years, he managed to be reinstated into Cipher Pol as part of CP0, this time as Spandam's superior. [ 3 ] Lucci is the secondary antagonist of the Water 7 Saga , appearing as the main antagonist of the Water 7 Arc and the secondary antagonist of the Enies Lobby Arc . He later appears as a major antagonist in the Egghead Arc (and briefly a reluctant ally). He is also one of the central characters from CP9's Independent Report Cover Page Serial, along with the rest of the CP9 agents.

name: Roger Pirates
intro_text: Roger Pirates Statistics Japanese Name: ロジャー海賊団 Romanized Name: Rojā Kaizoku-dan Official English Name: Roger Pirates First Appearance: Chapter 19 ; Episode 8 [ 1 ] Captain: Gol D. Roger Main Ship: Oro Jackson Total Bounty: Over 5,564,800,000 [ bounty 1 ] The Roger Pirates were the pirate crew of the late Pirate King , Gol D. Roger . They were, and remain, the only known crew to traverse the entirety of the Grand Line and reach its final island Laugh Tale . Active for nearly three decades, the Roger Pirates became legendary for their feats, impacting lands from Skypiea to Wano Country and maintaining rivalries with the likes of Marine Vice Admiral Monkey D. Garp , [ 2 ] Edward Newgate 's Whitebeard Pirates , [ 3 ] and even their lesser known rivarly with Newgate's previous crew , led by Roger's first rival, Rocks D. Xebec . Even after their captain's execution, this reputation lingered with the crew's surviving members, ranging from first mate Silvers Rayleigh and revered navigator Scopper Gaban to former cabin boys Shanks and Buggy . The first introduction to their crew comes from Buggy, who recalls his days with Shanks as apprentices in their crew. [ 1 ] Their captain, Roger, is the first character introduced in the series. [ 4 ]

intro_text: Rokki is a member of the Numbers in the Beasts Pirates , representing the number "six".

name: Rolling Pirates
intro_text: Rolling Pirates Statistics Japanese Name: ローリング海賊団 Romanized Name: Rōringu Kaizokudan Official English Name: Rolling Pirates First Appearance: Chapter 476 ; Episode 370 Captain: Charlotte Lola Main Ship: Unknown ship, The Rumbar Pirates ' second ship Total Bounty: At least 24,000,000 [ bounty 1 ] The Rolling Pirates are a group of pirates introduced in the Thriller Bark Arc . They are led by the 23rd daughter of the Charlotte Family , Charlotte Lola . The crew had their own shadows taken away by Gecko Moria , and they aid Luffy in helping him defeat Moria by stuffing as many shadows as they can into him, making him more powerful .

name: Rocks D. Xebec
japanese_name: ロックス・ D ・ジーベック
affiliation: Rocks Pirates ; Clan of D. ( Davy Family )
intro_text: Rocks D. Xebec , [ 4 ] born Davy D. Xebec , [ 2 ] was the captain of the legendary Rocks Pirates . [ 1 ] Born on God Valley , he was a member of the Davy Family [ 2 ] and the father of Marshall D. Teach , one of the current Four Emperors . [ 3 ] His goal in life was to become King of the World ( 世界の王 , Sekai no Ō ? ) , [ 5 ] a title he believed was held by his ancestor, the legendary pirate Davy D. Jones . [ 6 ] Rocks was a dominant figure four decades ago, [ 7 ] during which he had assembled one of the strongest and most infamous pirate crews in history, many of whom went on to be highly infamous pirates themselves. He had a rivalry with Gol D. Roger years before Roger reached the heights of his own power. [ 1 ] He was also a close friend of Elbaph 's most recent king , Harald , and was idolized by Harald's son Loki . His dominance over the seas came to an end during the God Valley Incident , during which he was corrupted by Nerona Imu into a demon and forced to battle Roger and Monkey D. Garp against his will [ 8 ] before ultimately being killed by Figarland Garling while in a weakened state. [ 9 ] His defeat, which was publicly attributed solely to Garp, is what earned Garp the epithet of "Hero of the Marines." [ 1 ] Due to his actions and his relationship with several major characters, he is a prominent character in the flashback events of the Elbaph Arc .

name: Roshwan Kingdom
intro_text: Roshwan Kingdom Statistics Japanese Name: ロシュワン王国 Romanized Name: Roshuwan Ōkoku English Name: Roshwan Kingdom First appearance: Chapter 905 ; Episode 882 (Mentioned) [ 1 ] Region: South Blue [ 2 ] Affiliates: World Government The Roshwan Kingdom [ 1 ] is a nation in the South Blue , [ 2 ] ruled by King Beer VI .

name: Roronoa Zoro
english_name: Roronoa Zoro (Uncut dub, Early VIZ manga); Roronoa Zolo (Edited dub, VIZ Media, 4Kids)
affiliation: Straw Hat Pirates ; Straw Hat Grand Fleet ; Shimotsuki Family (descended); Ninja-Pirate-Mink-Samurai Alliance (disbanded)
occupation: Master Swordsman ; Pirate ; Crew Combatant ; Senior Officer ; Rōnin (temporary); Bounty Hunter (former)
residence: Shimotsuki Village (former); Nazawaka City (former) (Non-Canon) ≠ ; Kuraigana Island (former, temporary)
alias: "Zoro-juurou" ( ゾロ十郎 , Zorojūrō ? , Funimation: Zorojuro, VIZ Media: "Zolojuro")
epithet: "Pirate Hunter Zoro" ( 海賊狩りのゾロ , Kaizoku Gari no Zoro ? )
intro_text: Roronoa Zoro , also known as "Pirate Hunter" Zoro , [ 9 ] is the master swordsman ( 剣豪 , kengō ? ) and combatant of the Straw Hat Pirates , one of the Senior Officers of the Straw Hat Grand Fleet , [ 4 ] and is publicly recognized as the right-hand man and number two of his crew's captain, Monkey D. Luffy . [ 20 ] [ 21 ] [ 22 ] [ 23 ] Formerly a bounty hunter , [ 6 ] he is the second member of Luffy's crew and the first to join it, doing so in the Romance Dawn Arc . [ 2 ] Born in the East Blue and raised in Shimotsuki Village , Zoro is a descendant of the Shimotsuki Family of Wano Country and the legendary samurai Ryuma ; his grandmother Shimotsuki Furiko , the sister of former daimyo Ushimaru , emigrated from Wano to the East Blue. [ 3 ] [ 11 ] As a master of Three Sword Style , Zoro is one of the three most powerful combatants of the Straw Hats, alongside Luffy and Sanji , who are referred to as the "Monster Trio". [ 24 ] [ 25 ] His dream is to become the greatest swordsman in the world , to honor a promise he made to his deceased childhood friend and distant cousin, Kuina . [ 26 ] In addition to his infamy as one of the Straw Hats and as a former bounty hunter, his sizeable bounty upon arriving at the Sabaody Archipelago caused Zoro, along with Luffy, to be included among the eleven " Super Rookies ", pirates who simultaneously reached the Red Line with bounties of over 100,000,000 shortly before the Summit War . [ 27 ] He, the other ten Super Rookies, and Marshall D. Teach would go on to be referred to as the " Worst Generation ." [ 28 ] Zoro gained his first bounty of 60,000,000 after the Arabasta Arc . It later increased to 120,000,000 after the Enies Lobby incident, then again to 320,000,000 after the Dressrosa Arc . [ 17 ] Following the Raid on Onigashima , his bounty was augmented to 1,111,000,000. [ 4 ] [ 16 ]

name: Ross

intro_text: Saint Rosward Rosward [ 4 ] is a World Noble and member of the Rosward Family . [ 5 ] He is the father of Charlos and Shalria . [ 1 ] Alongside his son and daughter, he is one of the main antagonists of the Sabaody Archipelago Arc .

name: Rosward Charlos
japanese_name: ロズワード・チャルロス聖
intro_text: Saint Rosward Charlos [ 4 ] [ 5 ] is a World Noble , the son of Saint Rosward Rosward , and the older brother of Saint Shalria . [ 1 ] Due to his actions, he can be considered one of the main antagonists of the Sabaody Archipelago Arc , and a minor antagonist during the Levely Arc .

name: Rowing
intro_text: Rowing [ 4 ] was the scholar ( 学者 , gakusha ? ) [ 3 ] of the Roger Pirates until the crew's dissolution. His current whereabouts and status are unknown.

name: Roxanne
intro_text: Roxanne is a Baratie regular who was friendly with Sanji . [ 1 ]

name: Rosy Life Riders
japanese_name: 人生バラ色ライダーズ
intro_text: Rosy Life Riders Statistics Japanese Name: 人生バラ色ライダーズ Romanized Name: Jinsei Bara-iro Raidāzu Official English Name: Rosy Life Riders First Appearance: Chapter 491 ; Episode 386 [ 1 ] Affiliation: Straw Hat Pirates Occupation: Slave Trader (Former) Leader(s): Duval The Rosy Life Riders [ 2 ] are an outlaw gang led by Duval , active around the Sabaody Archipelago . [ 1 ] Their members famously ride on giant flying fish, maneuverable both midair and underwater. Originally a kidnapping gang known as the Flying Fish Riders ( トビウオライダーズ , Tobiuo Raidāzu ? ) , they were briefly enemies of the Straw Hat Pirates , per Duval's personal vendetta. However, after Duval was "reformed" by Sanji and made peace with them, the gang followed suit, becoming staunch allies of the Straw Hats. [ 2 ]

name: Royal
intro_text: Royal Statistics Japanese Name: 王族 Romanized Name: Ōzoku Official English Name: Royal First Appearance: Chapter 43 ; Episode 20 [ 1 ] A royal is a member of a monarchic family ruling over a country, typically referred to as a kingdom ( 王国 , ōkoku ? ) . The majority of countries in the Blue Planet with known governments are ruled over by royalty, and royal bloodlines have played a big role in the history of the World Government , which hosts a representative council of affiliated royals known as the Levely .

name: Rosward Shalria
japanese_name: ロズワード・シャルリア宮
intro_text: Saint Rosward Shalria [ 2 ] [ 4 ] is a World Noble , the daughter of Saint Rosward Rosward , and the younger sister of Saint Charlos . [ 1 ] Alongside the rest of her family, Shalria is one of the main antagonists of the Sabaody Archipelago Arc .

name: Royder
intro_text: Royder [ 3 ] [ 1 ] is a reporter who witnessed and reported on the events of the Summit War of Marineford from Sabaody Archipelago . [ 2 ]

intro_text: Run the Machete is an ex-pirate and former member of the Centaur Patrol Unit under Brownbeard , having served as one of Caesar Clown ’s henchmen. He is a spider centaur . [ 1 ]

name: Russian

name: Rush

name: Rumbar Pirates
intro_text: Rumbar Pirates Statistics Japanese Name: ルンバー海賊団 Romanized Name: Runbā Kaizokudan Official English Name: Rumbar Pirates First Appearance: Chapter 103 ; Episode 63 [ 1 ] Captain: Yorki ; Brook (acting captain) Main Ship: Two unknown ships Total Bounty: At least 33,000,000 [ bounty 1 ] The Rumbar Pirates were a pirate crew from the West Blue . They were first mentioned by Crocus as the group of pirates who brought Laboon to Twin Cape . Their captain , Yorki , and several other crew members contracted an incurable disease, causing them to leave the crew. Sometime later after an attack by another pirate crew using poisonous weapons, the crew's doctor was killed and the rest of the crew perished 52 years ago in the Florian Triangle . [ 1 ] One member of the crew, Brook , survived through the power of the Yomi Yomi no Mi , although it look his soul a long while to find his body, finding only his skeleton remained, albeit with his afro intact.

name: Ryugu Palace
intro_text: Ryugu Palace Statistics Japanese Name: 竜宮城 Romanized Name: Ryūgū-jō English Name: Ryugu Palace First appearance: Chapter 612 ; Episode 531 [ 1 ] The Ryugu Palace (literally meaning "Dragon Imperial Palace") is the royal palace of Ryugu Kingdom on Fish-Man Island . King Neptune , Princes Fukaboshi , Ryuboshi , Manboshi , and Princess Shirahoshi live here. It is apparently located in the smaller bubble that sits on top of the main bubble surrounding the island.

name: Ryugu Kingdom
english_name: Ryugu Kingdom Kingdom of Ryugu (VIZ manga and Funimation sub, used interchangeably) *
intro_text: Ryugu Kingdom Statistics Japanese Name: リュウグウ王国 Romanized Name: Ryūgū Ōkoku English Name: Ryugu Kingdom Kingdom of Ryugu (VIZ manga and Funimation sub, used interchangeably) * First appearance: Chapter 609 ; Episode 528 Region: Sea Floor The Ryugu Kingdom is the country that King Neptune rules over. It includes all of Fish-Man Island as well as the surrounding areas.

name: Ryuboshi

intro_text: Ryunosuke was a "Rising Dragon" ( 昇り竜 , Nobori Ryū ? ) created by Kurozumi Kanjuro using the power of the Fude Fude no Mi . It was created to aid Kurozumi Kanjuro , Kin'emon , Trafalgar Law , and the Straw Hat Pirates in scaling the leg of Zunesha to reach Zou , [ 1 ] and received its name from the Straw Hats. [ 2 ]

name: S-Hawk
intro_text: S-Hawk is one of the Seraphim and a Lunarian -based clone of Dracule Mihawk . [ 1 ] [ 4 ] Due to his actions and role, he is a supporting antagonist in the Egghead Arc .

name: Ryokugyu
alias: Ryokugyu ( 緑牛 , Ryokugyū ? , literally meaning "Green Bull")
intro_text: Aramaki , better known by his alias Ryokugyu , is an Admiral in the Marines . A former policeman from the Taya Kingdom , [ 3 ] he was part of the World Military Draft that filled the two Admiral vacancies (along with Fujitora ), caused by Kuzan 's resignation and Sakazuki 's promotion. [ 2 ] Ryokugyu was first mentioned by Donquixote Doflamingo in the Dressrosa Arc and debuted in the Levely Arc . His full appearance and real name were revealed near the end of the Wano Country Arc , in which he serves as a supporting antagonist. [ 6 ]

name: S-Shark
intro_text: S-Shark is one of the Seraphim and a Lunarian -based clone of Jinbe . [ 1 ] Due to his actions and role, he is a supporting antagonist in the Egghead Arc .

name: SWORD
intro_text: SWORD Statistics Japanese Name: SWORD Romanized Name: Sōdo Official English Name: SWORD First Appearance: Chapter 498 ; Episode 392 ; [ 1 ] Chapter 956 ; Episode 957 (official) [ 2 ] Affiliation: Marines Leader(s): X Drake SWORD is a Marine Headquarters Secret Special Force ( 機密特殊部隊 , Kimitsu Tokushu Butai ? ) that consists of Marines who have formally resigned themselves from the actual command structure of the organization, but still operate on its behalf. [ 3 ]

name: Saber
intro_text: Saber [ 2 ] is a member of the Spade Pirates . [ 1 ] Despite being commonly seen at Ace's side, he was allegedly not a commanding officer. [ 3 ]

name: SSG
intro_text: SSG Statistics Japanese Name: SSG Romanized Name: Esu Esu Jī Official English Name: SSG First Appearance: Chapter 1059 ; Episode 1087 [ 1 ] Affiliation: Marines [ 2 ] Leader(s): Vegapunk [ 3 ] (former) Residency: Egghead [ 4 ] The Special Science Group ( 特殊科学班 , Tokushu Kagaku-han ? ) , [ 5 ] abbreviated as SSG , is a Marine science division, formerly led by Vegapunk . [ 3 ] The SSG is responsible for the research and development of advanced technology and weaponry for the World Government , including the Pacifista and eventually the Seraphim , [ 1 ] which the Government hoped would be able to replace the Seven Warlords system as one of the Three Great Powers . [ 2 ] The SSG's main base of operation was Egghead , where every member resided. [ 4 ] Following the Egghead Incident , the organization's status is unclear; the only members of the group that remain loyal to the World Government are York [ 6 ] and the Seraphim , as Vegapunk himself, the other satellites and all the low-level researchers were targets of the Marines' Buster Call . [ 7 ] [ 8 ]

name: S-Snake
intro_text: S-Snake is one of the Seraphim and a Lunarian -based clone of Boa Hancock . [ 1 ] [ 4 ] Due to her actions and role, she is a supporting antagonist in the Egghead Arc .

name: Sabaody Archipelago
intro_text: Sabaody Archipelago Statistics Japanese Name: シャボンディ諸島 Romanized Name: Shabondi Shotō English Name: Sabaody Archipelago First appearance: Chapter 496 ; Episode 390 [ 1 ] Region: Paradise The Sabaody Archipelago [ 2 ] is the final island in Paradise , close to the Red Line . [ 3 ] Though it is called an archipelago, it is actually a massive mangrove forest growing out from the middle of the ocean with each tree of the forest serving as an "island" on which people live. [ 1 ] Since it is just a group of trees and not an island like those found in the Grand Line , it has no magnetic pull for which to affect a Log Pose . [ 4 ] This place is notable for being the last island in Paradise visited by the Straw Hat Pirates as a whole before they got separated by Bartholomew Kuma . Two years after the Celestial Dragon Hit-and-Run Incident , the Straw Hats regrouped here once more before departing for the New World . It is the main setting of the Sabaody Archipelago Arc and Return to Sabaody Arc .

name: Sabo
affiliation: Revolutionary Army ; Dadan Family (former); Goa Kingdom (defected)
occupation: Chief of Staff ( 参謀総長 , Sanbō Sōchō ? ) of the Revolutionary Army; Noble (former); Pirate (former); Thief (former); Bandit (former)
residence: Goa Kingdom (former); Mt. Colubo (former); Baltigo (former); Momoiro Island
alias: Lucy ( ルｰシｰ , Rūshī ? )
epithet: "Flame Emperor" ( 炎帝 , Entei ? )
devil_fruit_english_name: Flame-Flame Fruit ( VIZ , Funimation ); Flare-Flare Fruit ( 4Kids , Funimation subs)
intro_text: "Flame Emperor" Sabo [ 5 ] is the Revolutionary Army 's chief of staff , recognized as the No. 2 of the entire organization under Supreme Commander Monkey D. Dragon . [ 2 ] He is also the sworn brother of the notorious pirates Monkey D. Luffy and the late Portgas D. Ace . [ 10 ] Raised in nobility by his parents Outlook III and Didit in the Goa Kingdom , Sabo ran away and met Ace and Luffy while living as a vagabond in Gray Terminal . [ 10 ] He tried to set sail just a few months afterward to get away from his family, but had his ship destroyed by the World Noble Saint Jalmack . [ 11 ] He was saved by Dragon but lost his memory in the process, and so devoted his life to the service of the Revolutionary Army. However, his memories would return 10 years later after hearing about Ace's death. [ 12 ] Two years after regaining his memories, Sabo would reunite with Luffy and also carry Ace's legacy by consuming his Devil Fruit , the Mera Mera no Mi . [ 13 ] After storming the Holy Land during the most recent Levely with several other commanders of the Revolutionary Army, Sabo was framed for the assassination of Nefertari Cobra , increasing his notoriety across the world and sparking several rebellions. [ 5 ] He acts as an ally of Luffy during the Dressrosa Arc , as well as the movies One Piece Film: Gold and One Piece: Stampede .

name: Saitank
intro_text: Saitank [ 3 ] is a Gifter in the Beasts Pirates ' Armored Division . [ 1 ] During the Raid on Onigashima , he was tamed by the power of the Kibi Kibi no Mi and joined the side of the Ninja-Pirate-Mink-Samurai Alliance . [ 2 ]

name: Sai
affiliation: Happo Navy ; Chinjao Family ; Straw Hat Grand Fleet
occupation: Captain of the Third Ship of the Straw Hat Grand Fleet ; 13th Leader of the Happo Navy; Martial Artist (VIZ: Fighter)
epithet: Don Sai ( 首領 ・サイ , Don Sai ? )
intro_text: Sai , [ 8 ] also known as Don Sai , is a member of the Chinjao Family and the 13th leader of the Happo Navy , [ 9 ] as well as the captain of the third ship of the Straw Hat Grand Fleet . [ 3 ] He is also a martial artist who joined as a gladiator at the Corrida Colosseum to compete for the Mera Mera no Mi , [ 1 ] where he met Monkey D. Luffy , whom he eventually pledged his loyalty to. He is now married to Baby 5 , a former officer of the Donquixote Pirates who defected due to falling in love with him. [ 10 ] He is the brother of Boo and grandson of Chinjao . He is an ally of Luffy during the Dressrosa Arc , and one of the central characters from The Stories of the Self-Proclaimed Straw Hat Grand Fleet Cover Page Serial.

name: Saikoro
intro_text: Saikoro [ 2 ] is a tanuki owned by Wakasa and Hiroshi that lives in Bakura Town in Wano Country . [ 1 ]

name: Sakura Kingdom
english_name: Cherry Blossom Kingdom; Sakura Kingdom (Funimation subs)
intro_text: Sakura Kingdom Statistics Japanese Name: サクラ王国 Romanized Name: Sakura Ōkoku English Name: Cherry Blossom Kingdom; Sakura Kingdom (Funimation subs) First appearance: Chapter 142 ; Episode 81 Region: Drum Island The Sakura Kingdom (literally meaning "Cherry Blossom Kingdom"), formerly the Drum Kingdom ( ドラム王国 , Doramu Ōkoku ? ) , is a kingdom located on Drum Island . This is where the Straw Hats ' doctor ( Chopper ) came from. The kingdom is well-known for its extraordinary and skilled doctors.

name: Sakazuki
alias: Akainu ( 赤犬 , Akainu ? , literally meaning "Red Dog")
intro_text: Sakazuki , [ 8 ] formerly known by his Admiral alias Akainu , [ 1 ] is the current Fleet Admiral of the Marines , succeeding the previous Fleet Admiral, Sengoku . [ 2 ] During the first half of the series, he was one of the three Admirals , [ 3 ] and was the last one out of the three to debut. [ 9 ] Upon becoming the Fleet Admiral, one of Sakazuki's first decisions was to relocate Marine Headquarters into the New World in preparation for the New Pirate Age . [ 10 ] In the manga, Akainu was first mentioned by Nico Robin during the initial encounter with Aokiji . [ 3 ] In the anime, he was mentioned earlier by Vice Admiral Jonathan during the anime-only G-8 Arc , which aired after Akainu had been revealed in the manga. [ 9 ] Sakazuki is perhaps the strictest follower of Absolute Justice in the entire series, to the point where his extremism prompted his fellow Admiral Aokiji to oppose his promotion to Fleet Admiral and resign from the Marines after this effort failed. [ 2 ] Due of his actions and role, Sakazuki is the main antagonist of the Marineford Arc and a major antagonist in the Final Saga and the second half of the series.

name: Saldeath
occupation: Chief Guard ( 牢番長 , Rōban Chō ? )
intro_text: Saldeath [ 2 ] is one of the Chief Guards of Impel Down . He is the commander of the Blue Gorillas . [ 1 ] Due to his actions, he is a major antagonist in the Impel Down Arc .

name: Samurai
affiliation: Kouzuki Family ; Ninja-Pirate-Mink-Samurai Alliance (Dissolved); Nine Red Scabbards
occupation: Samurai ; Great Elder of the Shogunate; Retainer of the Kouzuki Family; Leader of the Nine Red Scabbards; Thief (former)
residence: Wano Country ( Kuri ); Flower Capital (Shogun Castle)
epithet: "Foxfire Kin'emon" ( 狐火の錦えもん , Kitsune-bi no Kin'emon ? )
devil_fruit_english_name: Garb-Garb Jutsu (VIZ and Funimation); Garb-Garb Fruit (One Piece Official YouTube Channel)
intro_text: "Foxfire" Kin'emon [ 10 ] is a samurai from the region of Kuri in Wano Country [ 5 ] who currently serves the shogunate as a great elder in the Flower Capital . [ 14 ] Once a thug in his youth, [ 15 ] he became a retainer of the Kouzuki Family [ 2 ] and the leader of Kouzuki Oden 's Nine Red Scabbards . [ 4 ] He was born 56 years before the present day, but traveled 20 years forward in time when he was 36 years old. [ 8 ] Due to Wano Country having been taken over by Shogun Kurozumi Orochi , an ally of Kaidou of the Four Emperors , Kin'emon set out on a seafaring quest to recruit warriors for his cause, bringing alongside him his master Kouzuki Momonosuke and his fellow retainers Kanjuro and Raizo . After a series of misadventures, Kin'emon ended up on the island of Punk Hazard , where he met and joined forces with the Straw Hat Pirates , posing as Momonosuke's father during the journey to Zou . He is one of the central allies of the Straw Hats during the Dressrosa , Whole Cake Island and Wano Country Sagas. [ 16 ] [ 17 ]

name: Sapi
intro_text: Sapi [ 4 ] is a fish salesman from Loguetown who sold Sanji the blue-finned elephant tuna . [ 5 ]

name: Sandayu
intro_text: Sandayu [ 2 ] is a bodyguard who worked for the oiran Komurasaki. [ 1 ]

name: Sanjuan Wolf

epithet: "Colossal Battleship" ( 巨大戦艦 , Kyodai Senkan ? , VIZ, Funimation: "Great Battleship")
intro_text: Sanjuan Wolf [ 6 ] is an enormous giant , known as "Colossal Battleship" for his size, [ 7 ] and and one of the Ten Titanic Captains of the Blackbeard Pirates , serving as the captain of the seventh ship of the fleet . [ 2 ] . He was one of the legendary criminals imprisoned within the sixth level of the great underwater prison Impel Down until he was freed and recruited by Marshall D. Teach . [ 1 ] Due to his actions and role, he is a supporting antagonist in the Marineford Arc , a minor antagonist in the Egghead Arc , and a major antagonist in the Final Saga .

name: Sarahebi
intro_text: Sarahebi [ 4 ] is a Gifter of the Beasts Pirates who works under Black Maria . [ 2 ] She was also a school teacher in the Flower Capital . [ 1 ]

alias: "Mr. Prince" ( Mr. プリンス , Misutā Purinsu ? ) "San-gorou" ( サン五郎 , Sangorō ? , English versions: Sangoro) "Osoba-mask" ( おそばマスク , O-Soba Masuku ? , English versions: "Soba Mask")
epithet: "Black Leg" ( 黒足 , Kuro Ashi ? )
intro_text: "Black Leg" Sanji [ 12 ] is the cook of the Straw Hat Pirates and one of the Senior Officers of the Straw Hat Grand Fleet . [ 5 ] He is the fifth member of the crew and the fourth to join, doing so at the end of the Baratie Arc . Born as Vinsmoke Sanji , [ 21 ] the third son and fourth child of the Vinsmoke Family [ 22 ] (thus, making him a former prince of the Germa Kingdom ), [ 23 ] he disowned his family twice, once in his youth and again after reuniting with them as an adult. [ 24 ] [ 25 ] After fleeing the Vinsmokes as a child, he eventually entered the care of Zeff as the sous chef of the Baratie , where he would remain until he met Luffy , who convinced him to join his crew. His dream is to find the rumored chef's paradise, the All Blue , which is where the East Blue , West Blue , North Blue , and South Blue meet, along with their wildlife. He is one of the top three fighters of the Straw Hats, alongside Luffy and Zoro , who is referred to as the "Monster Trio". [ 26 ] [ 27 ] He first gained a bounty of 77,000,000 for his role in the raid on Enies Lobby . It increased to 177,000,000 after the Dressrosa Arc , but the condition of his bounty was changed to Only Alive due to his biological father 's interference. After he escaped from Big Mom 's territory , his bounty condition was reverted to Dead or Alive (with the Vinsmoke name despite his renouncing it), and its value increased to 330,000,000. [ 19 ] Following the Raid on Onigashima , his bounty was increased to 1,032,000,000. [ 5 ]

name: Sarai
intro_text: Sarai [ 2 ] was a member of the Takotopus Pirates 30 years ago. [ 1 ]

name: Sarfunkel
first_appearance: Chapter 620 (cover); One Piece Film: Red (credits); Episode 1151
intro_text: Sarfunkel is an inhabitant on the Island of Rare Animals . She is described as a barrel woman. [ 1 ]

name: Sarie Nantokanette
japanese_name: サリー・ナントカネット
occupation: Queen of the Goa Kingdom; Princess of the Goa Kingdom (former)
intro_text: Sarie Nantokanette is the queen of the Goa Kingdom and Sterry 's wife. [ 1 ]

name: Saru
intro_text: Saru is the pet dog of two of the World Nobles , Saint Rosward and Saint Shalria . [ 1 ]

name: Sarutobi
intro_text: Sarutobi [ 5 ] is a ninja and a member of the Beasts Pirates . [ 3 ] He previously was a member of the Orochi Oniwabanshu which served the shogun of Wano Country , Kurozumi Orochi . [ 2 ] Due to his actions and role, he is a minor antagonist in the Wano Country Arc .

name: Satchels Maffey
japanese_name: サッチェルズ・マッフィー宮
affiliation: Knights of God ; World Nobles ( Satchels Family )
intro_text: Saint Satchels Maffey [ 2 ] [ 3 ] is a World Noble and a member of the Knights of God . [ 1 ] 38 years ago, she took part in the God Valley Incident , being the reason that Shanks and Shamrock were split up. [ 2 ]

name: Saruyama Alliance
english_name: Monkey Mt. Allies (4Kids) ; Saruyama Alliance (Funimation) ; Monkey Mountain Allied Force (VIZ) ; Monkey Mountain Alliance ( OPCG )
intro_text: Saruyama Alliance Statistics Japanese Name: 猿山連合軍 Romanized Name: Saruyama Rengō-gun Official English Name: Monkey Mt. Allies (4Kids) ; Saruyama Alliance (Funimation) ; Monkey Mountain Allied Force (VIZ) ; Monkey Mountain Alliance ( OPCG ) First Appearance: Chapter 219 ; Episode 144 [ 2 ] Captain: Mont Blanc Cricket Main Ship: Victory Hunter ; Utan Sonar ; Unnamed Third Ship [ 1 ] Total Bounty: At least 84,000,000 [ bounty 1 ] The Saruyama Alliance (lit. "Monkey Mountain Alliance") is a Pirate Alliance formed between three pirate captains : Mont Blanc Cricket and his surrogate sons, the brothers "Salvage King" Masira and "Sonar King" Shoujou . As an alliance, it joins the brothers' respective crews, the Masira Pirates and the Shoujou Pirates .

name: Sauce
intro_text: Sauce [ 3 ] is the king of the Jambalaya Kingdom ( ジャンバラヤ王国 , Janbaraya Ōkoku ? ) and one of fifty monarchs who took part in the Levely . [ 2 ] [ 3 ]

name: Sarquiss
epithet: "Big Knife Sarquiss" ( ビッグナイフ・サーキース , Biggunaifu Sākīsu ? )
intro_text: "Big Knife" Sarquiss [ 3 ] is the former first mate of the Bellamy Pirates , with a bounty of 38,000,000 on his head. [ 2 ] His epithet originates from the large dagger he always wields, which bears a strong resemblance to a massive kukri . Due to his actions, he can be considered a supporting antagonist of the Jaya Arc .

name: Scales
intro_text: Scales [ 1 ] [ 5 ] is a Sea King . It is one of the six Sea Kings that speak to Shirahoshi when she fully manifests the power of Poseidon . [ 3 ]

name: Satori
epithet: "Satori of the Forest" ( 森のサトリ , Mori no Satori ? )
intro_text: Satori of the Forest is one of four former priests of Enel 's God's Army , operating the Ordeal of Balls to punish criminals during Enel's reign. [ 3 ] He is also the oldest triplet brother of Hotori and Kotori . Due to his actions, he is a major antagonist of the Skypiea Arc .

name: Scarlett
intro_text: Scarlett was the first daughter of the Riku Family and the former crown princess of Dressrosa until falsifying her own death. She was Viola 's elder sister, [ 6 ] Kyros ' wife, [ 7 ] and Rebecca 's mother. She was killed by Diamante when the Donquixote Pirates took over Dressrosa ten years ago. [ 1 ]

name: Scimitarta
intro_text: Scimitarta is a member of the Endurance Curry Pirates . [ 1 ]

name: Scientist
intro_text: Scientist Statistics Japanese Name: 科学者 Romanized Name: Kagakusha Official English Name: Scientist First Appearance: Chapter 329 ; Episode 233 A scientist is an individual who uses their knowledge and expertise to help engineer new creations, either to serve the world or themselves.

name: Schollzo
intro_text: Schollzo is a member of the Franky Family . [ 1 ]

name: Scopper Gaban
japanese_name: スコッパー・ギャバン
alias: "Ya-san" ( ヤーさん , Yā-san ? )
epithet: "Mountain-Eater" ( 山喰らい , Yamagurai ? ) ; "Left Hand of the Pirate King" ( 海賊王の左腕 , Kaizoku-Ō no Hidariude ? )
intro_text: Scopper Gaban , also known as the "Mountain-Eater" , [ 5 ] is a legendary retired pirate and former navigator [ 4 ] of the Roger Pirates . [ 1 ] His fame is said to rival that of his crewmates Gol D. Roger and Silvers Rayleigh , being known as the "Left Hand of the Pirate King" . After the disbandment of the Roger Pirates and the execution of Roger, Gaban has come to live out his retirement on Elbaph , alongside his partner Ripley and their son Colon , being known to the giant locals as Ya-san . [ 3 ] First introduced in Buggy 's flashback sequence in the Orange Town Arc and later seen in Kouzuki Oden 's flashbacks during his time with the Roger Pirates, Gaban made his present-day debut in the series through the " From the Decks of the World " cover story , [ 7 ] before eventually playing an active role in the main storyline during the Elbaph Arc where he acts as an ally of the Straw Hat Pirates .

name: Scorpionlady
intro_text: Scorpionlady [ 3 ] is a Gifter in the Beasts Pirates and a member of the crew's Armored Division. [ 1 ] During the Raid on Onigashima , she was tamed by the power of the Kibi Kibi no Mi and joined the side of the Ninja-Pirate-Mink-Samurai Alliance . [ 2 ]

name: Sea Beast Weapons
intro_text: Sea Beast Weapons Statistics Japanese Name: 海獣兵器 Romanized Name: Shī Bīsuto Uepon Official English Name: Sea Beast Weapons First Appearance: Chapter 1062 ; Episode 1091 [ 1 ] Habitat: Egghead [ 1 ] Affiliation: Vegapunk [ 1 ] The Sea Beast Weapons are Sea Beasts cyberized by Vegapunk . They guard the waters around Egghead . [ 1 ]

name: Sea Boar
intro_text: The Sea Boar is a sea creature that debuted in Hatchan's Sea-Floor Stroll .

name: Sea King
english_name: Sea Kings (uncut Funimation dub); Neptunians (4Kids, VIZ, edited Funimation dub, Funimation subs)
intro_text: Sea King Statistics Japanese Name: 海王類 Romanized Name: Kaiō-rui Official English Name: Sea Kings (uncut Funimation dub); Neptunians (4Kids, VIZ, edited Funimation dub, Funimation subs) First Appearance: Chapter 1 , Episode 4 (Seen) [ 1 ] ; Chapter 92 , Episode 42 (Named) [ 2 ] Literal Meaning: Sea King Species Habitat: Blue Sea (particularly Calm Belt ) Size: Over 5000m (16,400') by estimate [ 3 ] Sea Kings are huge, carnivorous monsters that inhabit all of the world 's oceans . [ 1 ] They are especially prevalent throughout the Calm Belts surrounding the Grand Line , and as such are one of the most common—and notorious—hazards encountered by seafarers in the area. [ 4 ] Though somewhat similar in habitats and behavior, they should not be confused with Sea Beasts , the (generally) smaller and more docile mammals that also inhabit the world's oceans. [ 5 ]

name: Sea Cat
intro_text: Sea Beast Statistics Japanese Name: 海獣 Romanized Name: Kaijū First Appearance: Chapter 73 , Episode 31 [ 1 ] Habitat: Grand Line ; Coast of Sandy Island ; Near Fish-Man Island Sea Beasts are a class of large aquatic mammals that inhabit the Grand Line , notable for their uncanny resemblance to surface mammals. The first Sea Beast encountered in the series is the Sea Cow Momoo . [ 1 ] Though somewhat similar in habitats and behavior, they should not be confused with Sea Kings , the (generally) larger and more vicious non-mammals that also inhabit the world's oceans. [ 2 ]

name: Scotch
epithet: "Iron Boy" ( アイアンボーイ , Aian Bōi ? )
intro_text: "Iron Boy" Scotch [ 2 ] is a member of the Beasts Pirates working as the guardian of one of the former Emperor Kaidou 's favorite islands. [ 1 ]

name: Sasaki
epithet: "Overflowing Sasaki" ( 盛っ切りのササキ , Mokkiri no Sasaki ? )
devil_fruit_name: Ryu Ryu no Mi, Model: Triceratops
intro_text: "Overflowing" Sasaki [ 3 ] [ 6 ] is a bluespine unicornfish fish-man [ 7 ] and one of the Tobiroppo , the strongest six Shinuchi of the Beasts Pirates. [ 8 ] He also leads the crew's Armored Division. [ 9 ] Before joining the Beasts Pirates, he captained his own crew [ 4 ] called the Sasaki Pirates . [ 3 ] Due to his actions and role, he is a supporting antagonist in the Wano Country Arc .

name: Seagull Guns Nozdon
japanese_name: シーガル・ガンズ・ノズドン
intro_text: Seagull Guns Nozdon [ 3 ] is a former member of the Roger Pirates . [ 2 ]

name: Seaman Recruits
intro_text: Marine Ranks Statistics Explained in: SBS Volume 8 [ 1 ] SBS Volume 24 [ 2 ] SBS Volume 29 [ 3 ] SBS Volume 98 [ 4 ] The ranks within the Marine System are fairly straightforward, where each rank is clearly delineated. [ 1 ] Officers present at Marine Headquarters are considered the elite forces of the Marines, about three ranks higher in terms of power from those of the same rank at other bases. All ranks present from "Lieutenant" above are usually trained here, exceptions being those in command of other Marine bases which includes Axe-Hand Morgan and Nezumi . [ 3 ] This page will list the Marine ranks and the soldiers who hold the titles.

name: Seamars
intro_text: Captain Seamars [ 2 ] is the captain of the Space Pirates who appears in Enel 's cover story.

name: Seki
intro_text: Seki [ 4 ] is the deposed king of Lulusia Kingdom [ 3 ] and one of fifty monarchs who took part in the Levely . [ 1 ] He is the father of Princess Komane . [ 3 ]

name: Seira
intro_text: Seira is a bluestriped angelfish mermaid and one of the top five Mermaid Cafe Dancers . [ 2 ]

name: Sengoku
occupation: Inspector General; Fleet Admiral (former); Admiral (former); Admiral (former) ; Vice Admiral (former)
epithet: "Sengoku the Buddha" ( 仏のセンゴク , Hotoke no Sengoku ? , Funimation subs : "Saint Sengoku") ; "The Resourceful General" ( 智将 , Chishō ? )
devil_fruit_name: Hito Hito no Mi, Model: Daibutsu
intro_text: Sengoku the Buddha [ 13 ] is a former Fleet Admiral of the Marines , [ 2 ] succeeding Kong and preceding Sakazuki . [ 5 ] He retired from his leadership position after the Summit War of Marineford , [ 3 ] but remained in the Marines as an Inspector General . [ 4 ] He was also one of the major figures from the time when Gol D. Roger , the "Pirate King", was still alive, and still continues to be in the present, even after his retirement from the Marines. He raised Donquixote Rosinante into a Marine and treated him like his own son. [ 14 ] Due to his actions and his position in the Marines, he is a major antagonist in the Marineford Arc .

name: Serizawa
intro_text: Serizawa [ 2 ] is a dyer and instructor who taught Bellamy in the cover page serial The Stories of the Self-Proclaimed Straw Hat Grand Fleet . [ 1 ]

name: Sennorikyuru
intro_text: Sennorikyuru is the master of tea ceremonies and is considered the best cook of Wano Country . [ 2 ] [ 1 ]

name: Senor Pink
intro_text: Senor Pink [ 1 ] is an assassin and officer of the Donquixote Pirates ' Diamante Army. [ 2 ] [ 5 ] He was also the husband of Russian and the father of Gimlet . [ 6 ] Due to his actions and role, he is a supporting antagonist during the Dressrosa Arc .

name: Scratchmen Apoo
japanese_name: スクラッチメン・アプー
epithet: "Roar of the Sea" ( 海鳴り , Umi Nari ? )
intro_text: Scratchmen Apoo , [ 9 ] also known as "Roar of the Sea" , is the captain of the On Air Pirates [ 1 ] and was formerly an informant for the Beasts Pirates , led by Kaidou of the Four Emperors . [ 2 ] [ 3 ] He is a member of the Longarm Tribe and one of twelve pirates who are referred to as the " Worst Generation ", being one of the eleven Supernovas who came to Sabaody Archipelago two years ago with a bounty of 198,000,000. [ 1 ] [ 10 ] Two years later, his bounty increased to 350,000,000. [ 7 ] Due to his actions and role, he is a supporting antagonist in the Wano Country Arc .

name: Seto
intro_text: Seto was one of the Shandia who lived on Jaya four hundred years ago. [ 1 ] He was the husband of Kalgara 's daughter Mousse , making him an ancestor to Wyper . [ 3 ]

name: Shaka
intro_text: Shaka , also designated as Punk-01 ( PUNK-01 , Panku-Wan ? ) , is one of the six satellites of Dr. Vegapunk , embodying his aspect of "good". [ 1 ] He is a major ally of the Straw Hat Pirates during the Egghead Arc .

name: Shachi
intro_text: Shachi [ 5 ] is a member of the Heart Pirates . [ 1 ]

name: Shakuyaku
affiliation: Shakky's Rip-off Bar ; Kuja ; Kuja Pirates (former)
occupation: Bartender; Pirate Captain (former); First Mate (former); Empress of Amazon Lily (former)
alias: "Shakky" ( シャッキー , Shakkī ? )
intro_text: Shakuyaku , [ 3 ] [ 5 ] most commonly known by her nickname Shakky , is the bartender of Shakky's Rip-off Bar on the Sabaody Archipelago [ 1 ] (formerly on Hachinosu over 40 years ago). [ 6 ] She lives with her husband Silvers Rayleigh . [ 7 ] Shakky formerly served in the Kuja Pirates as the First Mate of Gloriosa , her captain and the Kuja tribe's empress . She later succeeded Gloriosa as both the Kuja Pirates' captain as well as the Kuja's empress, before eventually being succeeded by Tritoma and Boa Hancock . [ 2 ] During her youth, Shakky was chased by the legendary Marine , Monkey D. Garp . [ 8 ] After retiring as empress and captain, she opened her bar at Hachinosu, becoming famous in the world of pirates alongside her bar. While she was beloved by both the Rocks Pirates and Roger Pirates , she only had eyes for Silvers Rayleigh, the Roger Pirates' First Mate . 38 years ago, Shakky was kidnapped and made the ultimate prize for the winner of the Native Hunting Competition on God Valley , which served as one of the major triggers of the God Valley Incident . [ 9 ] She was rescued by Rayleigh, which ultimately solidified their romantic relationship. She is a minor ally of the Straw Hat Pirates during the Sabaody Archipelago Arc .

name: Shanba
intro_text: Shanba [ 4 ] is an inhabitant of Torino Kingdom . He was first seen at the time of Chopper 's arrival. [ 2 ]

name: Sham
epithet: "Nyaban Brothers" ( ニャーバン 兄弟 , Nyāban Burazāzu ? , English versions: "Meowban Brothers")
intro_text: Sham is an officer of the Black Cat Pirates . [ 2 ] Along with his partner Buchi , he is also the protector of the crew's ship, the Bezan Black , and together they are known as the Nyaban Brothers ( ニャーバン・ 兄弟 , Nyāban Burazāzu ? ) . [ 1 ] Due to his actions, he is a supporting antagonist during the Syrup Village Arc .

name: Shandia Chief
intro_text: The Shandia chief is the leader of the Shandia tribe.

name: Seven Warlords of the Sea
english_name: Seven Warlords of the Sea (VIZ, Funimation, 4Kids); Seven Sea Warriors (Odex); Seven Royal Seas (Manga Entertainment)
intro_text: Seven Warlords of the Sea Statistics Japanese Name: 王下七武海 Romanized Name: Ōka Shichibukai Official English Name: Seven Warlords of the Sea (VIZ, Funimation, 4Kids); Seven Sea Warriors (Odex); Seven Royal Seas (Manga Entertainment) First Appearance: Chapter 49 ; Episode 23 (seen); [ 1 ] Chapter 69 ; Episode 31 (named) [ 2 ] Literal Meaning: (Royal) Seven Martial-Seas Total Former Bounty: At least 871,000,000 [ Bounty 1 ] [ 3 ] [ 4 ] At least 1,651,000,000 [ Bounty 2 ] [ 6 ] At least 716,000,000 [ Bounty 3 ] [ 7 ] [ 8 ] At least 1,286,000,000 [ Bounty 4 ] [ 10 ] At least 1,367,000,000 [ Bounty 5 ] Affiliation: World Government (former) Occupation: Sanctioned Privateers The Seven Warlords of the Sea , or simply the Seven Warlords , were a selection of seven incredibly powerful and notorious pirates authorized by the World Government . [ 2 ] Collectively, they comprised one of the Three Great Powers keeping the world in balance. [ 15 ] After two members ( Crocodile and Donquixote Doflamingo ) were exposed and arrested for undermining important kingdoms, Marine Admiral Fujitora led a campaign against the Warlords system, and during the next Levely a majority of kings voted to abolish it entirely. As a result, all of the remaining Warlords were reverted to wanted criminals. [ 16 ] Currently, the World Government is advancing the SSG 's Seraphim as a replacement. [ 17 ] The Seven Warlords of the Sea are a major group in the overall storyline, with most of its individual members encountering the Straw Hat Pirates at many different junctures, serving as both enemies and allies.

name: Shandia
intro_text: Shandia Statistics Japanese Name: シャンディア Official English Name: Shandians (VIZ); Loftrians (Edited dub); Shandorians (Uncut dub) First Appearance: Chapter 221 ; Episode 145 Features: Wings Homeland: Jaya The Shandia is a tribe of people originating from the Moon and later lived on Jaya . They currently reside within Skypiea .

name: Shark
intro_text: Megalo is a shark that lives on Fish-Man Island . He is the beloved pet of princess Shirahoshi [ 3 ] and former pet of the Neptune Army. [ 2 ]

name: Sheepshead
occupation: Shinuchi of the Gifters ( ギフターズ真打ち , Gifutāzu Shin'uchi ? )
intro_text: Sheepshead is a Shinuchi of the Beasts Pirates who was in charge of the Gifters on Zou. [ 2 ]

name: Shells Town
intro_text: Shells Town Statistics Japanese Name: シェルズタウン Romanized Name: Sheruzu Taun English Name: Shells Town; Naval Base Island ( 4Kids ) First appearance: Chapter 3 ; Episode 1 Region: East Blue (Yotsuba Island Region) Shells Town [ 1 ] is located in the Yotsuba Island Region ( ヨツバ島海域 , Yotsuba-tō Kaiiki ? ) of East Blue . [ 2 ] The town is distinguished by its skyline of power plant-shaped towers, each bristling with cannons. It serves as the third setting in the Romance Dawn Arc .

name: Shelly
intro_text: Shelly is Tonjit 's hooorse and an animal of Long Ring Long Land . [ 1 ]

name: Sharinguru
intro_text: Captain Sharinguru [ 3 ] [ 4 ] is a Marine captain who helped in the Buster Call on Enies Lobby . [ 1 ]

name: Sentomaru
occupation: Marine Officer (former); Captain of the Science Unit (former); Dr. Vegapunk 's bodyguard (former)
intro_text: Sentomaru [ 5 ] is a former Marine Officer [ 2 ] and the former captain ( 隊長 , taichō ? ) of the Marines' Science Unit , as well as Dr. Vegapunk 's former bodyguard. [ 3 ] He turned against the World Government and the Marines by siding with Vegapunk and the Straw Hat Pirates during the Egghead Incident . [ 7 ] Due to his actions, he can be considered a supporting antagonist in the Sabaody Archipelago Arc and the Marineford Arc and the secondary antagonist of the Return to Sabaody Arc . He is an ally of the Straw Hat Pirates in the Egghead Arc .

name: Shepherd Sommers
japanese_name: シェパード・ソマーズ聖
affiliation: Knights of God ; World Nobles ( Shepherd Family )
intro_text: Saint Shepherd Sommers [ 3 ] is a World Noble and a member of the Knights of God . [ 1 ] Due to his actions and role, he is a major antagonist in the Elbaph Arc .

name: Shift Station
intro_text: Shift Station Statistics Japanese Name: シフト 駅 Romanized Name: Shifuto Sutēshon English Name: Shift Station First appearance: Chapter 322 ; Episode 228 Region: Paradise The Shift Station is the small stop where Kokoro , Chimney , and Gonbe were found by the Straw Hat Pirates . It is a small station in the middle of the ocean, serving as a quick stop for the Sea Train . [ 1 ] After the timeskip, Chimney is in charge of running it on Sundays. [ 2 ]

name: Shiki
first_appearance: Chapter 0 ; Chapter 530 (mentioned); Episode 425 ; One Piece Film: Strong World
affiliation: Golden Lion Pirates ; Rocks Pirates (former); Impel Down (former)
occupation: Pirate Captain / Admiral ; Prisoner of the Great Prison (former); Mobster ( 極道 , Gokudō ? )
epithet: "Shiki the Golden Lion" ( 金獅子のシキ , Kinjishi no Shiki ? ) ; "The Flying Pirate" ( 空飛ぶ海賊 , Soratobu Kaizoku ? )
intro_text: Shiki the Golden Lion , also known as the "Flying Pirate" , [ 1 ] is the admiral and helmsman of the Golden Lion Pirates . [ 7 ] He is also a former member of the Rocks Pirates [ 3 ] and the first known [ 8 ] prisoner to have ever escaped from Impel Down . [ 1 ] Shiki wreaked havoc on the seas during Roger 's time, having commanded the largest pirate fleet of that period. Considered one of Roger's greatest rivals, Shiki desired to conquer the world . [ 9 ] He is the main antagonist of One Piece Film: Strong World .

name: Shepherd Ju Peter
japanese_name: シェパード・ 十 ・ピーター聖
affiliation: Five Elders ; World Nobles ( Shepherd Family )
occupation: Co-Head of the World Government (Public) ; Warrior God of Agriculture ( 農務武神 , Nōmu Bushin ? , English versions: "Godhead of Agriculture")
intro_text: Saint Shepherd Ju Peter [ 3 ] [ 4 ] is a World Noble of the Shepherd Family and one of the Five Elders who publicly head the World Government , [ 1 ] holding the title of Warrior God of Agriculture . [ 3 ] He is one of the secondary antagonists of the Egghead Arc . Along with the other Elders, he is one of the main antagonists of the Final Saga and one of the overarching antagonists of the One Piece series.

name: Shimotsuki Koushirou
intro_text: Shimotsuki Koushirou [ 1 ] [ 3 ] is a member of the Shimotsuki Family and a master swordsman , he was both the teacher of as well as the distant relative of Roronoa Zoro . He is also the father of the late Shimotsuki Kuina [ 4 ] and son of Shimotsuki Kouzaburou . [ 5 ] He is the master of Isshin Dojo in Shimotsuki Village . [ 2 ]

name: Shikon Kettai
intro_text: Shikon Kettai [ 3 ] is a member of the Germ Pirates . [ 2 ]

name: Shimotsuki Kouzaburou
intro_text: Shimotsuki Kouzaburou [ 3 ] was a member of the Shimotsuki Family and a swordsmith who crafted the Great Grade Blades , Wado Ichimonji and Enma . He was born in Wano Country , but illegally departed from there 55 years ago [ 2 ] and eventually settled down in what became Shimotsuki Village in the East Blue . There, he fathered a son named Koushirou , making him the grandfather of Koushirou's daughter Kuina . [ 4 ]

name: Shimotsuki Ushimaru
intro_text: Shimotsuki Ushimaru was a member of the Shimotsuki Family , and the last daimyo of Ringo in Wano Country before the takeover of Kurozumi Orochi as shogun 20 years ago. [ 1 ] He was a direct descendant of the legendary samurai Shimotsuki Ryuma [ 3 ] and the great-uncle of Roronoa Zoro through his older sister Furiko . [ 4 ] After failing to depose Orochi, Ushimaru abandoned his name in shame [ 5 ] and referred to himself as "So-and-So" ( 某 , Nanigashi ? ) . Alongside fellow daimyo Fugetsu Omusubi and Uzuki Tempura , he helped inspire a young Yamato , the son of their nemesis Kaidou , to pursue his dream of becoming Kouzuki Oden . [ 6 ]

name: Shimotsuki Village
intro_text: Shimotsuki Village Statistics Japanese Name: シモツキ村 Romanized Name: Shimotsuki-mura English Name: Frost Moon Village (VIZ); Shimotsuki Village (Funimation) First appearance: Chapter 5 ; Episode 2 Region: East Blue Shimotsuki Village [ 1 ] is a village in East Blue and Roronoa Zoro 's homeland. It was founded by pirates, around 52 years ago. [ 2 ] [ 3 ] The village was named after Shimotsuki Kouzaburou , a member of the Shimotsuki Family from Wano Country and one of the village's aforementioned founders.

name: Shimotsuki Kuina
intro_text: Shimotsuki Kuina [ 2 ] was a childhood friend, relative and rival of Roronoa Zoro . She was the daughter of Shimotsuki Koushirou [ 6 ] and the granddaughter of Shimotsuki Kouzaburou [ 7 ] making her a descendant of Wano Country 's famed Shimotsuki Family . [ 8 ] Her death at the age of eleven drove much of Zoro's ambitions as a swordsman , including his development of the Three Sword Style . [ 1 ]

name: Shin Detamaruka
intro_text: Shin Detamaruka [ 2 ] is a citizen of Dressrosa and a former dancer. She is the grandmother of Shin Jaiya . [ 1 ]

name: Shimotsuki Ryuma
epithet: Legendary Samurai ( 伝説の侍 , Densetsu no Samurai ? ) ; Sword God ( 刀神様 , Tōjin-sama ? , VIZ: "God of the Blade") ; Ryuma de King ( リューマ・ド・キング , Ryūma do Kingu ? )
intro_text: Shimotsuki Ryuma [ 7 ] [ 5 ] was a legendary, world-famous samurai hailing from the Shimotsuki Family of Wano Country , who lived during Wano's "Country of Gold" era around 400 years ago. [ 8 ] He was revered for his mastery of swordsmanship that earned him the title Sword God , as well as his feat of slaying a dragon. [ 9 ] [ 2 ] [ 10 ] He is the direct ancestor of Shimotsuki Ushimaru and Roronoa Zoro . [ 1 ] [ 11 ] 23 years before the current storyline, Ryuma's consecrated grave in Ringo was ransacked and both his corpse and sword, Shusui were stolen by Gecko Moria . [ 12 ] Eventually, his corpse was reanimated by Brook 's shadow and turned into a zombie to serve Moria on Thriller Bark , [ 2 ] [ 13 ] until it was destroyed by Zoro himself in a sword duel while his sword was eventually returned to his grave. He is the same Ryuma from Oda 's one-shot Monsters and its anime adaptation, Monsters: 103 Mercies Dragon Damnation . [ 14 ]

name: Shimotsuki Yasuie
alias: "Tonoyasu" ( トの康 , Tonoyasu ? )
epithet: "Yasu the Hedgehog" ( ハリネズミの康 , Harinezumi no Yasu ? )
intro_text: Shimotsuki Yasuie , [ 5 ] also known as " Yasu the Hedgehog ", Tonoyasu , or just Yasu ( ヤス , Yasu ? ) , was a member of the Shimotsuki Family and a taikomochi who lived in Ebisu Town near the capital of Wano Country . [ 1 ] He was the adoptive father of Toko . [ 4 ] Back when the Kouzuki Family ruled over Wano Country , Yasuie served as the daimyo of Hakumai . [ 3 ] Twenty years after Kurozumi Orochi 's takeover of Wano, Yasuie sacrificed himself in an effort to mislead the shogun's forces and enable Kouzuki Momonosuke 's revolution to continue. [ 6 ]

name: Shin Jaiya
intro_text: Shin Jaiya [ 2 ] is a citizen of Dressrosa . She is the granddaughter of Shin Detamaruka . [ 1 ]

name: Shipwright
intro_text: Shipwright Statistics Japanese Name: 船大工 Romanized Name: Funadaiku First Appearance: Chapter 37 ; Episode 10 [ 1 ] A Shipwright is a carpenter who works specifically on ships . They are responsible for the building and repair of the ship, meaning most pirates need them around for general maintenance of their vessels. Other ships often have them as well. The city of Water 7 , in particular, is renowned worldwide for its highly skilled shipwrights.

name: Shine
intro_text: Shine is a Marine Chief Petty Officer who works under the command of Hina . [ 1 ] [ 2 ]

name: Shioyaki
intro_text: Shioyaki is a salmon fish-man who was a member of the Arlong Pirates and the head of banquets. [ 3 ] [ 2 ]

name: Shinosuke
intro_text: Shinosuke is a ninja who serves the Kouzuki Family . [ 1 ] He is Shinobu 's older brother. [ 3 ]

name: Shirahoshi
alias: " Poseidon " ( ポセイドン , Poseidon ? )
epithet: "Mermaid Princess" ( 人魚姫 , Ningyo Hime ? )
intro_text: Princess Shirahoshi , famous in the world as the Mermaid Princess ( 人魚姫 , Ningyo Hime ? ) , [ 5 ] is a giant smelt-whiting mermaid and the princess of the Ryugu Kingdom , as the youngest of King Neptune 's children and the only daughter in the Neptune royal family . [ 2 ] [ 8 ] Having been locked up and raised inside an impregnable tower for most of her childhood thanks to the constant threat of Vander Decken IX , Shirahoshi wishes to know more about the outside world, following the will of her late mother, Queen Otohime . She is also the current incarnation of the Ancient Weapon Poseidon , to the knowledge of very few. [ 4 ] [ 9 ] [ 10 ] [ 11 ] Shirahoshi was first mentioned by Pappag well before her debut, the starfish claiming he knew her and even promising to introduce the Straw Hat Pirates to her if they arrived on Fish-Man Island (which would later turn out to be a lie). [ 5 ] [ 2 ] She is a major ally during the Fish-Man Island Arc .

name: Shanks
affiliation: Red Hair Pirates ; Four Emperors ; Roger Pirates (former); Knights of God (former); World Nobles ( Figarland Family ) (former)
occupation: Chief ; Emperor ; Apprentice (former); Devoted Blade of God (former);
epithet: "Red-Haired Shanks" ( 赤髪のシャンクス , Akagami no Shankusu ? )
intro_text: "Red-Haired" Shanks , [ 12 ] commonly known as just "Red Hair" , [ 16 ] is the chief [ 7 ] of the Red Hair Pirates [ 2 ] and one of the Four Emperors that rule over the New World . [ 3 ] Born in God Valley to the Figarland Family of the World Nobles , Shanks is the son of Figarland Garling and the younger twin brother of Shamrock . [ 6 ] However, as an infant during the God Valley Incident , [ 17 ] Shanks was bequeathed to Monkey D. Dragon by his mother Magnolia . He ended up in a treasure chest which was stolen by the Roger Pirates , resulting in him being adopted and raised onboard the Oro Jackson . He served on Gol D. Roger 's crew as an apprentice alongside Buggy . [ 4 ] After Roger's death, Shanks began to assemble his own crew, only to then return to Mary Geoise to reunite with his family and join the Knights of God , becoming Saint Shanks ( シャンクス聖 , Shankusu Sei ? ) . [ 5 ] However, Shanks ultimately abdicated his noble status after working against Mary Geoise; [ 6 ] he then rapidly attained infamy as a pirate before being named as one of the Emperors six years ago. [ 18 ] Shanks is a major figure in Monkey D. Luffy 's life, having saved his life as a child twelve years ago and inspiring Luffy to set his own path as a pirate to surpass him someday. [ 19 ] He gave Luffy the straw hat that Roger once wore, as a symbol of their promise to meet again once Luffy had surpassed him, and also accidentally enabled Luffy to eat the Gomu Gomu no Mi . [ 20 ] Two years ago, Shanks was pivotal in bringing the Summit War of Marineford to a close. [ 21 ] Following the downfall of his rival Emperors in Wano Country , Shanks has set his sights on claiming the One Piece . [ 22 ] Shanks has been an important background character throughout the series, usually being shown acknowledging Luffy's ever-growing reputation as a pirate. He serves as a minor ally to Luffy during both the Marineford and Wano Country Arcs . He and his crew also have a sizable role in One Piece Film: Red , which centers on Uta , Shanks' adopted daughter.

name: Shoujou Pirates
intro_text: Shoujou Pirates Statistics Japanese Name: ショウジョウ海賊団 Romanized Name: Shōjō Kaizokudan Official English Name: Shoujou Pirates First Appearance: Chapter 226 , Episode 147 [ 1 ] Captain: Shoujou [ 1 ] Main Ship: Utan Sonar Total Bounty: At least 36,000,000 [ bounty 1 ] The Shoujou Pirates is a crew of treasure hunters and echolocating explorers. Their captain is Shoujou . They are part of the Saruyama Alliance , alongside the Masira Pirates and Mont Blanc Cricket . [ 1 ]

name: Shishilian
affiliation: Mokomo Dukedom ; Inuarashi Musketeer Squad ; Ninja-Pirate-Mink-Samurai Alliance

intro_text: "Full Power" Shishilian [ 2 ] [ 4 ] is a lion mink and the captain of the Inuarashi Musketeer Squad , as well as one of the Three Inuarashi Musketeers leading the squad. [ 2 ]

name: Shu
intro_text: Captain Shu [ 3 ] was one of the Marine captains that helped in the Buster Call on Enies Lobby .
