devil_fruit_english_name: Ripe-Ripe Enticement Jutsu (VIZ and Funimation); Ripe-Ripe Fruit (One Piece Official YouTube Channel)
intro_text: Shinobu is a kunoichi from Wano Country and a retainer of the Kouzuki Family , [ 1 ] [ 7 ] having once served in the Oniwabanshu of the Kouzuki Shogunate and trained under Kin'emon as his protégée. [ 2 ] She is also the younger sister of Shinosuke . [ 8 ] She is an ally of the Straw Hat Pirates during the Wano Country Arc .

name: Shura
epithet: "Sky Rider" ( スカイライダー , Sukai Raidā ? )
intro_text: "Sky Rider" Shura is one of the four former priests of the Upper Yard , who punished criminals with the Ordeal of String during Enel 's reign. [ 2 ] He rode a giant flying bird named Fuza . [ 1 ] He is a major antagonist during the Skypiea Arc .

name: Shyarly
occupation: Proprietor of the Mermaid Cafe; Fortune teller (former)
residence: Coral Hill ( Mermaid Cove ) Fish-Man District (former)
epithet: Madam Shyarly ( マダム・シャーリー , Madamu Shārī ? )
intro_text: Madam Shyarly [ 7 ] is a shortfin mako shark mermaid living on Fish-Man Island . She is the proprietor of the Mermaid Cafe [ 2 ] and Arlong 's younger half-sister. [ 5 ] She used to be a fortune teller until she decided to discard her crystal ball. [ 3 ]

name: Sicily
intro_text: Sicily [ 4 ] is a Marine Rear Admiral . [ 1 ]

name: Shutenmaru
affiliation: Mt. Atama Thieves ; Kouzuki Family ; Nine Red Scabbards ; Ninja-Pirate-Mink-Samurai Alliance (disbanded)
occupation: Bandit ; Retainer of the Kouzuki Family; Yakuza Boss (former); Samurai
alias: Shutenmaru ( 酒天丸 , Shutenmaru ? )
epithet: Strongest Monster of Kuri ( 九里最強の怪物 , Kuri Saikyō no Kaibutsu ? , VIZ Media: "Strongest Monster in Kuri")
intro_text: Ashura Doji [ 11 ] was a bandit , samurai from Wano Country and a retainer of the Kouzuki Family , serving as one of Kouzuki Oden 's Nine Red Scabbards . [ 12 ] After Oden's death, he returned to being a criminal under the name Shutenmaru , [ 13 ] assuming leadership of the Mt. Atama Thieves . [ 2 ] He initially severed his ties with the Kouzuki Family in the present but rejoined after witnessing Yasuie 's death. [ 14 ] Ashura eventually met his demise during the Raid on Onigashima , sacrificing himself to protect his fellow Scabbards from one of Kanjuro 's schemes. [ 15 ] He is an ally of the Straw Hat Pirates during the Wano Country Arc .

name: Shoujou
epithet: "Sonar King" Shoujou ( 海底探索王ショウジョウ , Kaitei Tansaku Ō Shōjō ? )
intro_text: "Sonar King" Shoujou [ 2 ] is the big boss ( 大園長 , ō bosu ? ) of the Shoujou Pirates , the head of underwater sonar operations around Jaya 's coast, the sworn brother of Masira , and a follower of Mont Blanc Cricket , as part of the Saruyama Alliance . He and Masira were both fans of Liar Noland , the fairy tale concerning Cricket's ancestor, Mont Blanc Noland . He became an ally of the Straw Hat Pirates during the Jaya Arc .

name: Sig
intro_text: Sig [ 2 ] is a member of the Giant Warrior Pirates . He serves as a minor ally during the Egghead Arc .

name: Sind
intro_text: Sind is a child who was held captive in the Biscuits Room on Punk Hazard . [ 1 ] [ 2 ] He was freed with the rest of the children by the Straw Hat Pirates .

name: Shiryu
occupation: Titanic Captain (Captain of the Second Ship); Head Jailer (former); Prisoner of the Great Prison (former)
epithet: "Shiryu of the Rain" ( 雨のシリュウ , Ame no Shiryū ? )
intro_text: Shiryu of the Rain [ 9 ] is one of the Ten Titanic Captains of the Blackbeard Pirates , serving as the captain of the second ship of the fleet . [ 5 ] He was originally introduced as the ex-Head Jailer of Impel Down , who had himself been imprisoned on Level 6 death row for his excessive, murderous violence against prisoners. [ 1 ] When temporarily released to help Magellan quell the prison riot caused by Monkey D. Luffy and Marshall D. Teach coming to Impel Down, [ 4 ] he chose to go against what he was ordered and instead assist the Blackbeard Pirates, ultimately deciding to join them. [ 2 ] [ 3 ] Due to his actions and role, he is a supporting antagonist in the Impel Down and Marineford Arcs , a minor antagonist in the Egghead Arc , and a major antagonist in the Final Saga .

name: Skaldi
intro_text: Skaldi [ 2 ] is a student at the Walrus School on Elbaph . [ 1 ]

name: Skull
intro_text: Skull [ 2 ] is a member of the Spade Pirates and, subsequently, the Whitebeard Pirates . [ 1 ]

name: Silvers Rayleigh
japanese_name: シルバーズ・レイリー
epithet: "Dark King" ( 冥王 , Meiō ? ) ; "Right Hand of the Pirate King" ( 海賊王の右腕 , Kaizoku-Ō no Migiude ? )
intro_text: Silvers Rayleigh , [ 2 ] [ 9 ] also known as the "Dark King" , [ 4 ] is a legendary retired pirate who formerly served as the first mate of the Roger Pirates , [ 3 ] being known as the "Right Hand of the Pirate King" . [ 2 ] He is one of the major figures from the time when Gol D. Roger , the "Pirate King", was still alive. After the disbandment of the Roger Pirates and the execution of Roger, Rayleigh became a coating mechanic at the Sabaody Archipelago . Also, at some point after this, he became the husband of Shakuyaku and befriended Hatchan . [ 10 ] Through Hatchan, Rayleigh became acquainted with the Straw Hat Pirates and volunteered to coat their ship so that they could continue their journey to the New World . [ 11 ] Following the Summit War of Marineford , Rayleigh tutored Monkey D. Luffy in Haki to prepare him for the challenges ahead and two years later saw Luffy and his crew off from Sabaody Archipelago, completing the job he had started for them. [ 12 ] After the Seven Warlords of the Sea were disbanded and the Emperor Blackbeard invaded Amazon Lily , Rayleigh personally intervened to put an end to the hostilities and intimidated the Emperor into retreating. [ 13 ] Rayleigh is an ally of the Straw Hat Pirates during the Sabaody Archipelago Arc and Return to Sabaody Arc , and served as Luffy's mentor during the two-year timeskip. [ 12 ]

name: Skeleton Masked Man
epithet: "Mountain Wind" ( 山風 , Yamakaze ? )
devil_fruit_name: Ushi Ushi no Mi, Model: Giraffe
intro_text: Kaku [ 12 ] is a masked agent of CP0 . [ 2 ] He was previously an assassin of CP9 , operating undercover in order to obtain the Pluton blueprints from Iceburg . [ 5 ] While undercover, he acted as one of the five foremen of Galley-La Company 's Dock One, specializing in mechanics, diagnostics, and housecalls. [ 6 ] He is a major antagonist in the Water 7 and Enies Lobby Arcs , and a supporting antagonist in the Egghead Arc , later turned reluctant temporary ally of the Straw Hat Pirates during the latter Arc.

name: Slaves
intro_text: Slavery Statistics Japanese Name: 奴隷制 Romanized Name: Dorei-sei First Appearance: Chapter 497 ; Episode 391 [ 1 ] Slavery is the act of owning, treating, and/or exchanging unwilling people as property, usually to exploit them for labor. Though nominally outlawed by the World Government , slavery continues as an institution in various parts of the world , under both legal and illegal conditions.

[ 1 ] It is the primary setting of the Skypiea Arc , and the sixth island visited by the Straw Hat Pirates on the Grand Line .

intro_text: "Rebar" Smooge is an ex-prisoner and former member of the Centaur Patrol Unit under Brownbeard , having served as one of Caesar Clown ’s henchmen. [ 1 ]

[ 5 ] [ 6 ] It was kept in the Burning Lands before being released. [ 1 ]

name: Smoker
occupation: Vice Admiral ; ; Base Commander of G-5; Commander of G-5 Unit 01; Commodore (former); Captain (former)
epithet: "Smoker the White Hunter" ( 白猟のスモーカー , Hakuryō no Sumōkā ? ) ; "White Chase Smoker" (VIZ); "Smoke Hunter" (4Kids)
devil_fruit_english_name: Smoke-Smoke Fruit (4Kids); Plume-Plume Fruit (VIZ, Funimation); Steam-Steam Fruit ( Grand Adventure )
intro_text: Smoker the White Hunter is a Marine vice-admiral and the commander of G-5 Branch's Unit 01, as well as the overall Base Commander of the G-5 Marine base . Originally a ranking captain in Loguetown , [ 3 ] Smoker became fixated on Monkey D. Luffy 's Straw Hat Pirates for escaping his previously-unbroken authority, and—with his loyal subordinate Tashigi —quit his post to pursue them into the Grand Line . Since then, he has battled the Straw Hats repeatedly, in addition to many larger threats that won him new recognition and promotion through the Marine Ranks . [ 4 ] [ 9 ] One of Luffy's longest-recurring adversaries, Smoker can be considered the main antagonist of the Loguetown Arc , and a minor antagonist during the Marineford Arc . Though playing a similar role initially, he becomes a temporary ally during the Arabasta Arc and Punk Hazard Arc .

affiliation: Straw Hat Pirates ; Straw Hat Grand Fleet ; Usopp Pirates (disbanded); Ninja-Pirate-Mink-Samurai Alliance (disbanded)

alias: "Sogeking" ( そげキング , Sogekingu ? ) " Hana Arashi " "Usoland" ( ウソランド , Usorando ? ) "Uso-hachi" ( ウソ八 , Usohachi ? , English versions: Usohachi)
epithet: "King of Snipers" ( 狙撃の王様 , Sogeki no Ō-sama ? , "Sniper King" (VIZ)) ; "God" ( ゴッド , Goddo ? ) ;
intro_text: "God" Usopp [ 10 ] is the sniper of the Straw Hat Pirates and one of the Senior Officers of the Straw Hat Grand Fleet . [ 2 ] He is the fourth member of the crew and the third to join, doing so at the end of the Syrup Village Arc . Although he left the crew during the Water 7 Arc , he rejoined at the end of the Post-Enies Lobby Arc . [ 17 ] Usopp is the son of Yasopp and the late Banchina . He was born and raised in Syrup Village , serving as " captain " of the Usopp Pirates and being Kaya 's close friend. After working with the Straw Hats to defeat Kuro and the Black Cat Pirates , he was invited to join the crew. Despite his usual cowardice, Usopp dreams of becoming a brave warrior of the sea just like his father and lives every day in pursuit of living up to this dream. He first gained a bounty of 30,000,000 under his Sogeking persona after the incident at Enies Lobby . After the Dressrosa Arc , Usopp gained a bounty of 200,000,000 under his real name. Following the Raid on Onigashima , his bounty was increased to 500,000,000. [ 2 ]

name: Sora
intro_text: Sora [ 2 ] is a coris mermaid [ 3 ] and one of the Mermaid Cafe Dancers .

name: Sonieh

name: Soro
intro_text: Soro was Helmeppo 's pet wolf and the main reason that Roronoa Zoro was arrested by the Marines at Shells Town . [ 1 ] He is classified as a Type C creature, "Big Savage". [ 3 ]

Ace that was founded five years before the current storyline. The crew later disbanded when its members integrated into the Whitebeard Pirates . [ 2 ]

name: Space Pirates
intro_text: Space Pirates Statistics Japanese Name: 宇宙海賊 Romanized Name: Uchū Kaizoku Official English Name: Space Pirates First Appearance: Chapter 438 ( cover ) [ 1 ] Captain: Seamars The Space Pirates are a pirate crew of aliens originating from outer space. They are moon miners that mine anything they can find.

name: South Bird
intro_text: South Bird Jaya Skypiea Statistics Japanese Name: サウスバード Romanized Name: Sausu Bādo Official English Name: South Bird First Appearance: Chapter 230 ; Episode 149 [ 1 ] Habitat: Jaya ; Skypiea Japanese VA: Ryoko Shiraishi Masaya Takatsuka [ 2 ] Funi English VA: Colleen Clinkenbeard The South Bird is a species of bird native to the forests of Jaya and Skypiea . For unknown reasons, its head is always inclined south, regardless of its current location or position. In ancient times, prior to the development of Log Poses , some civilizations used South Birds as navigational aids.

name: Sorbet Kingdom
intro_text: Sorbet Kingdom Statistics Japanese Name: ソルベ王国 Romanized Name: Sorube Ōkoku English Name: Sorbet Kingdom First appearance: Chapter 1095 ; Episode 1129 [ 1 ] Region: South Blue [ 2 ] Affiliates: World Government [ 3 ] The Sorbet Kingdom is a nation in the South Blue that was once ruled by the revolutionary -turned- Warlord , Bartholomew Kuma . [ 3 ]

name: Spartan
intro_text: Spartan is a gladiator at the Corrida Colosseum who was going to compete for the Mera Mera no Mi , before being defeated by Luffy . [ 1 ]

name: Spector
intro_text: Spector [ 2 ] is the owner of the Tropical Hotel . [ 1 ]

name: Speed Jiru
intro_text: Speed Jiru [ 4 ] is the former 14th division commander of the Whitebeard Pirates . [ 1 ]

name: Spandine
intro_text: Spandine is the father of Spandam [ 4 ] and was CP9 's chief 22 years ago during the Ohara Incident . [ 1 ] He led the "investigation" in Ohara and was responsible for summoning the Buster Call . Presently, his political power within the World Government is weakening due to an unknown disease he has been stricken with. [ 5 ] At some point later, his sickness led to him losing all of his authority within the government. [ 6 ]

name: Spandam
occupation: CP0 Chief (former); CP9 Chief (former); CP5 Chief (former)
intro_text: Spandam is the former chief of CP9 [ 3 ] and CP5 . [ 1 ] He is the son of Spandine , who was also his predecessor as the chief of CP9. He currently serves under CP0 . [ 2 ] He planned to obtain the blueprints for Pluton and bring Nico Robin to justice. [ 10 ] Ten years ago, he framed Tom's Workers for a bombing attack on Water 7 , which caused Tom to take responsibility and be executed. As revenge, Franky disfigured his face. [ 11 ] He is the main antagonist of the Water 7 Saga , appearing as the overarching antagonist of the Water 7 Arc and the main antagonist of the Enies Lobby Arc . He also appears as a minor antagonist in One Piece Film: Gold .

name: Spencer
intro_text: Spencer [ 4 ] was a member of the Roger Pirates and their intelligence officer ( 諜報部員 , chōhō buin ? ) until the crew's dissolution. [ 1 ] [ 3 ] His current whereabouts and status are unknown.

name: Splash
japanese_name: スプラッシュとスプラッタ
english_name: Splash and Splatta Splash and Splatter ( WT100 )
intro_text: Splash and Splatter are two newkama pirate twins. They both willingly donated blood to Sanji when he was dying of severe blood loss. [ 1 ]

name: Speed
affiliation: Beasts Pirates (former); Kurozumi Tama ; Ninja-Pirate-Mink-Samurai Alliance (disbanded)
intro_text: Speed [ 5 ] is a former Shinuchi of the Beasts Pirates stationed in Bakura Town . [ 2 ] She has since become a subordinate to Kurozumi Tama due to the latter's Devil Fruit powers [ 3 ] and became an ally of the Ninja-Pirate-Mink-Samurai Alliance . [ 6 ] She has been dubbed Umami ( ウマ美 , Umami ? , English version: "Horselina") by Tama and Monkey D. Luffy .

name: Spiders Cafe
first_appearance: Original: Chapter 160 ; Episode 103 New Spiders Cafe: Chapter 409
intro_text: Spiders Cafe Statistics Japanese Name: スパイダーズカフェ Romanized Name: Supaidāzu Kafe English Name: Spider's Cafe First appearance: Original: Chapter 160 ; Episode 103 New Spiders Cafe: Chapter 409 Region: Arabasta Kingdom (Former) ‡ ; Unknown Spiders Cafe is the name of two desert-based saloons, both operated by "Poison Spider" Zala —under the name of Paula—and tied to Baroque Works . The original location, based in the Arabasta Kingdom , served as an outpost for agents prior to Operation Utopia ; its successor, known as the New Spiders Cafe ( NEW スパイダーズカフェ , Niyū Supaidāzu Kafe ? ) [ 1 ] [ 2 ] and formed in a refurbished building on an unknown island after the syndicate's collapse, is a legitimate business currently staffed by many ex-members.

name: Sphinx
intro_text: Sphinx Statistics Japanese Name: スフィンクス Romanized Name: Sufinkusu English Name: Sphinx First appearance: Chapter 909 ; Episode 890 [ 1 ] Region: New World Affiliates: Whitebeard Pirates (former) Sphinx [ 2 ] is the island in the New World where Edward Newgate was born. Unaffiliated with the World Government due to its poverty and inability to pay the Heavenly Tribute , it was previously under the protection of the Whitebeard Pirates until their disbandment and currently under one of its former members, Marco . [ 1 ] In addition, Edward Weevil also serves as the protector of the island due to being his "father's" hometown.

intro_text: "Maelstrom Spider" Squard [ 2 ] is an infamous New World pirate and the captain of the Maelstrom Spider Pirates . Squard and his crew were allies of the Whitebeard Pirates and participated in the Summit War of Marineford . [ 1 ]

name: Stainless
intro_text: Vice Admiral Stainless [ 4 ] is a Marine officer who participated in the Summit War of Marineford . In the anime, he was initially named Kaizeruhige ( カイゼルヒゲ , Kaizeruhige ? , Bandai : "Kaiser Mustache") . [ 5 ]

name: Stansen
affiliation: New Giant Warrior Pirates ; Straw Hat Grand Fleet ; Buggy's Delivery (former)
intro_text: Stansen [ 6 ] is a giant from Elbaph [ 7 ] and shipwright . A childhood friend of Hajrudin 's, [ 8 ] they sailed together in their youth. [ 9 ] Two years ago, Stansen was imprisoned in the Auction House , until he was freed alongside other slaves by Silvers Rayleigh during the Straw Hat Pirates ' assault on the business. [ 10 ] He later rejoined with Hajrudin and his New Giant Warrior Pirates as their shipwright, working as an S-Class soldier in Buggy's Delivery until Hajrudin swore loyalty to Monkey D. Luffy , when they left the organization. [ 2 ] He is a major ally of the Straw Hat Pirates during the Elbaph Arc .

name: Stalker
intro_text: Lieutenant Junior Grade Stalker is a Marine on Vice Admiral Momonga 's ship. [ 1 ]

name: Sterry
occupation: King of the Goa Kingdom; Noble (former)
intro_text: Sterry [ 4 ] is the king of  the Goa Kingdom and the husband of the queen , Sarie Nantokanette . [ 5 ] He was adopted by Sabo 's family at eight years of age, having originally been born in a separate noble family. [ 1 ]

name: Stomp
english_name: Supersonic Duck Squadron Super Spot-Billed Duck Troops ( OPCG )
intro_text: Super Spot-Billed Duck Troops Statistics Japanese Name: 超カルガモ部隊 Romanized Name: Chō Karugamo Butai Official English Name: Supersonic Duck Squadron Super Spot-Billed Duck Troops ( OPCG ) First Appearance: Chapter 180 ; Episode 111 [ 1 ] Affiliation: Arabasta Kingdom Leader(s): Karoo The Super Spot-Billed Duck Troops [ 2 ] are a family of seven Super Spot-Billed Ducks (and later one camel) who serve the kingdom of Arabasta . They are led by their captain Karoo , and are reputed to be the fastest troop in the kingdom of Arabasta . [ 1 ] All of the ducks have the strange theme of wearing different types of hats and various other jewelry and clothing. Also strange was that the last member to join the squad, Matsuge , is a camel who helped the Straw Hats confront Baroque Works .

name: Stevie
intro_text: Stevie [ 3 ] is one of the two sea train organizers in Water 7 , along with Bushon . [ 2 ]

name: Straw Hat Grand Fleet
english_name: Straw Hat Grand Fleet Straw Hat Fleet (Funimation subs)
intro_text: Straw Hat Grand Fleet Crews 1-3 Crews 4-7 Statistics Japanese Name: 麦わら大船団 Romanized Name: Mugiwara Dai-sendan Official English Name: Straw Hat Grand Fleet Straw Hat Fleet (Funimation subs) First Appearance: Chapter 800 ; Episode 745 [ 1 ] Captain: Monkey D. Luffy Total Bounty: At least 10,380,001,000 [ bounty 1 ] At least 4,725,000,100 [ bounty 2 ] At least 3,134,000,100 [ bounty 3 ] The Straw Hat Grand Fleet [ 1 ] is a fleet formed by seven pirate crews who vowed to serve under the Straw Hat Pirates . The Fleet's members were allies of Monkey D. Luffy during the Dressrosa Arc , and the central characters from The Stories of the Self-Proclaimed Straw Hat Grand Fleet Cover Page Serial.

name: Strawberry
intro_text: Vice Admiral Strawberry [ 5 ] is a Marine officer, and one of the five vice admirals who led the Buster Call assault on Enies Lobby . [ 1 ]

name: Streusen
epithet: "Gourmet Knight" ( 美食騎士 , Bishoku Kishi ? )
intro_text: "Gourmet Knight" Streusen is the executive chef of the Big Mom Pirates , [ 1 ] and is also the co-founder of the crew alongside Big Mom herself. [ 3 ] Prior to meeting Linlin, he was the chef of a pirate crew that has since fallen apart. [ 3 ] Since meeting Linlin as a child he has sailed the seas for decades by her side, even accompanying her during her time as a member of the Rocks Pirates . [ 2 ]

name: Stronger
devil_fruit_name: Uma Uma no Mi, Model: Pegasus
intro_text: Stronger [ 4 ] is the horse that Doc Q rides on. Because Doc Q is seemingly always sick, he rides on Stronger all the time, since the doctor tends to collapse if left unsupported for some time; however, Stronger is just as sick as he is. He is classified as a Type A creature, "Big Friendly". [ 5 ]

name: Stroganoff
intro_text: Stroganoff [ 2 ] is the king of the Beef Kingdom ( ビーフ王国 , Bīfu Ōkoku ? ) and one of fifty monarchs who took part in the Levely . [ 1 ] [ 2 ]

name: Straw Hat Pirates
english_name: Straw Hat Pirates; Straw Hat Crew ( OPCG )
intro_text: Straw Hat Pirates Statistics Japanese Name: 麦わらの一味 Romanized Name: Mugiwara no Ichimi Official English Name: Straw Hat Pirates; Straw Hat Crew ( OPCG ) First Appearance: Chapter 5 ; Episode 3 [ 1 ] Captain: Monkey D. Luffy Main Ship: Going Merry (Destroyed) † ( Ch.41 - 430 and Ep.17 - 312 ) Thousand Sunny ( Ch.436 -present and Ep.321 -present) Total Bounty: 8,816,001,000 [ bounty 1 ] 3,161,000,100 [ bounty 2 ] 1,570,000,100 [ bounty 3 ] 800,000,050 [ bounty 4 ] 700,000,050 [ bounty 5 ] 667,000,050 [ bounty 6 ] 239,000,000 [ bounty 7 ] 30,000,000 [ bounty 8 ] The Straw Hat Pirates , also known as the Mugiwara Pirates , Straw Hat Crew or  simply the Straw Hats , are an extremely infamous and powerful pirate crew under the captaincy of Monkey D. Luffy that originated from the East Blue . First referred to with this moniker by Smoker in Arabasta , [ 13 ] the crew made its way through the first half of the Grand Line within a year of Luffy beginning his pirating career, rapidly becoming more infamous and attracting powerful enemies and allies alike. Luffy, as well as his right hand Roronoa Zoro , were both recognized as Super Rookies with bounties of over 100,000,000. However, following a total defeat in the aftermath of the Celestial Dragon Hit-and-Run Incident , the crew was separated by Bartholomew Kuma and Luffy made the decision to have them train separately for two years to increase their strength for the New World . [ 14 ] The crew successfully reunited after this time and reached the New World, where they have continued in exploits sending shockwaves throughout the world. As founding members of the Ninja-Pirate-Mink-Samurai Alliance , they played a central role in the overthrow of Kaidou and Big Mom of the Four Emperors , and following this Luffy was recognized as one of the Emperors. [ 15 ] Of their many allies, the Straw Hats are most prominently tied to the Straw Hat Grand Fleet whose members officially professed their service to Luffy during the Dressrosa Arc , giving the crew over 5600 subordinates at their command if necessary. [ 16 ] Each Straw Hat member under Luffy is officially recognized as a Senior Officer of the Grand Fleet. [ 17 ] The crew sailed on the Going Merry , [ 18 ] their first official ship , up until the Water 7 Arc . During the Post-Enies Lobby Arc , Franky and Iceburg built them a new ship, which was named the Thousand Sunny by Iceburg. [ 19 ] Being led by main protagonist Luffy, they are the central protagonist group of the manga and anime One Piece .

name: Su
intro_text: Su is a Cloud Fox and pet of Conis . [ 1 ]

name: Stussy
occupation: Spy; Cipher Pol Agent (undercover, former); Empress of the Underworld
epithet: Queen of the Pleasure District ( 歓楽街の女王 , Kanraku-gai no Joō ? )
intro_text: Stussy is MADS ' first-ever successful clone , having been modeled after Miss Buckingham Stussy . [ 5 ] She is a masked agent of CP0 , [ 9 ] although she is actually a spy employed by Dr. Vegapunk and spent years working deeply undercover in the World Government until she was forced to discard her cover, [ 3 ] during which she was allegedly killed by another agent . [ 10 ] Additionally, while acting as an agent, she operated as an emperor of the Underworld under the epithet " Queen of the Pleasure District ". [ 1 ] Initially, she was a minor antagonist of the Egghead Arc , but later became a major ally to Vegapunk and the Straw Hat Pirates when her background and true allegiance were revealed.

name: Sugamichi and Warazane
japanese_name: スガミチ; ワラザネ
intro_text: Sugamichi and Warazane [ 2 ] are two land-dwelling catfish ridden by Fujin and Raijin , respectively. [ 1 ]

name: Sukare Karehosui
japanese_name: スーカレ・カレホスイ
intro_text: Sukare Karehosui is a member of the Germ Pirates and the younger sister of Sukare Tainen . [ 2 ] [ 3 ]

name: Sukare Tainen
intro_text: Sukare Tainen [ 3 ] is the captain of the Germ Pirates and the older brother of Sukare Karehosui . [ 2 ]

name: Sugamichi
japanese_name: スガミチ; ワラザネ
intro_text: Sugamichi and Warazane [ 2 ] are two land-dwelling catfish ridden by Fujin and Raijin , respectively. [ 1 ]

name: Sugar
intro_text: Sugar is a special officer of the Donquixote Pirates ' Trebol Army. [ 2 ] She was one of the most integral components of Doflamingo 's plan in keeping Dressrosa in line, as any dissenters were turned into toys by her Hobi Hobi no Mi powers. She is also the younger sister of Monet . [ 7 ] Due to her actions and role, she is a supporting antagonist during the Dressrosa Arc .

name: Sukune
intro_text: Sukune is a yokozuna -ranked sumo wrestler from Wano Country . He is the older brother of Urashima . [ 1 ]

japanese_name: スコシバ・カニシトール

name: Suke
intro_text: Suke [ 2 ] is a gangster who is a member of the Kyoshiro Family in Wano Country . [ 1 ]

name: Sun God
affiliation: Straw Hat Grand Fleet ( New Giant Warrior Pirates ), Land of Gods , Buggy's Delivery (former)
alias: "Sun God" ( 太陽神 , Taiyō-shin ? )
intro_text: Road is a giant from Elbaph [ 3 ] who is the navigator of the New Giant Warrior Pirates and was formerly an S-Class ranked mercenary for Buggy's Delivery . [ 1 ] In addition, he rules over a personal diorama full of entrapped humans and giant animals as its " Sun God ". [ 4 ] He is the older brother of Bjorn . [ 7 ] He served as a minor antagonist in the beginning of the Elbaph Arc , but later became an ally of the Straw Hat Pirates .

intro_text: Sun Pirates Statistics Japanese Name: タイヨウの海賊団 Romanized Name: Taiyō no Kaizokudan Official English Name: Sun Pirates First Appearance: Chapter 620 ; Episode 540 [ 1 ] Captain: Fisher Tiger ; (Deceased) † Jinbe (Former) ‡ Main Ship: Snapper Head (Destroyed) † Stolen Marine Ship (Former) ‡ Total Bounty: Unknown [ bounty 1 ] [ 2 ] [ 3 ] At least 438,000,000 [ bounty 2 ] [ 4 ] At least 250,000,000 [ bounty 3 ] [ 5 ] At least 306,000,000 [ bounty 4 ] [ 6 ] The Sun Pirates , sometimes known as the Fish-Man Pirates ( 魚人海賊団 , Gyojin Kaizoku-dan ? ) , are a pirate crew formed by the late Fisher Tiger . [ 7 ] The crew is notable for having Jinbe and Arlong as part of its members, the former eventually becoming the second captain of the crew, and later, one of the Seven Warlords of the Sea . This crew split apart into three factions eleven years ago: the Sun Pirates under Jinbe, the Arlong Pirates under Arlong, and the Macro Pirates under Macro . The Sun Pirates were pardoned by the World Government when Jinbe became a Warlord of the Sea , but lost the pardon when he abdicated his title. They later went to serve under Emperor Big Mom until Jinbe rebelled and joined the Straw Hat Pirates .

name: Sunbell
intro_text: Sunbell [ 2 ] is a fish-man and former member of the Roger Pirates . [ 1 ]

name: Super Rookie
intro_text: Super Rookie Statistics Japanese Name: 超新星 Romanized Name: Sūpā Rūkī Official English Name: Super Rookie; Supernova First Appearance: Chapter 498 ; Episode 392 [ 1 ] Literal meaning: Supernova Super Rookie , also called Supernova ( 超新星 , Chōshinsei ? ) , [ 1 ] [ 2 ] [ 3 ] is a term that is used to refer to certain rookie pirates who have managed to earn a bounty of over 100,000,000. The term has been used particularly in the context of the Sabaody Archipelago , the final destination of all pirates seeking to enter the New World . [ 1 ] While there is a large overlap in members, Super Rookies are distinct from the Worst Generation , a group of twelve infamous pirates who emerged right before the Summit War of Marineford two years ago.

name: Super Spot-Billed Duck Troops
english_name: Supersonic Duck Squadron Super Spot-Billed Duck Troops ( OPCG )
intro_text: Super Spot-Billed Duck Troops Statistics Japanese Name: 超カルガモ部隊 Romanized Name: Chō Karugamo Butai Official English Name: Supersonic Duck Squadron Super Spot-Billed Duck Troops ( OPCG ) First Appearance: Chapter 180 ; Episode 111 [ 1 ] Affiliation: Arabasta Kingdom Leader(s): Karoo The Super Spot-Billed Duck Troops [ 2 ] are a family of seven Super Spot-Billed Ducks (and later one camel) who serve the kingdom of Arabasta . They are led by their captain Karoo , and are reputed to be the fastest troop in the kingdom of Arabasta . [ 1 ] All of the ducks have the strange theme of wearing different types of hats and various other jewelry and clothing. Also strange was that the last member to join the squad, Matsuge , is a camel who helped the Straw Hats confront Baroque Works .

name: Suleiman
affiliation: Beautiful Pirates ; Underworld (former); Straw Hat Grand Fleet
epithet: "Suleiman the Beheader" ( 首はねスレイマン , Kubi-hane Sureiman ? )
intro_text: Suleiman the Beheader is a war criminal who joined as a gladiator at the Corrida Colosseum to compete for the Mera Mera no Mi . [ 1 ] He eventually joined the Beautiful Pirates , serving under Cavendish . [ 3 ] He is an ally of Luffy during the Dressrosa Arc .

name: Superhuman Domingos
intro_text: Buggy Pirates Statistics Japanese Name: バギー海賊団 Romanized Name: Bagī Kaizokudan Official English Name: Buggy's Band of Pirates First Appearance: Chapter 8 ; Episode 4 [ 1 ] Captain: Buggy [ 2 ] ; Alvida (former, temporary during Buggy's second absence) [ 3 ] ; Richie (former, temporary during Buggy's first absence) [ 4 ] Main Ship: Big Top Total Bounty: At least 3,320,000,000 [ bounty 1 ] At least 144,000,000 [ bounty 2 ] 20,000,000 [ bounty 3 ] 15,000,000 [ bounty 4 ] The Buggy Pirates are a band of pirates led by Buggy , a former Roger Pirates apprentice . Initially an undistinguished (albeit feared) presence in the East Blue , it began pursuing a vendetta after being defeated by the Straw Hat Pirates , and followed them into the Grand Line . Since then, several unlikely circumstances and Buggy 's constantly-revolving fortunes have repeatedly overhauled it: first into an alliance with the Alvida Pirates , then into the Seven Warlords -affiliated Buggy's Delivery , [ 5 ] and finally into the Four Emperors -affiliated Cross Guild . [ 6 ] Due to their actions and role, they serve as the main antagonists of the Orange Town Arc , the protagonists of the Buggy's Crew Adventure Chronicles mini-arc, co-antagonists (alongside Smoker and his Marine unit ) in the Loguetown Arc , and side-characters in the Jaya Arc . After the timeskip , they have made tertiary appearances throughout the Dressrosa Arc , the Zou Arc , and the Wano Country Arc .

name: Surume
intro_text: Surume [ 4 ] is a kraken [ 7 ] and famous giant creature which dwells in the deepest parts of the ocean . [ 1 ] He was enslaved by the New Fish-Man Pirates , but later became the pet of Monkey D. Luffy , who was the one who gave Surume his name. [ 7 ]

name: Syrup Village
intro_text: Syrup Village Statistics Japanese Name: シロップ村 Romanized Name: Shiroppu-mura English Name: Syrup Village First appearance: Chapter 23 ; Episode 8 Region: Gecko Islands Syrup Village , a peaceful settlement located on the Gecko Islands , is the birthplace of Usopp . This is the main location of the Syrup Village Arc .

name: Sweet Pea
intro_text: Sweet Pea is a member of the Kuja tribe living on the island Amazon Lily . [ 1 ] During the timeskip, she became a member of the Kuja Pirates . [ 2 ]

name: Tacos
intro_text: Tacos is the king of the Shishano Kingdom and one of fifty monarchs who took part in the Levely . [ 1 ]

name: Suzume
intro_text: Suzume [ 2 ] is a rooster living in the Tower of Justice . [ 1 ]

name: Tabuhachiro
intro_text: Tabuhachiro is a samurai and an ally of the Kouzuki Family . [ 3 ] After waiting 20 years for the return of the Nine Red Scabbards , he affiliated with the Ninja-Pirate-Mink-Samurai Alliance to raid Onigashima . [ 1 ] [ 2 ]

name: T Bone
occupation: Marine Vice Admiral ; Marine Rear Admiral (promoted); Marine Captain (promoted); Knight (former)
epithet: "Ship Cutter" ( 船斬り , Funekiri ? , Funimation: "Ship Slasher")
intro_text: "Ship Cutter" T Bone [ 5 ] was a Marine Vice Admiral . [ 3 ] As a Marine Captain two years ago, he was a minor antagonist during the Water 7 Arc and confronted the Straw Hat Pirates on the Sea Train route to Enies Lobby . Prior to joining the Marines , he was a royal knight. [ 2 ] Sometime around the Egghead Arc , T Bone was killed in the Pepe Kingdom for the bounty he received from the Cross Guild . [ 3 ]

intro_text: Tajine Kingdom Statistics Japanese Name: タジン王国 Romanized Name: Tajin Ōkoku English Name: Tajine Kingdom First appearance: Chapter 905 ; Episode 882 (mentioned) [ 1 ] The Tajine Kingdom is a nation somewhere in the world that is ruled by Queen Mororon . [ 1 ]

name: Taka

name: Takao

name: Takoyaki 8
intro_text: Takoyaki 8 Statistics Japanese Name: タコヤキ 8 Romanized Name: Takoyaki Eito Official English Name: Takoyaki 8 Debut: Chapter 227 ( cover ); [ 1 ] Episode 390 Affiliation: Hatchan Status: Active Takoyaki 8 is a ship stand run by Hatchan near his home at Fish-Man Island . Built by a community of catfish , it is the home base for Hatchan's takoyaki selling business.

name: Takotopus Pirates
intro_text: Takotopus Pirates Statistics Japanese Name: タコトパス海賊団 Romanized Name: Takotopasu Kaizokudan Official English Name: Cephaloctopus Pirates First Appearance: Chapter 553 ; Episode 467 [ 1 ] Captain: Karma The Takotopus Pirates [ 2 ] are a pirate crew led by Karma . They were a subordinate crew of the Whitebeard Pirates prior to Whitebeard's death. [ 1 ]

name: Take
intro_text: Take is a carp fish-man and is a member of the Arlong Pirates . [ 1 ] He is the commander of parties . [ 3 ]

name: Tamachibi
intro_text: Tamachibi is a child Dr. Kureha healed while she was in Cocoa Weed . He lives with his father, who is the owner of Stool , a restaurant in town. [ 1 ] [ 2 ]

name: Tamanegi
intro_text: Tamanegi is a former member of the Usopp Pirates , along with Ninjin and Piiman , before Usopp joined the Straw Hat Pirates . [ 1 ] He is an ally of the Straw Hat Pirates during the Syrup Village Arc .

name: Tama
intro_text: Kurozumi Tama , [ 2 ] commonly known as O-Tama ( お玉 ? ) , is a girl from the region of Kuri in Wano Country . She is a kasa weaver working under Tenguyama Hitetsu , [ 1 ] as well as a kunoichi in training under the apprenticeship of Shinobu . [ 6 ] She is the last known survivor of the Kurozumi Family . [ 2 ] Tama befriended Portgas D. Ace four years ago, having wished to join his crew at the time. She is a major ally of the Ninja-Pirate-Mink-Samurai Alliance during the Wano Country Arc .

name: Tamago
epithet: "Baron Tamago" ( タマゴ男爵 , Tamago Danshaku ? )
intro_text: Baron Tamago [ 2 ] (also known as Viscount Hiyoko and Count Niwatori in his second and third form respectively) is a knight-ranked combatant of the Big Mom Pirates , [ 4 ] who originates from the Longleg Tribe . He and his partner Pekoms were responsible for collecting the monthly payment of sweets from Fish-Man Island in exchange for Big Mom 's protection. [ 1 ] Due to his actions and role, he is a minor antagonist in the Fish-Man Island Arc and Dressrosa Saga , and a supporting antagonist in the Whole Cake Island Saga .

name: Tamikebao
intro_text: Tamikebao [ 3 ] is a retainer of the Kurozumi Family [ 2 ] and a checkpoint guard at the dock between the Flower Capital and Kuri regions of Wano Country . [ 1 ]

name: Tanaka
devil_fruit_english_name: Through-Through Fruit (Funimation) Phase-Phase Fruit ( Treasure Cruise , BStation )
intro_text: Tanaka-san is the security guard of Gran Tesoro and an executive member of Gild Tesoro 's crew. He appeared in One Piece Film: Gold as well as its filler arc and TV special . [ 4 ]

name: Tamagon
affiliation: Galley-La Company (Zambai's Company Union); Franky Family (former)
intro_text: Tamagon [ 3 ] is a ship dismantler from Water 7 . Initially part of the Franky Family , he is now working for the Galley-La Company as part of the Zambai's Company Union.

name: Tank Lepanto
intro_text: Tank Lepanto is the commander of Dressrosa 's Self-Defense Army. [ 2 ] He joined as a gladiator at the Corrida Colosseum to compete for the Mera Mera no Mi . [ 1 ]

name: Tararan
occupation: General Zombie ; Commander of the Spider Mice
intro_text: Tararan was a General Zombie and the Commander of the Spider Mice on Thriller Bark . He was the one that had caught the Thousand Sunny in his webs, forcing the Straw Hat Pirates to enter the island. [ 1 ] Due to his actions and role, he is a minor antagonist in the Thriller Bark Arc .

name: Taroimo

name: Taro

name: Tate

name: Tansui
intro_text: Tansui is a member of the Macro Pirates [ 1 ] and a former member of the Sun Pirates . [ 3 ] He is an arowana fish-man . [ 4 ]

name: Tea IV
intro_text: Tea IV [ 3 ] is the king of the Eigis Kingdom on the Grand Line and one of fifty monarchs who took part in the Levely . [ 2 ] [ 3 ]

name: Tashigi
occupation: Captain ; Ensign (former); Master Chief Petty Officer (former)
intro_text: Captain Tashigi [ 5 ] is a Marine officer serving under Vice Admiral Smoker in the base of G-5 , [ 2 ] as well as a member and Captain of G-5 Branch's Unit 01. She was originally introduced as a Master Chief Petty Officer in Loguetown [ 3 ] but was promoted to Ensign [ 4 ] after the events in Arabasta . [ 9 ] During the timeskip, she was promoted to Captain . [ 2 ] Due to her actions, she can be considered a supporting antagonist during the Loguetown Arc , but she and Smoker temporarily teamed up with the Straw Hats during the end of the Arabasta Saga and the Punk Hazard Arc .

name: Tensei
occupation: Director of the Marine Bureau of Investigation
alias: "Kurouma" ( 黒馬 , Kurouma ? , literally meaning "Black Horse")
intro_text: Tensei , also known by his Marine alias Kurouma , is the director of the Marine Bureau of Investigation . [ 1 ]

name: Tegata Ringana

name: Tenjo-Sagari
intro_text: Tenjo-Sagari [ 2 ] is a Gifter in the Beasts Pirates who works under Black Maria . [ 1 ]

name: Terracotta
intro_text: Terracotta is Igaram 's wife and the royal head chef who appeared very late in the Arabasta Arc . She is also the royal seamstress. [ 1 ] Her friend and helper is Maidy . [ 3 ]

name: Terry
intro_text: Terry is a bartender at a pub in Mock Town . [ 1 ] He is not named in the manga , but his name was given in the databooks. [ 2 ]

name: Tenguyama Hitetsu
residence: Wano Country ( Amigasa Village , formerly Flower Capital )
alias: "Tenguyama Hitetsu" ( 天狗山飛徹 , Tenguyama Hitetsu ? )
intro_text: Kouzuki Sukiyaki [ 6 ] is the former shogun of Wano Country . He is the father of the late daimyo of Kuri , Kouzuki Oden , as well as the grandfather of current shogun Kouzuki Momonosuke and Hiyori . The descendant of the legendary swordsmith Kotetsu , he is a swordsmith by hobby [ 7 ] and crafted one of Roronoa Zoro 's swords, Sandai Kitetsu , [ 8 ] as well as Ame no Habakiri , which was previously wielded by Oden and currently by his son, Momonosuke. Around three decades before the present day, he was deposed from the shogunate and imprisoned by the usurper Kurozumi Orochi . Escaping sometime after Oden's execution 20 years ago, Sukiyaki went into hiding and lived as a hermit under the name Tenguyama Hitetsu ; he resided in Amigasa Village in Kuri and raised the young girl Kurozumi Tama as his ward. [ 1 ] After Orochi was overthrown and his grandson Momonosuke took power, Sukiyaki revealed his identity to his family and their retainers, but chose to remain hidden from the general public due to his shame over what he allowed to happen to Wano. [ 9 ]

name: Terry Gilteo
intro_text: Terry Gilteo [ 2 ] is an intelligence controller ( 情報管制官 , Jōhō kansei-kan ? ) of the Revolutionary Army and was stationed at their headquarters on Baltigo . [ 2 ] [ 1 ]

name: Thalassa Lucas
intro_text: Thalassa Lucas is the former king of the Ilisia Kingdom , a country in West Blue . [ 3 ] [ 1 ] [ 4 ]

name: Thatch
intro_text: Thatch [ 5 ] was the 4th division commander , [ 1 ] as well as the head chef of the Whitebeard Pirates . [ 2 ] He was murdered by Marshall D. Teach for his Devil Fruit . [ 1 ]

name: The Eleven Supernovas
intro_text: Worst Generation Statistics Japanese Name: 最悪の世代 Romanized Name: Saiaku no Sedai Official English Name: Worst Generation First Appearance: Chapter 498 ; Episode 392 [ 1 ] Total Bounty: At least 15,977,000,000 [ Bounty 1 ] 6,727,600,000 [ Bounty 2 ] 2,152,000,000 [ Bounty 3 ] The Worst Generation are a collection of twelve infamous pirates who emerged immediately before the beginning of the Summit War of Marineford . They consist of the eleven super rookies who were present at the Sabaody Archipelago just before said war, and the then- Warlord Blackbeard , who soon became one of the Four Emperors . [ 2 ] They are notorious for the bold actions they committed against the World Government , [ 1 ] and have played a large role in the world's biggest conflicts since the Summit War, causing them to be regarded as "problem children" who have been key players in the New Age of the Great Pirate Era. [ 2 ]

name: Thormann
intro_text: Thormann [ 2 ] is a member of the Giant Warrior Pirates . He serves as a minor ally during the Egghead Arc , and, after being converted into a demon , a minor antagonist during the Elbaph Arc .

name: Thriller Bark Pirates
japanese_name: スリラーバーク海賊団
intro_text: Thriller Bark Pirates Statistics Japanese Name: スリラーバーク海賊団 Romanized Name: Surirā Bāku Kaizokudan Official English Name: Thriller Bark Pirates First Appearance: Chapter 446 ; Episode 340 [ 1 ] Captain: Gecko Moria Main Ship: Thriller Bark Total Bounty: At least 320,000,000 [ bounty 1 ] The Thriller Bark Pirates [ 2 ] is the second pirate crew captained by the former Warlord , Gecko Moria . They are the main antagonist group in the Thriller Bark Arc .

name: Thriller Bark
intro_text: Thriller Bark Statistics Japanese Name: スリラーバーク Romanized Name: Surirā Bāku Official English Name: Thriller Bark Debut: Chapter 443 ; Episode 338 [ 1 ] Affiliation: Thriller Bark Pirates Status: Active Thriller Bark is the world's largest ship [ 2 ] and the former home of the Thriller Bark Pirates , led by the former Warlord Gecko Moria . [ 3 ] Originally an island from the West Blue , it was somehow converted into a pirate ship and sailed to the Florian Triangle , [ 1 ] [ 4 ] where it lurked within the thick fog for 10 years. [ 5 ] The ship was heavily damaged during the battle against the Straw Hat Pirates , [ 6 ] and the Thriller Bark Pirates abandoned it after Moria's defeat. [ 7 ] It was later reclaimed by Moria, who used it to travel to Hachinosu in the New World . [ 8 ] However, it is unknown what happened to it after Moria was imprisoned by the Blackbeard Pirates . [ 9 ] Thriller Bark is the main setting of the Thriller Bark Arc , as well as the ninth island in Paradise that the Straw Hat Pirates visited.

name: Thriller Bark Victim's Association
japanese_name: スリラーバーク被害者の会
english_name: Thriller Bark Victims' Club Thriller Bark Victim Association (Funimation subs)
intro_text: Thriller Bark Victim's Association Statistics Japanese Name: スリラーバーク被害者の会 Romanized Name: Surirā Bāku Higaisha no Kai Official English Name: Thriller Bark Victims' Club Thriller Bark Victim Association (Funimation subs) First Appearance: Chapter 448 , Episode 343 [ 1 ] Occupation: Resistance Group Leader(s): Spoil (Chairman) Total Bounty: At least 24,000,000 [ bounty 1 ] Residency: Thriller Bark (formerly) Allies: Straw Hat Pirates Affiliates: Rolling Pirates The Thriller Bark Victim's Association is a group of people that banded together after having their shadows stolen by the former Warlord of the Sea , Gecko Moria .

name: Thunder Soldier
alias: "Thunder Soldier of Rage" ( 怒りの雷兵 , Ikari no Kaminari Hei ? , Viz: "The Angry Lightning Soldier") ; "The Invincible Gladiator"
intro_text: Kyros [ 7 ] is a legendary gladiator who fought in the Corrida Colosseum until he left to become captain of the royal army of Dressrosa. [ 8 ] He was later turned into a toy , causing everyone to forget his existence, becoming a One-Legged Soldier ( 片足の兵隊 , Kata-ashi no Heitai ? ) , also known as the " Thunder Soldier of Rage ". [ 9 ] He is the former captain of the Riku Royal Army ( リク王軍 , Riku Ō Gun ? ) , [ 10 ] [ 11 ] the father of Rebecca , [ 12 ] the husband of Scarlett , and the son-in-law of Riku Doldo III . [ 13 ] He spent ten years as a toy before being freed by the success of his own Operation SOP . [ 14 ] After helping bring down the Donquixote Pirates , Kyros currently lives with Rebecca. [ 15 ] He is an ally of the Straw Hat Pirates during the Dressrosa Arc .

name: Tokijiro
intro_text: Tokijiro is a resident of the Flower Capital in Wano Country . He once possessed the blueprints to Kaidou 's fortress on Onigashima . [ 1 ]

name: Tokikake
alias: Chaton ( 茶豚 , Chaton ? , literally meaning "Brown Pig")
intro_text: Tokikake , [ 2 ] better known by his alias Chaton , is a Marine vice admiral . [ 1 ]

name: Toko
intro_text: Toko is a girl who lives in the Flower Capital of Wano Country and is under the care of Kouzuki Hiyori . She is the adopted daughter [ 2 ] of the late former daimyo of Hakumai , Shimotsuki Yasuie , [ 3 ] and thus a member of the Shimotsuki Family . [ 4 ] She worked as a kamuro for Hiyori, who was living as the courtesan "Komurasaki", until Toko angered Shogun Kurozumi Orochi and was driven out of the Flower Capital. [ 1 ] After the Beasts Pirates ' fall from power and Orochi's death, she returned to live in the Flower Capital with Hiyori. [ 5 ]

name: Tightrope Walking Funan Bros
intro_text: Buggy Pirates Statistics Japanese Name: バギー海賊団 Romanized Name: Bagī Kaizokudan Official English Name: Buggy's Band of Pirates First Appearance: Chapter 8 ; Episode 4 [ 1 ] Captain: Buggy [ 2 ] ; Alvida (former, temporary during Buggy's second absence) [ 3 ] ; Richie (former, temporary during Buggy's first absence) [ 4 ] Main Ship: Big Top Total Bounty: At least 3,320,000,000 [ bounty 1 ] At least 144,000,000 [ bounty 2 ] 20,000,000 [ bounty 3 ] 15,000,000 [ bounty 4 ] The Buggy Pirates are a band of pirates led by Buggy , a former Roger Pirates apprentice . Initially an undistinguished (albeit feared) presence in the East Blue , it began pursuing a vendetta after being defeated by the Straw Hat Pirates , and followed them into the Grand Line . Since then, several unlikely circumstances and Buggy 's constantly-revolving fortunes have repeatedly overhauled it: first into an alliance with the Alvida Pirates , then into the Seven Warlords -affiliated Buggy's Delivery , [ 5 ] and finally into the Four Emperors -affiliated Cross Guild . [ 6 ] Due to their actions and role, they serve as the main antagonists of the Orange Town Arc , the protagonists of the Buggy's Crew Adventure Chronicles mini-arc, co-antagonists (alongside Smoker and his Marine unit ) in the Loguetown Arc , and side-characters in the Jaya Arc . After the timeskip , they have made tertiary appearances throughout the Dressrosa Arc , the Zou Arc , and the Wano Country Arc .

name: Tibany
intro_text: Tibany [ 5 ] is an okama from Momoiro Island . He and the other okama chased after Sanji and attempted to convert him into an okama. [ 2 ] In the anime, he was called Elizabeth ( エリザベス , Erizabesu ? ) .

name: Tom's Workers
intro_text: Tom's Workers Statistics Japanese Name: トムズワーカーズ Romanized Name: Tomuzu Wākāzu Official English Name: Tom's Workers First Appearance: Chapter 353 ; Episode 248 [ 1 ] Affiliation: Water 7 [ 1 ] Occupation: Shipwrights [ 1 ] Leader(s): Tom Tom's Workers was one of the ship companies that worked in Water 7 . It was headed by a fish-man known as Tom . Kokoro was the secretary, and Franky and Iceburg were the apprentices. Tom's pet, a giant frog named Yokozuna , was also considered a member. Tom's Workers was known for its incredibly talented members, as both Franky and Iceburg were skilled enough to respectively become the shipwright of the Straw Hat Pirates and the head of Water 7's most important naval company; Tom himself was known as the best shipwright in the whole world. [ 1 ]

name: Tonjil
origin: Grand Line ( Long Ring Long Land )
intro_text: Tonjil [ 2 ] is Tonjit 's grandson and Tonsfer 's brother. [ 1 ]

name: Tomatito
intro_text: Tomatito [ 2 ] is a musician who lives in Dressrosa . [ 1 ]

name: Tomozo
intro_text: Tomozo [ 2 ] is a shopkeeper in the Wano Country 's Flower Capital who operated 41 years ago. [ 1 ]

name: Tilestone
intro_text: Tilestone is one of the five foremen of Dock One of the Galley-La Company in Water 7 . Tilestone is the last of the foremen to be formally introduced in the story, [ 2 ] although he is present from the first scene Galley-La is shown in. [ 1 ] His specialties are cabinetry, caulking, and flag making. [ 2 ] He became an ally of the Straw Hat Pirates during the end of the Water 7 Arc and the beginning of the Enies Lobby Arc .

name: Tonjit
origin: Grand Line ( Long Ring Long Land )
intro_text: Tonjit is an elderly nomad belonging to a tribe that lives on Long Ring Long Land . [ 1 ]

name: Tonsfer
origin: Grand Line ( Long Ring Long Land )
intro_text: Tonsfer [ 2 ] is Tonjit 's granddaughter and Tonjil 's sister. [ 1 ]

name: Tontatta Kingdom
intro_text: Tontatta Kingdom Statistics Japanese Name: トンタッタ王国 Romanized Name: Tontatta Ōkoku English Name: Kingdom of Tontatta First appearance: Chapter 711 ; Episode 641 [ 1 ] Region: Green Bit , New World [ 1 ] The Tontatta Kingdom is a kingdom underneath Green Bit , and home to the Tontatta Tribe ( トンタッタ族 , Tontatta-zoku ? ) , a tribe of dwarves ruled by king Gancho . [ 1 ]

name: Tom
intro_text: Tom [ 4 ] was a long-horned cowfish fish-man known as the greatest shipwright in the world, particularly for building the Roger Pirates ' ship, the Oro Jackson . [ 5 ] He was also the older brother of Den , a fellow fish-man shipwright. As the head of Tom's Workers , Tom was pivotal to the redevelopment of Water 7 , directly mentoring both Iceburg [ 4 ] and Franky and laying groundwork for what would become the Galley-La Company . His ultimate innovation, the Sea Train , impressed even the World Government into pardoning his associations with Pirate King Gol D. Roger . However, in order to protect his apprentices from a frame-up orchestrated by CP5 's Spandam , Tom renounced this pardon and was taken to Enies Lobby , presumably to be executed shortly after. [ 6 ]

name: Tonoyasu
alias: "Tonoyasu" ( トの康 , Tonoyasu ? )
epithet: "Yasu the Hedgehog" ( ハリネズミの康 , Harinezumi no Yasu ? )
intro_text: Shimotsuki Yasuie , [ 5 ] also known as " Yasu the Hedgehog ", Tonoyasu , or just Yasu ( ヤス , Yasu ? ) , was a member of the Shimotsuki Family and a taikomochi who lived in Ebisu Town near the capital of Wano Country . [ 1 ] He was the adoptive father of Toko . [ 4 ] Back when the Kouzuki Family ruled over Wano Country , Yasuie served as the daimyo of Hakumai . [ 3 ] Twenty years after Kurozumi Orochi 's takeover of Wano, Yasuie sacrificed himself in an effort to mislead the shogun's forces and enable Kouzuki Momonosuke 's revolution to continue. [ 6 ]

name: Tontatta Pirates
intro_text: Tontatta Pirates Statistics Japanese Name: トンタッタ海賊団 Romanized Name: Tontatta Kaizokudan Official English Name: Tontatta Pirates First Appearance: Chapter 799 ; Episode 745 [ 1 ] Captain: Leo [ 1 ] Main Ship: Usoland The Tontatta Pirates , [ 2 ] formerly known as Tonta Corps ( トンタ兵団 , Tonta Heidan ? ) [ 1 ] , are the armed forces of the Tontatta Tribe formed in order to commence Operation SOP , and later, reformed as a pirate crew. [ 3 ] They are composed of 200 dwarves under the command of Leo , forming the fifth ship of the Straw Hat Grand Fleet . [ 4 ] They are allies of the Straw Hat Pirates during the Dressrosa Arc , and also one of the central characters from The Stories of the Self-Proclaimed Straw Hat Grand Fleet Cover Page Serial.

name: Topknot
intro_text: Topknot [ 1 ] [ 4 ] is a Sea King . [ 2 ] It is one of the six Sea Kings that speak to Shirahoshi when she fully manifests the power of Poseidon . [ 5 ]

name: Tori
intro_text: Tori is a member of the Blackbeard Pirates . [ 2 ]

name: Torino Kingdom
intro_text: Torino Kingdom Statistics Japanese Name: トリノ王国 Romanized Name: Torino Ōkoku English Name: Birdie Kingdom First appearance: Chapter 524 ; Episode 419 Region: South Blue The Torino Kingdom is an island in the South Blue that some call "Treasure Island" ( 宝島 , Takarajima ? ) . [ 1 ] It is a relatively small island with a huge tree growing in the middle of it. At first glance, the island seems savage, and its inhabitants seem primitive. In reality however, the locals have an extensive library and the great tree in the middle of the island is covered in plants that are excellent for making various medicines. Tony Tony Chopper was sent here by Bartholomew Kuma during the events in the Sabaody Archipelago Arc . He spent two years here in order to train.

name: Topman Warcury
japanese_name: トップマン・ウォーキュリー聖
occupation: Co-Head of the World Government (Public) ; Warrior God of Justice ( 法務武神 , Hōmu Bushin ? , English versions: "Godhead of Justice")
intro_text: Saint Topman Warcury [ 3 ] [ 4 ] is a World Noble and one of the Five Elders who publicly head the World Government , [ 1 ] holding the title of Warrior God of Justice . [ 3 ] Due to his actions and role, he is one of the secondary antagonists of the Egghead Arc . Along with the other Elders, he is one of the main antagonists of the Final Saga and one of the overarching antagonists of the One Piece series.

name: Torasaburo
intro_text: Torasaburo was a tiger created by Kurozumi Kanjuro using the power of the Fude Fude no Mi . It was created to aid him, Kin'emon , and Bariete scale Zunesha 's leg to reach Zou , fading away after it achieved its goal. [ 1 ]

name: Toto
intro_text: Toto is Koza 's father and Goro 's older brother, who lives in Yuba . [ 1 ]

name: Toyama Tsujigiro
intro_text: Toyama Tsujigiro [ 2 ] is a Wano Country government official who lives in the Flower Capital . [ 3 ] He is also a serial killer who attacked strangers at night. [ 1 ]

name: Tosa
intro_text: Tosa [ 3 ] is a Marine Vice Admiral and one of the nine that took part in the Egghead Incident . [ 1 ] He serves as a minor antagonist in the Egghead Arc .

name: Tony Tony Chopper
japanese_name: トニートニー・チョッパー
affiliation: Straw Hat Pirates ; Straw Hat Grand Fleet ; Foxy Pirates (former, temporary); Ninja-Pirate-Mink-Samurai Alliance (disbanded)
alias: "Chopa-emon" ( チョッパえもん , Choppaemon ? , English versions: Chopperemon)
epithet: "Cotton Candy Lover" ( わたあめ大好き , Wataame Daisuki ? )
intro_text: Tony Tony Chopper , also known as "Cotton Candy Lover" Chopper , [ 6 ] is the doctor of the Straw Hat Pirates and one of the Senior Officers of the Straw Hat Grand Fleet . [ 2 ] He is the sixth member of the crew and the fifth to join, doing so at the end of the Drum Island Arc . He was temporarily forced to join the Foxy Pirates during the Long Ring Long Land Arc but was quickly returned to Luffy 's crew. Chopper is a reindeer that ate the Hito Hito no Mi , a Devil Fruit that allows its user to transform into a human hybrid at will. He was taught medicine on Drum Island by his two parental figures, Doctors Hiriluk and Kureha . Chopper aims to travel all across the world in the hopes of accomplishing his dream of being able to cure any disease. Chopper gained his first bounty of 50 after the incident at Enies Lobby , having been mistaken for the Straw Hats' pet . After the Dressrosa Arc , it was increased to 100, then to 1,000 following the Raid on Onigashima . [ 2 ]

name: Trafalgar D. Water Law
japanese_name: トラファルガー・ D ・ワーテル・ロー
affiliation: Heart Pirates ; Clan of D. ; Ninja-Pirate-Mink-Samurai Alliance (disbanded); Seven Warlords of the Sea (revoked); Donquixote Pirates (defected)
occupation: Pirate Captain ; Doctor ; Warlord of the Sea (former)
epithet: "Surgeon of Death" ( 死の外科医 , Shi no Gekai ? )
intro_text: Trafalgar D. Water Law , [ 17 ] more commonly known as just Trafalgar Law ( トラファルガー・ロー , Torafarugā Rō ? ) and by his epithet as the "Surgeon of Death" , is a pirate from the North Blue and the captain and doctor of the Heart Pirates . [ 1 ] [ 6 ] He is one of twelve pirates who are referred to as the " Worst Generation ". [ 1 ] [ 18 ] He became one of the Seven Warlords of the Sea during the timeskip, [ 2 ] but his position was revoked for allying with the Straw Hat Pirates . [ 13 ] Like many other pirates, Law has dreams of finding the One Piece , while also desiring to know the purpose of the Will of D. [ 19 ] [ 20 ] Law is the only known survivor of Flevance , a town whose inhabitants suffered from a condition known as Amber Lead Syndrome . Because the disease was fatal and poorly understood, Flevance was destroyed by neighboring countries out of fear (including Law's parents and younger sister ), with a young Law barely escaping alive. [ 7 ] He subsequently joined the Donquixote Pirates , where Donquixote Doflamingo intended to make Law one of his executive officers. [ 21 ] However, thanks to the efforts of Doflamingo's brother, Rosinante , Law was freed from the Donquixote Pirates' influence and became a pirate set to bring down Doflamingo's empire. As part of his plan, he allied himself with Monkey D. Luffy , and together they not only defeated Doflamingo, but also two of the Four Emperors . During the timeskip , his bounty increased from 200,000,000 [ 1 ] to 440,000,000 [ 2 ] before it was frozen due to his induction into the Seven Warlords of the Sea. However, after having his title revoked during the events of the Dressrosa Arc , Law's bounty was reinstated and raised to 500,000,000. [ 13 ] Eventually, his bounty would be raised to 3,000,000,000 for his role in taking down Big Mom of the Four Emperors alongside Eustass Kid during the Wano Country Arc . [ 12 ] Law joins forces with the Straw Hat Pirates for a brief moment during the Sabaody Archipelago Arc and later on saves Luffy 's life at the very end of the Marineford Arc . He is one of the central allies of the Straw Hat Pirates during the Punk Hazard , Dressrosa , Zou , and Wano Country Arcs. He also acts as an ally of the Straw arcs Pirates during the movies One Piece: Stampede and One Piece Film: Red .

name: Totts
intro_text: Totts [ 3 ] [ 4 ] is a member of the Bonney Pirates . He was once a resident of the Sorbet Kingdom , having been a friend of Bartholomew Kuma and Ginny since childhood. After the Summit War of Marineford , he was arrested by Admiral Akainu following his crew's defeat against the Blackbeard Pirates .

name: Tristan
intro_text: Tristan [ 2 ] is a squirrel mink [ 1 ] and one of Inuarashi 's subjects, [ 3 ] until Carrot took the throne of Mokomo Dukedom .

name: Totto Land
intro_text: Totto Land Statistics Japanese Name: 万国 Romanized Name: Totto Rando English Name: Totto Land First appearance: Chapter 651 ; Episode 571 [ 1 ] Region: New World Affiliates: Big Mom Pirates Totto Land [ 2 ] is an archipelago in the New World . It constitutes the main territory of one of the former Emperors , Big Mom , and her crew, the Big Mom Pirates , which extends around Whole Cake Island . [ 3 ] It is navigable with a New World Log Pose . [ 4 ] According to Pekoms , it is considered one large, powerful nation, and Big Mom as its queen wants it to become a utopia that unifies all races of the world. [ 3 ] [ 4 ] Totto Land is the general setting for the Whole Cake Island Arc .

name: Tritoma
occupation: Empress of Amazon Lily ; Pirate Captain
intro_text: Tritoma is a former empress of the Kuja tribe, succeeding Shakuyaku and preceding Boa Hancock . She died years ago, as a victim of Love Sickness . [ 1 ] [ 4 ]

name: Tritobu
intro_text: Tritobu [ 2 ] is the prince of the Nagagutsu Kingdom . He accompanied his father Furrari to the Levely . [ 1 ]

name: Tsugaru Umi
intro_text: Tsugaru Umi [ 2 ] is a woman who trained Nico Robin to perform as a geisha. [ 3 ] She lives in the Flower Capital of the Wano Country . [ 1 ]

name: Tsumonsieur Kamaya
intro_text: Tsumonsieur Kamaya [ 2 ] is a former CP9 agent. [ 1 ]

name: Tsukimi
intro_text: Dr. Tsukimi was an old man who appeared in Enel 's cover story . [ 1 ]

name: Trebol
occupation: Pirate Executive Officer; Staff Officer; Sugar 's Bodyguard
intro_text: Trebol [ 6 ] is one of the top three officers of the Donquixote Pirates , acting as a Staff Officer. [ 7 ] He occupies the Club seat of the Donquixote Family and is the leader of the crew's Trebol Army subdivision. [ 8 ] [ 9 ] He is also personally responsible for fostering Donquixote Doflamingo 's cruelty from a young age, making him the indirect cause of an inhumanly large amount of evil and suffering brought about by Doflamingo's wrath. Because of this, he can be considered a major antagonist in the Dressrosa Arc with a greater influence and impact than what is first suggested in his initial appearances.

name: Tsunagoro
epithet: "Broken Hat Tsunagoro" ( 破れ笠綱ゴロー , Yabure-gasa Tsunagorō ? , VIZ: "Split-Hat Tsunagoro")
intro_text: "Broken Hat" Tsunagoro is a yakuza boss who was in charge of the Hakumai region in Wano Country . He was imprisoned in Udon by the Beasts Pirates , but was freed when Luffy took over the prison. [ 3 ] [ 2 ]

name: Tsunokkov
intro_text: Tsunokkov [ 3 ] is a former prisoner of Impel Down and resident of Newkama Land in Level 5.5. He is one of Emporio Ivankov 's dancers. [ 2 ]

name: Tsurube
epithet: "Careless Tsurube" ( うっかりツル兵衛 , Ukkari Tsurubē ? )
intro_text: "Careless" Tsurube was a retainer of the Kurozumi Family [ 2 ] [ 3 ] who burned to death after accidentally falling into the boiling oil prepared for Kouzuki Oden 's execution . [ 1 ]

name: Tsurujo
residence: Wano Country ( Okobore Town, Kuri (former); Flower Capital )
intro_text: Tsurujo , [ 3 ] [ 4 ] commonly known as O-Tsuru ( お鶴 ? , VIZ: "Otsuru") , is a tea house owner from the Wano Country , [ 2 ] as well as the wife of Kin'emon . [ 5 ]

name: Tsurue Monnosuke
intro_text: Tsurue Monnosuke [ 2 ] is the machi-bugyō of the Flower Capital . [ 1 ]

name: Tulip Pirates
intro_text: Tulip Pirates Statistics Japanese Name: チューリップ海賊団 Romanized Name: Chūrippu Kaizokudan Official English Name: Tulip Pirates First Appearance: Chapter 151 ( cover ) [ 1 ] Captain: Yurikah The Tulip Pirates are a group of pirates that appeared in Jango 's cover story . [ 1 ]

name: Turco
intro_text: Turco [ 4 ] is a member of the Fake Straw Hat Crew and masqueraded as Franky . [ 2 ] When the crew switched to posing as the Kid Pirates , Turco impersonated Wire . [ 5 ]

name: Twin Cape
intro_text: Twin Cape Statistics Japanese Name: 双子岬 Romanized Name: Futago Misaki English Name: Twin Capes First appearance: Chapter 102 ; Episode 62 [ 1 ] Region: Red Line Twin Cape , sometimes called the Twin Lighthouses ( ふたごとう台 , Futago Tōdai ? ) , [ 2 ] is located at the bottom of Reverse Mountain , at the exit that leads into Paradise . The area is located precisely where the Red Line and the Grand Line meet. From here, sailors can choose one of the seven routes of the Grand Line by waiting for the Log Pose to set on the desired one. [ 3 ] As the base of Reverse Mountain, Twin Cape's northern lighthouse acts as the setting of the Reverse Mountain Arc .

intro_text: Tsuru , known as the "Great Staff Officer" , is a renowned Marine Vice Admiral , [ 1 ] as well as the grandmother of Kujaku . [ 6 ]

name: Ubau
intro_text: Ubau [ 2 ] was the God of Skypiea roughly 400 years ago. His desire to live on the Vearth the Shandia had called home initiated a war between the Skypieans and Shandia that would last over 400 years. [ 1 ]

name: Uholisia
first_appearance: SBS Volume 77 ; Chapter 877 ( cover ); Episode 710 (fantasy); Episode 1123
intro_text: Uholisia is the daughter of Chichilisia , the leader of the Niho Navy . [ 5 ] She is the wife of 25 men and Sai 's former fiancée. [ 3 ]

name: Ukkari Hot-Spring Island
intro_text: Ukkari Hot-Spring Island Statistics Japanese Name: うっかり温泉島 Romanized Name: Ukkari Onsen Shima English Name: Unexpected Hot Spring Island First appearance: Chapter 315 ( cover ) Region: Paradise Ukkari Hot-Spring Island is an island located somewhere in Paradise , and where Gedatsu landed after being defeated in Skypiea . [ 1 ]

name: Ukon
intro_text: Ukon is a samurai who allied with the Kouzuki Family . [ 2 ] After waiting 20 years for the return of the Nine Red Scabbards , he affiliated with the Ninja-Pirate-Mink-Samurai Alliance to raid Onigashima . [ 1 ]

name: Ucy
english_name: Moocy (VIZ Media, FUNimation dub); Usy (FUNimation simulcast); Bullcy (FUNimation subs)

intro_text: "Brutal Bull" Ucy [ 2 ] is a fighting bull ( 闘牛 , Tōgyū ? ) that regularly competed as a gladiator in Dressrosa 's Corrida Colosseum , where he was befriended (and named) by Monkey D. Luffy . [ 1 ] [ 4 ] He serves as an ally to Luffy during the Dressrosa Arc .

name: Uni
intro_text: Uni [ 2 ] is a member of the Heart Pirates . [ 1 ]

name: Underworld
intro_text: Underworld Statistics Japanese Name: 裏社会 Romanized Name: Urashakai Official English Name: Underworld First Appearance: Chapter 103 ; Episode 62 [ 1 ] The Underworld is an interlinked collection of illegal businesses, institutions, and connections that elude the World Government 's control. While such operations may exist anywhere, the largest and most infamous is based mainly in the New World . [ 2 ]

name: Ulti
devil_fruit_name: Ryu Ryu no Mi, Model: Pachycephalosaurus
intro_text: Ulti [ 5 ] is a former member of the Tobiroppo , the six strongest Shinuchi of the Beasts Pirates . [ 6 ] She is the elder sister of fellow former Tobiroppo Page One , and the daughter of a former Warlord of the Sea , Hanafuda . [ 7 ] [ 8 ] Due to her actions and role, she is a supporting antagonist in the Wano Country Arc . Following the downfall of the Beasts Pirates however, Ulti swore loyalty to Yamato for saving her and Page One from Who's-Who and became one of his allies in the Oni Child Yamato's Golden Harvest Surrogate Pilgrimage Cover Page Serial. [ 2 ]

name: Unknown Pirate Crew
intro_text: Roger Pirates Statistics Japanese Name: ロジャー海賊団 Romanized Name: Rojā Kaizoku-dan Official English Name: Roger Pirates First Appearance: Chapter 19 ; Episode 8 [ 1 ] Captain: Gol D. Roger Main Ship: Oro Jackson Total Bounty: Over 5,564,800,000 [ bounty 1 ] The Roger Pirates were the pirate crew of the late Pirate King , Gol D. Roger . They were, and remain, the only known crew to traverse the entirety of the Grand Line and reach its final island Laugh Tale . Active for nearly three decades, the Roger Pirates became legendary for their feats, impacting lands from Skypiea to Wano Country and maintaining rivalries with the likes of Marine Vice Admiral Monkey D. Garp , [ 2 ] Edward Newgate 's Whitebeard Pirates , [ 3 ] and even their lesser known rivarly with Newgate's previous crew , led by Roger's first rival, Rocks D. Xebec . Even after their captain's execution, this reputation lingered with the crew's surviving members, ranging from first mate Silvers Rayleigh and revered navigator Scopper Gaban to former cabin boys Shanks and Buggy . The first introduction to their crew comes from Buggy, who recalls his days with Shanks as apprentices in their crew. [ 1 ] Their captain, Roger, is the first character introduced in the series. [ 4 ]

name: Urashima
intro_text: Urashima is a yokozuna -ranked sumo wrestler of Wano Country 's Flower Capital. [ 1 ] He is also of samurai class, thus giving him an elevated social status. [ 2 ] He is also the younger brother of Sukune . [ 3 ] Due to his actions and role, he is a minor antagonist of the Wano Country Arc .

name: Unigaro
intro_text: Unigaro [ 2 ] was a Wild Zombie who lived on Thriller Bark . [ 3 ]

name: Urbain
intro_text: Urbain [ 2 ] is a giant that Kouzuki Oden encountered in his travels.

name: Uraya Mashikatta
intro_text: Uraya Mashikatta [ 2 ] is a pirate . [ 1 ]

name: Urban
intro_text: Urban [ 3 ] is a Marine Vice Admiral and one of the nine Vice Admirals that took part in the Egghead Incident . [ 1 ] He serves as a minor antagonist in the Egghead Arc .

name: Ushiano
intro_text: Ushiano is a cattle mink , the deputy commander of the Revolutionary Army 's West Army, and the assistant of Morley . [ 1 ] [ 2 ]

name: Usakkov
occupation: Dancer, Prisoner of the Great Prison (former)
intro_text: Usakkov [ 3 ] is a former prisoner of Impel Down and resident of Newkama Land in Level 5.5. He is one of Emporio Ivankov 's dancers. [ 2 ]

name: Urouge
epithet: "Mad Monk" ( 怪僧 , Kaisō ? )
intro_text: Urouge , [ 6 ] nicknamed the Mad Monk , is a pirate hailing from a sky island and high priest of the Fallen Monk Pirates . [ 1 ] He is one of twelve pirates referred to as the " Worst Generation ", [ 7 ] and prior to the two-year timeskip had a bounty of 108,000,000. [ 1 ]

name: Usagihebi
affiliation: Animals of the Island of Rare Animals
intro_text: Usagihebi [ 2 ] is an animal who lives on the Island of Rare Animals . [ 1 ] Like all the animals on the island, he is protected by Gaimon . [ 3 ]

name: Usopp Pirates
english_name: Usopp Pirates (VIZ, Funimation); Veggie Pirates (4Kids); The Gang of Usopp (Odex); Usopp's Pirate Crew ( OPCG )

[ 2 ] It was then reformed as a "Security Force" by the rest of its original members. [ 3 ] [ 4 ]

occupation: Daimyo ; Samurai ; Retainer of the Kouzuki Family (former); Yakuza Boss (former); Money Changer (former); Thief (former)
residence: Wano Country ( Flower Capital ) Wano Country ( Kibi )
alias: "Kyoshiro" ( 狂死郎 , Kyōshirō ? ) "Ushimitsu Kozo" ( 丑三つ小僧 , Ushimitsu Kozō ? , Meaning "Witching Hour Boy")
epithet: "Dozing Kyoshiro" ( 居眠り狂死郎 , Inemuri Kyōshirō ? , VIZ: "Napping Kyoshiro")
intro_text: Denjiro is a samurai from Wano Country and one of the Nine Red Scabbards who served as Kouzuki Oden 's retainers. [ 7 ] He currently serves as the daimyo of Kibi . [ 4 ] After becoming grief-stricken over Oden's execution 20 years ago, Denjiro's facial structure changed, and he started going under the name Kyoshiro . With this new identity, he became a yakuza boss and recruited followers to form the Kyoshiro Family . Eventually, he started working for Oden's usurper, shogun Kurozumi Orochi , as his money changer and bodyguard; he would successfully keep his true allegiance to the Kouzuki Family a secret and bide his time until the Scabbards finally reunited to take down Orochi and Kaidou . [ 2 ] [ 1 ] [ 8 ] Apart from his Kyoshiro identity, Denjiro would disguise himself at night to rob the wealthy Flower Capital citizens and give to the poor residents of Ebisu Town , earning him the moniker "Ushimitsu Kozo" . He also took care of Oden's daughter Kouzuki Hiyori for the past 13 years, raising her to become the oiran Komurasaki. [ 2 ]

name: Usopp
affiliation: Straw Hat Pirates ; Straw Hat Grand Fleet ; Usopp Pirates (disbanded); Ninja-Pirate-Mink-Samurai Alliance (disbanded)
occupation: Sniper ; Senior Officer ; Toad Oil Salesman (temporary)
alias: "Sogeking" ( そげキング , Sogekingu ? ) " Hana Arashi " "Usoland" ( ウソランド , Usorando ? ) "Uso-hachi" ( ウソ八 , Usohachi ? , English versions: Usohachi)
epithet: "King of Snipers" ( 狙撃の王様 , Sogeki no Ō-sama ? , "Sniper King" (VIZ)) ; "God" ( ゴッド , Goddo ? ) ;
intro_text: "God" Usopp [ 10 ] is the sniper of the Straw Hat Pirates and one of the Senior Officers of the Straw Hat Grand Fleet . [ 2 ] He is the fourth member of the crew and the third to join, doing so at the end of the Syrup Village Arc . Although he left the crew during the Water 7 Arc , he rejoined at the end of the Post-Enies Lobby Arc . [ 17 ] Usopp is the son of Yasopp and the late Banchina . He was born and raised in Syrup Village , serving as " captain " of the Usopp Pirates and being Kaya 's close friend. After working with the Straw Hats to defeat Kuro and the Black Cat Pirates , he was invited to join the crew. Despite his usual cowardice, Usopp dreams of becoming a brave warrior of the sea just like his father and lives every day in pursuit of living up to this dream. He first gained a bounty of 30,000,000 under his Sogeking persona after the incident at Enies Lobby . After the Dressrosa Arc , Usopp gained a bounty of 200,000,000 under his real name. Following the Raid on Onigashima , his bounty was increased to 500,000,000. [ 2 ]

name: Usunoro
intro_text: Usunoro is a Shinuchi [ 1 ] [ 2 ] of the Beasts Pirates and part of the Armored Division led by Sasaki . [ 3 ]

name: Uwattsura
intro_text: Uwattsura [ 2 ] is a Waiter of the Beasts Pirates who serves as a chief guard in the Prisoner Mine of the Udon region.

name: Uzu
intro_text: Uzu is a child who was held captive in Punk Hazard 's Biscuits Room . [ 2 ] He was freed with the rest of the children by the Straw Hat Pirates . [ 1 ]

name: Utan Divers
japanese_name: ウータン・ダイバーズ
intro_text: The Utan Divers are a group of divers who composes the Shoujou Pirates on Shoujou 's ship, the Utan Sonar . They each have a specific Diver Number. [ 1 ]

name: Uta
first_appearance: Chapter 1055 (flashback); One Piece Film: Red ; Episode 1029
intro_text: Uta is a world -famous diva ( 歌姫 , Utahime ? ) and the adopted daughter of the Emperor Red-Haired Shanks , being a musician in his crew . In the filler Uta's Past Arc , she met and befriended Monkey D. Luffy in Foosha Village when they were both children. [ 6 ] Left behind on Elegia by the Red Hair Pirates to become a singer, Uta trained under the guardianship of the island's former king Gordon for ten years. She then rapidly rose to worldwide success over the last two years, but after coming to learn of the suffering pirates had inflicted on her fans, she concocted a plan to end the Great Pirate Era and create a "New Genesis" where everyone would live in peace in her " Uta World " for eternity. After facing resistance to this plan, Uta ended up summoning the demonic entity Tot Musica , which was defeated by an alliance led by Luffy and Shanks. Remorseful at her actions, Uta rejected a life-saving medicine in order to return everyone from Uta World, leaving her status unknown. [ 7 ] She is the main antagonist of One Piece Film: Red .

name: Uzuki Tempura
intro_text: Uzuki Tempura was a samurai who, as a member of the Uzuki Family , served as the daimyo of the Udon region [ 2 ] until he was imprisoned and killed by Kaidou 20 years ago. [ 1 ]

name: Uzuki Namida
intro_text: Uzuki Namida [ 2 ] is a samurai and a member of the Uzuki Family who was formerly imprisoned in the Udon Prisoner Mine . [ 1 ]

name: Vegapunk Atlas
intro_text: Atlas , also designated as Punk-05 ( PUNK-05 , Panku-Faibu ? ) , is one of the six satellites of Dr. Vegapunk , embodying his emotions of frustrations and stress which was relieved through "violence". [ 1 ] She is a major ally of the Straw Hat Pirates during the Egghead Arc .

name: Vegapunk
first_appearance: Chapter 684 ; Episode 610 (shadowed) Chapter 1061 ; Episode 1090 (satellite) Chapter 1066 ; Episode 1096
alias: "Stella" ( 本体 , Sutera ? , kanji literally meaning "Main Body")
epithet: "The Man With the Best Brain in the World" ( 世界一の頭脳を持つ男 , Sekaiichi no Zunō o Motsu Otoko ? , VIZ: "The Smartest Man in the World")
intro_text: Dr. Vegapunk was the leading scientist of the SSG in the employment of the Marines . His work included discovering the secrets and uses of seastone , the secrets of how Devil Fruit powers work, the co-discovery of the Lineage Factor and its applications, the creation of the Pacifista and Seraphim , and various other scientific achievements that are said to be at least 500 years ahead of current technology . [ 10 ] [ 11 ] He hailed from the technologically advanced Karakuri Island [ 5 ] [ 12 ] and resided on Egghead , where his laboratory is located. [ 6 ] Before being employed under the World Government , Vegapunk had been the director of an outlaw scientific research team known as MADS . The team was eventually arrested, and Vegapunk was later integrated into the Marines as its head scientist after MADS' dissolution. [ 4 ] During his tenure at Egghead, he created six copies, or "satellites", of himself, each embodying an aspect of his personality. However, when one of his satellites, York , betrayed him by revealing to the World Government that Vegapunk was researching the Void Century , they dispatched CP0 and conspired with her to eliminate him, which resulted in the monumental Egghead Incident . [ 13 ] [ 14 ] Vegapunk was killed by his old friend, Admiral Kizaru , during the ensuing Buster Call on Egghead. [ 15 ] Foreseeing his assassination, however, Vegapunk left behind an important message to be broadcasted around the world regarding a catastrophic global future event. [ 16 ] He was survived by all six of his satellites: most ascended with Punk Records into the clouds, York remained with the World Government, and Lilith escaped with the Straw Hat Pirates and is attempting to resurrect Vegapunk via cloning . [ 17 ] First mentioned during the Post-Enies Lobby Arc , Vegapunk was a major background character throughout the series until his proper introduction during the Egghead Arc , becoming a major ally to the Straw Hat Pirates alongside his satellites and playing a central role during its ongoings.

[ 3 ] Due to his actions and role, he is a minor antagonist in the Jaya Arc , a supporting antagonist in the Impel Down and Marineford Arcs , a minor antagonist in the Egghead Arc , and a major antagonist in the Final Saga .

name: Vegapunk Edison
intro_text: Edison , also designated as Punk-03 ( PUNK-03 , Panku-Surī ? ) , is one of the six satellites of Dr. Vegapunk , embodying his aspect of "thinking". [ 3 ] He is a major companion and ally to the Straw Hat Pirates during the Egghead Arc .
