name: Vasco Shot
occupation: Titanic Captain (Captain of the Eighth Ship); Prisoner of the Great Prison (former)
epithet: "Heavy Drinker" Vasco Shot ( 大酒のバスコ・ショット , Ōzake no Basuko Shotto ? )
intro_text: Vasco Shot , [ 8 ] monikered "Heavy Drinker" , [ 3 ] is one of the Ten Titanic Captains of the Blackbeard Pirates , serving as the captain of the eighth ship of the fleet . [ 4 ] He was originally one of several legendary criminals given a life sentence on Impel Down 's Level 6, before being freed by Marshall D. Teach and joining him. [ 3 ] [ 1 ] [ 2 ] Due to his actions and role, he is a supporting antagonist in the Marineford Arc , a minor antagonist in the Egghead Arc , and a major antagonist in the Final Saga .

name: Vegapunk Lilith
intro_text: Lilith , also designated as Punk-02 ( PUNK-02 , Panku-Tsū ? ) , is one of six satellites of Dr. Vegapunk , embodying his aspect of "evil". [ 3 ] She is a major ally of the Straw Hat Pirates during the Egghead and Elbaph Arcs , and ultimately the only Vegapunk to escape with them after the Egghead Incident . [ 4 ]

name: Vegapunk Pythagoras
intro_text: Pythagoras , also designated as Punk-04 ( PUNK-04 , Panku-Fō ? ) , is one of the six satellites of Dr. Vegapunk , embodying his aspect of "wisdom". [ 3 ] He is an ally of the Straw Hat Pirates during the Egghead Arc .

name: Vegapunk Shaka
intro_text: Shaka , also designated as Punk-01 ( PUNK-01 , Panku-Wan ? ) , is one of the six satellites of Dr. Vegapunk , embodying his aspect of "good". [ 1 ] He is a major ally of the Straw Hat Pirates during the Egghead Arc .

name: Very Good
intro_text: Very Good [ 4 ] is a Marine Captain and one of the Marines who helped to attack the Straw Hat Pirates during the Buster Call at Enies Lobby . [ 1 ]

name: Vegapunk York
intro_text: York , also designated as Punk-06 ( PUNK-06 , Panku-Shikkusu ? ) , is one of the six satellites of Dr. Vegapunk , embodying his aspect of "greed". [ 4 ] She acted as an ally to the Straw Hat Pirates at first, but was later revealed to be a traitor responsible for instigating the Egghead Incident and many of the events prior during the Egghead Arc . Due to her actions, she is a major antagonist in the aforementioned arc. After Jaygarcia Saturn 's death, York has become a World Noble and the direct subordinate to Saturn's replacement, Figarland Garling . [ 2 ]

name: Victoria Cindry
japanese_name: ビクトリア･シンドリー
intro_text: Victoria Cindry was once a famous stage actress who died after falling off the stage twelve years ago. [ 6 ] Having been infatuated with her, Dr. Hogback stole her corpse in order to make her his own personal zombie servant with the aid of Gecko Moria 's powers . [ 7 ]

name: Vincent
intro_text: Vincent is the prince of the Sankan Kingdom ( サンカン王国 , Sankan Ōkoku ? ) . [ 2 ]

name: Vice Admiral
intro_text: Vice Admiral Statistics Japanese Name: 中将 Romanized Name: Chūjō Official English Name: Vice Admiral First Appearance: Chapter 92 ; Episode 68 [ 1 ] Affiliation: Marines Vice Admiral is the third highest rank in the Marines . These officers can have varying duties and amounts of authority. For example, one Vice Admiral, John Giant , is seen to have some special authority, as he was the first in the entire Marine Headquarters to receive the report of the Buster Call and could also evidently command other Vice Admirals to dispatch. There are always at least five Vice Admirals sent with a Buster Call fleet. The general attire of a Vice Admiral is that of a Marine coat with epaulets and a suit and tie worn underneath, although there are exceptions such as, again, John Giant, who wears a gold and red uniform with a strain of medals on his chest, and later Smoker who keeps his current marine jacket, only adding to it the standard marine coat. While most Vice Admirals wear standard blue epaulets, some have customized theirs, like Garp's, which are black and red, and Tsuru's, which are purple.

[ 7 ] He was a Marine vice admiral , and head of G-5 , [ 3 ] who made his debut at Punk Hazard . [ 1 ] Due to his duplicitous conduct and allegiances, he can be considered the secondary antagonist of the Punk Hazard Arc . [ 2 ]

name: Vinsmoke Sora

She is the princess of the Germa Kingdom and a commander in its military army, Germa 66 . [ 1 ] She is an ally of the Straw Hat Pirates in the Whole Cake Island Arc and one of the central characters in Germa 66's Ahh... An Emotionless Excursion Cover Page Serial.

intro_text: Vinsmoke Ichiji , [ 7 ] also known as "Sparking Red" , [ 8 ] is the eldest son and second child of the Vinsmoke Family . [ 4 ] He is a prince of the Germa Kingdom and a commander in its military arm, Germa 66 . [ 1 ] [ 2 ] Due to his actions, he is a major antagonist during the first half of the Whole Cake Island Arc . However, he and his family became allies of the Straw Hat Pirates and the Fire Tank Pirates after realizing Big Mom deceived and intended to assassinate them. He is also one of the central characters in Germa 66's Ahh... An Emotionless Excursion Cover Page Serial.

name: Vinsmoke Sanji
affiliation: Straw Hat Pirates ; Straw Hat Grand Fleet ; Vinsmoke Family (former); Baratie (resigned); Germa Kingdom (defected); Ninja-Pirate-Mink-Samurai Alliance (disbanded)
occupation: Cook ; Senior Officer ; Sous Chef (former); Prince (former); Cart Vendor (temporary)
residence: East Blue ( Baratie ) (former); Germa Kingdom (former); Momoiro Island (former, temporary)
alias: "Mr. Prince" ( Mr. プリンス , Misutā Purinsu ? ) "San-gorou" ( サン五郎 , Sangorō ? , English versions: Sangoro) "Osoba-mask" ( おそばマスク , O-Soba Masuku ? , English versions: "Soba Mask")
epithet: "Black Leg" ( 黒足 , Kuro Ashi ? )
intro_text: "Black Leg" Sanji [ 12 ] is the cook of the Straw Hat Pirates and one of the Senior Officers of the Straw Hat Grand Fleet . [ 5 ] He is the fifth member of the crew and the fourth to join, doing so at the end of the Baratie Arc . Born as Vinsmoke Sanji , [ 21 ] the third son and fourth child of the Vinsmoke Family [ 22 ] (thus, making him a former prince of the Germa Kingdom ), [ 23 ] he disowned his family twice, once in his youth and again after reuniting with them as an adult. [ 24 ] [ 25 ] After fleeing the Vinsmokes as a child, he eventually entered the care of Zeff as the sous chef of the Baratie , where he would remain until he met Luffy , who convinced him to join his crew. His dream is to find the rumored chef's paradise, the All Blue , which is where the East Blue , West Blue , North Blue , and South Blue meet, along with their wildlife. He is one of the top three fighters of the Straw Hats, alongside Luffy and Zoro , who is referred to as the "Monster Trio". [ 26 ] [ 27 ] He first gained a bounty of 77,000,000 for his role in the raid on Enies Lobby . It increased to 177,000,000 after the Dressrosa Arc , but the condition of his bounty was changed to Only Alive due to his biological father 's interference. After he escaped from Big Mom 's territory , his bounty condition was reverted to Dead or Alive (with the Vinsmoke name despite his renouncing it), and its value increased to 330,000,000. [ 19 ] Following the Raid on Onigashima , his bounty was increased to 1,032,000,000. [ 5 ]

Later, along with his crew, he is a temporary ally of the Straw Hat Pirates during the Whole Cake Island Arc . He and his crew are also the central characters in "Gang" Bege's Oh My Family Cover Page Serial.

[ 8 ] [ 9 ] When the Donquixote Pirates took over Dressrosa, Viola joined them and adopted the name Violet , [ 1 ] working as an assassin and officer of the Trebol Army until betraying the crew. [ 2 ] [ 10 ]

name: WENP
english_name: World Economic Journal World Economy News Paper
intro_text: World Economy News Paper Statistics Japanese Name: 世界経済新聞 Romanized Name: Sekai Keizai Shinbun Official English Name: World Economic Journal World Economy News Paper [ 1 ] First Appearance: Chapter 96 [ 2 ] Occupation: Newspaper Company Leader(s): Morgans The World Economy News Paper , also called the WENP ( 世経 , Sekei ? , WEJ) and WE News for short, is the newspaper that is distributed globally via News Coo . The organization in charge of writing, printing and distributing the newspaper is presided by "Big News" Morgans , an emperor of the Underworld .

name: Vinsmoke Judge
japanese_name: ヴィンスモーク・ジャッジ
affiliation: Vinsmoke Family ; Germa Kingdom ; Germa 66 ; NEO MADS ; MADS (former)
occupation: King of the Germa Kingdom; Supreme Commander of Germa 66; Scientist ; ; Mercenary
epithet: "Garuda" ( 怪鳥 , Garūda ? )
intro_text: Vinsmoke Judge , also known as Garuda , [ 5 ] is the king of the Germa Kingdom , the supreme commander of the Germa 66 , and the patriarch of the Vinsmoke Family , being Sanji 's biological father. [ 1 ] [ 7 ] Judge is also a skilled scientist specialized in engineering and genetics, being responsible for the creation of most of Germa 66' technological advancements, including modifying his own children into super soldiers and developing the Raid Suit that supports their enhanced abilities. He is a former member of MADS , where he was a research partner to the leading World Government scientist Vegapunk and helped in co-discovering the existence of the Lineage Factor , which years later, led to him building and expanding his Kingdom's military might through the use of Cloning . [ 3 ] After escaping Totto Land , Judge and Caesar Clown , his former colleague, created NEO MADS as a successor to MADS. [ 2 ] Due to his actions, he is the secondary antagonist during the first half of the Whole Cake Island Arc . However, he and his children became allies of the Straw Hat Pirates and the Fire Tank Pirates after realizing Big Mom deceived and intended to assassinate them. [ 8 ] He is also one of the central characters in Germa 66's Ahh... An Emotionless Excursion Cover Page Serial.

name: Wallace
intro_text: Wallace [ 2 ] is a weedy stingfish fish-man and a member of the Spade Pirates . [ 1 ]

name: Waford
intro_text: Waford Current Past Statistics Japanese Name: ワフルド Romanized Name: Wafurudo English Name: Waford First appearance: One Piece Odyssey Region: New World Waford is a fallen Sky Island that the Straw Hat Pirates shipwreck on in One Piece Odyssey . Until 200 years ago, the island floated on a giant Sabao bubble ; however, the bubble was destroyed, and the island fell to the Blue Sea . [ 1 ] While unconfirmed, Nico Robin speculates that Weatheria may be partially built and influenced by remains of Waford from before it fell into the Blue Sea.

name: Wakasa
intro_text: Wakasa [ 2 ] is a resident of Bakura Town in Wano Country who runs a restaurant alongside Hiroshi ; the two of them own a tanuki named Saikoro which the sumo wrestler Urashima forced to be cooked and served to him. [ 1 ]

name: Wallem
intro_text: Wallem [ 2 ] is an infamous New World pirate captain who allied with Whitebeard . [ 1 ]

name: Wadatsumi
epithet: "Large Monk" ( 大入道 , Ōnyūdō ? , "Giant Monk" in the FUNimation subs)
intro_text: "Large Monk" Wadatsumi [ 3 ] is a giant tiger blowfish fish-man and a member of the Sun Pirates . He was formerly a member of the Flying Pirates under captain Vander Decken IX before they were defeated. [ 1 ] He was a minor antagonist during the Fish-Man Island Arc but became an ally to the Straw Hat Pirates during the Whole Cake Island Arc .

name: Wanda
affiliation: Mokomo Dukedom ; Inuarashi Musketeer Squad ; Ninja-Pirate-Mink-Samurai Alliance (disbanded)
intro_text: Wanda is a canine mink [ 6 ] of the Inuarashi Musketeer Squad , [ 2 ] previously also acting as a Kingsbird to both Inuarashi and Nekomamushi . [ 3 ] She is an ally of the Straw Hat Pirates during the Zou and Wano Country Arcs.

name: Wany
intro_text: Wany [ 2 ] is Wanda 's crocodile-boar steed. [ 1 ]

name: Wanyudo
intro_text: Wanyudo [ 2 ] is a Gifter in the Beasts Pirates , serving as Black Maria 's weapon.

name: Wanze
epithet: "Mad Wanze" ( マッドなワンゼ , Maddona Wanze ? )
intro_text: Wanze is an agent of CP7 and a cook , specializing in making ramen noodles. [ 2 ] He was one of the antagonists during the Sea Train voyage in the Water 7 Arc .

name: Warashi
intro_text: Warashi [ 2 ] is one of the Shandia warriors who fought against Enel . [ 1 ]

name: Wano Country
english_name: Land of Wano (VIZ Media - Starting with the Punk Hazard Arc; Funimation - Starting with the Zou Arc) * Wano Kingdom (Funimation - Until the Zou Arc) * Wano Country (VIZ Media - Until the Punk Hazard Arc) *
intro_text: Wano Country Present Past Statistics Japanese Name: ワノ国 Romanized Name: Wano Kuni English Name: Land of Wano (VIZ Media - Starting with the Punk Hazard Arc; Funimation - Starting with the Zou Arc) * Wano Kingdom (Funimation - Until the Zou Arc) * Wano Country (VIZ Media - Until the Punk Hazard Arc) * First appearance: Monsters (Wanted!); Chapter 793 ; Episode 736 [ 1 ] [ 2 ] Region: New World Affiliates: Straw Hat Pirates , Beasts Pirates (formerly) Wano Country [ 3 ] is a country in the New World that is unafilliated with the World Government . [ 4 ] It is located on the north side of the New World, [ 5 ] northwest of Egghead , [ 6 ] southwest of Winner Island , [ 7 ] and west of Elbaph . [ 8 ] It was previously occupied by the Beasts Pirates as their territory, under Kaidou , one of the Four Emperors . [ 9 ] For a long time it was ruled by the Kouzuki Family , [ 10 ] however, the family's usurper, Kurozumi Orochi , conspired to overthrow and supersede their shogunate with the aid of the Beasts Pirates 28 years before the present day. [ 11 ] Upon his betrayal of the Kurozumi Family, Kaidou initiated his project to transform Wano into a lawless pirate paradise. [ 12 ] However, Wano was liberated after the defeats of both Kaidou and Orochi in the Raid on Onigashima , and the Kouzuki Family was returned to power with Kouzuki Momonosuke as the current shogun. [ 13 ] Before departing Wano, Monkey D. Luffy , the man who dethroned Kaidou, gave a copy of his Jolly Roger to Momonosuke to hang somewhere in the country and announced that if big trouble came, to point to the flag, implying that Wano is allied with and under the protection of the Straw Hat Pirates . [ 14 ] Hundreds of years ago, Wano was known as the Country of Gold ( 黄金の国 , Ōgon no Kuni ? ) , [ 15 ] being once located at sea level. The Ancient Weapon Pluton is currently located under Mt. Fuji, beneath the old Wano Country. [ 16 ] [ 17 ] First mentioned by Hogback during the Thriller Bark Arc , [ 18 ] Wano is the primary setting of the Wano Country Arc .

name: Warazane
japanese_name: スガミチ; ワラザネ
intro_text: Sugamichi and Warazane [ 2 ] are two land-dwelling catfish ridden by Fujin and Raijin , respectively. [ 1 ]

name: Waruno Furishiro
intro_text: Waruno Furishiro [ 2 ] is a man who manages weapon production orders on behalf of Kurozumi Orochi in the Flower Capital of Wano Country . [ 1 ]

name: Watchdog Unit of the Law
intro_text: Watchdog Unit of the Law Statistics Japanese Name: 法の番犬部隊 Romanized Name: Hō no Banken Butai Official English Name: Courthouse Guard Dog Unit [ 1 ] First Appearance: Chapter 380 ; Episode 267 [ 2 ] Affiliation: World Government [ 2 ] Occupation: Guardians of Enies Lobby [ 2 ] Leader(s): Baskerville [ 2 ] Residency: Enies Lobby [ 2 ] The Watchdog Unit of the Law , "Law Watching Unit" ( 法番隊 , Hōbantai ? ) for short, are the first class guards at Enies Lobby under the control of Baskerville . They consist of a group of troops that wear arm blades and ride on dogs. [ 2 ]

name: Weatheria
intro_text: Weatheria Statistics Japanese Name: ウェザリア Romanized Name: Wezaria English Name: Weatheria First appearance: Chapter 523 ; Episode 418 Region: Sky Weatheria is an artificial sky island . Nami was sent here by Bartholomew Kuma during the events of Sabaody Archipelago , and spent two years on the island honing her skills.

name: Wapol
affiliation: Evil Black Drum Kingdom ; Drum Kingdom (former); Bliking Pirates (disbanded)
occupation: King of the Evil Black Drum Kingdom; President of Wapol Konzern; King of Drum Kingdom (former); Pirate ; Captain (former)
residence: Evil Black Drum Kingdom Drum Kingdom (former)
epithet: "Tin-Plate" Wapol ( ブリキのワポル , Buriki no Waporu ? , VIZ: Wapol of Tin)
intro_text: "Tin-Plate" Wapol [ 5 ] is the king of the South Blue 's Evil Black Drum Kingdom and chairman of an international toy conglomerate. [ 2 ] Originally king of the Grand Line 's Drum Island , [ 3 ] [ 4 ] Wapol fled when the Blackbeard Pirates attacked [ 9 ] (spending some time as the "captain" of his own, improvised pirate crew ) and was permanently deposed by the Straw Hat Pirates soon after. However, his chance creation of a unique "miracle" alloy allowed him to rebuild as a toy manufacturer, winning wealth and power anew and eventually securing his current kingdom with the world-famous Kinderella as consort. [ 10 ] After accidentally witnessing the Five Elders and Imu assassinating King Nefertari Cobra at the latest Levely , he went into hiding aboard "Big News" Morgans ' airship alongside Nefertari Vivi . [ 11 ] [ 12 ] He is the main antagonist of the Drum Island Arc (and by extension the ninth movie ). He is also the protagonist of the Wapol's Omnivorous Hurrah cover arc .

name: Wheel
intro_text: Wheel [ 2 ] is the prince of the South Fire Kingdom. He accompanied his father Jeep to the Levely . [ 1 ]

name: Water 7
intro_text: Water 7 Present Past Statistics Japanese Name: ウォーターセブン Romanized Name: Wōtā Sebun English Name: Water 7 Water Seven ( OPCG ) First appearance: Chapter 323 ; Episode 229 [ 1 ] Region: Paradise Log: 1 Week [ 2 ] Water 7 , known as the "Capital of Water" ( 水の都 , Mizu no Miyako ? ) , is a city in Paradise known for its shipwrights . [ 1 ] It is the main setting of the Water 7 Arc and Post-Enies Lobby Arc . The Straw Hat Pirates stopped here to trade in their gold for belly , as well as to repair the Going Merry and also to find a new shipwright for their crew. It is part of the route their log was on, heading there directly after Long Ring Long Land , making it the eighth island in Paradise that they visited.

name: Wellington
intro_text: Wellington is a North Blue pirate from around fourteen to sixteen years ago. [ 1 ]

name: Warlords
english_name: Seven Warlords of the Sea (VIZ, Funimation, 4Kids); Seven Sea Warriors (Odex); Seven Royal Seas (Manga Entertainment)
intro_text: Seven Warlords of the Sea Statistics Japanese Name: 王下七武海 Romanized Name: Ōka Shichibukai Official English Name: Seven Warlords of the Sea (VIZ, Funimation, 4Kids); Seven Sea Warriors (Odex); Seven Royal Seas (Manga Entertainment) First Appearance: Chapter 49 ; Episode 23 (seen); [ 1 ] Chapter 69 ; Episode 31 (named) [ 2 ] Literal Meaning: (Royal) Seven Martial-Seas Total Former Bounty: At least 871,000,000 [ Bounty 1 ] [ 3 ] [ 4 ] At least 1,651,000,000 [ Bounty 2 ] [ 6 ] At least 716,000,000 [ Bounty 3 ] [ 7 ] [ 8 ] At least 1,286,000,000 [ Bounty 4 ] [ 10 ] At least 1,367,000,000 [ Bounty 5 ] Affiliation: World Government (former) Occupation: Sanctioned Privateers The Seven Warlords of the Sea , or simply the Seven Warlords , were a selection of seven incredibly powerful and notorious pirates authorized by the World Government . [ 2 ] Collectively, they comprised one of the Three Great Powers keeping the world in balance. [ 15 ] After two members ( Crocodile and Donquixote Doflamingo ) were exposed and arrested for undermining important kingdoms, Marine Admiral Fujitora led a campaign against the Warlords system, and during the next Levely a majority of kings voted to abolish it entirely. As a result, all of the remaining Warlords were reverted to wanted criminals. [ 16 ] Currently, the World Government is advancing the SSG 's Seraphim as a replacement. [ 17 ] The Seven Warlords of the Sea are a major group in the overall storyline, with most of its individual members encountering the Straw Hat Pirates at many different junctures, serving as both enemies and allies.

name: Whisky Peak
english_name: Whisky Peak ( Funimation , VIZ ); Misty Peak ( 4Kids )
intro_text: Whisky Peak Statistics Japanese Name: ウイスキーピーク Romanized Name: Uisukī Pīku English Name: Whisky Peak ( Funimation , VIZ ); Misty Peak ( 4Kids ) First appearance: Chapter 106 ; Episode 64 Region: Cactus Island Whisky Peak [ 1 ] is the only city located on Cactus Island .

name: Whitey Bay
epithet: "Ice Witch" ( 氷の魔女 , Kōri no Majo ? )
intro_text: "Ice Witch" Whitey Bay is an infamous New World pirate captain who was once a member of the Whitebeard Pirates before forming her own crew subordinate to Whitebeard . [ 5 ] [ 1 ]

name: Whitebeard
japanese_name: エドワード・二ューゲート
affiliation: Whitebeard Pirates ; Rocks Pirates (former); Four Emperors
epithet: "Whitebeard" ( 白ひげ , Shirohige ? , "White Beard" in the edited dub) ; "The Strongest Man in the World" ( 世界最強の男 , Sekai Saikyō no Otoko ? ) "The Man Closest to One Piece" ( ひとつなぎの大秘宝 に最も近い男 , Wan Pīsu ni Mottomo Chikai Otoko ? )
intro_text: Edward Newgate , [ 12 ] more commonly known as "Whitebeard" , was a legendary pirate and the captain of the Whitebeard Pirates . Widely known as the "Strongest Man in the World" , he was considered the "Man Closest to One Piece " after Gol D. Roger 's death. [ 7 ] Growing up as an orphan on the island of Sphinx , Newgate went on to become a pirate, eventually joining the legendary Rocks Pirates . Sometime after the Rocks Pirates' disbanding, he went on to form his own crew, taking on the nickname "Whitebeard" and eventually becoming one of the Four Emperors that rule over the New World . [ 4 ] [ 5 ] He shared a friendly rivalry with Roger, to whom he lent one of his crewmates, Kouzuki Oden , so that Oden could help Roger discover the final island of the Grand Line , a goal that Whitebeard had no interest in. Following Roger's death, Whitebeard became recognized as the strongest man in the world, a fact complimented by having the highest active bounty whilst alive, and the second highest bounty of any pirate in history. Later in life, Whitebeard unknowingly took Roger's son, Portgas D. Ace , under his wing. After Ace was arrested by the Marines during a doomed attempt to hunt down the traitorous crew member Marshall D. Teach , Ace was to be executed by the Marines as a display to end the Great Pirate Era . Whitebeard, his crew and his allies all laid siege to Marineford to rescue Ace, resulting in the Summit War of Marineford which concluded with the deaths of both Ace and Whitebeard at the hands of Akainu and Teach, respectively. In his final moments, Whitebeard announced to the world that the One Piece did in fact exist, inspiring a new wave of pirates and effectively beginning the New Age . [ 13 ] Whitebeard was an ally of Monkey D. Luffy and a central figure overall during the Marineford Arc .

name: Wicca
affiliation: Tontatta Kingdom Scouting Unit; Straw Hat Grand Fleet
intro_text: Wicca is a female dwarf from Tontatta Kingdom beneath Green Bit . [ 2 ] She, along with other members of her kind often pose as Dressrosa 's fairies and take their "offerings". [ 1 ] She is a member of the Tontatta Pirates , the 5th Division of the Straw Hat Grand Fleet .

name: Wire
intro_text: Wire [ 4 ] is a member of the Kid Pirates . [ 1 ]

name: Wolf
intro_text: Wolf is a giant from Elbaph who works as the gym teacher at the Walrus School . [ 1 ]

name: Whitebeard Alliance
intro_text: Whitebeard Pirates Statistics Japanese Name: 白ひげ海賊団 Romanized Name: Shirohige Kaizokudan Official English Name: Whitebeard Pirates First Appearance: Chapter 154 ; Episode 91 [ 1 ] Captain: Edward Newgate (deceased) Main Ship: Moby Dick (Destroyed) † [ 2 ] Total Bounty: Main Crew: Over 7,480,000,000 [ bounty 1 ] Organization: Over 10,010,000,000 [ bounty 2 ] The Whitebeard Pirates were the pirate crew of the late Edward Newgate (better known as "Whitebeard" ), renowned as the strongest of the Four Emperors and the only pirate captain to have ever matched the Pirate King , Gol D. Roger , in battle. [ 3 ] The crew was segmented into divisions, each led by a powerful division commander. The crew also had multiple subordinate crews operating in the New World , allowing the pirate crew to function as a massive pirate fleet . In addition, they controlled several territories throughout the New World, including Fish-Man Island . Two years before the current storyline, the Whitebeard Pirates and many of their subordinate crews engaged Marine Headquarters in the legendary Summit War of Marineford over the fate of the crew's second division commander, Portgas D. Ace . Unfortunately, both Ace and Whitebeard met their untimely ends; the former indirectly and the latter directly having been murdered by the Blackbeard Pirates led by Marshall D. Teach aka "Blackbeard", who had betrayed the crew earlier on. Following this, the Whitebeard Pirates lost much of their power and influence in the New World, and many of their former territories were conquered by Blackbeard. A year later, the remaining members of the crew, led by first division commander Marco "the Phoenix", engaged the Blackbeard Pirates' full forces in the Payback War , which ended with their brutal defeat, thus leading to them disbanding and Blackbeard becoming Whitebeard's replacement within the Four Emperors. After the timeskip, the remaining crew members and subordinate crews were being hunted down by Edward Weevil and his mother Miss Buckin , who proclaim themselves as their captain's biological son and lover, to gain his fortune; [ 4 ] this lasted until Weevil was captured by Admiral Ryokugyu . [ 5 ] Around the same time, Marco and Izou supported the Ninja-Pirate-Mink-Samurai Alliance in their raid against a then-Emperor crew , which succeeded, resulting in one of the alliance leaders becoming one of the Four Emperors.

name: Woop Slap
intro_text: Woop Slap [ 3 ] is the mayor of Monkey D. Luffy 's hometown, Foosha Village . [ 1 ]

name: World Economic Journal
intro_text: Newspaper Statistics Japanese Name: 新聞 Romanized Name: Shinbun Official English Name: Newspaper First Appearance: Chapter 96 ; Episode 45 Newspapers are sources of printed news distributed both locally and worldwide, with worldwide newspapers being delivered by News Coo flying around the world. Wanted posters are often slipped into newspapers.

name: Wyper
english_name: Wyper (4Kids , Viz, Funimation); Wyler (4Kids ; Funimation edited dub)
epithet: "Berserker" ( 戦鬼 , Senki ? )
intro_text: "Berserker" Wyper [ 6 ] is the former leader of the Shandia warriors that fought to take Upper Yard back from Enel . He is the direct descendant of Kalgara . After the timeskip, he joined the God's Guards and became their leader. [ 4 ] He is an antagonist later turned ally during the Skypiea Arc . After the timeskip, he is one of God's Guards . [ 4 ]

name: World Noble
intro_text: World Noble Statistics Japanese Name: 世界貴族 Romanized Name: Sekai Kizoku Official English Name: World Noble First Appearance: Chapter 233 ; Episode 151 [ 1 ] Affiliation: World Government Occupation: Global -class Nobles Leader(s): Five Elders [ 1 ] The World Nobles , also known as the Celestial Dragons ( 天竜人 , Tenryūbito ? , literally meaning "Heavenly Dragon Folk") , are the aristocratic descendants of nineteen of the First Twenty who established what is now known as the World Government . Due to their actions and role, they are among the major overarching antagonists of the series. Many of the series' antagonists, including the Five Elders , Knights of God , Doflamingo , and Charlos , are all members of the World Nobles (or were, in the case of Doflamingo).

name: Yama
intro_text: Yama is a Birkan and the commander of the Divine Soldiers under Enel . [ 2 ] He is a supporting antagonist during the Skypiea Arc .

name: Yamakaji
intro_text: Vice Admiral Yamakaji [ 4 ] is a Marine officer, and one of the five vice admirals who led the Buster Call on Enies Lobby . [ 1 ]

name: Who's-Who
affiliation: Beasts Pirates ( Tobiroppo ); Who's-Who Pirates (former); CP9 (former);
occupation: Shinuchi ; Pirate ; Captain (former); Prisoner (former); Cipher Pol Agent (former)
epithet: "Who of the Droplets" ( 飛沫のフー , Shibuki no Fū ? )
devil_fruit_name: Neko Neko no Mi, Model: Saber Tiger
intro_text: Who's-Who , [ 9 ] also known as Who of the Droplets , [ 3 ] is a pirate who acted as one of the Tobiroppo , the strongest six Shinuchi of the Beasts Pirates , prior to Kaidou 's fall from power after the Raid on Onigashima . [ 10 ] Over a decade ago, he served as an agent of CP9 before his failure to guard the Gomu Gomu no Mi led to his dismissal from service and imprisonment. [ 4 ] Upon escaping, Who's-Who turned to piracy, becoming captain of the Who's-Who Pirates before eventually joining the Beasts Pirates. [ 5 ] [ 3 ] Due to his actions and role, Who's-Who is a supporting antagonist in the Wano Country Arc and the Oni Child Yamato's Golden Harvest Surrogate Pilgrimage cover story.

name: World Government
intro_text: World Government Statistics Japanese Name: 世界政府 Romanized Name: Sekai Seifu Official English Name: World Government First Appearance: SBS Volume 8 (mentioned) [ 1 ] Chapter 142 ; Episode 91 (shown) [ 2 ] Affiliation: Blue Planet Occupation: Global aristocratic totalitarian regime (absolute monarchy) Leader(s): Nerona Imu (King; de facto) Five Elders (Highest Authorities; de jure) World Nobles (Ruling Class) Kong (Commander-in-Chief) Residency: Mary Geoise (Capital) Affiliates: Marines Cipher Pol Seven Warlords of the Sea (formerly) God's Knights Impel Down Status: Active The World Government is a federation of over 170 nations that governs most of the world . [ 3 ] Founded by an alliance of 20 kingdoms eight centuries ago, it has vastly grown in influence since. [ 4 ] Its capital is the land of Mary Geoise atop the Red Line intersecting the Grand Line , although the government maintains official facilities and bases across the world. In the public's view, the World Government is an oligarchy ruled over by the aristocratic descendants of its founders known as the World Nobles , chief among them the Five Elders , alongside a limited representative council of local rulers known as the Levely . Despite claims to be decentralized with no single ruler, founder Nerona Imu secretly holds total authority over the government as King of the World . [ 5 ] [ 6 ] The government oversees the Marines , Cipher Pol , and Seraphim , which serve as peacekeeping and military forces; it previously oversaw the Seven Warlords of the Sea before their dissolution. The standards and objectives of the World Government naturally put it at odds with lawless pirates , and it has historically oppressed numerous islands and groups; thus, it serves as overarching antagonists of the One Piece series. The Straw Hat Pirates have come into conflict with affiliates of the World Government throughout the series, and directly declared war on the institution during the Enies Lobby Arc .

name: X Drake
affiliation: Marines ( SWORD ); Drake Pirates ; Beasts Pirates ( Tobiroppo , former); Barrels Pirates (defected); Ninja-Pirate-Mink-Samurai Alliance (disbanded)
occupation: Captain of SWORD ; Pirate (undercover); Captain (undercover); Shinuchi (undercover, former); Marine Rear Admiral (former)
alias: Dory ( ドリィ , Dorii ? , English version: Drie)
epithet: "Red Flag" ( 赤旗 , Akahata ? )
devil_fruit_name: Ryu Ryu no Mi, Model: Allosaurus
intro_text: "Red Flag" X Drake (pronounced as "Diez Drake") is the captain of the Marine Secret Special Unit SWORD . In order to go undercover as a pirate , he publicly defected from his position as rear admiral [ 8 ] and founded the Drake Pirates . [ 2 ] [ 1 ] He is one of twelve pirates referred to as the " Worst Generation ", [ 13 ] and before the two-year timeskip had a bounty of 222,000,000. [ 1 ] Drake is the son of the Marine-turned-pirate Diez Barrels , and was affiliated with the Barrels Pirates until he defected to the Marines. As a young adult, he was called Dory . [ 6 ] [ 14 ] In Drake's endeavor as an undercover spy, [ 2 ] he and his crew became subordinate to the Beasts Pirates , led by Kaidou of the Four Emperors , over the two-year timeskip. [ 3 ] Drake served as one of the crew's Shinuchi , specifically one of strongest six called Tobiroppo . [ 4 ] His treachery was eventually uncovered, however, leading him to ally himself with the Ninja-Pirate-Mink-Samurai Alliance . [ 5 ]

name: Yamanba
intro_text: Yamanba [ 2 ] is a Gifter of the Beasts Pirates who works under Black Maria . [ 1 ]

name: Yamon
intro_text: Yamon [ 1 ] was a member of the Roger Pirates until the crew's dissolution. His current whereabouts and status are unknown.

name: Yamenahare
intro_text: Yamenahare is a citizen of Pucci and the manservant to Marumieta , the daughter of Pucci's mayor, Bimine . [ 2 ] [ 1 ]

name: Yarisugi
intro_text: Yarisugi is a Marine Commodore of G-5 Unit 06. [ 1 ]

name: Yame
intro_text: O-Yame [ 2 ] is a woman who lives in Okobore Town of Kuri with her two sons, Kinbo and an unnamed infant. [ 1 ]

name: Yamato
alias: "Kouzuki Oden" ( 光月おでん , Kōzuki Oden ? )
epithet: "Oni Princess" ( 鬼姫 , Onihime ? , VIZ: "Ogre Princess")
devil_fruit_name: Inu Inu no Mi, Model: Okuchi no Makami
intro_text: Yamato is the son  of Kaidou . Born as Kaidou's daughter and groomed from a young age to be his heir, Yamato instead developed a profound admiration for the legendary samurai Kouzuki Oden . After Oden's death, Yamato decided to become like him, impersonating him and adopting his mannerisms. As a result of this desire to emulate Oden, Yamato decided to become a man and identify as Kaidou's son, with his father and the Beasts Pirates referring to him as such as well. [ 4 ] This path has put Yamato at odds with Kaidou, with much of his life being spent imprisoned on Onigashima . [ 9 ] Yamato befriended Portgas D. Ace during his visit to Wano Country , and after learning of Ace's death waited for the arrival of his sworn brother, Monkey D. Luffy . [ 10 ] Yamato eventually met Luffy during the Raid on Onigashima , [ 11 ] during which he took a rebellious stance against his father and fought as a valuable ally to the samurai against the Beasts Pirates . [ 2 ] Initially desiring to join Luffy's crew , [ 12 ] Yamato ultimately decided to remain behind in Wano to help protect it from outside forces, though he still intends to join them in the future. [ 13 ] Yamato is a major ally of the Straw Hats during the Wano Country Arc . He also is the central character from the Oni Child Yamato's Golden Harvest Surrogate Pilgrimage Cover Page serial.

name: Yasopp
epithet: "Chaser" ( 追擊者 , Cheisā ? )
intro_text: Yasopp , [ 6 ] known as "Chaser" , [ 3 ] is one of the Senior Officers and the sniper of the Red Hair Pirates . [ 7 ] He is also the father of Usopp [ 8 ] and the widower of Banchina . [ 9 ]

name: Yazaemon
intro_text: Yazaemon [ 5 ] is a ninja and a member of the Beasts Pirates . He previously was a member of the Orochi Oniwabanshu which served the shogun of Wano Country , Kurozumi Orochi . [ 2 ] Due to his actions and role, he is a minor antagonist in the Wano Country Arc .

name: World Economy News Paper
english_name: World Economic Journal World Economy News Paper
intro_text: World Economy News Paper Statistics Japanese Name: 世界経済新聞 Romanized Name: Sekai Keizai Shinbun Official English Name: World Economic Journal World Economy News Paper [ 1 ] First Appearance: Chapter 96 [ 2 ] Occupation: Newspaper Company Leader(s): Morgans The World Economy News Paper , also called the WENP ( 世経 , Sekei ? , WEJ) and WE News for short, is the newspaper that is distributed globally via News Coo . The organization in charge of writing, printing and distributing the newspaper is presided by "Big News" Morgans , an emperor of the Underworld .

name: Yatappe
epithet: "Snake-Eyes Yatappe" ( 蛇の目の弥太っぺ , Janome no Yatappe ? )
intro_text: "Snake-Eyes" Yatappe is a yakuza boss who was in charge of the Kibi region in Wano Country . He was imprisoned in Udon by the Beasts Pirates , but was freed when Luffy took over the prison. [ 1 ] [ 2 ]

name: Yes Pirates
intro_text: Yes Pirates Statistics Japanese Name: イエス海賊団 Romanized Name: Iesu Kaizokudan Official English Name: Yes Pirates First Appearance: Chapter 96 ; Episode 48 [ 1 ] Captain: Billy [ 2 ] Total Bounty: 3,000,000 [ bounty 1 ] The Yes Pirates were a pirate crew that originated from the East Blue . [ 2 ]

name: Ylva
intro_text: Ylva is a student at the Walrus School on Elbaph . [ 1 ] She is the great-great-granddaughter of Jarul . [ 2 ]

name: Yeti Cool Brothers
epithet: "Killers of the Snowy Mountain" ( 雪山の殺し屋 , Yukiyama no Koroshiya ? )
intro_text: The Yeti Cool Brothers are Rock ( ロック , Rokku ? ) and Scotch ( スコッチ , Sukotchi ? ) , [ 2 ] [ 5 ] a pair of giant assassins who were employed by Caesar Clown . [ 1 ] They are members of a mysterious type of giant. [ 3 ] They serve as supporting antagonists of the Punk Hazard Arc .

name: Yonta Maria Grand Fleet
intro_text: Yonta Maria Grand Fleet Statistics Japanese Name: ヨンタマリア大船団 Romanized Name: Yonta Maria Dai-sendan Official English Name: Yonta Maria Fleet First Appearance: Chapter 704 ; Episode 633 [ 1 ] Admiral: Orlumbus Main Ship: Yonta Maria Total Bounty: At least 148,000,000 [ bounty 1 ] The Yonta Maria Grand Fleet is a group of 56 ships led by Orlumbus . It shares its name with its flagship, the Yonta Maria . After the defeat of Doflamingo , the flagship became the seventh ship of the Straw Hat Grand Fleet [ 2 ] [ 3 ] and with it the entire Yonta Maria Grand Fleet. They also are one of the central characters from The Stories of the Self-Proclaimed Straw Hat Grand Fleet Cover Page Serial.

name: Yokan
intro_text: Yokan [ 2 ] is a doctor assigned to treat the injured at sumo matches in Bakura Town. [ 1 ]

name: Yomo
affiliation: Mokomo Dukedom ( Inuarashi Musketeer Squad ); Ninja-Pirate-Mink-Samurai Alliance
epithet: "Pastor Yomo" ( ヨモ牧師 , Yomo Bokushi ? )
intro_text: Pastor Yomo [ 3 ] is a sheep mink and one of Inuarashi 's Musketeers . [ 1 ]

name: York
intro_text: York , also designated as Punk-06 ( PUNK-06 , Panku-Shikkusu ? ) , is one of the six satellites of Dr. Vegapunk , embodying his aspect of "greed". [ 4 ] She acted as an ally to the Straw Hat Pirates at first, but was later revealed to be a traitor responsible for instigating the Egghead Incident and many of the events prior during the Egghead Arc . Due to her actions, she is a major antagonist in the aforementioned arc. After Jaygarcia Saturn 's death, York has become a World Noble and the direct subordinate to Saturn's replacement, Figarland Garling . [ 2 ]

name: Yokozuna
intro_text: Yokozuna is a Sumo Frog that Tom's Workers kept as a pet , friend and mascot up until Tom 's execution. [ 1 ] He is a supporting character throughout the Water 7 Saga .

name: Yorki
epithet: "Calico" Yorki ( キャラコのヨーキ , Kyarako no Yōki ? )
intro_text: "Calico" Yorki was the captain of the Rumbar Pirates . 52 years ago, he and the rest of his crew traveled from the West Blue to Reverse Mountain , bringing along Laboon and leaving him at Twin Cape in Crocus ' care. [ 1 ]

name: Yotsubane
intro_text: Yotsubane [ 2 ] is one of the Shandia warriors who fought against Enel . [ 1 ]

name: Yoshimoto
intro_text: Mr. Yoshimoto is the owner of the restaurant Spice Bean . [ 2 ] [ 1 ]

name: Yosaku
intro_text: Yosaku along with Johnny are old friends and former bounty hunting partners of Roronoa Zoro . He is an ally of the Straw Hat Pirates during the Baratie Arc and the Arlong Park Arc .

name: Yu
intro_text: Yu [ 3 ] is a little girl who accidentally bumped into Smoker and got ice cream on his uniform. [ 1 ]

name: Yui
intro_text: Yui [ 2 ] was a member of the Roger Pirates until the crew's dissolution. [ 1 ] His current whereabouts and status are unknown.

name: Yuki
intro_text: Yuki [ 3 ] was a young girl over 100 years ago. She was responsible for starting the century-long duel between Dorry and Brogy . [ 1 ]

name: Yurikah
intro_text: Yurikah is the captain of the Tulip Pirates that attacked Mirrorball Island in Jango 's cover story . [ 1 ]

name: Zabo
intro_text: Zabo [ 2 ] was a man that illegally trespassed into Upper Yard and was subsequently punished by Enel during his escape. [ 1 ]

name: Zadie
intro_text: Zadie [ 2 ] was one of the archaeologists of Ohara . [ 1 ]

name: Zala
occupation: Spiders Cafe Owner ; Assassin (Former); Officer Agent (Former)
alias: Miss Doublefinger ( ミス・ダブルフィンガー , Misu Daburufingā ? , 4Kids: "Ms. New Year's Eve"; Funimation: "Miss Double Finger") Paula ( ポーラ , Pōra ? , VIZ: "Pola")
epithet: "Poison Spider Zala" ( 毒グモのザラ , Doku Gumo no Zara ? )
intro_text: "Poison Spider" Zala , [ 4 ] better known by her alias Miss Doublefinger , was the second highest ranking female officer agent in the secret organization known as Baroque Works . As an officer agent, she was partnered with Mr. 1 . [ 3 ] She also used the alias of Paula while she acted as the owner of Spiders Cafe in Arabasta . She was a major antagonist during the Arabasta Arc . After the group's dissolution, she went back to being the owner of the New Spiders Cafe alongside most of her Baroque Works colleagues. [ 7 ]

name: Zangirimaru
intro_text: Zangirimaru [ 3 ] is a former prisoner of Udon 's prisoner mines. [ 1 ] In the anime credits and closed captions, he was named Jo ( ジョー , Jō ? ) . [ 4 ]

name: Z
first_appearance: One Piece Film: Z ; Chapter 691 (cover); Episode 577
occupation: Neo Marines Supreme Commander Marine Instructor (former) Marine Admiral (former)
epithet: Black Arm Zephyr ( 黒腕のゼファー , Kokuwan no Zefā ? )
intro_text: Z ("Zed"), also known by his birth name and former epithet "Black Arm" Zephyr , was the Supreme Commander ( 総司令官 , Sōshireikan ? ) of the Neo Marines as well as a former Marine Admiral and instructor before his resignation. [ 1 ] He served as the main antagonist of One Piece Film: Z , in which he and his forces clashed with the Straw Hat Pirates as they were caught in midst of his Grand Reboot plan to destroy the New World . He was defeated by Monkey D. Luffy after several battles. Z sacrificed himself to protect his remaining subordinates and the Straw Hats from his former Marine students.

name: Zanki
intro_text: Zanki is a member of the Numbers in the Beasts Pirates , representing the number "three". [ 2 ]

name: Zambai
affiliation: Galley-La Company (Zambai's Company Union); Franky Family (former)
intro_text: Zambai is a ship dismantler from Water 7 , who was a member of the Franky Family and Franky 's right hand man. [ 1 ] After the timeskip, he, Kiev , and Tamagon have joined the Galley-La Company as Zambai's Company Union. [ 5 ] He became an ally of the Straw Hat Pirates during the end of the Water 7 Arc and the beginning of the Enies Lobby Arc , having started off as a minor antagonist in the former.

name: Zepo
intro_text: Zepo was a polar bear mink , Bepo 's older brother, [ 2 ] and a member of the Nox Pirates . He was killed by Big Mom in Totto Land five years ago after he spun her Soul Pocus Roulette . [ 1 ]

name: Zeo
epithet: "Noble of the Fish-Man District" ( 魚人街の貴族 , Gyojin-gai no Kizoku ? )
intro_text: Zeo [ 5 ] is a Japanese wobbegong fish-man [ 1 ] and the self-proclaimed " Noble of the Fish-Man District ". [ 3 ] He was an officer of the New Fish-Man Pirates before their downfall and disbandment. Due to his actions and role, he is considered to be a major antagonist in the Fish-Man Island Arc .

name: Zodia
intro_text: Zodia [ 2 ] is an infamous New World pirate captain who allied with Whitebeard . [ 1 ]

name: Zotto
intro_text: Zotto is a Marine Lieutenant and a subordinate of Vice Admiral Momonga . [ 2 ] [ 1 ]

name: Zeus
affiliation: Straw Hat Pirates ; Big Mom Pirates (defected) ; Rocks Pirates (former)
occupation: Partner ( 相棒 , Aibō ? , Viz: "Sidekick") ; Living Weapon; Servant (former)
epithet: "Zeus the Thundercloud" ( 雷雲のゼウス , Raiun no Zeusu ? )
intro_text: Zeus the Thundercloud is a homie that is fused with Nami 's Sorcery Clima-Tact . Before merging with the Clima-Tact, he was owned by Big Mom , who would summon him from her left hand. [ 3 ] Due to being made from a soul fragment from Big Mom herself, [ 8 ] he is more powerful than most homies. He was created by Big Mom in her youth, and served her into old age as one of her personal weapons alongside Prometheus and Napoleon . During the Straw Hat Pirates ' escape from Totto Land , Zeus was captured by the Straw Hats and forced to become Nami's servant. [ 9 ] He lived inside her Sorcery Clima-Tact for a brief period until he was reclaimed by Big Mom in Wano Country . [ 2 ] [ 10 ] However, Big Mom later abandoned Zeus for good after he had struggled during the battle at Onigashima, replacing him with another homie named Hera . She attempted to remove her soul fragment from him, [ 11 ] but he survived the ordeal by permanently fusing with Nami's Clima-Tact as a vessel. [ 12 ] Zeus then joined Nami for good, this time as her partner. [ 4 ]

name: Zou
intro_text: Zou Statistics Japanese Name: ゾウ Romanized Name: Zō English Name: Zou First appearance: Chapter 795 ; Episode 739 [ 1 ] Region: New World Zou [ 2 ] is an island [ 3 ] located on the back of a Naitamie-Norida elephant named Zunesha that roams the New World . [ 4 ] It is known as a "Phantom Island" ( 幻の島 , Maboroshi no Shima ? ) due to Log Poses being unable to point to it. [ 5 ] It is home to the Mokomo Dukedom of the Mink Tribe [ 6 ] as well as where the Heart Pirates resided while waiting for their captain to return from Dressrosa . [ 7 ] Zou is the third island visited by the Straw Hats in the New World, and it is the primary setting of the Zou Arc .

name: Zucca
intro_text: Zucca [ 3 ] is an infamous New World pirate captain who allied with Whitebeard . [ 2 ]

name: Zunesha
intro_text: Zunesha [ 2 ] is a Naitamie-Norida elephant [ 6 ] that was affiliated with Joy Boy 800 years ago . [ 7 ] It now wanders through the New World and carries the island of Zou on its back [ 1 ] as punishment for an unspecified crime it committed in the past. [ 8 ]

name: crows
intro_text: The Susu Susu no Mi is a Logia -type Devil Fruit that allows the user to create, control, and transform into soot at will. It was eaten by Karasu . [ 2 ]

name: Époni
intro_text: Époni is a nurse in service to the royal household of the Germa Kingdom . She was primarily charged with caring for the late queen , Vinsmoke Sora . [ 1 ]

name: Zururin
intro_text: Zururin [ 2 ] is a catfish fish-man who encountered Queen Otohime as a child 16 years ago. [ 1 ]

name: Zeff
occupation: Head Chef of Baratie , Pirate Captain (former)
epithet: "Red-Leg Zeff" ( 赫足のゼフ , Akaashi no Zefu ? , "Red Foot Zeff" (English))
intro_text: Zeff is the head chef and owner of the Baratie , as well as the adoptive father and mentor of Sanji . [ 1 ] [ 2 ] Once the feared "Red-Leg" Zeff , captain of the Cook Pirates , his notoriety ended in a storm that annihilated both his crew and ship . [ 6 ] After saving a young Sanji from this storm and co-surviving months of starvation as castaways, he launched the Baratie, raising Sanji as his trainee. He is an ally of the Straw Hat Pirates during the Baratie Arc .
